| | **We Need You!**
---
| | In order to win next year, Mike will need to spread his message from Detroit to Marquette, Saginaw to Kalamazoo, and everywhere in between! We need **YOUR** help to make sure every Michigander knows who Mike Rogers is and what he stands for. That's why we're asking that you forward this email to your friends and family and let them know about Mike's plans to fix D.C. and serve the Great Lakes State. Please follow us on [Facebook](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=5c11c89234f94e879c3e86e5ef09018b&_e=YCHub8QqKTKcOJm33t9Ot12Umjd8VcR0jsAfTYKQm9Ouh0FqZuRkNOfkdE8kvDynQzAXjgD77JB-nzmMpItYGrmbui5JPlwe1H-Cpi3AJdzaO0W_YPCjPWvyWYb4WigvCG5Gt4iAnoe2E87n-DKutlOOXbCFLdEOoYrEH6YPOSnWiIYoOcGVFkI7UhsKEX71KdfQ-kfVh9bpBpfwefzN0g75P_b83LzX8dT9lfHTpIQ%3D), [Twitter/X](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=5c11c89234f94e879c3e86e5ef09018b&_e=YCHub8QqKTKcOJm33t9Ot0dOw_o42XupE8Jw_ECZlF6Hv53dryJEogKMjHqF6oLR8BRiu0zE-I4Nb0l2MIwQlW45ryrhKZJAAevfwAt_iqG6FcUpSNV-MX9vNoW0yCNUIUHdl7hVn7ITeu__HNhWlRiBPQNGI7Rwf6lfLGO8nHIBVX3XEzkir1jN4Yko1_iVoUSt_h2CJ-Oc0i3npKT2kg%3D%3D), and [Instagram](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=5c11c89234f94e879c3e86e5ef09018b&_e=YCHub8QqKTKcOJm33t9Ot-k9LAQYAOWgF7GoSO0qaZqHjgQOymnc1iZtiXYRpzJ2K829Bt7aKdZUH-aFPJ2I7WPMuTGIOuahz-ngRo4nCBVsJiD0ZQHw6HIVHyLLiAE05SDBDm-DKmkynQRGt3WmBBChLwS61uRto2H_s7upJ9DnIXdZSiJ_v_4QJTdrVMO1KoVPmAZfbMRnLa63TG09JTRpoLQLjjVxa9ZGnFqYib4%3D) to get the latest and most up to date information from the campaign. body:
Kari Lake

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=358210c918d14a81802447e029c89627&_e=4DqbYsZL02cS7yV3MTZPOyFodmyBpoQQ4twhTG0QURBbA9ibbp80m012DSA41fcXG9YctegPsmcSC02hWtXf4Qn6HBApdzBWwmwxRUuML4aQEnN_s8OiUGItnuYckNM5vMskZ3bx3GcIY5vYE97LlkiCtk_unf2GBPiujdgNeFbAxHQiO9Euhmh8IdTidpfZMip5j9PBA2_tOTzi9gb3-bzPDTVyj88hDM_hdQvJ9nsvh03HEXsT9FGF8917ArZG9ce1boARgHA1aR19v9kMa_cOxeOBr-grg_PtFJ4At07B6OamFdar228QQnL-wcLejmhjRsha3eonXC7nrVCyuClJfUkDZkkQ1k3DKOPH61qOs2CbltS0_idw7ky4FtnH)

**FROM THE DESK OF KEN PAXTON**
Friend,

I'm honored to endorse Kari Lake -- she's a principled and uncompromising fighter for the America First movement and the state of Arizona.

Kari and I know what it feels like to be made the villain. We're stalwart defenders of the freedoms and liberties every American is entitled to -- and the left hates us for it. We've remained loyal to America First, and in return, we've been attacked, berated, slandered, and targeted by the left's political machine.

[**Our retribution will come in 2024 when we WIN BIG in America and show the left the Silent Majority stands with AMERICA FIRST.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=358210c918d14a81802447e029c89627&_e=4DqbYsZL02cS7yV3MTZPOyFodmyBpoQQ4twhTG0QURBbA9ibbp80m012DSA41fcXG9YctegPsmcSC02hWtXf4Qn6HBApdzBWwmwxRUuML4aQEnN_s8OiUGItnuYckNM5vMskZ3bx3GcIY5vYE97LlkiCtk_unf2GBPiujdgNeFbAxHQiO9Euhmh8IdTidpfZMip5j9PBA2_tOTzi9gb3-dREoHFB1vFfNPU9GLZBRXFj1UEOPnV-xmf-M57y89p8EceJmpFww1IYuvtpycTeVVKgqO7vsnF9qf3zCs6X8kFm3MhlX9yZ1UHtEdyejvF2iPqfCqDm-jz4H4aKGNlYvYTj3ofkJ8aDxuw-JG27Ti7fNW1lapzXG8EIbHqsoWUdzQrndh2RDKYilYkB7X0cVg%3D%3D)

Kari will be face-to-face with some of the most vicious, un-American actors the left has to offer. [**She won 't be able to win her critical election by herself. She needs every willing and able patriot to fight with her!**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=358210c918d14a81802447e029c89627&_e=4DqbYsZL02cS7yV3MTZPOyFodmyBpoQQ4twhTG0QURBbA9ibbp80m012DSA41fcXG9YctegPsmcSC02hWtXf4Qn6HBApdzBWwmwxRUuML4aQEnN_s8OiUGItnuYckNM5vMskZ3bx3GcIY5vYE97LlkiCtk_unf2GBPiujdgNeFbAxHQiO9Euhmh8IdTidpfZMip5j9PBA2_tOTzi9gb3-dREoHFB1vFfNPU9GLZBRXFj1UEOPnV-xmf-M57y89p8XuaETL9yWRsfcZl4eh97JVf8g7Z3aI8Rehucdl40TITOgDE21vud3fe-3ySo7yVs2yd_XYeLeqdVvxZ6UsUuCEpQQCKtYGgKqLdLhMHJQRsAL5jcxyDq-DlOWp3MUi0Ziperynrg-33xoKj-D-wnJA%3D%3D)

**Kari 's got my support 100% of the way. **

America is in desperate need of some house cleaning. For too long, we've been bogged down in D.C. politics and forced to accept Washington's status quo. I'll keep up the pressure against the Biden Administration, but we need to make sure the entire country has fighters who are willing to put America First.

**Kari will put America First & bring the change this country needs to Washington, D.C. **
[**I 'm asking you to help Kari by donating $5, $10, $15, or anything you can spare to FLIP Arizona RED.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=358210c918d14a81802447e029c89627&_e=4DqbYsZL02cS7yV3MTZPOyFodmyBpoQQ4twhTG0QURBbA9ibbp80m012DSA41fcXG9YctegPsmcSC02hWtXf4Qn6HBApdzBWwmwxRUuML4aQEnN_s8OiUGItnuYckNM5vMskZ3bx3GcIY5vYE97LlkiCtk_unf2GBPiujdgNeFbAxHQiO9Euhmh8IdTidpfZMip5j9PBA2_tOTzi9gb3-dREoHFB1vFfNPU9GLZBRXFj1UEOPnV-xmf-M57y89p8dC7zJaNReZJMxKaKS8TVrYF6FOT3M99sbbd9DgZIrQnTRT11boppWlbfd3A9NibkEbi1BZX5qQNxxl_k3mUwy7EvmwZk0fhKQLuzF-wuMiFnIipNQmrQx6MtIE_gMrb8QX5VbrMplbY9i3NxhDZJTw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Kari Lake | FROM THE DESK OF KEN PAXTON Friend, I'm honored to endorse Kari Lake -- she's a principled and uncompromising fighter for the America First movement and the state of Arizona. Kari and I know what it feels like to be made the villain. We're stalwart defenders of the freedoms and liberties every American is entitled to -- and the left hates us for it. We've remained loyal to America First, and in return, we've been attacked, berated, slandered, and targeted by the left's political machine. Kari will be face-to-face with some of the most vicious, un-American actors the left has to offer. Kari 's got my support 100% of the way. America is in desperate need of some house cleaning. For too long, we've been bogged down in D.C. politics and forced to accept Washington's status quo. I'll keep up the pressure against the Biden Administration, but we need to make sure the entire country has fighters who are willing to put America First. Kari will put America First & bring the change this country needs to Washington, D.C. PLEASE -- DONATE BELOW -- HELP KARI LAKE | Best, | Ken Paxton Texas Attorney General ---|--- Pol. Adv. name: Rep. Mary Miller
subject: Announcement Video
body:
Watch and share this special message
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a1102c1291048cbbcb7e64a38f24db7&_e=1L2jITCpdICpPF-QhNuwWulalRbOX6ncUt1pPX2xUgU-IPoVDLZ_1jtiU407uzPrf5_vzVF3vR4gpnewl_ZKK9aqmstjPBW79D-uw-xBK5pmE3wFaAFCzC10UCzuYiE48ilS-QD4aJZq4f3aEdBt3HBXR91hPTm_511VrvlUVp498B64lhkUn2v-EQ6NIHUU6_2o0zFFaiwvpT8ma5qUnbNjHUGTdIbzancLK799JhwxsgZdOlD-VpC_KLjJn26SwTvqN0i-Op1-T-SKQHtnbJ8Szqg56IQ878---BXpCqzOTDgAYh3hBecNBN3F_Qfs-omzuPrOx6j-tvOCRe0WgmTM23IzQgtCQ5xZzRvVUSSpLUVN0Rql97jmKMKae8nb)
---
Friend - Proverbs 29:18 warns us that, "Where there is no vision, the people perish." Our government is broken because too many of our leaders lack the foundation that comes from faith in God and fidelity to our Constitution. Chris and I have lived our lives guided by our belief that we will give account to God for all that we do. We raised our seven children to work hard and sacrifice on our small family farm. We are grateful for every harvest. This year, we were blessed to welcome our **20th** grandchild to the world. My driving passion is to give our nation's children and grandchildren a future filled with opportunity. Joe Biden and the Swamp establishment have set the world on fire. Open borders, crushing inflation, and cultural perversion threaten our country and our future. **Today, I am announcing that I am running for re-election** because our country stands at a crossroads, and only the America First movement can save us.
| [ **WATCH REP. MARY MILLER'S LAUNCH VIDEO** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a1102c1291048cbbcb7e64a38f24db7&_e=1L2jITCpdICpPF-QhNuwWulalRbOX6ncUt1pPX2xUgU-IPoVDLZ_1jtiU407uzPrf5_vzVF3vR4gpnewl_ZKK9aqmstjPBW79D-uw-xBK5pmE3wFaAFCzC10UCzuYiE48ilS-QD4aJZq4f3aEdBt3HBXR91hPTm_511VrvlUVp498B64lhkUn2v-EQ6NIHUU6_2o0zFFaiwvpT8ma5qUnaGzEY0gBrBy29RDExHLKJrNnO7kGbqQqrTHFHhT3KzxBd_wBcnBbMZu2Jgz4MDgdRrEFWS9L-hTj9J0MtFno5IqPYUG9ne-F7E9DP_gkZv3EztlV6caBHn_h86zFA4kAo67jHYzrMF1BEOPKGCh7Sd_CU_t1sXlEPlWw23Zqw4D)
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a1102c1291048cbbcb7e64a38f24db7&_e=1L2jITCpdICpPF-QhNuwWulalRbOX6ncUt1pPX2xUgU-IPoVDLZ_1jtiU407uzPrf5_vzVF3vR4gpnewl_ZKK9aqmstjPBW79D-uw-xBK5pmE3wFaAFCzC10UCzuYiE48ilS-QD4aJZq4f3aEdBt3HBXR91hPTm_511VrvlUVp498B64lhkUn2v-EQ6NIHUU6_2o0zFFaiwvpT8ma5qUnYcUvYBE8fYHQlkPh2DAcQf5jrOjARK4j2C1uZHLlmy2QxLt1GFAFHpTZKFSxU5aTBzBqGMYslHj4MzFFq6Oj8Nlj4JgU59EoUFE8UMyNqFO1NYpo_3AERMDD2Dbh4FqfnEVXXvvzm-jnNfPP6AtYw-1A04iJwNAevnxyrAr_aPC)
---
**I proudly stand with President Donald J. Trump and the America First agenda** of secure borders, energy independence, and a booming economy. I oppose the corrupt Deep State, and I was one of the first members of Congress to call for Joe Biden's impeachment because he has violated his oath to defend our borders. I am honored to have an **"A" Liberty Score** , an **"A" NRA rating** , an **"A+" from Gun Owners of America** , a perfect **100% Heritage Action score** , a perfect **100% Family Research Council score** , an **"A+" from Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America** , a perfect **100% Club for Growth** **score** , and a perfect **100% CPAC score**. I was ranked as one of the 10 most conservative members of Congress out of 435 members by GovTrack. This year, **I launched the Congressional Family Caucus** and authored several sections of the Parents Bill of Rights, which passed the House. I led the opposition against Joe Biden as he attempted to force men into girls' locker rooms, and I continue to lead parents in the fight against JB Pritzker's perverted sex ed curriculum and extreme abortion agenda. I wrote and passed religious liberty protections for our troops in the Defense Bill, and I led the effort to end the COVID vaccine mandate for our troops. As one of the few family farmers left in Congress, and a member of the House Agriculture Committee, **I look forward to voting for a Farm Bill** that prioritizes the needs of production agriculture, especially on trade and crop insurance. The first bill I introduced in the House this year was to **ban China from buying our farmland** , and I have led the fight against replacing fertile farmland with Chinese solar panels. Defending our Second Amendment rights has never been more important. The horrific attacks in Israel should serve as a reminder that Americans must remain armed and vigilant to defend ourselves and our families. Joe Biden has allowed drug cartels and terrorists to cross our southern border. JB Pritzker is releasing dangerous criminals into our communities while Democrats work to Defund The Police. **The Second Amendment is our greatest safeguard of liberty and security**. The DC Swamp and corrupt Chicago politicians hate me because I am not afraid to call out their corruption. They want me gone because I stand with President Trump. They were furious when I challenged Biden's Health Secretary on unconstitutional COVID mandates and myocarditis statistics. The lobbyists, special interests, and "woke" leftist billionaires will spend every penny they have to defeat me. **I would be grateful for your help**. With your grassroots support, we can continue to take on and defeat every powerful interest that wants to silence the America First movement. Together, we are more powerful than Biden, Pritzker, and the Swamp. **[_Will you consider contributing $5_ so I can run this video throughout our district and unite the Patriots fighting to Save America](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a1102c1291048cbbcb7e64a38f24db7&_e=1L2jITCpdICpPF-QhNuwWulalRbOX6ncUt1pPX2xUgU-IPoVDLZ_1jtiU407uzPrf5_vzVF3vR4gpnewl_ZKK9aqmstjPBW79D-uw-xBK5pmE3wFaAFCzC10UCzuYiE48ilS-QD4aJZq4f3aEdBt3HBXR91hPTm_511VrvlUVp498B64lhkUn2v-EQ6NIHUU6_2o0zFFaiwvpT8ma5qUnRygcljYN5DKtMlsFnAe7iXisE2hDOl542JgYL8sg4JVH1Q_sDrxFFZByx7Rzq4W_BaO3eTsINcKNuANrW-SAemolCW7XaY8A_KbHfC6GmjSVRIgc1GGP1GtvZKo8XirWDurAVeg0FVqaAHoc1nDHeDc2e524YZ_s9b10wo-rcGt)?** I am honored to serve as your servant representative, and I will never give up on our mission to defend Family, Faith, and Freedom. Your prayers and support give me the strength to take on this fight, and I am truly grateful for your friendship. _God Bless,_ Mary Miller Congresswoman, Illinois' 15th District P.S. [**Please watch and share this video with your friends and family members as we build a grassroots network of Patriots who want to Save America****!**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a1102c1291048cbbcb7e64a38f24db7&_e=1L2jITCpdICpPF-QhNuwWulalRbOX6ncUt1pPX2xUgU-IPoVDLZ_1jtiU407uzPrf5_vzVF3vR4gpnewl_ZKK9aqmstjPBW79D-uw-xBK5pmE3wFaAFCzC10UCzuYiE48ilS-QD4aJZq4f3aEdBt3HBXR91hPTm_511VrvlUVp498B64lhkUn2v-EQ6NIHUU6_2o0zFFaiwvpT8ma5qUnaUveL0JvOOlkEwVrHwdEMvuhh6n84CfB0AaoXIwc0lhZ2dMMAPriafVfxyNsJQ39R4VIy8LU2CK6875Sp5dhsGOfu7UssDN7cv5wT3D9vhefYGfeTaXyLHzzhuD7f9ml8XNj6OUwgxkyHOpN1-sGE91Uqq5wDAEPXzsTPwujwai)

clean_body: Watch and share this special message | | | Friend - Proverbs 29:18 warns us that, "Where there is no vision, the people perish." Our government is broken because too many of our leaders lack the foundation that comes from faith in God and fidelity to our Constitution. Chris and I have lived our lives guided by our belief that we will give account to God for all that we do. We raised our seven children to work hard and sacrifice on our small family farm. We are grateful for every harvest. This year, we were blessed to welcome our 20th grandchild to the world. My driving passion is to give our nation's children and grandchildren a future filled with opportunity. Joe Biden and the Swamp establishment have set the world on fire. Open borders, crushing inflation, and cultural perversion threaten our country and our future. Today, I am announcing that I am running for re-election because our country stands at a crossroads, and only the America First movement can save us. | | I proudly stand with President Donald J. Trump and the America First agenda of secure borders, energy independence, and a booming economy. I oppose the corrupt Deep State, and I was one of the first members of Congress to call for Joe Biden's impeachment because he has violated his oath to defend our borders. I am honored to have an "A" Liberty Score , an "A" NRA rating , an "A+" from Gun Owners of America , a perfect 100% Heritage Action score , a perfect 100% Family Research Council score , an "A+" from Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America , a perfect 100% Club for Growth score , and a perfect 100% CPAC score. I was ranked as one of the 10 most conservative members of Congress out of 435 members by GovTrack. This year, I launched the Congressional Family Caucus and authored several sections of the Parents Bill of Rights, which passed the House. I led the opposition against Joe Biden as he attempted to force men into girls' locker rooms, and I continue to lead parents in the fight against JB Pritzker's perverted sex ed curriculum and extreme abortion agenda. I wrote and passed religious liberty protections for our troops in the Defense Bill, and I led the effort to end the COVID vaccine mandate for our troops. As one of the few family farmers left in Congress, and a member of the House Agriculture Committee, I look forward to voting for a Farm Bill that prioritizes the needs of production agriculture, especially on trade and crop insurance. The first bill I introduced in the House this year was to ban China from buying our farmland , and I have led the fight against replacing fertile farmland with Chinese solar panels. Defending our Second Amendment rights has never been more important. The horrific attacks in Israel should serve as a reminder that Americans must remain armed and vigilant to defend ourselves and our families. Joe Biden has allowed drug cartels and terrorists to cross our southern border. JB Pritzker is releasing dangerous criminals into our communities while Democrats work to Defund The Police. The Second Amendment is our greatest safeguard of liberty and security. The DC Swamp and corrupt Chicago politicians hate me because I am not afraid to call out their corruption. They want me gone because I stand with President Trump. They were furious when I challenged Biden's Health Secretary on unconstitutional COVID mandates and myocarditis statistics. The lobbyists, special interests, and "woke" leftist billionaires will spend every penny they have to defeat me. I would be grateful for your help. With your grassroots support, we can continue to take on and defeat every powerful interest that wants to silence the America First movement. Together, we are more powerful than Biden, Pritzker, and the Swamp. ? I am honored to serve as your servant representative, and I will never give up on our mission to defend Family, Faith, and Freedom. Your prayers and support give me the strength to take on this fight, and I am truly grateful for your friendship. God Bless, Mary Miller Congresswoman, Illinois' 15th District P.S. | ! | | | | %unsubscribeurl%This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails

| | Friend, We are officially less than a year out from Election Day 2024! Last week, we launched ["Veterans for Kelly"](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1cOk6RSHQ/c?w=bn_utpmtcglB8d6U6ecVTHzHta62iEKrvHWg-RoeSj8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgvcG9zdHMvcGZiaWQwNVZ3QVF3cjZqblg1OGZRR1NtUlA0V25NdmpXeFJVWHhwR1Z3WkVUQzFDSEpGVHhxeVdtakRFbkhwdmdZcTh0d2wiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0), a coalition of over 100 members of New Hampshire's veteran community, led by Kelly's husband, retired Air Force LTC Joseph Daley. If you, a friend, or family member would like to join Veterans for Kelly you can do so by [signing up here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1cOk6RSHQ/c?w=1y1qMe2puTJjAI-cCDgb4V5OSorPX67WPyVH6vYJz1w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZmNhM3Q0dlV5WGRmbWZscW9ISzFHRVhjSFoxM0FTM29hM0RaTllyTVJGVUExRzJBL3ZpZXdmb3JtIiwiciI6ImZjNzBjMWM5LTFjYzctNDgzYS05ZjA2LWJiNjQ4N2ZmMTIzYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJiMDhlNzAzLWE2MjctNDZmMy1iZThhLTVkNTY1NDQyNjIwMiJ9). Kelly had another busy week on the trail! On Monday, Kelly met with Republicans in Hillsboro at an event hosted by Bob Nash. Then on Halloween, Kelly was up in Alton passing out candy at the home Rep. Peter Varney and his wife, Beth. On Friday, Kelly was honored to attend and speak at the Woodbury Middle School's Veterans Day Ceremony in Salem, you can catch [Kelly's remarks here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1cOk6RSHQ/c?w=FnsOI8TBnRhqPt7OxMwWakOKXrwjFZ_BaM2_2218esY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1TNldNMGRVR01jVSIsInIiOiJmYzcwYzFjOS0xY2M3LTQ4M2EtOWYwNi1iYjY0ODdmZjEyM2IiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ). On Saturday morning Kelly attended the Liberty House Annual Breakfast before heading out to Keene to speak at the Cheshire Republican Women's Luncheon. Then on Sunday, Kelly and Joe walked in the Dan Healy Memorial Foundation's Annual 5k in Exeter. Have you liked our [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1cOk6RSHQ/c?w=imqCRgbpMtt1gpbhY23wa5SuVvZz04faW-hK_ia3XzA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0) page yet? Follow us there to keep up with all of our campaign updates! Best, Team Kelly

| |

| | “Coming from a military family, honoring our commitment to veterans is deeply personal to me. My Grandfather served in the Army Air Corps in World War II, my husband Joe was an A-10 pilot in the Air Force and our daughter Kate is following in her father’s footsteps as a cadet at the Air Force Academy. I understand the sacrifice that our service members and their families make every day.” “I am so grateful to have the support and confidence of these men and women who have bravely served our nation. As Governor, I will ensure that every military family receives the benefits and respect they have earned.” [Read the full article in the Manchester Ink Link here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1cOk6RSHQ/c?w=JTJlOu0-1JffoBy6e-HR99I_ASlwM7lvgwHU4-smlao.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5jaGVzdGVyaW5rbGluay5jb20vYXlvdHRlLWxhdW5jaGVzLXZldGVyYW5zLWZvci1rZWxseS1jb2FsaXRpb24vIiwiciI6ImViN2MxM2Q5LTViNDgtNDAwMy1iMjA4LTE3YmQ2NGYyZmJiYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJiMDhlNzAzLWE2MjctNDZmMy1iZThhLTVkNTY1NDQyNjIwMiJ9)

Prominent supporters include Marine Corps vets Hillsborough County Attorney John Coughlin of Amherst and Bedford auto dealer Andy Crews, Navy retiree Jim Adams of Pittsfield, Army vet and state Rep. Jess Edwards of Auburn and Air Force vets and Reps. John Potucek of Derry, Ken Weyler of Kingston and Michael Vose of Epping." [Read the full article in the Union Leader here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1cOk6RSHQ/c?w=CUONc9f3BaaJWKjTvjy8GVYz7vO0ebwhRu6SYthasnM.)

clean_body: We have exactly one day until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 Tomorrow is Election Day 🚨 One day – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. And President Joe Biden knows this, so he’s calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: Republicans have funneled a staggering $27 million into Virginia, making this an even tougher battle to win. We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – there’s a hell of a lot more to do. Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory on Election Day: Strategize with our candidates in these final days Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line Invest in pivotal races like Virginia to ensure every vote counts Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you, to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a crucial part of this team, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Greg Casar
subject: THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
THANK YOU Peter.
**This weekend we held our first-annual Fight For Our Future Fest, and it was a huge success—thanks to you.**
With the help of our supporters, we brought together hundreds of folks from across the state. We saw amazing performances from local artists like A Giant Dog, Gina Chávez, Trouble in the Streets, and DJ Chorizo Funk. We heard inspiring speeches from incredible progressive leaders like Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley and Tennessee State Rep. Justin Jones.
**And most importantly:_we celebrated the big, strong, hopeful progressive movement being built in Texas. _**
We couldn’t have pulled off this event without the help of our supporters. So I wanted to reach out personally to thank you—for attending, donating, sharing the event with your friends and families, or even just being a part of Team Casar.
We know that when Texas changes, so does the country. So we’re going to continue growing our movement in love, joy, and solidarity.
[**Consider chipping in $5, $10, $20 or whatever you can to help us build a progressive movement in Texas. I’m thankful to have you on this team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72918921/436810385/-554299737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNhODY1NS0wMzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jqOmadoLMypxNewMhL5QAyj-0Ht7LUKwvXy174GGcdI=)

clean_body: THANK YOU Peter. This weekend we held our first-annual Fight For Our Future Fest, and it was a huge success—thanks to you. With the help of our supporters, we brought together hundreds of folks from across the state. We saw amazing performances from local artists like A Giant Dog, Gina Chávez, Trouble in the Streets, and DJ Chorizo Funk. We heard inspiring speeches from incredible progressive leaders like Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley and Tennessee State Rep. Justin Jones. And most importantly:we celebrated the big, strong, hopeful progressive movement being built in Texas. We couldn’t have pulled off this event without the help of our supporters. So I wanted to reach out personally to thank you—for attending, donating, sharing the event with your friends and families, or even just being a part of Team Casar. We know that when Texas changes, so does the country. So we’re going to continue growing our movement in love, joy, and solidarity. = = **= Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: John Fetterman
subject: The clock is ticking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
So much is at stake in 2024!
We’re officially less than one year out from Election Day, Peter!!!!
That’s less than one year left to...
* Fight back against Bob’s self-funding GOP opponent (a.k.a *lots* of money spent against Bob)
* Keep Bob in the Senate fighting for PA’s working families
* Defend our Senate majority

There’s simply too much at stake in 2024 to play it safe. We’ve got to rush to hit Bob’s new goal!!!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-2?refcode=em20231106-2&refcode2=1076_552475_M7647y&akid=1076%2E552475%2EM7647y)
_Pedal to the metal, folks!_
**[Bob’s team set a 72-hour goal to raise $30,000, and we’re almost halfway to the deadline. Will you join the sprint, chip in, + support Bob?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-2?refcode=em20231106-2&refcode2=1076_552475_M7647y&akid=1076%2E552475%2EM7647y)**
**[Rush a donation »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-2?refcode=em20231106-2&refcode2=1076_552475_M7647y&akid=1076%2E552475%2EM7647y)**
Throughout my run for Senate, Bob was there to support my campaign. When Republicans attacked me + my values, Bob always had my back.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-2?refcode=em20231106-2&refcode2=1076_552475_M7647y&akid=1076%2E552475%2EM7647y)
Now, Republicans are attacking Bob + are preparing to spend millions to try to unseat him. But I’ll keep repeating: **Pennsylvania is not for sale.** I have Bob’s back, too.
Long story short, we need as many folks as possible to chip in what they can to support Bob before the 72-hour deadline is up. Republicans are willing to spend millions of dark money in PA, and we need to be prepared to fight back.
**[So what do you say, Peter? Will you support my friend Bob by making a contribution today toward his campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-2?refcode=em20231106-2&refcode2=1076_552475_M7647y&akid=1076%2E552475%2EM7647y)**

Let’s get this done.
Thank you for being a part of this team,
— John 💛

Bob Casey for Senate

| |
# **Election day is almost here! **
Tomorrow, thousands of Michiganders will go to the polls and make their voices heard. You have the opportunity to use **your** vote to shape **your** community.

You know the urgency of **flipping the House blue in 2024 by electing Joseph Alfonso for MI-04.** But the importance of voting in state and local elections cannot be overstated. This is your chance to elect strong local leaders and vote on proposals that will directly affect your community.

Polls are open from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. local time on Election Day. You have the right to vote if you are in line by 8 p.m. To find out where to vote and see your sample ballot, click the link below.

Friend,

It's Governor Glenn Youngkin. I'm humbly asking for your help in Virginia.

We are just days away from what I believe is a critical election in America. We have an opportunity in Virginia to prove that commonsense, conservative leadership and policies can transform a state that just two years ago was predominantly Blue.

If we win, we can shock America once again and lead the nation in a direction that prioritizes growth, opportunity and freedom. We only need to win a few competitive seats to hold the Virginia House, flip the Senate, and advance an agenda that will move Virginia toward the goal of being the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

**[But we cannot do this without your partnership!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e4ff4ad0c638421fa5fd03eed2e509ed&_e=gl1VfY5rSZTkH59fYSJL1ByaA7xa358LPhjzOEaBQJpmzyDSawTNhkWfLtmlPDfvHJ68EC6D5GTVMI0gsrRomPOO8oszwbDxKMsWkz6sR-2VnDn8CmbOXKdF1ouQX4WJW3NYzMwixZzJSgwFFDOz5uqyCRB3qVNYTtuW5ABC5nAf0kMf5MXZaxJEFCkanx35xKsNgzvqeByjssP4dtJkPbRbdiHXfsDjHHgPmbQRPRcm2wYUhJwq2EY7zOXr6dogIOAFOv2qTj5pohqfgUA9aCkfFd1AKvEWnjkJkK3jtrjcmOPh7vTI_TOwFvPaWve9DLBScIadQNYSMqoSuCoUzgG1-P-7NZuWC6I4cMMS5E2ucvcnGpIAxDjDZRpyentb)**

The Democrat machine including Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, the DNC and every major, national Democrat-affiliated entity have made Virginia's elections a priority -- pouring countless millions into Virginia to spread messages of mistruth and scare tactics.

That's why I am asking committed donors like you from across the country to band together to demonstrate that good ideas, capable leaders and optimism are needed now more than ever. **[Please help us compete all the way through Election Day.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e4ff4ad0c638421fa5fd03eed2e509ed&_e=gl1VfY5rSZTkH59fYSJL1ByaA7xa358LPhjzOEaBQJpmzyDSawTNhkWfLtmlPDfvHJ68EC6D5GTVMI0gsrRomPOO8oszwbDxKMsWkz6sR-2VnDn8CmbOXKdF1ouQX4WJW3NYzMwixZzJSgwFFDOz5uqyCRB3qVNYTtuW5ABC5nAf0kMf5MXZaxJEFCkanx35xKsNgzvqeByjssP4dtJkPdAzfi4LmJG3y2KM46hZ4UpOw3p7RBrgb_ZoePAr_tLtmyjJBG9p3EJUx6iXhjlHYbW8ILM4OFv-hOsgXHbUOGoQ5rEbawITo5ZC2OJsmFNnlprxAx2Y6ADtwfdDLNs4Ab6pRZiEA-hUjzgtJJz62vvF0YKYwbVTKHe6rvinup_O)** | [ **HELP US COMPETE TO WIN** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e4ff4ad0c638421fa5fd03eed2e509ed&_e=gl1VfY5rSZTkH59fYSJL1ByaA7xa358LPhjzOEaBQJpmzyDSawTNhkWfLtmlPDfvHJ68EC6D5GTVMI0gsrRomPOO8oszwbDxKMsWkz6sR-2VnDn8CmbOXKdF1ouQX4WJW3NYzMwixZzJSgwFFDOz5uqyCRB3qVNYTtuW5ABC5nAf0kMf5MXZaxJEFCkanx35xKsNgzvqeByjssP4dtJkPU-XuZ0lOWj7IWRzXNjjEgdDmRAqRfBd-3DoZ7ly84D9BiuPQDGhdTJJ7l1hXCHRfJIgERMPpCPg5lI7vOs4pGiuxff8lIZbsRbSDfYBc-paWr6M6bTfG8G1CqxVUFDkjXQsvCa78C3yRao5xORumTGL0IxGQ0LcWysjGHGY33JO)

[ **SUPPORT TEAM YOUNGKIN** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e4ff4ad0c638421fa5fd03eed2e509ed&_e=gl1VfY5rSZTkH59fYSJL1ByaA7xa358LPhjzOEaBQJpmzyDSawTNhkWfLtmlPDfvHJ68EC6D5GTVMI0gsrRomPOO8oszwbDxKMsWkz6sR-2VnDn8CmbOXKdF1ouQX4WJW3NYzMwixZzJSgwFFDOz5uqyCRB3qVNYTtuW5ABC5nAf0kMf5MXZaxJEFCkanx35xKsNgzvqeByjssP4dtJkPTCSSFJdVz2nfuutgpDYH92HBw7emDQGvTv-PyB79ArLzUVy-jYh3tiRFicRwpgLWVwuqM8gksok1TH1sEfQD-FPLBfRXRXYsa_hKQE-vL9Q0W5uZdtb3Zp41IVZaavhuMAMjlZ-dIghGtd7w9JoNcpLLDMQxwvM55mBABeS0ZGF)

body:
Congress in Chaos | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress?e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| | [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=d91bdb023e&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| Peter,
---
| During my previous run for Congress, your support as a donor meant so much to me. I’m excited to announce that I’m running again.

With Oregon redistricting, many of the counties I won in are now in CD-4, which will be a great fit with the previous victories and support in those counties.

I could not have achieved the milestones of my previous campaign without your generous donation. Your support made a huge difference and for that I am extremely thankful. I need your support now more than ever in the battle to save our nation from the deeply entrenched progressives.
---
| [JOIN MY FIGHT AGAIN »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=b92f20d00e&e=36bbc8e2ca "JOIN MY FIGHT AGAIN »")
---
| In our short history as a country of patriots, who have embraced individual liberties and demanded to have a government that is by, for, and of the people – we’ve become leaders of the free world. With that recognition comes great responsibility, and this reminds me of the phrase, “Peace through strength.”

Today the endless addiction to conflict and weaponization of our government against its own people, has us frustrated over the endless political games and weakness of our current administration. This is not my America – nor is it the America of **We The People. **

**I love our nation and its people, and I believe America and its citizens are worth fighting for – and I’m excited to announce my candidacy to serve Oregon’s 4th Congressional District!**

I announced my candidacy recently [**in this video:**](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=360e80ae00&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=cb55dcf32e&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| _**As your Congresswoman, I will be Relentless in the fight for our great nation, and YOUR rights, voice and OUR Conservative values.**_
---
|
---
| | [SEND ME TO CONGRESS TO FIGHT FOR YOU »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=9592c4e95b&e=36bbc8e2ca "SEND ME TO CONGRESS TO FIGHT FOR YOU »")
---
| With your support I promise to prioritize these 7 things: National security, fiscal accountability, ending the weaponization of our government, securing the integrity of our elections, a balanced budget, securing the American borders, and ensuring safe communities for all of us.

**I'm ready to be your voice but I can't do this alone.** I need you to join me in my battle all the way to DC. Please [sign up for my newsletter](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=6dddf85d07&e=36bbc8e2ca), share my social media posts and get engaged!

**As your candidate and Congresswoman** , You will always know where I stand on the important issues, the policies, and world events. I will always listen to you: _The People_.

**I appreciate your prayers and[of course your contributions](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=40b425982b&e=36bbc8e2ca) are critical to my success in this battle of GOOD vs. EVIL.** We have a country to save! Donate now, and together we can drain The swamp in DC.

For America,
---
| [DONATE $40 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=a5da5debbd&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $40 »")
---
| [DONATE $80 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=85e4a9603b&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $80 »")
---
| [DONATE $100 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=e1b595278a&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $100 »")
---
| [DONATE $500 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=340a0a5a45&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $500 »")
---
| [DONATE $1000 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=ea8d8f0f42&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $1000 »")
---
| [DONATE $3300 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=412f866f6e&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $3300 »")
---
| [DONATE ANY AMOUNT »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=e135870747&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE ANY AMOUNT »")
---

---
|
---
|
---
| **CHALLENGE FOR THE WEEK: Social Media Campaign Support Rally!**
---
| Friend, grassroots support **is key** to changing the status quo. By sharing my emails and social media posts, this will greatly help me in getting the word out to Oregonians.

I’m building my campaign’s social media presence and would be grateful for a “follow” from you on any of my accounts:
| **[](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=297054c4c2&e=36bbc8e2ca)** | **[](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=5fff897b23&e=36bbc8e2ca)** | **[](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=ff2b4fe68e&e=36bbc8e2ca)** | **[](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=398e7a083e&e=36bbc8e2ca)**
---|---|---|---
**[Follow me on Facebook](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=7669cf6592&e=36bbc8e2ca)** | **[Follow me on X](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=e6dee1abf0&e=36bbc8e2ca)** | **[Follow me on Instagram](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=a7968a03fe&e=36bbc8e2ca)** | **[Follow me on YouTube](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=913cafe0b1&e=36bbc8e2ca)**

**Above all, I promise to be Relentless _for you_!**

body:
We need to hear from you before midnight
| | |
---

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: To me, policy is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Did you know that over half of all Members of Congress are millionaires? Meanwhile, the median household income is only $70,784. 👈🏽 **This is wild.**
Many of our lawmakers have no lived experience of working paycheck to paycheck or trying to pay rent working a low-wage job.
To me, policy is personal. When I worked as a bartender, I relied on tips to pay the bills. I know the urgent and daily stresses of working class people because I have lived them. And I intimately understand how important measures like raising the minimum wage, universal health care, universal child care, and free college can be for families living in financial uncertainty.
That’s why I’m in Congress: **to represent working families like mine.**
I am honored to be here, and I can’t do this work without you — the grassroots supporters who have had my back every step of the way. I can’t self-fund my campaign by writing a big check, and I don’t do any donor call-time or exclusive fundraising events.
[We rely completely on small-dollar donors, so if you are able, can you chip in $5 today to our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231106.u3Dn-I&refcode=em20231106-5272-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)
****
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231106.u3Dn-I&refcode=em20231106-5272-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231106?refcode=em20231106-5272-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5272_2526796_8LGI2w&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231106-5272-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5272%2E2526796%2E8LGI2w)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: “Too many jobs?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, This is absolutely despicable.

**The Democrats have made themselves clear: they want to ERASE blue-collar America.** **Their vision is a country of liberal elites, who bow the knee to China’s natural resources, and a hollowed out middle class dependent on the government. **

The Democrats know what blue-collar America stands for: and they absolutely HATE it.

The Left will NEVER respect hard work, family values, and patriotism.

_But it’s not enough for them to send jobs overseas and inject woke into the next generation: they won’t be done until they ELIMINATE blue-collar American altogether._

[**We MUST fight back. Join me today and DEFEND blue-collar America!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=15cafeda76b14c5d91eff49b306a942b&_e=-I5X-6UboFdBSvYyxVC6XCw4Kkcb_jaz4UhA_c2qhQUu5CUBv-wpi6_1aecDerH_oEVxpn56aOyrPlzH3I6G74oNtELPmVH9FZFWy80b_lqS6V05D49xUZerZbHNAgd0lTMuwJRkZvQZW64kZwjEKvSVPaNMLEi5qrrtZodasbPP_gh5jMMucETxBySAXaRnYxj29PHzCw_36VH-wGGzVSKv1NsFu8nd5mPaX1ZoCop0QxLOflod1NVZfmG_u9S1Kr019SI3WEoBMo1ve0C-AfL-TgKpbPx-hAFJCH8DHH7NiU7nk7CbkXPoEQbYsd2lhSncMY4LsTpEhiiQmFP8NetWd5xdCuPdFhdkQaYWve_4W-AHbbUD_kyLeC2DW95j9y27JTgOXTuUdt52j6QLGA%3D%3D)

body:
You probably know that Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. declared as an Independent candidate for President.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_video_3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, **We have a massive challenge before us that the two party candidates don't have.** **Since Bobby is now an Independent candidate, we need to collect hundreds of thousands of petition signatures from all 50 states to get him on the ballot.** [](https://www.kennedy24.com/ballot-access-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_video_3&n=2) Would you believe there is a whole for-profit industry of signature collection? They estimate a per-signature cost as much as $10-$25 per signature. Well, we are taking a different approach. We are going with our own field workers and grassroots volunteers instead, at a fraction of the cost. Your donation will go a long way! name: LCV Conservation Team
subject: Take Action to SHUT DOWN the Dakota Access Oil Pipeline
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT4dKVrC_/YTdCa0c4bUFsOEtId3JHcjNpakFHaStuVlArSzNvdEQrWTNqNFdrTTcwak11MzNPNUdhMjg3NUVudThZZkVJOEhLM3pJdGFWSTh1by9WYm1wV3p1eGcrdVorcVh0NElvaTdmRm1GbGNRa009S0/NUdNMlNJTW9KQzQ0NlYrdHJqSHNVMDQvNGplVEJpTW03U0Z1a0VKVnR4MTRveThZaExoTUZOSVVVQ2VSTmdOcW9ia1prSE9rUC8vbmwzSk8rNkR2OXc9PQS2 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQxY48AQw/YTdCa0c4bUFsOEtId3JHcjNpakFHaStuVlArSzNvdEQrWTNqNFdrTTcwak11MzNPNUdhMjg3NUVudThZZkVJOEhLM3pJdGFWSTh1by9WYm1wV3p1eGcrdVorcVh0NElvaTdmRm1GbGNRa009S0/NUdNMlNJTW9KQzQ0NlYrdHJqSHNVMDQvNGplVEJpTW03U0Z1a0VKVnR4MTRveThZaExoTUZOSVVVQ2VSTmdOcW9ia1prSE9rUC8vbmwzSk8rNkR2OXc9PQS2

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2r43wMj/YTdCa0c4bUFsOEtId3JHcjNpakFHaStuVlArSzNvdEQrWTNqNFdrTTcwak11MzNPNUdhMjg3NUVudThZZkVJOEhLM3pJdGFWSTh1by9WYm1wV3p1eGcrdVorcVh0NElvaTdmRm1GbGNRa009S0/NUdNMlNJTW9KQzQ0NlYrdHJqSHNVMDQvNGplVEJpTW03U0Z1a0VKVnR4MTRveThZaExoTUZOSVVVQ2VSTmdOcW9ia1prSE9rUC8vbmwzSk8rNkR2OXc9PQS2

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10188551&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDEzNDI4OQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDEzNDI4OQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10188551&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDEzNDI4OQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDEzNDI4OQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMrW0GqQk/YTdCa0c4bUFsOEtId3JHcjNpakFHaStuVlArSzNvdEQrWTNqNFdrTTcwak11MzNPNUdhMjg3NUVudThZZkVJOEhLM3pJdGFWSTh1by9WYm1wV3p1eGcrdVorcVh0NElvaTdmRm1GbGNRa009S0/NUdNMlNJTW9KQzQ0NlYrdHJqSHNVMDQvNGplVEJpTW03U0Z1a0VKVnR4MTRveThZaExoTUZOSVVVQ2VSTmdOcW9ia1prSE9rUC8vbmwzSk8rNkR2OXc9PQS2 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/8wqzCNma34fX/YTdCa0c4bUFsOEtId3JHcjNpakFHaStuVlArSzNvdEQrWTNqNFdrTTcwak11MzNPNUdhMjg3NUVudThZZkVJOEhLM3pJdGFWSTh1by9WYm1wV3p1eGcrdVorcVh0NElvaTdmRm1GbGNRa009S0/

It’s a pretty simple roadmap: stop ruining the planet, give kids access to education, and protect them from getting shot. This shouldn’t be too much to ask and yet, we started the PAC because our current leaders are failing us in these fundamental ways. In just one year we’ll elect a new Congress, and we need to make sure we elect a Kids First Majority who will prioritize future generations and the safety of America’s kids. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | The elections may feel far away, but we have a lot of work to do. name: Kari Lake
subject: This Mama Bear isn't just armed with claws.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
Protecting our cubs

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dab2b53e82704d4fa1ba0630d1f266c2&_e=iBNiZMEeSCu8jW5rX2n6HqFO2qafPJ6d4Hqaqdmsinzz_pqbtNQMjS2YkJG8RLocj07rI8GIOKF1im5VshHkX1o4_hr6hsfYzXvRdhqa2qCc8AiOMzJ1i3JR2EvGCjvWKOBONay3zrq5oT26gDK_eQV2YD8uyQM6nzC-vtGVU8wVOHSojYYPEIE2-kLfyIBm1NdvEp6ylbNZTn5CaXPB9h7QpkrwzRksuzGKGX5SY1l5ndtJlLheOuPi2mudWykddJZuOWaIiAyNb4YsoRVReMgiioG2meWeXCP_q9bGW6NHd8E169LkQeYv5zbgRCxQhAyVEU2TgdfTn8a8T_1mMw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

It's time to make a stand and show the world that Mama Bears like us won't take any nonsense when it comes to protecting our cubs.

They say nothing is scarier than getting between a Mama Bear and her Baby Cubs, but guess what?

This Mama Bear isn't just armed with claws.

I'm asking you to channel that fierce Mama Bear energy to contribute to our cause and stop the indoctrination of our kids!

| [**CONTRIBUTE TODAY!** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dab2b53e82704d4fa1ba0630d1f266c2&_e=iBNiZMEeSCu8jW5rX2n6HqFO2qafPJ6d4Hqaqdmsinzz_pqbtNQMjS2YkJG8RLocj07rI8GIOKF1im5VshHkX1o4_hr6hsfYzXvRdhqa2qCc8AiOMzJ1i3JR2EvGCjvWKOBONay3zrq5oT26gDK_eQV2YD8uyQM6nzC-vtGVU8wVOHSojYYPEIE2-kLfyIBmh_ZJzvVBauEIxCQthDiWsYL4WO_LR23CPP-C7esyXmn4ST4iu2YzNXZIjw8r8bYmATXHBR5p7Iztse33GXgNu1sJV2ce_K79oGn3kQZNEi1MfdZNEFtzAGTMqbxdErgF967gka2aJyOWav4EJqjzmA%3D%3D)
---

Together, we can make sure those who dare to harm our precious little ones know they're messing with the wrong crowd.

Warm regards,

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dab2b53e82704d4fa1ba0630d1f266c2&_e=iBNiZMEeSCu8jW5rX2n6HqFO2qafPJ6d4Hqaqdmsinzz_pqbtNQMjS2YkJG8RLocj07rI8GIOKF1im5VshHkX1o4_hr6hsfYzXvRdhqa2qCc8AiOMzJ1i3JR2EvGCjvWKOBONay3zrq5oT26gDK_eQV2YD8uyQM6nzC-vtGVU8wVOHSojYYPEIE2-kLfyIBmzBPwrN1Tde9wQxPGrHLQA9kDCSsjx5c3Oi06kWB8ZiLIdw23gddLFS4nBtP-2s0I5nmkuCcIogtowB0OLAtEFspYK36KF-YDKj9_DSHxWFALck1dvKjRA77AJ393o5LwpbOfjcWOKYedQCGCam_u8w%3D%3D)

Kari Lake
_Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona_

Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate

body:
We told you 3 things yesterday...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20378%2E4449941%2EiV6V8N)
---

As Israel continues to wage an unrelenting genocide in Gaza, massive protests against it have swept the country and the entire world.
Yet Washington remains unresponsive to popular dissent. The implications may be as disturbing as the state of international human rights in exile.
The pattern of Washington ignoring grassroots demands is nothing new--but every mounting civilian death in Gaza invites a long overdue reckoning.
### **A world united...**
Protests have swept the entire globe over the past week. A [massive crowd descended upon Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/5c6bb8be-2793-42dc-94d5-69f8eee1db25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last weekend, joined by [others in London, Paris, Berlin, and Milan](https://substack.com/redirect/b7263d65-6ebb-47b4-9b56-2389721fff23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Protests spanned from [Senegal](https://substack.com/redirect/ca4e634c-52da-47c1-be0a-7aefc1436788?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to [Japan](https://substack.com/redirect/ca4e634c-52da-47c1-be0a-7aefc1436788?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In San Francisco, tens of thousands [marched](https://substack.com/redirect/c286ff4f-f495-4b76-a9ec-96a5b194a1ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the streets, and mobilized again over the weekend to [block the Cape Orlando](https://substack.com/redirect/0c9bc006-f2ad-430b-bf9f-7a7e2f3ea2e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a ship destined to bring weapons to Israel, from docking in the Port of Oakland. They were followed by [counterparts in Seattle & Tacoma](https://substack.com/redirect/c03febb2-7aae-4292-8d31-56a4e8a749be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who kept the ship from docking there, either.
Only a few times in human history has such global unanimity emerged. One of those moments [preceded](https://substack.com/redirect/b575b7b7-73c3-4fee-a8bd-b6b1e8858284?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the American invasion of Iraq 20 years ago.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e28ad820-c7ee-4a26-a9a4-6e3dea53c5ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by Ted Eytan, Wikimedia Commons
Moreover, the American people have repeatedly chosen antiwar candidates for the White House when given the chance. Obama won the Democratic nomination in 2008 largely [because](https://substack.com/redirect/9a128e2d-a6ed-4334-8df1-1b9b3101bb59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of his stance against the Iraq War, which his leading opponent, Hillary Clinton, foolishly enabled as a Senator. His [record](https://substack.com/redirect/12622d2f-2552-4505-9f79-395288f02353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a president [hardly matched](https://substack.com/redirect/8eb29d28-a1af-4e7e-a287-161a954796c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his rhetoric as a candidate, but the point is that voters came together and tried to force change at the ballot box.
Similarly, when Trump came to Washington, he [claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/90543280-0f42-4a06-8764-d56937545f02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to be an outsider with an antipathy for militarism. That was the crucial distinction that allowed him to outpace a crowded field of Republicans competing for the nomination. Like Obama, Trump [ultimately empowered the CIA](https://substack.com/redirect/8cf44376-592f-4c9d-90e0-bb8458fe710a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (which seemed to [stage coups](https://substack.com/redirect/7cc18bdc-7bf2-43b3-a1be-67cdba679b60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in multiple countries under Trump's administration). Their shared hypocrisy indicates a hole in the bucket of democracy.
Even George W. Bush ran for the White House as an outsider. Journalists indulged him despite his history as the son of a former President and CIA Director who built his career based on a legacy admission to an Ivy League university. Like Trump and Obama, Bush revealed himself in office to be a close ally of the Pentagon.
Each of those figures ran for office as an outsider to Washington unstained by the bipartisan military industrial corruption of which [we were prolifically warned](https://substack.com/redirect/d52e6302-45e9-487f-8d42-b7667d265ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That's why they won their elections.
We the People of the United States, in fact, don't support wars of aggression to [fill the pockets of weapons companies](https://substack.com/redirect/735fc6dc-f5f3-4990-b120-5c8a92a60406?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Try telling that to anyone in Washington.
To stay informed, subscribe for future posts! Subscriptions are free, while paid subscriptions help expand my work.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..9GHWz6O0hOhGhok-ua3_e6zr3RyV63pbl_EMyyx1xno?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=138655455)
### **...against Washington and Tel Aviv**
The global outcry against America's invasion of Iraq 20 years ago fell on deaf ears in Congress--even though the voices of global dissent included millions of voters.
The pattern is no different today.
Thank you for reading! Feel free to share this post with anyone who might learn from it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138655455&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjU1NDU1LCJpYXQiOjE2OTkzMjUzNTQsImV4cCI6MTcwMTkxNzM1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e3s_fOUZgL1T2coLONqMyJOhy20YrOHG3W838ped3yY)
In San Francisco, a one-time epicenter of the antiwar movement, voters took to the streets, organized massive direct action, and forced [controversies](https://substack.com/redirect/aa44b593-9f68-424a-bc7c-f50a283452ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over competing statements by local officials. Similar protests took place [across the country](https://substack.com/redirect/1ba966ff-0809-42e6-a8c0-cf727ac5a6da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from coast-to-coast.
Yet San Francisco's powerful voice in Congress, who served for years as Speaker of the House and the leader among House Democrats, flatly rejected global demands for a ceasefire, disingenuously [claiming that it would only help Hamas](https://substack.com/redirect/31983848-380f-4d8d-9536-e802ff7ef9ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It is precisely the same canard [repeated](https://substack.com/redirect/06529c57-207f-427d-b196-5ea1111c4e27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Biden administration officials [parroting](https://substack.com/redirect/2347a695-978c-4295-aeaf-0120fb3c2693?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) their Israeli counterparts.
The pattern of Washington ignoring grassroots demands is nothing new--but every mounting civilian death in Gaza invites [a long overdue reckoning](https://substack.com/redirect/87d41f8a-67af-44fd-ba7a-709624dcfb44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Even Bernie Sanders, who articulated the most independent foreign-policy of any presidential candidate in the last generation, has fallen prey to the groupthink in Washington. He broke ranks from some fellow Democrats by publicly calling to "[stop the indiscriminate slaughter of innocent people](https://substack.com/redirect/ae5a48b5-4917-471d-b92e-329d7680f016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," yet even he rejected calls for a cease-fire.
[A response by professor Norman Finkelstein](https://open.substack.com/pub/normanfinkelstein/p/a-response-to-senator-bernie-sanders?publication_id=1487884&post_id=138628039&isFreemail=true&r=97w99&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNTQ4NDk0MSwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjI4MDM5LCJpYXQiOjE2OTkyNjg5MTYsImV4cCI6MTcwMTg2MDkxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0ODc4ODQiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.w9de6Cgz9JCmsrP6cQ7anHKk06bMKD9C4BW74Z2ovJE) is worth reading. He notes, among other things, that "when you oppose a ceasefire at this point, you are in effect...and in fact, giving Israel carte blanche to continue to indiscriminately target the civilian infrastructure and the civilian population of Gaza." He observes a painful double standard throughout most discussions of Palestine.
That is the [consensus position among both Democrats and Republicans](https://substack.com/redirect/694ce35f-4220-43c7-a2ad-5eaece5742f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Washington, notwithstanding rhetorical dissent from a [handful](https://substack.com/redirect/940cbc14-abdc-498f-bbd4-c168dccf8a86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of voices who are now facing [opportunistic retaliation](https://substack.com/redirect/3b698710-e68e-446c-9417-02f47b13cd87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a result of speaking out in defense of human rights.
### **What do "democracy" and "fascism" mean?**
Ultimately, popular dissent aims to revoke the "consent of the governed" that political scientists have long described as the essence of democracy: rule by the people.
Yet the competing principles of dissent and consent only matter to the extent that We the People actually had any influence in Washington, which we most certainly do not. A decade ago, researchers from Princeton and Northwestern universities [established](https://substack.com/redirect/d6013c95-000c-42d9-82f4-fa596f121b3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that, as an empirical matter, congressional policy tracks not public opinion, but rather the interests of capital.
In [their own words](https://substack.com/redirect/d6013c95-000c-42d9-82f4-fa596f121b3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Multivariate analysis indicates that economic elites and organized groups representing business interests have substantial independent impacts on US government policy, while average citizens and mass-based interest groups have little or no independent influence.
The British Broadcasting Corporation [summed](https://substack.com/redirect/d6013c95-000c-42d9-82f4-fa596f121b3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it up "In English: the wealthy few move policy, while the average American has little power."
Despite the rhetoric of self-interested officials, no one in Washington cares what voters think. As long as participants in protests and outraged voices on social media platforms continue to buy things and go to work, the war machine can comfortably ignore expressions of dissent.
That is precisely the essence of fascism.
As long as Wall Street enjoys continuity, it can ensure path dependency in Washington. When business insulates politics from popular accountability, they inevitably turn a blind eye to human rights violations, and then grow to encourage and rely on them.
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138655455&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjU1NDU1LCJpYXQiOjE2OTkzMjUzNTQsImV4cCI6MTcwMTkxNzM1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e3s_fOUZgL1T2coLONqMyJOhy20YrOHG3W838ped3yY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments)
The only tools in the box of "democracy" that could stop the war machine in Washington is [mass work stoppage](https://substack.com/redirect/22f9f769-f184-40f2-8fdc-1d460b39acc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Boycotts theoretically offer an alternative, but the military industrial complex is principally composed of companies that sell to government agencies or other businesses, leaving few ways for consumers to withhold resources from critical decision makers.
### **An inconvenient truth**
Americans pride ourselves on our nation's history of introducing democracy to the modern world. But bipartisan support in Washington for Israel's unfolding genocide in Gaza, like bipartisan support for previous wars for profit initiated by the CIA and the Pentagon, suggests that America's connection to democracy is a bit like the connection between water and fire.
Paid subscribers can access a collection of articles by a handful of other writers who I respect. They include Seymour Hersh, Robin Buller, Norman Finkelstein, James Risen, and a pair of voices from Gaza whose reports have found a global audience--but apparently not yet one in Washington...

body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_t=VGFFjdUQo37IzlcSRirjeiHkDCCdfKMF5Q3drS4YuHy0094zcXBdRvSPgYD7MG6pwHD7M1H2VGzLWXxXldaUNI0CekLt2d2Uld_n0gT4Vao%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_t=VGFFjdUQo37IzlcSRirjeiHkDCCdfKMF5Q3drS4YuHy0094zcXBdRvSPgYD7MG6pwHD7M1H2VGzLWXxXldaUNI0CekLt2d2Uld_n0gT4Vao%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgEv4C0sUxKWKNOZuTccMo1wrFV3UR6CAD_cqSjy0tmkqiK71oTulXaGWVUHoQwua4q8ZqboAZaPL_8-lSOBLbvG_CO4TvpLGCwKgPJCKTi5uSO2Q_mxA21-wZ1n0X52T5INMvBtWHxkx04kHG04e2rYQZGAqFF6n_xi5Em9ooi7dQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgFZl89GidqsyYoNW1ZFbCf-0KPDKUy1sMnT5NK99t6TKxDE3AGgxFHWeQTiiEL-b6tF34b6ak_3Ia5dGWgqDhqCGc-Dq40Ouu1rNQHY_Zp4aqLbEBNKsY4h7n8SD84Fy6jXesrNfyMvXX7RCfEFPEytqVvWKCDRZk4-T9h6D5uqTw%3D%3D) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgH_3GinzNaZYNKtZPa53aMflVQRcsf_mPpn1FNGKkn7zO5AiNvug-YushqeqoiTAqX3C8d6GNV_1rS0j26bDrDZWCf8KK8WpgxyeAO63DHAGD6Un6MGX2yPFVQpuTIsGq95GfI01OmO8VjNGnPYuL56_yU_ira4aDY5diiPmDXz2A%3D%3D)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgHuu45PsT_ahkTCIfHm1bmQBy-BHB-qH1RyVckYwoe58s6PwFTttkqhbTvVyY-J7LMvtZV3AF8PiSK8f-w3PEz-USrR6id32SraUIC5hxDhKo6Rrfdy5Z4xEl3N1uVy0SGCXX2ZIzj5UhZJ0tNQ-jiTA9dyODyU1Hxcb7ieDuvDhA%3D%3D)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgFGsfJf-NR0L01MhIpcwf4QYdL2KQq7igGYfaUwYKV4GgsyoGtpkEF1P_ilmBSGxA7b5RakRMAuOQADJdn17fvW2m8Qv_fZjsX6Z6o5cA9dnxd-NOFcRkqtVJ_p0ZOx_Vm4trvW83paaxycB_fZny8y8piWQdCSd1FE1kYH5ZqcxA%3D%3D)

I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgGl9u41epvhUGHQrdjQpH5uRzD2fumiEfBFydZbTCVeMMvaIzIqVGsrrJChVIyxPCsLf1caE70lBIwEm8UgB9vs5QkOxa5wKYOJpkU0az3NmyhTzD8mCksixdCibD470rC3PhA8uzreA0zK1aVq--kbafU0Y6Zx6vwBWxpcbdby6Q%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgEh_VowUJaqD5yzCgn1I-Y4h4EmfdQPD4ETXhdltr-n1BvzsJYhDgw0K7dYrb37tEZjTaM0Im5KM85mOKf70cB1XJTCFFeFhAksZKj-EVCAPdsf1-xmV-C-a-L-2KR1eB-5BBfluHAnAa-Hhhwf0dv2rVWACmIwE8jex7Za0KpO0g%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around – IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bd5b1b91faa4890b64b993b14da9fad&_e=vzCFCmwP7Plus3XAZwCzFANX927WKygQGFIURPuopcRX-C3gnb58uwBnyU2MMvdu0qVFjMyhGtWNs20wn49aMIW94Xqx-xnFNEfJOZzBC8WCEncJc6zDmceG6chBTYY-Z20cSgQw3Dx0TOStr5N3M26jBNnPdPa3d69wEOfIUqLbLAOWUJX_yN8_ashCRxOzhg2PlHYRg42dKD4u4NC7V3F7aPZOURpVNEPoB09vJgGSphgwuBatMtssC5tX480_HhFGU4H9gR-ABSe4V42O87kpt-zASgX4pR4TPxkmUiq7O-whxXGS9bZfMYGrG5fZd1PEdSS6A0s-juXK7Az71nqNWbBgXdpRJk3cajhrvbli8ME13jDygw5soP5GwfvA9GvIhW-lYj6P5smXAwJTVQ%3D%3D)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: URGENT: Pro-Life Friend, you need to make sure you...
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

It’s official! Tomorrow, November 7th, is Election Day – _and I have a last-minute update for you!_

As you might already know, our student activists have been working around the clock this whole week to make sure the pro-life movement rolls over the Abortion Lobby in both Ohio and Virginia.

But the work they’ve done for us has had **_FAR MORE_** impact than we could have hoped for!

So, if you can possibly help our students make ONE FINAL PUSH for the pro-life movement before the election tomorrow, **[would you please consider making a generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to _Students for Life Action_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjttyly-duchtdja-y/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, I even have a few short stories to share with you proving how effective they’ve been during crunch time!

At Bowling Green State University, a student texted her pro-abortion friends to come over to a display our students had set up to learn about Ohio’s _Issue 1_ Abortion Referendum.

After seeing our booth, they became concerned about the radical amendment, since it would allow abortion through all nine months.

Not only that, but they learned a lot of the propaganda they were being fed from Planned Parenthood and their pals in the press regarding care for pregnant women was baloney!

**_Not long after, all of these young people pledged to vote no on _Issue 1__!**

In another case, a student at Kent State University came up to our students and our display shouting about how we shouldn't be "advocating for abortion bans.”

One of our _Students for Life_ leaders then calmly explained that, at that display, they were merely bringing awareness to the abortion _extremism_ that _Issue 1_ would bring to Ohio.

After listening to the explanation of what _Issue 1_ could mean for Ohio, reading through the actual text of the amendment, and realizing that a "NO" vote would leave the law as-is, she pledged to change her vote!

Pro-Life Friend, these are just SOME of the stories I could tell you.

Our students have changed hearts and minds at other colleges like Cleveland State University, Miami University (OH), and more – _not to mention so many in Virginia that I can’t even list them here!_

So, to show our student activists some appreciation for their hard work, **[could you please make your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjttyly-duchtdja-j/)?**

With tomorrow being the biggest day of 2023 and the biggest day until Tuesday, November 5th, 2024, we need your **_IMMEDIATE_** support!

**[So please make a generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ TODAY – _even just $10 will help us across the finish line_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjttyly-duchtdja-i/)!**

And please also pray for a **_HUGE_** pro-life turnout tomorrow.

Thanks for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – It’s official! Tomorrow, November 7th, is Election Day!

Our student activists have been working around the clock for the past 72 hours to make sure we come away with huge victories in Ohio and Virginia.

That’s why, in order to get ONE FINAL PUSH for the pro-life movement before the election tomorrow, **[would you please consider making a generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjttyly-duchtdja-d/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.
