clean_body: Dear Pro-Life Friend, It’s official! Tomorrow, November 7th, is Election Day – and I have a last-minute update for you! As you might already know, our student activists have been working around the clock this whole week to make sure the pro-life movement rolls over the Abortion Lobby in both Ohio and Virginia. But the work they’ve done for us has had FAR MORE impact than we could have hoped for! So, if you can possibly help our students make ONE FINAL PUSH for the pro-life movement before the election tomorrow, ? Pro-Life Friend, I even have a few short stories to share with you proving how effective they’ve been during crunch time! At Bowling Green State University, a student texted her pro-abortion friends to come over to a display our students had set up to learn about Ohio’s Issue 1 Abortion Referendum. After seeing our booth, they became concerned about the radical amendment, since it would allow abortion through all nine months. Not only that, but they learned a lot of the propaganda they were being fed from Planned Parenthood and their pals in the press regarding care for pregnant women was baloney! Not long after, all of these young people pledged to vote no on Issue 1! In another case, a student at Kent State University came up to our students and our display shouting about how we shouldn't be "advocating for abortion bans.” One of our Students for Life leaders then calmly explained that, at that display, they were merely bringing awareness to the abortion extremism that Issue 1 would bring to Ohio. After listening to the explanation of what Issue 1 could mean for Ohio, reading through the actual text of the amendment, and realizing that a "NO" vote would leave the law as-is, she pledged to change her vote! Pro-Life Friend, these are just SOME of the stories I could tell you. Our students have changed hearts and minds at other colleges like Cleveland State University, Miami University (OH), and more – not to mention so many in Virginia that I can’t even list them here! So, to show our student activists some appreciation for their hard work, ? With tomorrow being the biggest day of 2023 and the biggest day until Tuesday, November 5th, 2024, we need your IMMEDIATE support! ! And please also pray for a HUGE_ pro-life turnout tomorrow. Thanks for everything you do for Life! For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action P.S. – It’s official! Tomorrow, November 7th, is Election Day! Our student activists have been working around the clock for the past 72 hours to make sure we come away with huge victories in Ohio and Virginia. That’s why, in order to get ONE FINAL PUSH for the pro-life movement before the election tomorrow, ? | Friends,
Today is the Big Day. I ask for your prayers and your vote for me and for fellow Republicans all across Virginia. Please go get ten friends to vote today so we can win and help Governor Glenn Youngkin make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family!
We are excited to have received the following endorsements:

* Governor Glenn Youngkin has endorsed John McGuire.

* The Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL), the Virginia pro-life affiliate of the National Right to Life Committee chose to endorse Republican John McGuire first in Virginia this year because of my solid record and legislation to protect life.

* The Virginia Citizen Defense League (VCDL), Virginia's premier pro-gun organization, chose to endorse Republican John McGuire first this year in Virginia because of my "hard hitting pro-gun legislation".

* Lt. Gen. William G. "Jerry" Boykin Lieutenant General (Retired) U.S. Army endorsed John McGuire

* Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired) endorsed John McGuire.

---
| | |
---|---
|
We oppose communism and we oppose Totalitarianism. The Declaration of Independence reminds us to put Tyrants on notice and the United States Constitution is a Bulwark against Tyranny. Our Republic is in trouble. I am fired up, full of energy, and with regard to the near future "I will do what I must".

We will not be saved by a donkey or an elephant; we will be saved by a Lamb. Take care, please vote, and I cannot wait to see you around the district!

name: Connor Boyack
subject: This public school did something jaw-dropping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
No, I’m not going to show you some public school promoting woke nonsense.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z82zkqgckbgvA5HhxWByPg&sysid=1 "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

No, I’m not going to show you some public school promoting woke nonsense.

_In fact, I’m going to show you the opposite._

Here is what we are achieving with the Tuttle Twins, and I wanted to show you first.

When a school district in Katy, Texas, was looking for new educational books to add to their school library, one series they knew they needed to add was the Tuttle Twins.

So these parents took action:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z82zkqgckbgvA5HhxWByPg&sysid=1)

My ultimate goal is to distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools, libraries, and families this year!

With this delivery of books, I’m one step closer to achieving my goal. But we’re getting closer to the end of the year, and I still need to distribute thousands of books before then.

I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month to distribute more books to children. Every $10 we raise allows us to give a child a copy of a Tuttle Twins book. [Please chip in $10, $20, $50, or even $100 today to give a book to a child.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hIsjlejH5yH843I%2fYWRdwQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $10 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HHRJBQ%2fR3EaFY8vAJRAMqQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $20 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xC8B2C4LX%2bWS%2falTvVAfng&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 = 5 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672490%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ltxj3heSmMAAb5nkj9Ss%2fw&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 = 10 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672491%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6A1S%2btf78gn6cW1pGfc6mg&sysid=1)

[Donate $200 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672492%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8BdtVRoyHx5aIpkjapgLpg&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 = 50 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672493%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uN47gAAthk44aDCbiYHuRA&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672494%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hKz1hyU%2fYBUAFRBWCJW%2bWA&sysid=1)

I created the Tuttle Twins books to teach kids American history and the values of liberty, free markets, and limited government. And they have proven to be effective at teaching these values to children. They even include discussion questions in each book to help kids understand the principles covered.

_That’s why these teachers and administrators love them so much_.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z82zkqgckbgvA5HhxWByPg&sysid=1)
_“I was thrilled to be able to watch these books be given to elementary schools today! Thank you, Katy Elementary and Woodcreek Elementary, for allowing us to be a part of that moment!”_
**- Morgan Calhoun, Katy ISD Trustee**

**But the best part is kids love reading the Tuttle Twins books!**

They enjoy the stories so much that they forget that they are reading an educational book.

What they don’t forget are the lessons they’ve learned from reading them.

**The Tuttle Twins books are creating a new generation of kids excited about the values of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.**

All we have to do is get more books in the hands of students. You can help me achieve that goal by clicking any button below.

[Donate $10 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672405%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZ1ZFVrTVHg8Dql3ps8nMQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $20 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xC8B2C4LX%2bWS%2falTvVAfng&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 = 5 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672490%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ltxj3heSmMAAb5nkj9Ss%2fw&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 = 10 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672491%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6A1S%2btf78gn6cW1pGfc6mg&sysid=1)

[Donate $200 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672492%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8BdtVRoyHx5aIpkjapgLpg&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 = 50 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672493%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uN47gAAthk44aDCbiYHuRA&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672494%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hKz1hyU%2fYBUAFRBWCJW%2bWA&sysid=1)

Teachers and students aren’t the only ones who love the Tuttle Twins series. Parents often tell me about some of the great conversations they have with their kids after they read the books.

They are happy to have an alternative to woke indoctrination usually found in today’s children’s books.

Instead, they are able to offer their children a better understanding of our nation’s history and values so they can know how to secure their liberty in the future.

When you donate $10, or whatever you can afford today, you are helping us provide a copy of the Tuttle Twins books to another child. Please click below to give.

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672406%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0C8aWVxK3SljBFz0c%2b4YHg&sysid=1)

Thank you for inspiring the next generation,

Connor Boyack

Paid for by Libertas Institute

American Update

**The IRS is trying to close the tax loophole** that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market crashes and recessions. **[Learn More](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z75mcg2ldiheqkqnjdmpr868bvmu6rf64o0q7p30_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)**

](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvoh5tk0v2132dlnpomppog5lvm7bj762n1jm13o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)**With recession looming and inflation at a 40-year high, **this asset hedges against economic uncertainty.** [**Learn More**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcshv40bf3djm7l33k02ql6qs0ehbnrspvbb1vqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)
# ****This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement** **
We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that's threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what 's worse is that our income can't keep pace**. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. _[Request your free guide now to inflation-proof your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjb2h73n0fe4cdh4r5glpvnh2e9b2qd8pr2gif90_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)_ Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, **our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further.** **It 's so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship.** _Paul Tudor Jones_ , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. _Jeremy Grantham_ , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and "an accompanying decline in stock prices." Even _Warren Buffet_ has sold off $33b of his stocks, piling up cash in advance of the predicted recession. **Whether you 're aged 45, 55, near retirement, or in retirement, doing nothing to _[protect your wealth](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk9bdefr0suupt84j2vgajt8et5j8iskhmvq44so_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)_ is not an option.** It's a fool's gambit. _[Protect what you have now. This**FREE Inflation Protection Kit** will show you how.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfhv3hpf19d2pro7tv47et9pv6vej3vh40u2pk80_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)_ While we can't stop inflation or prevent interest rates from rising, we can protect our savings and retirement from the whims of the Fed and market volatility. Seize control of your financial future. This **_[FREE Inflation Protection Kit](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zak8r9p76ttu0q7firjgsd5js0jag0fe78s6v108_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o74c1h2bs)_** is your beacon through the storm and can guide you safely during these treacherous times.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Please watch this before my next debate.
body:
Thank you for taking a moment out of your day

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zppc7727dhhg51bjsdoa0uojegeolmconrb3nk3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)
---

Friend,

It's Nikki Haley here, and with the third debate tomorrow, I want to take a moment to share my story and my vision for a strong and proud America with you.

**Throughout my life, I have dedicated myself to standing for America and defending the values she was founded on.** This commitment has been at the core of everything I've done, whether it was during my time as South Carolina's governor or while representing America on the global stage at the United Nations. I firmly believe that these values are the foundation of our great nation, and I am determined to uphold them as your next President of the United States.

**I want you to hear my vision for America directly from me. That 's why I'm sending you this quick video. **

---
| | [WATCH NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z65var2vn2rh6rbg1kk96ftpm7dkcbmbmo9jmrno_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

Thank you for taking a moment out of your day to watch.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zllbvh17eetlh6ht1mkjft8qhau2jdq92cpe3si8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

Nikki Haley

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za5i6jetr876u3se904na07b0n0bg7625jbhs128_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3pk99jmh1lut3b60os0rk3qod3rv3d9qub974c0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrj57qr3dvj26ia81undu0l7n1g0soefh1b8rtvo_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt743kcf76pb4bfa2v7p3u7hriivl4qsnqv16ep0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

No, I’m not going to show you some public school promoting woke nonsense.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69s859ieffihl4984onvodv6pfvo8c0tah6ojig_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

No, I'm not going to show you some public school promoting woke nonsense.

_In fact, I 'm going to show you the opposite._

Here is what we are achieving with the Tuttle Twins, and I wanted to show you first.

When a school district in Katy, Texas, was looking for new educational books to add to their school library, one series they knew they needed to add was the Tuttle Twins.

So these parents took action:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd77fa37vapon4hblrmtup8jv4ro38i7mr34a83o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

My ultimate goal is to distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools, libraries, and families this year!

With this delivery of books, I'm one step closer to achieving my goal. But we're getting closer to the end of the year, and I still need to distribute thousands of books before then.

I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month to distribute more books to children. Every $10 we raise allows us to give a child a copy of a Tuttle Twins book. [Please chip in $10, $20, $50, or even $100 today to give a book to a child.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9n2cvhmcqdakl348ehh4354117drlue60qia57o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $10 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeb5hhsj8bor81ehau8jk5jn7mbet6geev11pi1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $20 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdsturn2apghqu5usf9nfdendrn0hlvn33it49lg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 5 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh83c5t85nlkrpl354ci4mjnlfibbgruc0bhr2k8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 10 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jh1m8oab5bup52nhilvlhdibitp8efded58qag_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z744h2pgjursq7dgke84ernovmmbn7i5rsmth0qo_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 50 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4e23v0jvsviv2d9k780kftvbm6pl85v4rtt2to_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6sspj85e329c3kn7o7bc24pmiu7mnpfvti854e0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

I created the Tuttle Twins books to teach kids American history and the values of liberty, free markets, and limited government. And they have proven to be effective at teaching these values to children. They even include discussion questions in each book to help kids understand the principles covered.

_That 's why these teachers and administrators love them so much_.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn7acf45oul3fdbtt3gq19s7hu0kp0f422j0mc2g_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)
_" I was thrilled to be able to watch these books be given to elementary schools today! Thank you, Katy Elementary and Woodcreek Elementary, for allowing us to be a part of that moment!"_
**- Morgan Calhoun, Katy ISD Trustee**

**But the best part is kids love reading the Tuttle Twins books!**

They enjoy the stories so much that they forget that they are reading an educational book.

What they don't forget are the lessons they've learned from reading them.

**The Tuttle Twins books are creating a new generation of kids excited about the values of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.**

All we have to do is get more books in the hands of students. You can help me achieve that goal by clicking any button below.

[Donate $10 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38g0qlb11agdm83rm71jt58vuhffd1ld1b0sflg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $20 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbr5ggp4e6lgtfj4litub48ss1iip3enh309r0ao_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 5 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmg2p50pjklmnon29m0rcjusg0l295ag0lloffm0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 10 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlq67ao5gln5c60salc2jqhoggph96ogus13m8to_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qte7hs15gu7cfhsko85t6iiu1ohsmmopoirpmo_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 50 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3lsvqugmlk6qdrp1s5s3utd6dd4jv4ffs9deeo8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5j73u03m08pkirpchehe64tqmmr817dttgs8dg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

Teachers and students aren't the only ones who love the Tuttle Twins series. Parents often tell me about some of the great conversations they have with their kids after they read the books.

They are happy to have an alternative to woke indoctrination usually found in today's children's books.

Instead, they are able to offer their children a better understanding of our nation's history and values so they can know how to secure their liberty in the future.

When you donate $10, or whatever you can afford today, you are helping us provide a copy of the Tuttle Twins books to another child. Please click below to give.

[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc561fe0j6j55hou5s8mi101rj9tam3gqqq2jtag_rp22sh2s8i66p74spim2o72clh2bs)

Thank you for inspiring the next generation,

Connor Boyack

name: Huffines Liberty Foundation
subject: Reducing Illegal Immigration and its Costs in Texas
body:
Close to 2.5 million illegal aliens were encountered by law enforcement at the Southwest U.S. border in the most recent (2023) fiscal year.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-n/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Reducing Illegal Immigration and its Costs in Texas**
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, November 6, 2023 -- Close to 2.5 million illegal aliens were encountered by law enforcement at the Southwest U.S. border in the most recent (2023) fiscal year. More than half of those were in Texas. This cost is high, more than $13 billion a year. To put that amount in context, it is more than 10 percent of Texas' annual spending.The most important step that can be taken to reduce these costs is to secure the U.S. border with Mexico. Unfortunately, neither federal nor state politicians are seriously trying to shut down the border to illegal immigration.The next best thing we can do is make Texas less attractive to current and potential illegal aliens. And perhaps the best way we can do that is to eliminate the many government benefits that illegal aliens take advantage of upon their arrival in Texas.**The place to start eliminating these benefits is in education.** The cost of educating illegal aliens is far higher than any other cost imposed by illegal immigration on Texans. Including both public education and higher education, the costs likely exceed $7 billion a year. Texas has tried in the past to recover some of these costs from illegal aliens and the federal government. In both cases, Texas has been rebuffed by the federal courts.To reduce these costs and the benefits that help attract illegal aliens to Texas, the Foundation makes these recommendations:

**1) eliminate in-state tuition for illegal aliens;
2) place a moratorium on enrollment of illegal aliens in public schools until the U.S. government reimburses the costs;
3) require proof of citizenship status for students and parents of students; and
4) require Texas school districts to count and report all noncitizen students and all children of noncitizens.**The federal government has forced Texans to spend billions of dollars each year to pay for the cost of open borders. Not only is this failure expensive in monetary terms, but it also contributes to the loss of America's cultural identity. In addition to taking steps to secure the border without the federal government's help, the Texas Legislature should pass laws, including those identified in our latest paper, to make Texas a less attractive place for illegal aliens to come to and live in. [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-j/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-t/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-u/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-o/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-p/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-vtllikd-l-c)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-b/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-vtllikd-17329976-yuddtktydi-q) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-vtllikd-yuddtktydi-a/)

body:

# **365 DAYS TO SAVE AMERICA!**

### Friend,
### In exactly one year, our great state of Wisconsin will stand at a pivotal crossroads, and will be one of the deciding states for America's next president. We have the opportunity to chart the course for a brighter and more prosperous future, [but to make it happen, we need your support _**TODAY**_!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xquhjl-didthutlhu-y/)
### Election Day 2024 will be a defining moment for our state and our nation. Our shared conservative values, the principles that have made Wisconsin strong, are on the line. We only have 365 days to make the case to people across Wisconsin, and we need to have to resources _**NOW**_ to start our campaign.
[🇺🇸 DONATE NOW 🇺🇸](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xquhjl-didthutlhu-j/)
### Your support is the foundation of our strength. By joining forces and rallying behind our candidates, we can ensure that the values we hold dear are represented in the halls of power.
[PITCH IN TO SAVE THE FUTURE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xquhjl-didthutlhu-t/)
### The clock is ticking, and our time to make a difference is now. Wisconsin deserves principled leadership that will guide us to prosperity. Together, we can make it happen!

](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35185%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bpxnu2jn6IZ0eAv3uf5h%2fQ&sysid=1)**With recession looming and inflation at a 40-year high, **this asset hedges against economic uncertainty.** [**Learn More**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35187%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X5D09VbpbGUxoYNHPa2LvA&sysid=1)
* * *
# ****This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement** **
We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that’s threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what’s worse is that our income can’t keep pace**. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. _[Request your free guide now to inflation-proof your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35188%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a95P8vL7h%2fP8S6pyrl3Ieg&sysid=1)_ Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, **our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further.** **It’s so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship.** _Paul Tudor Jones_ , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. _Jeremy Grantham_ , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and “an accompanying decline in stock prices.” Even _Warren Buffet_ has sold off $33b of his stocks, piling up cash in advance of the predicted recession. **Whether you’re aged 45, 55, near retirement, or in retirement, doing nothing to _[protect your wealth](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35189%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nqbj6QntYdKnMJrFEiFjWw&sysid=1)_ is not an option.** It’s a fool’s gambit. _[Protect what you have now. This**FREE Inflation Protection Kit** will show you how.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35180%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MFVBTMw1ZPaa9fmUluHF9w&sysid=1)_ While we can’t stop inflation or prevent interest rates from rising, we can protect our savings and retirement from the whims of the Fed and market volatility. Seize control of your financial future. This **_[FREE Inflation Protection Kit](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sYRPgxJpBa%2bz%2b1lvDWBTKQ&sysid=1)_** is your beacon through the storm and can guide you safely during these treacherous times.

name: Caleb Max
subject: Reminder: We Must Win - Please Vote on Tuesday
body:
Polls Open Tuesday from 6:00am to 7:00pm
| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| We Must Win!
---
| Friends,
The future of Virginia is on the line. We are faced with crucial elections up and down the ballot from Treasurer to State Senate. The last months I have been working tirelessly with Juan Pablo Segura and the Renew Virginia Pac to hold Republican seats and flip our State Senate.
It has been inspiring to see the outpouring of support for so many of our candidates, but none of that will matter if we do not finish the job. To finish the job we must ensure high turnout on Tuesday. We need you to vote, tell your friends to vote, post on your social media pages, knock on your neighbors' door, drive an elderly person in to vote, whatever it takes.
Whether we like to admit it or not, the Democrats have a grip on Northern Virginia. We are blessed to have an amazing Republican Governor in Glenn Younkgin, as well as other statewide offices like AG Miyares and LG Sears. However, they will not be able to pass a lasting conservative agenda without winning our State Senate.
That is why I am imploring you to come out and support our amazing Northern Virginia and 10th district specific candidates like [Juan Pablo Segura](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwT8NkRW7KHkwALyDGNBSOm0UGPMfpPx4VyglktmSvcaueuWfHXkfUDlPCEoaSQbZFHQRvdHz0PiJCghdHlwV2sZN5dH-ICnCH9RZs_PMiToRBsQojNS9EgJAdD1Y3UlXABmMiE4lLH5Lx6pqvX5OA==&c=VzmBCJSwSrV0IqMrOfkMO3LBjJN65nNZDrpGzvi_fdhCsntvCs9QVQ==&ch=tltt61rG7KPINltF1ZutyDQY9AivV161IMQIqbwNbQx2RtLE8P7D9Q==) and [Bill Woolf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwT8NkRW7KHkwALyDGNBSOm0UGPMfpPx4VyglktmSvcaueuWfHXkfYfUfW6a0gUmCJYEoRE2idsHTEW6adg8JcYCyuGfNr_1xTO_XXQgs6NNBBq7vFYC6GAlFhi9984C__b6fPoJDlEbE_dn8m3cLw==&c=VzmBCJSwSrV0IqMrOfkMO3LBjJN65nNZDrpGzvi_fdhCsntvCs9QVQ==&ch=tltt61rG7KPINltF1ZutyDQY9AivV161IMQIqbwNbQx2RtLE8P7D9Q==).
I have had the distinct pleasure of campaigning and working for Juan Pablo Segura everyday since March. We have visited Mosques, churches, Latin businesses and churches, Cattlemen meetings, County Fairs, farmers markets and dozens of other community events.
They say the way you campaign is the way you will govern and it is clear that Juan Pablo has put in the work to earn your support and will be a fantastic representative in Richmond. He has pledged to lower the cost to commuters but instituted a rebate for tolls. He has pledged to preserve our rural heritage by keeping Data Centers off of our farmland. He has pledged to continue being a voice to the voiceless in many of our working immigrant communities. We need Juan Pablo Segura in District 31 and for all of Virginia.
This upcoming Monday the 6th at 6:30PM at the Segra Field in Leesburg, is the FINAL rally before the election with Governor Youngkin, Lt. Governor Sears and Attorney General Miyares. I hope that you will attend and invite your friends. [Details HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwT8NkRW7KHkwALyDGNBSOm0UGPMfpPx4VyglktmSvcaueuWfHXkfY-wFOWA0Q_dXC2aqZix-EEVo5EDwjEnbwn-L1dY4Ahzcwg4diVPfCmulHAUVLUdKsnwU9KkATdmO_HvtFHmWsadzJEw_sajFQ2AFMQOCAgT01xWZG2zj-Kpfz0nC98LXc45jJSy88-8GlfSaiX8ezM=&c=VzmBCJSwSrV0IqMrOfkMO3LBjJN65nNZDrpGzvi_fdhCsntvCs9QVQ==&ch=tltt61rG7KPINltF1ZutyDQY9AivV161IMQIqbwNbQx2RtLE8P7D9Q==).
And remember to vote on Tuesday, November 7th!
Thank you and God bless, Caleb
P.S. If you don't know your location to vote, follow the link below and it will provide you with your polling location. Thank you again for voting!

subject: 🗳️ It’s Election Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Hey Friend \- Happy Election Day 2023!
We just wanted to drop a quick note to remind you that if you didn’t vote early in person or via absentee ballot, today is the day to get out and make your voice heard.

It’s so important that we prevail in key municipal races and then keep up our momentum as we head into the presidential election year!

**The polls are NOW OPEN and will remain so until 6:00 pm EST tonight. **

You can find your polling location HERE: [https://indianavoters.in.gov/](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2f477864703421c43947229f28c3afba/24f088c40bce3aa2c3d6b838967d376c/40313)

Thank you for being part of the team and thank you for taking time to **VOTE REPUBLICAN **today!

\- Indiana Republican Party

Friend,

Last night's rally was fun. It's not every day that you get an endorsement from one of the most incredible governors in the country and witness excitement for a presidential candidate explode across a state.

Now, we're counting down the hours until we see even more momentum for Ron DeSantis explode across the nation.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb5830aacc148ef5e8ea2bf4af6a906bbef02073e8084768ca6a864425d22840dbed973e4a4966dda203ec50f40adca1eb510

We caused a national stir last night when Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds endorsed Ron DeSantis. Everyone will be looking to take us down tomorrow night, but with your support, they don't stand a chance. We have less than 24 hours to take this momentum one step further and raise the resources to arm Ron DeSantis with the support he needs.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb5835ff9451622c9284c51344c99c5c35be3bd0e0a20e18dc0459c46c33529d88f5b3a3d51256ccebef8bc6194deae5f601a

DONATE NOW: $50

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb583b3f8a566d9dabe8c8edd1f2811eee8e60244b801513de4b998a4c318d24313728dc313a6819fb6b1fac56ca63c5f1859

Help fuel the momentum Ron DeSantis EARNED last night. Push him toward another debate victory before time runs out!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb5833d89209d4c49edbf47c37c4551c1e7592c4d51434f7330e9dc17041da6bed4e7edc7203ca9857be9138d162075c13eeb

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb583e41b1a6de013430e0aafde176e633be61f64a966885de4327d5a022e65cc820c6b27b82c615214b9b5b774b13a088c9b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb5830aacc148ef5e8ea2bf4af6a906bbef02073e8084768ca6a864425d22840dbed973e4a4966dda203ec50f40adca1eb510

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6bf7dd93f25fb5830aacc148ef5e8ea2bf4af6a906bbef02073e8084768ca6a864425d22840dbed973e4a4966dda203ec50f40adca1eb510

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Christine Drazan
subject: Kotek doesn’t want to repeal M110
body:
even though Oregonians want to.
[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,**In a recent interview with "Think Out Loud," Gov. Kotek revealed she has no intention of repealing M110, even though she is aware that is what the people of Oregon want.** I believe that the people's voices should be heard and respected, and that's why I need your support.We all know how devastating M110 has been on our communities and our lives. [_**It 's crucial that we do everything in our power to repeal it, which is why it's imperative that you sign the petition if you haven't already.**_](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-y/) [SIGN THE PETITION TO REPEAL M110](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-j/) Friend, we've seen the power of collective action before, and I firmly believe that if enough voices unite, we can create change. **We can 't let our elected leaders continue to ignore the people who elected them.** **[Add your name to the petition before we turn the signatures in to Kotek tomorrow.](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-t/)** Join us in making change in our state.Thank you, Christine Drazan [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-i/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-d/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-h/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-o/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xqkho-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xqkho-dihkkhuuli-n/)
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: WHY YOU SHOULD VOTE NO ON PROP HH!
body:
Episode #21 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-r/) Hi Peter, This week, we're diving headfirst into a hot-button issue right here in Colorado: **[Proposition HH](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-y/)** . This ballot measure, an initiative being heavily pushed by Governor Jared Polis and his dark money groups, aims to **destroy the Taxpayer's Bill of Rights (TABOR)** \- one of the most important pieces of legislation we've had in Colorado history - by eliminating the surplus payments back to taxpayers OVER TIME. While Prop HH claims to lower property tax in the short term, the long-term effect will cost taxpayers tens of millions of dollars in taxes. **TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY. What's the price of not voting? Losing our TABOR tax refunds FOREVER.** In this episode, I interview Pete Sepp from the [National Taxpayers Union](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-j/) on the importance of TABOR and why we must protect it at all costs, not just for Colorado, but for our nation. We also discuss [Attorney General Phil Weiser's involvement in an alarming anti-trust lawsuit against Google](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-t/). More on that below.
### **Episode #21 - FAITH TO FREEDOM:
SPEAKING TRUTH AND VOTING YOUR VALUES**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-i/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-d/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-h/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-k/) [READ HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-b/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-n/)_
### **TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY. GET OUT AND VOTE!**
**Below is my voter guide!** Get out there and VOTE. Local elections are just as important, if not MORE important, than national elections. These candidates and campaigns are on the frontlines of the battle for our kids, safety, and state. I know them all personally and can say with absolute confidence that they will do what's best to protect our families and freedoms. Don't let your vote go to waste and tell everyone in your circle of influence to vote, too.
### **STATEWIDE ⤵️**
❌ [**NO TO PROP HH**](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-p/) ❌
### **LOCAL ⤵️**
❌ **Douglas County School District: **[Vote NO to 5A and 5B](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-x/)
**✅ Douglas County School Board: **[Best DCSD](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-m/) \-- Maria Sumnicht, Jason Page, Andy Jones
**✅ Woodland Park School Board: **[Cassie Kimbrell](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-c/) _,_[Mick Bates](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-q/) _,_[Dave Illingworth](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-a/)
✅ **Aurora City Council: **[Stephanie Hancock](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-f/) and [Jono Scott](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-z/)
✅ **City of Aurora:** [Mayor Mike Coffman for Re-election](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-v/)
✅ **City of Pueblo:** [Randy Thurston for Mayor](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-e/)
✅ **City of Lakewood:**[Don Burkhart for Mayor](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-s/)

### **So why should you care about the Phil Weiser lawsuit?**
[News broke](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-g/) this summer that a Federal judge dismissed a significant portion of a lawsuit [Colorado AG Phil Weiser](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-w/) is leading re: stifling competition in tech.**In a nutshell:** Weiser is using taxpayer funds to fund the questionable lawsuit and is distracted from other important priorities to Coloradans - like rising crime rates, fentanyl deaths, etc. Pete joins us to discuss the trial slated in September as well as a larger conversation about taxpayer-funded issues and big tech regulations.Weiser joined over 35 other attorneys general in a suit against Google for search engine monopoly that would stifle competition. **Why should you care?** It would chill innovation in tech at a time when we are seeing rapid growth in the sector. It's a questionable lawsuit that distracts from higher priorities to Coloradans (Ex: Crime rates, etc.). Recently, a District Court Judge ruled to [dismiss a significant portion of the State AGs' multi-state lawsuit against Google's](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-yd/) search business which AG Phil Weiser was leading. Essentially, NTU believes it's an overreach and frustrating way to spend taxpayer dollars - you can read their [full statement here](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-yh/).
### **Switch your spending to an America-first, family-owned, patriot-backed manufacturer.[ Click here](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-yk/) for more info!**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-yu/)
### **Things are changing a bit around here!**
In an effort to streamline things, we'll be switching to a new software program to stay in touch. In doing so, you may not receive my emails and newsletters as you usually do. If you want to avoid being left out, **[make sure you sign up here](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jl/)**. Happy Election Week! Let's WIN!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jr/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jy/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jj/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jt/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-ji/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jd/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-atkbe-66AAC70D-tkwdjuidt-jh) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-atkbe-tkwdjuidt-jk/)

This ballot measure, an initiative being heavily pushed by Governor Jared Polis and his dark money groups, aims to destroy the Taxpayer's Bill of Rights (TABOR) \- one of the most important pieces of legislation we've had in Colorado history - by eliminating the surplus payments back to taxpayers OVER TIME. body:
The polls close at 7pm
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GXT0UR36OZ9-ElMbIjERtNdyf3KriwDMaN3NL0y3HBTNyKpUO6yDqFq0ibVr513F4TZnCJng5p0qBRJbxVmJaGok0UtmJ75LqpP9FG6AWK5GbvR12jzLIB7Y9iJ3aGhg_-doNrv7JkdRvERYK8k5zip5O-BfexejZ5cpssfT0-Y=&c=-8Qb_YFkbnuDsYsfs1yfA4bamAOtC4voWlZFMBXtYVQr0Eu5jGk0xw==&ch=gQgGYKF4qBkh01aoUscOzGwBMUf1V7W5-VsTTPYdk8SUx2fo1DSx2w==)

---|---
Dear Friends,

Today, Tuesday, November 7, is Election Day across the commonwealth. The polls close at 7pm. Please make sure you vote today.

If you are unsure where to vote, [then click on this link to the Virginia Dept. of Elections,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GXT0UR36OZ9-ElMbIjERtNdyf3KriwDMaN3NL0y3HBTNyKpUO6yDqOuBINLmNGS4-uEeAhOEi9GojO1cu3r5a0uqYQpDf9Z3h9qrX1ug1d5vKlhkC3OY8A1w6rB0b6b5vevaq6GlsEmJ9wP_bWd2z3yK6gAQsUmMaMZ2Wu9cojPg2zVFMG_0tY-MlgIAvlJofikNfcFh_rrREASkv0LBdw==&c=-8Qb_YFkbnuDsYsfs1yfA4bamAOtC4voWlZFMBXtYVQr0Eu5jGk0xw==&ch=gQgGYKF4qBkh01aoUscOzGwBMUf1V7W5-VsTTPYdk8SUx2fo1DSx2w==) and then type in your address.

Two years ago, Fast Terry McAuliffe spoke against parental involvement in schools. His baffling policy choice was a major factor in his loss that year.

Well, history has a tendency to repeat itself. Senator Scott Surovell, of the Democrat tribe of Arlington, said over the weekend, "This whole parents rights movement is really about 5-10% of the parents telling the other 90% of parents how the school is going to be run. And it isn't working." Voters contend otherwise.

It appears that Scott has those numbers backwards. I've seen 90% of parents who want to be included in their child's education, while a small sliver of parents are ok with Democrats putting sexual materials in libraries.

The solution is to vote Republican. The Republican Sample Ballot for Chesterfield County is below.
| |
---|---

I voted early this morning at my home precinct, as I always do, Early Voting is not for me.

Join us tonight for the Chesterfield VA Tea Party. We will watch the results come in live at Great American Ranch, starting at 6:30pm. The invitation is below.

Make a plan to vote. Map out the rest of your day that includes a brief stop at your local polling location.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Connor Boyack
subject: This public school did something jaw-dropping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
No, I'm not going to show you some public school promoting woke nonsense.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b744f3c5070f4bf1b280341fca2f322e&_e=BaJQJkOXV9J8pKiKWXUnAJSiI7WR-vR7aDi0t0WpByMzWOQ2pbnjclYQURjf_EPqPd2X5pREnZvaI_-f9hyuecX9-kBR_GTHv_6Y22tnoebVIUhVmfFFLWegGRlSa7Ihs3KVhTPwEnXSEIBoQU3qpSR3L4BZ0Oe0xjIdnGNTgjeDtnvzfoEduefkjv5zBlNavdhUAWrCeNra8aj8ZCr54Jq7W7Z6RISOd3ZaN5ZX3fMElOUQBsvz2rD8n20QUKueT3Zy5hMftyY04Ta4BVJm1ixyiZDexVMG-147Tu84Pgc%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

No, I'm not going to show you some public school promoting woke nonsense.

_In fact, I 'm going to show you the opposite._

Here is what we are achieving with the Tuttle Twins, and I wanted to show you first.

When a school district in Katy, Texas, was looking for new educational books to add to their school library, one series they knew they needed to add was the Tuttle Twins.

So these parents took action:

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b744f3c5070f4bf1b280341fca2f322e&_e=BaJQJkOXV9J8pKiKWXUnAJSiI7WR-vR7aDi0t0WpByMzWOQ2pbnjclYQURjf_EPqPd2X5pREnZvaI_-f9hyuecX9-kBR_GTHv_6Y22tnoebVIUhVmfFFLWegGRlSa7IhNg4QLsrO4RqKMNjuq3e00RBN3t8l55AmFBGjDB6jcdrXl7SuFObfs8sTFBYqLfyelxS67zbNPy_sgV-Xedhe2tBcQHpVoXuODYvcJDm9De9nxf8ycb4SH5ZYNQo5JyLMKOsPHaLBXrX6N9oos_7Cx-zPQkBTqpdylvpqngYhYKY%3D)

My ultimate goal is to distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools, libraries, and families this year!

With this delivery of books, I'm one step closer to achieving my goal. But we're getting closer to the end of the year, and I still need to distribute thousands of books before then.

I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month to distribute more books to children. Every $10 we raise allows us to give a child a copy of a Tuttle Twins book. The Biden administration is helping Chicago launch a program to get
migrants to work, according to the Chicago Sun-Times. The pilot
program will begin Thursday to help the city and state with the strain
migrants have been placing on public resources, according to the
Chicago Sun-Times.

Arkansas Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders Endorses Trump

Arkansas Republican Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders endorsed former
President Donald Trump for a second term in a statement reported by
NBC News on Monday. The governor, who served as the Trump
administration’s press secretary for two years and delivered the GOP’s
response to President Joe Biden’s State of the Union speech in
February, will officially announce her [...]

RNC Announces Third GOP Debate Participants

The Republican National Committee (RNC) announced Monday evening that
five 2024 GOP primary candidates will participate in Wednesday’s third
debate in Miami, Florida, according to a press release. Former
President Donald Trump is skipping the third debate, as he did the
first two, and is instead holding a rally in Florida during the same
time frame.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update- Election Day is Here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Cast your vote today if you haven't already! |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=68d51f880a&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

It's Election Day. If you haven't already cast your ballot, be sure to vote today!

Polls are open from 7 AM to 8 PM. If you don't know your polling place, you can check here: [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=59b8d6efe5&e=1090c5c412)

The statewide judicial races are at the top of the ticket. It's crucial that we elect conservative judges that respect the U.S. and Pennsylvania Constitutions. They are: [Carolyn Carluccio](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9d62b98fb6&e=1090c5c412) for Supreme Court, [Maria Battista](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=6584dd5190&e=1090c5c412) and [Harry Smail](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ca0fd236c8&e=1090c5c412) for Superior Court (vote for both), and [Megan Martin](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=aa26d7fbe0&e=1090c5c412) for Commonwealth Court.

In Northampton County, it's [Nancy Aaroe](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=2dcc4a1554&e=1090c5c412) for Judge, [Tom Giovanni](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=666b8446af&e=1090c5c412), [Bill Rowe](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=956d829aed&e=1090c5c412), [Casey Foreman](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e04457c458&e=1090c5c412), and Kerry Myers for Northampton County Council, and [John Cusick](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=73eebeb00f&e=1090c5c412) for Northampton County Controller.

In Lehigh County, we can elect four candidates for Commissioner: [Jacqueline Rivera](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d348ee908a&e=1090c5c412), [Paul Moat](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7608a46b49&e=1090c5c412), [Gary Fedorcha](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d2e934db8a&e=1090c5c412), and Rita Sisselberger. Plus we have [Robert E. Smith Jr.](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3419db33ef&e=1090c5c412) for Controller, [Gavin Holihan](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b70f3999f6&e=1090c5c412) for District Attorney, [Joseph Hanna](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b39b9b3eb8&e=1090c5c412) for Sheriff, and Dr. Joseph Zitarelli for Coroner.

In Carbon County, the top contested races are [Wayne Nothstein and Michael Sofranko](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9fbcbc0502&e=1090c5c412) for Commissioner, [Kayla Herman](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=79f317cead&e=1090c5c412) for Controller, and Mark Smith for Coroner.

In Monroe County it's [David Parker](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b97ab7f32a&e=1090c5c412) and [Christine Wilkins](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3dfbdd015a&e=1090c5c412) for Commissioner, [Alex Marek](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=82a6e84e88&e=1090c5c412) for District Attorney, Ken Morris for Sheriff, Marlo Merhige for Controller and Josephine Ferro for Register/Recorder.

And these are just the headline races. In every municipality and school district, we have board candidates, municipal officeholders and magistrate races that have a direct impact on how we live our lives. You still have time to get informed if you aren't sure about candidate positions or party affiliations.

Today is the culmination of many months of hard work by these candidates. Many are seeking jobs with little or no compensation. Support them by going to the polls and reminding your conservative friends and neighbors to do the same. Safe communities, good jobs, and strong families depend on it!

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life. _

**This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement** We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that's threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what 's worse is that our income can't keep pace**. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. _[Request your free guide now to inflation-proof your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05d0cf26635f45a38da8fbf838b54a67&_e=JRwFI1UdDKeMTwRuzclJNqBP-6Ub5XhDvP3zYczJyKtsNTfZiJw0YqEKxI91L7kRTn8PCRuhgJBOnvxsyieAT5N5q5WKG_W3by9BdM8oesY33Wt5G_tiuktKEeFMVajhmwwDD-2xnXyYNbKDvax5TOlE3qknwv-esfGLd8BjDTtf5kFRTeDv6VS2Kog_Sm5Tqsn4W_-SHy361QC9f3iHBkJuJEZAxb-bUDx2cxeSpNIozN-HJyZV37DqBT2k0JRH47kxuHP_lpqLCjVyV2EJTkY-XpAzt_flZyZwcVnsiaG3y0ugeGjxYTp_oUYMxCOML7tq3hOTyciOYo6Xayi_uv4atEIB_WjgmINQs0LJJT5EtCilH7TfWYi2FfoQdJN6GH2UefIWhiESXXkNPq3wQEW_YUOHz8g6JbCKhtKXQq8%3D)_ Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, **our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further.** **It 's so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship.** _Paul Tudor Jones_ , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. _Jeremy Grantham_ , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and "an accompanying decline in stock prices." _**This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share. **Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m.**_
---
Friend, pesticide corporations want you to ignore their devastating impact on our planet. **But nearly 50% of U.S. honeybee colonies PERISHED last year, and neonics are largely to blame. Frantic beekeepers worked tirelessly to help their colonies survive, but the massive bee DIE-OFFS won’t stop unless we take action.**
**Here’s the problem:** Neonics are the most widely used insecticides in the entire world. They’re **NEUROTOXIC to our precious bees and wreak havoc on our ecosystems** – contaminating our soil and water. **But our farming system still uses MILLIONS of pounds of these chemicals every single year! The pesticide industry’s chokehold on our farming system is so strong that even the seeds of our major crops are coated with neonics.**
It’s worse than you think, friend. **Studies show little to no benefit for neonic seed coatings.** Yet, they're putting the future of our food system and our health at risk! Communities worldwide could pay the price if fruits, nuts and vegetables become more scarce and expensive.
**But chemical companies have a powerful lobby fighting to hide the truth and allow them to keep control. They’re spending MILLIONS on targeted misinformation campaigns to deceive farmers and consumers and downplay the fact that neonics POISON our bees!** Even more, ecological farming solutions already exist that could protect pollinators and our planet. But the pesticide lobby is **working to suppress the urgent bee-saving solutions we need!**
**We MUST fight back to get neonics OUT of our farm fields and protect our pollinators, our communities and our planet before it’s too late. We urgently need 22 more activists from your area to speak out before 11:59 p.m. tonight – but we're still missing your response! Tell us now:**
| | **Should pesticide corporations be held accountable for DEVASTATING bee die-offs?**
---

name: Ohio Democrats
subject: Polls are open – have you voted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Find your polling place
| **Polls are open in Ohio, team!** It’s officially Election Day, and our last chance to make sure we protect reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution. [**Have you voted yet? Find your polling place right now and make sure to cast your ballot before 7:30 PM.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72922982/436846406/1652841836?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzk4MjExOC02MzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7tKwJrGIC2Yh021iD2j6gFiiOIALEcYpddjP6kG_q48=&emci=4c42f9f3-f87c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a3982118-637d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=25291327) If we pass Issue 1 today, Ohio will become the next state to guarantee the protection of reproductive healthcare under our state constitution. It’s a right that Republicans have been working hard to take away, but it’s one we have the power to protect by getting to the polls before they close. * * *
**This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement** We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that's threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what 's worse is that our income can't keep pace**. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. _[Request your free guide now to inflation-proof your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4528505def1c4deb9630d0267ac7b87b&_e=BI3mnckZUnNiWYBhToMRF7IPwrzl82j5jAwH5VnfM-n-9xZcEjoJ1_MUOhA45bigiCODL5cf5QpOdivKkJBoUB-tfz0ZUDdc00Ii2AsLk-nqU6Bj4gw_054npQEDgNTZ4dIiiC_UjPCaiy98zD9ubO47lIoSXqQCZSvMWr_u-X_Rzy8Alluezn4lIyOdow19Rp845p9TQCSMoZRiuFXT1qncxtvlGHJaBBxSGRzxS4ZOlB75paRDrXpz-K51DkGPxKRJr4UdykiKr5AFTJrGyhdMuZonyJ3AX-kX6WGa_QUK637dOXSCFGvX8s7ROvN1afxhFNtSv5DbHfPOheLIN1TS2il26dI564c8GtAmM5FG3pMr3H3W2Mga9w1Ye5VkSrijMPYkC2b3SE57ET0udG0SSuIU2cIZiqn7rbje0F8%3D)_ Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, **our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further.** **It 's so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship.** _Paul Tudor Jones_ , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. _Jeremy Grantham_ , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and "an accompanying decline in stock prices." Even _Warren Buffet_ has sold off $33b of his stocks, piling up cash in advance of the predicted recession. **Whether you 're aged 45, 55, near retirement, or in retirement, doing nothing to _[protect your wealth](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4528505def1c4deb9630d0267ac7b87b&_e=BI3mnckZUnNiWYBhToMRF7IPwrzl82j5jAwH5VnfM-n-9xZcEjoJ1_MUOhA45bigiCODL5cf5QpOdivKkJBoUB-tfz0ZUDdc00Ii2AsLk-nqU6Bj4gw_054npQEDgNTZ4dIiiC_UjPCaiy98zD9ubO47lIoSXqQCZSvMWr_u-X_Rzy8Alluezn4lIyOdow19Rp845p9TQCSMoZRiuFXT1qncxtvlGHJaBBxSGRzxS4ZOlB75paRDrXpz-K51DkGP35LuAPJ244_4C54GI5e19TiXNOF4ynhcWG0VcKhTde_1tIHfGyxqw2bVMa60_vnWOnZ8RbDXCja6gOC551PhwTtzG8V-bNTEMk3ZszjsjY56EVYPPLjW3Kp40Izs5q0XUKVfA4Gr11r6C5Ij11NVOlHYUHmzg_mUCuP2LS2ok-M%3D)_ is not an option.** It's a fool's gambit. _[Protect what you have now. This**FREE Inflation Protection Kit** will show you how.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4528505def1c4deb9630d0267ac7b87b&_e=BI3mnckZUnNiWYBhToMRF7IPwrzl82j5jAwH5VnfM-n-9xZcEjoJ1_MUOhA45bigiCODL5cf5QpOdivKkJBoUB-tfz0ZUDdc00Ii2AsLk-nqU6Bj4gw_054npQEDgNTZ4dIiiC_UjPCaiy98zD9ubO47lIoSXqQCZSvMWr_u-X_Rzy8Alluezn4lIyOdow19Rp845p9TQCSMoZRiuFXT1qncxtvlGHJaBBxSGRzxS4ZOlB75paRDrXpz-K51DkGPS5xjaOY99rstf9wMJIpokd0g9n3ewAdRf1F8NONwal-lZ4y932zPbLoEzLiSFoViylu7T9Ok1kJyZRSZPdteqHOKQIOBGB0PJSsbX9iOrg3sKpkTjw6mENOX5cpl_Opk5Izs3OMbt1fgfylPkHLlO2yQ8Oa_ex92AZfwm2KbyHs%3D)_ While we can't stop inflation or prevent interest rates from rising, we can protect our savings and retirement from the whims of the Fed and market volatility. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: it’s Election Day in PA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
https://www.depasqualeforag.com/ [https://www.depasqualeforag.com/] Folks, it’s Election Day in PA! Polls are open from 7am to 8pm.

A critically important Pennsylvania Supreme Court race is on the ballot — along with other important elections, including local school boards, mayors, municipal councils, and new judges to sit on the Commonwealth and Superior Courts.

To find your polling place, click here [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx] .

From voting rights to abortion access, Pennsylvania’s judges will hold significant power over the issues that matter most.

That’s why it’s so important to make your voice heard this Election Day.

So please, cast your ballot if you haven’t already done so — and forward this email to friends and family to remind them to vote too.

Happy voting!

– Eugene
Donate → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualengpfooter?refcode=email_emailfooter]
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@depasqualeforag.com to your address book.
This campaign is powered by grassroots donation. clean_body: [] Folks, it’s Election Day in PA! Polls are open from 7am to 8pm. A critically important Pennsylvania Supreme Court race is on the ballot — along with other important elections, including local school boards, mayors, municipal councils, and new judges to sit on the Commonwealth and Superior Courts. To find your polling place, click here [] . From voting rights to abortion access, Pennsylvania’s judges will hold significant power over the issues that matter most. That’s why it’s so important to make your voice heard this Election Day. So please, cast your ballot if you haven’t already done so — and forward this email to friends and family to remind them to vote too. Peter, Indiana — it’s time to vote! Polls are open right now for municipal elections across the Hoosier State. Polls will remain open until 6 pm local time. You can find your polling place at **[indianavoters.in.gov.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72924921/436851750/2018321534?refcode=2311107Polls&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmEyYTI5Ni02NjdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GH3JxOqU7wYOV-8RO0YOqCT8kPV_85eYwKKzBEgicdw=&emci=f27faef6-dc7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=06a2a296-667d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)** Make sure you bring a photo ID issued by state or federal government with an expiration date on or after 11/8/22, like a drivers’ license, or U.S. Passport. [Click here for more information on Indiana’s photo ID law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72924922/436851751/-1945714271?refcode=2311107Polls&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmEyYTI5Ni02NjdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GH3JxOqU7wYOV-8RO0YOqCT8kPV_85eYwKKzBEgicdw=&emci=f27faef6-dc7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=06a2a296-667d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) If you run into any issues at the polls, or have a question you can’t find the answer to, please call our Election Protection Hotline at **1 (833) 336-8683.** Lastly, this election will decide the direction our communities take for the last four years. Many races will be very close — encouraging your friends and family to vote could make all the difference. Can you remind three friends or family members to vote today? Let’s win today,
Indiana Democratic Party

| Hey, I know it’s early. Here’s why I’m writing:

Sharice needs you to help get her over the finish line. We still need $8,000 to hit our One Year to Election Day goal this week.

Despite the inexperienced and extreme leadership in the House GOP caucus and time they’ve wasted on petty infighting, Sharice is not letting up on her work of delivering for working Kansans. She’ll work with anyone regardless of party to make sure you’re heard.

But National Republicans have set her as a top target to try to defeat and are pouring resources at one of our anti-choice opponents.

name: American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2cam7q7618bjbuu9v5lc8hl3vc0c0ae3fjcstv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8oc138nsrib9uid2e0du3ga5e5055d0pon8is3o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj2qnbc7ogjnokhcv69lnfeq7n1pc1fcopsfdtlo_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuj1jkqei5ogd1u1ujsomi5sqa5aspl03gdq2ko8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5il1jkfvgkm0acclnqnhepicm7d07sspm2ch930_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34shimepr246h22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfue4fq6vddicq1c9nok6emikd118fgannmu1cao_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)_

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z42oo4840koik93lt1r79j9moihv0kdqeo9nirpg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgtl1p7v94nkff7umljo8rsm1a83jhvh0q89v1m8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z30gqq9vprpvm4nbg68d56a72aig6gb7cr6mba78_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zai0ubj80u3ls3cav8ti6ipm1nqclgqlbnpmqjvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chie8pb7c3h238h1e8he4933cjiecpr0s9j61oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdbo06unoq5kqb2vuip8dm7fj0eon20f2ehbpfkg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spjm1oj6c3h2bs)_

I could not be more honored to lead House Republicans in our fight to defend and expand our Republican Majority in 2024.
