name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSPvK9Eto07h5ILUcbXwbcUJGATqlHjfWtRbN6hnq_dmv1kpIxZujt1SDnELvlXmc-qXGB-z2ZKmf5mJdvAg1mPSEX8uEhKUNRJP1aVg2zHiCYxz5u0v4qBdSu_1w5cBS-Qm9feamqMF49tQAsXEhgBlEmJQcjt1UncTXZV5pf2gg%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSejunjcMUPikPT7WYIHo9ZGlAu_1_cgNB_-qqXrgRkPiTLoMGaG0UB-HE8_X-lxpVWj_1UOx-C596y_-06qoKQZzD3UfFz821l3gBoS56VKV7ldtLdnH3LtgQkhMzahFVP6Jn5x3TwHBxL6p9YiOnG7BbFtvihs38hS-Q01QI6HA%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSdzdRpB7JoPAxFzffWh2V_dm0dJlmxAEY2a24c6UucCD-QdL-a4q0Ruj6YL_ZP8mQWcdhouP_kYoJ9udZrCivQzXeCJf7wv5z_09biNU-xL1fMO04cXnvdtys9ZhuEGEFPK4PZbPCBSCCYOPBpE2NRsTZ-Bqm_ddg4X9HJ0tgva8%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSVHokn0m8uouR1AjjWZXJ4JVAjwtljxpea7wXj2XNZZgxASWPh1R_QJgM226o0ntOsDgFR_oKvRsA92cxyHzdrnOgbe85QYAUtnb1Jd6xZ6AFjEtVoC4hPX0zMrar22cz66AXmRAwyfkR91UJfvGeZdgUzaqwpXqmW89jle8FjVI%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSkAHPTltlefzv9Poji15y0-7yhJi8y8qRCYEwGG4Ws1V6Hg3F4KEs5BTisyI9sZteZf5SZM4YWB2jVM-e76yRK_qOOxJQ8ovCEnAxZii3RDk1lo5oblPQD0J62pN7uJTwxsug_MVQsybUPuleFiue1r7ttLKfneqMcMCLOQZrZjs%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSTK-Lf18oTDtz7Sx5YFFVTiGmZ30uKrZ2PH64O_hrJgSgx0FKrYKI17wEIE0r6hhwkSibMRVPUwm00_j2Aol-eELnvXVtzDdByXrIS9yGr1-UPt9eQbWksHSCSM4RbuDvPRNnEkJqF7QAFZ5QOzCJmnMDZ0hzI9ddWVEZL4cuTEw%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4ca1d0471f334fdc8519dc3815f4894d&_e=yOrgqkARFUtTZK-e5ytaEkt3sFsl5q9TYuuxbN8iUG9jKppZI6bhJLo6jNOta9uheeDthBkG-9j1bcrKEn0gaG3Ep-4DbrokOBOTaya0iONliW0W7uim52NRgxXbWFn7i1bdrs6dqQiKoSDY58E_AWOoT76UYLbp-nqS8DvayRsX1pKXMnx5stpNx4q89zfSEGmz-ywgvBdSI813XbjVjojyY7OdYNbw6GEPtuRmdiQdTGt8wrTeh7W9a5_FCBw-46czldmu0TKYi0gxNXHUfeWw4V4FuJ6Yr45wsAlWH5vg1E_0Yx_JUaE0Dxfz5ReOcU857ZZZcZrTTnslbuVhLM5zoRNlsgrvRAKJ2QEJTRM%3D)
---
Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District
---

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless. Pat Harrigan GOP Conservative Candidate North Carolina's 14th District | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

JD FOSTER: The Battle Over Ukraine-Israel Aid Is Sparking A Sorely
Needed Debate On Emergency Spending

President Biden has proposed spending over $105 billion to support
Ukraine against Russia, Israel against Hamas, the American border
against southern invasion, and for humanitarian aid. This request has
kicked off a long overdue debate about when, where, why and for how
long U.S. aid should flow.

Armed Drones Shot Down Near Base Hosting US Troops

Three armed attack drones were shot down in two separate attacks on an
outpost near Erbil airport, in Iraq, hosting U.S. and coalition troops
Tuesday, Reuters reported, citing a statement by Iraqi Kurdistan’s
security service.

Peter, we’re working hard all day to turn out voters across the state of Georgia to vote in these crucial municipal elections, and we need your help. All day today, we’ll be calling strong Democrats across Georgia to make sure they’ve gone out to vote. You can also help us by funding our voter outreach team: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = This is our last chance to turn out voters for a major election before the 2024 presidential election, and every voter we get to cast a ballot today is exponentially more likely to vote next November. Are you with us? – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Today is Election Day! Go Vote by 8PM!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this special edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Today is Election Day! Go Vote By 8PM!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/11.7%20NPP.jpg]
Today is the day! Below is some important information to help you navigate the voting process.
Voting at the polls:
*
Polls
are
open
from
7AM-8PM
and
as
long
as
you're
in
line
by
8PM
you
can
cast
a
ballot
*
Click
here
[https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx?&emci=d3d9c5f0-597a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
to
find
your
polling
location
*
You
only
need
to
show
ID
if
it's
your
first
time
voting
or
your
first
time
voting
at
a
new
precinct.
For
a
full
list
of
acceptable
IDs,
click
here
[https://www.vote.pa.gov/Register-to-Vote/Pages/Voter-ID-for-First-Time-Voters.aspx?&emci=d3d9c5f0-597a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
.
*
If
you
get
turned
away
at
your
polling
location,
don't
leave
before
asking
for
a
provisional
ballot!
Voting/Voted-By-Mail:
*
Mail-in
ballots
must
be
received
at
your
county
Board
of
Elections
by
8PM
tonight
for
your
vote
to
count
*
If
you
still
have
your
vote-by-mail
ballot,
click
here
[https://vote.pa/return/]
to
find
out
where
you
can
drop
it
off
ahead
of
the
8PM
deadline
*
If
you
mailed-in
your
ballot
previously,
you
can
make
sure
it
was
received
correctly
at
this
link
[https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/ballottracking.aspx]
*
If
there's
any
issue
with
your
mail-in
ballot
(it
hasn't
been
received
yet,
you
lost
it,
etc.)
plan
on
going
to
your
polling
location
and
cast
a
provisional
ballot
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Front.png]

We're asking everyone to vote for Dan in the crucially important PA Supreme Court race as he'll protect so many of the issues directly connected to our organizational values.

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE TODAY] Join Bill for Election Day
body:
Peter, Get ready for an exciting evening, as Bill is going live today at 5:30PM ET from the North Brunswick Pub for a very sp
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/56ab91c48daa768d7c845f22c2501825/eJyNkE1rwkAQhv_LnFPDxtjaQBGroiGpFPGDnsqaTOlislk2s6ar5L930xZPCr3MYeaZ52XmDISSS4pziOCLTkHQBw80ZkIJlDSpJPHsZxoMQtZnHhRCHua6Mgqi89XlC9C12f3D0AOyCh2yXo0nSbycv6fxMnGk4tpl_M8TsvDimb2M4xTa9qYYS0Gzo3PXEJE22F2UC3cVbXTh-E8iVUe-3zRNz1aGzB57WVX6quC2EDWNuvL0mj4vTnh8k3tTUnInlV4cpo8fq6Hdse0uYxvuorhSKPO_PyVofwPbb5y4cdk=)
---
| Peter, Get ready for an exciting evening, as **Bill is going live today at 5:30PM ET** from the North Brunswick Pub for a very special Common Ground Election Day stream! **Tune in for all the scoop on New Jersey’s biggest election showdown, with every seat in the state legislature up for the taking.** The whole Assembly and Senate are on the election block, and that’s just the top of the ticket. Our local leadership is on the line, too, with numerous school board and municipal seats ready for change, and pivotal county commissioner positions also on the ballot.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE LIVE STREAM (STARTS AT 5:30PM)](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/ef06af1c65286d5110d376a7bbb513f8/eJyNkE1rwkAQhv_LnFPDxmjbQBGroiGpFPGDnsqaTOlislk2s6ar5L930xZPCr3MYeaZ52XmDISSS4pziOCLTkHQBw80ZkIJlDSpJPHsZxoMQtZnHhRCHua6Mgqi89XlC9C12fB-6AFZhQ5Zr8aTJF7O39N4mThSce0y_ucJWXjxzF7GcQpte1OMpaDZ0blriEgb7C7KhbuKNrpw_CeRqiPfb5qmZytDZo-9rCp9VXBbiJpGXXl6TZ8XJzy-yb0pKbmTSi8O08eP1YPdse0uYxvuorhSKPO_PyVofwPbb5rOcdc=)
---
|
---
|
---
**This election isn’t just another run-of-the-mill vote; it’s a turning point for defending many things we hold dear** — **including parental rights in our schools.** It’s about ensuring that we have a say in what’s going down in our children’s classrooms. And when it comes to fiscal responsibility? We must stop the reckless spending and make sure our tax dollars are actually doing work for us, not just funding endless government bloat.

---
| Tonight's Common Ground stream will feature Bill getting into the nitty-gritty of it all, rallying for leaders who know that America — and Americans — come first. We want fighters who will keep our interests at heart, who resonate with our vision of smaller government, and who respect the value of a dollar earned. **It’s about more than just voting; it’s about sending a message that we’re done with business as usual.** **It's time to bring common sense back to New Jersey once and for all.** [Click here to join the stream at 5:30PM ET and get informed with Bill’s deep dive into what’s at stake.](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/38756c05ec515cbd5f0a834ddf122760/eJyNkE1Lw0AQhv_LnGPDpvErIFJraUNikWItnmSbjLg02Qyb2cZtyX93o6IXBS9zmHnmeZk5AqOWmtMSEnjjQxSNIQCDhSKFmqeNZll8TKPTWIxFAJXSu7lpLEFy_HX5Gxja4uw8DoAdoUceVpNpli7nz3m6zDxJ0viM_3li8eOZ3U3SHPr-TzHWimd7724hYWNxuKhU_ipem8rzr8zUJmHYdd3INZbtFkdFU4dUSVeplq-HcnWf3ywOuH_SW1tzdqLJLHa3ly-rC7cRj5tCrKWPkkSoy68_Zeg-A_t3mORx1Q==) These elections are our chance to step up, make our voices heard, and vote in folks who stand for what we believe in. **_It’s go-time, New Jersey._** Let’s roll out and vote for the America we know we can be. Common Sense Action Team
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea

body:
Imagine it’s tomorrow morning – the morning after Election Day. You get out of bed, pour yourself a cup of coffee, and eagerly turn on the news to see the outcome of the Virginia elections. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Good morning! There are less than 12 hours until polls close in battleground states like Virginia and Pennsylvania, so before it gets too late, I wanted to share two very different outcomes that could happen in the next 24 hours. Picture this: it’s tomorrow morning – the morning after Election Day. You get out of bed, pour yourself a cup of coffee, and eagerly turn on the news to see the outcome of the Virginia elections – _the most important and competitive elections in the country in 2023._ **In the first outcome,[you decided to chip in $10 one last time before polls closed.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpWF9cu_jvmU2XoLCpRVJVcvoVqGvv1NVCTsO2E0xLyVa8OZF9-rgS14t_LlHqU3zDb1mvvBv92UjqgFFiaDsqSmYX6sOtnaBsvKqi4xXRi5Wg5lp4vCT9653M-I5eXEaq1C-SdruEtU275Ido0a5Oyd51XzAmA0yR46Or0syLMWWR_eBPxZfWQrX2lT4ZtOe-HmoAXwIomBp4Yg7kiPXsafr-lWv0Hmt0sXv0QTdU71V0sxz_9woYH41FNmyYDKIDR8ASqOJ1OSbKX-Uid_om5mDWUztgy0Zwf_xhzYSBltG0DIeenHVtmNtZKW4gY-Z-7WcnvAv5jt8vkRI0qQU2spwEahiT0AvP6OZbqJ3N4jXzATjB9VBitRPO-dXEf5kmOj63CAsaeLPO-AuDMxW_C1_1onhb7fHZ694XuwNfLEPqU6pt1m7tcnsv4WmrozOB/413/vgkhuu8pSMK0cfttCs1J-Q/h0/gXtnCqcQltrlG4Ku72iJG-Jj-cTcR0UMCjEezwsx9do)** And now, in the news, you see that Democrats blocked a right-wing trifecta, held their VA Senate majority, and flipped the House of Delegates. You feel determined knowing that _you_ helped defend abortion rights, access to the ballot box, and a progressive future in Virginia. **In the second outcome,** your morning starts like normal – but this time, you decided **not** to donate that final $10 on Election Day. This time, you see on the news that Democrats lost their Senate majority, and Republicans held onto their House majority. The GOP now has full control of Virginia’s state government – and with it, unchecked power to implement extreme legislation. **Our team is sprinting to the finish line to make sure we don’t wake up tomorrow knowing that more could have been done.** **Voters are casting their ballots as you read this,**[and there’s still time to rush last-minute resources, win tonight across the country, and build a strong foundation for continued success in special elections later this year and throughout 2024. **I won’t sugarcoat this: Tonight’s elections in Virginia are a toss-up.**
And let’s not forget: The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats for Democrats to lose control of the Senate. That’s a close margin.
Every single dollar counts today. Your donation _right now_ could make the difference for state Democrats running in Virginia and across the nation.
[Chip in $10 to elect state Democrats in battleground states like Virginia this Election Day, in 2024, and beyond »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpWF9cu_jvmU2XoLCpRVJVcvoVqGvv1NVCTsO2E0xLyVa8OZF9-rgS14t_LlHqU3zDb1mvvBv92UjqgFFiaDsqSmYX6sOtnaBsvKqi4xXRi5Wg5lp4vCT9653M-I5eXEaq1C-SdruEtU275Ido0a5Oyd51XzAmA0yR46Or0syLMWV1YawPUibom3z4kKLoOSdge_MxCc5Eus596AyjIKzhwMvGNqszG8l7AI_jgmNi6n5nURbSR1EMQhwTNvSw1f3Z6WgOl1f4uqVOuYK_QORuPxm7MAVIJOqOAkLbdLTaQzpUslmOXB4KKoCTGE5TJkq8td0nhKcIvDUeJ3FwHKvDU2LGP8Ts0Lvn2c_9ZbSndf-pMKe3ZcLZoufU-yRUpFfXJEdLb0RaUan-t6lyudKpqxgqIDcwCJVy1zra4ch3lU9AClljBxa007VlZaMIUm93/413/vgkhuu8pSMK0cfttCs1J-Q/h7/SGOWmBReGrxJBJXaXQDQvn1t8BfIfU5inrYo0BNRCAs)

clean_body: Imagine it’s tomorrow morning – the morning after Election Day. You get out of bed, pour yourself a cup of coffee, and eagerly turn on the news to see the outcome of the Virginia elections. | | | | | ---|--- Good morning! There are less than 12 hours until polls close in battleground states like Virginia and Pennsylvania, so before it gets too late, I wanted to share two very different outcomes that could happen in the next 24 hours. Picture this: it’s tomorrow morning – the morning after Election Day. You get out of bed, pour yourself a cup of coffee, and eagerly turn on the news to see the outcome of the Virginia elections – the most important and competitive elections in the country in 2023. In the first outcome, And now, in the news, you see that Democrats blocked a right-wing trifecta, held their VA Senate majority, and flipped the House of Delegates. You feel determined knowing that you helped defend abortion rights, access to the ballot box, and a progressive future in Virginia. In the second outcome, your morning starts like normal – but this time, you decided not to donate that final $10 on Election Day. This time, you see on the news that Democrats lost their Senate majority, and Republicans held onto their House majority. The GOP now has full control of Virginia’s state government – and with it, unchecked power to implement extreme legislation. Our team is sprinting to the finish line to make sure we don’t wake up tomorrow knowing that more could have been done. Voters are casting their ballots as you read this, | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | I won’t sugarcoat this: Tonight’s elections in Virginia are a toss-up. And let’s not forget: The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats for Democrats to lose control of the Senate. That’s a close margin. Every single dollar counts today. Your donation right now could make the difference for state Democrats running in Virginia and across the nation. Thanks for helping make your coffee (and mine!) taste like victory. name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsLZQepikN

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osLZQepikN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35191%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6KNkeyT1zSC3a%2fxY%2b8JjzQ&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35192%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nfMYFvnt0Wxgi53M1wBKQQ&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35193%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fq81Xqmwr4sIJ4snYIL37Q&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35194%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pDN4ezQyZSqdT6%2fVSOvhmw&sysid=1)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5j1efoi37vc7aqn5hqr395kl2lvvlou88158f70_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge8o74cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhecslinsgf24u76m1nq8otr9atp5l1u4shlj9f8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge8o74cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbdr4pekqi47r0sg5nn2u0ro09gbtpj9t6qvop1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge8o74cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z077dq1926igddlbk673tsis9fqc3l8nno921838_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge8o74cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrgt84blcc8bmgsu44grg8q7iu7csd36kk8b0nd0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge8o72chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Bob Casey
subject: Time is running out to cast your ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Please take a few minutes to cast your ballot before polls close at 8 PM tonight.https://go.bobcasey.com/mailings/drafts/compose/1075# ?akid=1077%2E552475%2EiSuZAA
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1077%2E552475%2EiSuZAA)
Hi Peter, it’s Bob.
Today is Election Day in Pennsylvania, and we have important offices on the ballot across the Commonwealth.
Today, we need to elect Judge Dan McCaffery to the PA Supreme Court. Pennsylvanians deserve a justice system that works for them, and Dan is a champion for workers’ rights, women’s rights, voting rights, and more. Not only that, but this race will make the difference in upholding free and fair elections in Pennsylvania in 2024.
We also need to elect Judge Timika Lane and Judge Jill Beck for Superior Court, and Judge Matt Wolf for Commonwealth Court. They are the champions we need to protect our democracy.
Our County-level officials make decisions that greatly impact our community, and there are critical County Commissioner and County Council races in Allegheny County, Bucks County, Centre County, Montgomery County, Luzerne County, and others.
**Our candidates need your help to get across the finish line, so if you haven’t already, please make a plan to get to the polls and vote today before polls close at 8 PM tonight.**
**[Find Your Polling Place »](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/581?t=2&akid=1077%2E552475%2EiSuZAA)**
_If you requested a vote by mail ballot, you can return it to your county board of elections by 8 PM tonight. It must be _received_ by that time, so it is too late to send it back in the mail._
Let’s bring home some wins.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231107-1?refcode=em20231107-1&refcode2=1077_552475_iSuZAA&akid=1077%2E552475%2EiSuZAA)**

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1077%2E552475%2EiSuZAA)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1077%2E552475%2EiSuZAA)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Tell the Supreme Court to disarm domestic violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today, the United States Supreme Court will be hearing arguments regarding the Fifth Circuit’s decision in United States v. Rahimi
#

Friend, we wanted to make sure you saw Gabby’s message from last week. Earlier this year, the Fifth Circuit struck down the federal law that prohibits people subject to domestic violence restraining orders from possessing guns. Today, the Supreme Court will be hearing oral arguments in an appeal of this dangerous decision.
[**Please read Gabby’s note below, and then add your name to our petition to call on the Supreme Court to reinstate the ban on domestic abusers owning guns.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_rahimi_pet_nov23/?source=em231107-1-30&refcode2=6840.3935704.w2ZyIr&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_rahimi_pet_nov23/?source=em231107-1-30&refcode2=6840.3935704.w2ZyIr&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr)**
* * *
_Original Message from Gabby Giffords:_
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_rahimi_pet_nov23/?source=em231107-1-30&refcode2=6840.3935704.w2ZyIr&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr)
Hi friends, it’s Gabby Giffords. I wanted to reach out to you personally about a critical Supreme Court case being heard in less than two weeks from now.
On November 7th, the United States Supreme Court will be hearing oral argument in an appeal of the Fifth Circuit’s decision in _United States v. Rahimi_. Earlier this year the Fifth Circuit struck down the federal law that prohibits people subject to domestic violence restraining orders from possessing guns.
This reckless decision puts countless lives at risk, and it disproportionately impacts women. Every year, more than 600 American women are shot and killed by intimate partners. And millions more have been threatened with a gun.
[**Please, join me today in calling on the Supreme Court to reinstate the ban on domestic abusers owning guns by signing GIFFORDS’ petition.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_rahimi_pet_nov23/?source=em231107-1-30&refcode2=6840.3935704.w2ZyIr&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_rahimi_pet_nov23/?source=em231107-1-30&refcode2=6840.3935704.w2ZyIr&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr)**
It is my greatest hope that the Supreme Court will make the right decision in this case and recognize that it is constitutional and commonsense to ban those subject to a domestic violence restraining order from owning firearms. That’s been the case for decades, and there’s no reason to go backwards now.
This case is the paramount opportunity to demonstrate that we care more about protecting women’s lives than letting domestic abusers have guns.
[**Countless lives are on the line. Will you please join me in calling on the Supreme Court to disarm domestic violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_rahimi_pet_nov23/?source=em231107-1-30&refcode2=6840.3935704.w2ZyIr&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr)
Thank you for using your voice,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6840%2E3935704%2Ew2ZyIr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🇺🇸 SAVE THE DATE - Jan. 5th 2024; Nebraska's 2024 Campaign Kickoff - Featuring U.S. Senate Candidate Kari Lake | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12660067?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1063e76504&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

The response has been extremely positive to **“Coffee w/ the Chairman”** as it has brought forth much truth about the nature of politics and the recent history of Nebraska Republican politics. Readers have indicated they enjoy the transparency and engagement as much as the vision for what’s to come. As with anything retrospective and informative, sometimes you have to discuss the bad. People don’t like to talk about the past. They don’t like the truth because it hurts feelings. Can't we just "move on or move forward?" **I would LOVE to.** In fact, we HAVE moved on by formulating the entire business plan for 2024 guided by the **RNC's GROW Program** perimeters. We have an ENTIRE playbook built for the success of the Republican Party of Nebraska in regards to **data, communications, financing, political plan, legislative plan, county development, coalition engagement, plus membership recruitment and development.**

And get this...there are still some within our party that want NOTHING to do with this! They don't want to ask how they can help. Or show excitement at the potential and opportunities. Or bring their time, talents, and treasures!

I make no apologies. We must be honest and understand that exposing the past is the only way to present contrast to a NEW vision. When the contrast is objective and when a vision is clearly defined with resources for success...all that remains is a choice. **A choice BY the people to make a party OF the people and do greater work FOR the people.**

The [NEGOP Constitution](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e3ece9734d&e=25844e23a8) Articles I and II **CLEARLY** outline a concept of governing of, by, and for the people. There are many, MANY Republican leaders, members, and even elected officials that have never read the [Constitution](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=eb30bf0165&e=25844e23a8) or our [Platform](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d15fa73cde&e=25844e23a8). Which makes it very difficult to have a conversation about anything political because in essence we are not speaking the same language. The language of servitude and solutions originates from a neutral concept, **following the RULES concept** , and for the purposes of the BUSINESS of being a Republican Party. Most want to have the conversation on the way _**_THEY_**_ want the Republican Party to operate. So herein lies the crossroads...do we operate where ALL members believe in the structure of the Constitution AND use our [Platform](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8c9c737295&e=25844e23a8) as the guiding principles? Guiding is the key word, NOT suggested principles, guiding principles. Or, does our Party operate that only those of the highest elected positions determine the outcome of governing as a Republican and no constitution or Platform (National or local) is needed? __ARTICLE I_
**Name and Objectives**_ _**Section 1.** The name of this organization shall be the Republican Party of Nebraska._ _**Section 2.** The **objectives of the Party** shall be the maintenance of _government of, by and for the people_ according to the Constitution and laws of the United States and the State of Nebraska, **AND** _**the furtherance of such principles**_ as may from time to time be adopted._

When I envision a party **BY the people** it implies a collective belief of principles and values. Common and shared values that resonate with the moral and ethical core of the community. These values are rarely modified and only with extreme measure through a lens of _long term applications and implications_. Values that are **documented** so they can be _learned, repeated, and even more so promoted._ For Republicans, we reference conservative principles as an umbrella term to our [Platform Planks](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=58c172e694&e=25844e23a8) that we are **SUPPOSED** to use when we govern or have dialogue on governance. When campaigning, a prepared candidate will give a general reference to a conservative value while answering questions or giving a speech. Ideally a candidate can dive further into a value and use their own past work or political identity to indicate future action. Interestingly, I have read the RNC, NEGOP, and even some county Platforms and the one word I noticed that was **absent** from the preambles was the word **“UNLESS”**. My search was to find if the Platform Value’s, a document defined _BY the Republican people_ as a stated set of core beliefs, provided a scenario where a Republican elected official or candidate could/should **deviate from the values**. As if to say, I will subscribe to these values **UNLESS** there is a risk to my reelection. I will subscribe to these values **UNLESS** a moral gray area is needed to somehow represent _**ALL, EVERY, SINGLE**_ constituent or voter (which is in essence a choice to modify objective truth and values just enough to whichever audience is present). Ayn Rand postulates that moral grayness is in fact **an avoidance of right and truth** because gray is a _combination of Black and White, a clear understanding of Right and Wrong_. If you subscribe to moral grayness you HAVE to **know the difference** between right and wrong. You have to choose **NOT** to believe in your values or what is right, in order to slide down the scale of moral grayness. The argument comes that "NOTHING is black and white" because we have to take into consideration how to be moderate for ALL people. Which is why there is such a solid foundation in OBJECTIVE TRUTHS, no personalities, just common sense truth. What a concept, right?!? __ARTICLE II_
**Membership**_ _**Section 1.** The membership of the Party shall be composed of all the registered Republican voters of the State of Nebraska **who desire to support the objectives of the Party**. _ _**Section 2.** It shall **be the duty** of the several _County Central Committees_ to **_enroll all the members of the Party within their respective counties_** , so far as practicable. Opportunity for enrollment shall be open at all times to all voters._ So who ARE the members **OF** the Republican Party of Nebraska?

If we believe in the [Constitution](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a5bb109f3c&e=25844e23a8) of the party, if we believe in the purpose of even HAVING a constitution to adhere to, then membership is _VERY_ clear...Republicans **who desire to support the objectives of the Party**. This membership composition SHOULD include every elected official from Federal to State to County and local AND every elected leadership position from delegates to County Chairman to State Chairman AND, well... _EVERYONE who believes in the objectives_. This is another seemingly difficult conversation to have within our party because titles and egos seem to present a **hierarchical caste system** within our party. _Add money, political campaign business opportunities, state-wide investments_ into the equation and the “membership” of decision makers shrinks to a few handful of Republicans and the entities that financially support them. In the end, none of the power struggle within the Republican party or desire to control/influence would EVER matter if we, as the members of the Republican Party, were all on the same page as to the _OBJECTIVES of the Party_. **We simply aren’t there yet.** Some members just **want to win elections** even if it doesn’t match the Constitutional objective.
Some members just **want to influence policy** even if it doesn’t match the Constitutional objective.
Some members just **want titles/status/prestige** even if it doesn’t match the Constitutional objective. As with anything in life, from politics to business...follow the money and you will usually find answers as to who is really controlling outcomes.

Lastly, why does a Political Party even exist? Whom does an elected representative, whether a Chairman or a Governor, do all the work **FOR**? _We do it for people. All...the...People._ We are called by the Word of God to servitude to others. _**Proverbs 11:25 says** “The generous will prosper; those who refresh others will themselves be refreshed.” **Matthew 20:26 says** “But among you it will be different. Whoever wants to be a leader among you must be your servant,” **John 13:14 says** “For even the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve others and to give his life as a ransom for many.”_ The line blurs with “Of” and “For” People, because some believe it’s one in the same. We do not **further our[principles](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fabf1fc13b&e=25844e23a8) (or support the objectives of the party)** just to benefit ONE group or those of a certain status. The source of any government's authority is “the consent of the governed.” This means that the government is **NOT** the ruler, but **the servant or agent** of the citizens; it means that the government as such has no rights except the rights delegated to it by the citizens for a specific purpose. This is again where money comes into play. Donations to the party or candidates in expectation of favors or donations for repayment of action should NEVER come into play. We should be _proactive, measured, objective, and cognizant_ of our principles to ensure a universal standard that all can subscribe to...NOT a **variable standard** that is reactive, random, subjective, and defined during times of emotional immaturity. People should WANT to join the Republican party because the Values resonate with THEIR values. People will naturally desire a governing entity lead by the core Principles of Conservatism that the Republican Party represents. [_Standards or principles or values_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9645d28e56&e=25844e23a8) are what **separates** the Republican Party from the Democratic Party (or any others). When personalities are removed and values are promoted, the people will SHOW UP because they see what a political party is **FOR**. It's **FOR** them, to represent them, to speak **FOR** them, defend against tyranny **FOR** them. When we operate with this mindset on governing or being leaders, the solutions that match our principles on _individual freedom, limited government, the rule of law, peace through strength, fiscal responsibility, free markets, human dignity_ ...the solutions become easier to articulate, promote and even more so bring to fruition in a relatively short amount of time.

Over the next several weeks, I will highlight the leaders at the county level who genuinely believe in the objectives of the party. At the county level is where we will make the most difference in our future...in our children's future. At the county level we will focus on our Political Plan of winning back our education system through 244 school boards and 19 Educational Services Units. At the county level we will recruit Constitutional & Platform Republicans to ensure the maintenance of the government of, by, & FOR the people.

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood

Readers have indicated they enjoy the transparency and engagement as much as the vision for what’s to come. As with anything retrospective and informative, sometimes you have to discuss the bad. People don’t like to talk about the past. They don’t like the truth because it hurts feelings. Can't we just "move on or move forward?" I would LOVE to. In fact, we HAVE moved on by formulating the entire business plan for 2024 guided by the RNC's GROW Program perimeters. We have an ENTIRE playbook built for the success of the Republican Party of Nebraska in regards to data, communications, financing, political plan, legislative plan, county development, coalition engagement, plus membership recruitment and development. Or bring their time, talents, and treasures! I make no apologies. We must be honest and understand that exposing the past is the only way to present contrast to a NEW vision. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02d0a6c1-c297-4f69-8a81-c7397804a99e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

subject: “The most dangerous politician in the world…”

body:

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231107-1-f&t=1&akid=1416%2E734936%2E5GDMjG)
_“I’m not just the most dangerous politician in America — I’m the most dangerous politician in the world...”_
Peter, it isn’t just us telling you that Kari Lake is dangerous. That is a direct quote from Kari Lake herself.
Kari and I don’t agree on much, but we do agree on that.
Over the next few months, she’s probably going to try to reel in her extreme positions, like when she demanded that Congress reinstate Trump. Or the calls for political violence, and the dark, dangerous lies and threats to our democracy.
She will try to appeal to moderates in Arizona, the people she lost in her last campaign.
**And it is our job to make sure she fails.** This campaign will make sure Arizona never forgets how dangerous Kari Lake is — in TV ads, radio ads, digital ads, in the media, at town halls, and at the doors.
But we can’t do it without you. We can’t do it if we don’t raise the resources we need to win — to beat Kari Lake.
And that is why I am humbly asking:
[**Make your first donation to my campaign today. With a donation of $3 you power this campaign. If everyone reading this chipped in, we’d have everything we need to win. But not everyone will donate. That is why I need you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231107-1-f&t=2&akid=1416%2E734936%2E5GDMjG)

Friend, did you see this email from Kirsten?
Only a couple months have passed since she sent this email, but the number of mass shootings in 2023 has, tragically, already skyrocketed to more than 500.
Our country is in the midst of a full-blown gun violence epidemic. And we all know that it won't end until leaders in Washington finally stand up to the gun lobby and pass an assault weapons ban. Kirsten is working hard to win the votes that we need to finally get these weapons of war off our streets. But she's counting on people like you to continue raising your voices for change until we get the job done.
**That's why I'm asking you to add your name to this petition to help us reach our new 25,000 signature goal before our midnight deadline.

Friend, there have already been more than 200 mass shootings in 2023 alone. _That's more than one shooting for every single day of the year._
America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic — and families and communities across the nation are paying the price every single day. It's heartbreaking. It's infuriating. And it's long past time we address this problem head-on.
**Today, on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I'm asking 5,000 people on this team to raise their voices for change by signing my petition to support an assault weapons ban.[_Please, will you mark this day by adding your name to keep these weapons of war away from schools, off our streets and out of our communities?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72938294/436873819/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4545-su-nd&refcode=jtk4545-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODM3MDQwYi03ODdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkfoIjwgPSwcMUoAM3AmXbKRiRX5cWH5w6zMiCWKklk=&emci=03f49e3f-fd74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=b837040b-787d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)**

Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable.
But here's the thing, friend: **This cycle _isn't_ endless. The next mass killing _isn't_ inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take _right now_ to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence.** And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms.
Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.
**[_So please, if you believe that we can win a future where communities are free from gun violence, will you add your name to support an assault weapons ban? I'm counting on your signature before midnight to know that you're on my side in this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72938296/436873827/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4545-su-nd&refcode=jtk4545-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODM3MDQwYi03ODdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkfoIjwgPSwcMUoAM3AmXbKRiRX5cWH5w6zMiCWKklk=&emci=03f49e3f-fd74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=b837040b-787d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)**

clean_body: sign on now to show your support for an assault weapons ban: | | | Friend, did you see this email from Kirsten? Only a couple months have passed since she sent this email, but the number of mass shootings in 2023 has, tragically, already skyrocketed to more than 500. Our country is in the midst of a full-blown gun violence epidemic. And we all know that it won't end until leaders in Washington finally stand up to the gun lobby and pass an assault weapons ban. Kirsten is working hard to win the votes that we need to finally get these weapons of war off our streets. But she's counting on people like you to continue raising your voices for change until we get the job done. That's why I'm asking you to add your name to this petition to help us reach our new 25,000 signature goal before our midnight deadline. | | Thank you so much, Emily Graham Kirsten's Digital Director \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Kirsten Gillibrand Subject: Friend, you have been exclusively selected | | | Friend, there have already been more than 200 mass shootings in 2023 alone. That's more than one shooting for every single day of the year. America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic — and families and communities across the nation are paying the price every single day. It's heartbreaking. It's infuriating. And it's long past time we address this problem head-on. Today, on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I'm asking 5,000 people on this team to raise their voices for change by signing my petition to support an assault weapons ban. | | Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable. But here's the thing, friend: This cycle isn't endless. The next mass killing isn't inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take right now to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence. And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms. Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me. | | With hope for the future, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand Congress make the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Bring back the expanded Child Tax Credit! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd88610f-1a30-42a3-90a7-097a44882a64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fb03474-a41c-4c7d-a50a-6b66d917303b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In 2021, the expanded Child Tax Credit cut childhood poverty by nearly half, and it did so very cost-effectively – **and Republicans in Congress got rid of it. **[**Tell them to bring it back.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a2b89ba-958e-4875-85ae-cd4141394279/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The expanded Child Tax Credit lifted millions of children out of poverty by providing families much needed funds to cover expenses and put food on the table. But at the end of that year, Republicans (joined by Sen. Joe Manchin) allowed the expanded tax credit to expire, and it hasn't been reinstated since. The expanded Child Tax Credit helped reduce child poverty by 46 percent! But in 2022, nearly [1 in 5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T044f1fa5-163a-4613-af2e-ff8034b8a0fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) American households with children were food insecure. Bringing back the expanded Child Tax Credit should be a no-brainer! We have clear evidence that it works to fight poverty and food insecurity. We need Congress to make it permanent so families have the support they need. [**Sign your name to tell Congress: Bring back the expanded Child Tax Credit now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b1b3126-fc4c-4b9d-99d8-a224725d18c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Diane Sare
subject: Statewide Petitioners Volunteer Christmas Party Dec 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=1)
---
Friend
### _Sunday December 3 Petitioning Launch and Christmas Party_
When I ran against Chuck Schumer in 2022, I became the first and only statewide candidate to achieve ballot status in New York State (after the outrageous tripling of the requirement to 45,000), thanks to many of you and your tough work for 6 brutal weeks in April and May last year. I still remember that the first day started with a snowstorm in Buffalo -- but we persevered. We cannot take it for granted that we will easily do this a second time, and there's a definite possibility that I'll be seeking more than one ballot line, which could mean DOUBLE the signatures (!!!).__ So it's time to assemble our forces and get ready for the 2024 petitioning campaign, which begins on April 16. Please plan now to put aside several days, or even weeks between April 16 and the end of May for this challenging task. On the positive side, our volunteers spoke with hundreds of thousands of people while getting the signatures, which greatly increased the visibility of my campaign. You are therefore invited to my statewide volunteers Christmas Party on Sunday, December 3 in the Syracuse area, which will be the launch of assembling the petitioning team. The event will start at 3pm with refreshments and live classical music. If you can't make it in person, you can tune in at 4:00 pm over Zoom for the hard facts on what's involved in the petitioning. Please RSVP below either to attend in person, or over Zoom. | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_peitioners_in_person?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=2 "RSVP for Syracuse in person") [RSVP for Syracuse in person](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_peitioners_in_person?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=2)
---
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_petitioners_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=3 "RSVP for Dec 3 Zoom Link") [RSVP for Dec 3 Zoom Link](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_petitioners_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=3)
---
My campaign spent close to $80,000 just to get on the ballot between gas, tolls, housing, printing, legal fees, etc, and we need to fill up that warchest now. So if you're not able to help gather signatures, you can absolutely help by funding the effort.
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=4)
---
\--Diane
* * *
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6hhYeg6uqrmVjcmfPLFdm4zVmvb8S7HE8Z_RlHQCC7m4&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=5) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tst9BOlZ9OlCCK74nOWoOKg&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=6) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2TAV1jfx9D-rSZxIUaL162PHBHURBc1qsFUGlrBqSav&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=7) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZZXVyx336ZlBfOdYcb7kM01j94uPh32frcmIhKSp55_4&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=8) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfJi8wVgkxoBFeO9SbtDkrsOsB53pTkfNsNzYoZI4W0Bq&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=9) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNyyQszqhD4wGTfakbeHue5PWHQ_UvD5z0w5lHezUkTQJ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203&n=10)

subject: Election Day is TODAY
body:
Polls are open! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5910a81e5ad8/my-work-is-far-from-finished-6210192?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend- **We made it - TODAY IS ELECTION DAY!**

Polls opened at 6:00 AM this morning, and if you haven’t gone to vote yet, you have until 7:00 PM to do so. Let’s make this a day to remember! To find your nearest polling location, just click here:
---
| [Find Your Polling Location](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=0e0e6dcf77&e=48b883ea87 "Find Your Polling Location")
---
| This campaign has been incredibly rewarding, and I am deeply honored to have connected with so many hard working members of our community during as I traveled across Virginia Beach. One thing has always been clear from these discussions: we need common sense solutions to solve the most important issues our district faces. I’m ready to continue working to deliver legislation that makes a positive impact on the lives of so many people in our district and across our Commonwealth. I am proud to support cutting taxes, getting back to the basics in our schools, connecting Virginians with good-paying jobs, strengthening our law enforcement, and [so much more](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=705aaff285&e=48b883ea87). **Today, you can have a direct influence on the future of our district. Every vote truly makes a difference. Help keep Virginia Beach RED and make a plan to vote today!** Thank you so much for your consideration. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=2b69ea812b&e=48b883ea87)

name: Team Reeves
subject: State of Emergency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
ALERT: Residents of Madison and surrounding localities
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018baa37f8de-1f25059a-95fc-4e31-9029-3991bf36839c-000000/m8miZWPi5PMhyRY5vGchM2lowgg=347)
---
| |
---
| **ALERT: Residents of Madison County and the surrounding localities; Youngkin Declares State of Emergency** Governor Youngkin has declared a **state of emergency** in response to the Quaker Run woodland fire. [According to the National Park Service](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nps.gov%2Fshen%2Fplanyourvisit%2Fquaker-run-fire-information.htm/1/0100018baa37f8de-1f25059a-95fc-4e31-9029-3991bf36839c-000000/NSzd4Oio20NRECW0DMr5TLcBnoc=347) as of yesterday, Nov. 6th the fire has burned approximately 2800 acres of state, federal, and private land, 670 of which fall in Shenandoah National Park. A containment line has been established around the entire perimeter, but the Virginia Department of Forestry reports that strong winds this past weekend led to multiple breaches. A declaration of a state of emergency will not only allow Virginia to utilize its resources like the Virginia National Guard in order to combat the growing threat as the fire continues to approach residences, but will also help garner further federal assistance. [**Madison County Sheriff 's Office has issued a voluntary evacuation order for residents north of ****681 Finks Hollow Lane.**](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fdailyprogress.com%2Fnews%2Flocal%2Fmadison-county-residents-encouraged-to-evacuate-as-wildfire-spreads%2Farticle_f41d1b80-7c36-11ee-8be0-c302547639e5.html/1/0100018baa37f8de-1f25059a-95fc-4e31-9029-3991bf36839c-000000/YX1mlw8KwTluowOt5rg8RetIyDw=347) **Jack Kauffmann** , a Forest Manager with the Virginia Department of Forestry, has taken charge during this crisis to coordinate firefighting efforts. Despite today's critical election, Senator Reeves' and Governor Youngkin's focus is on the safety and security of the residents of Madison County and those who might be affected by the Quaker Run fire. At this time, no structures have been damaged. ** _The current status of the fire can be seen at_ ****https://virginiapublic.firesponse.com/********https://www.nps.gov/shen/planyourvisit/quaker-run-fire-information.htm********https://www.madisonco.virginia.gov/AlertCenter.aspx?AID=Quaker-Run-Fire-Updates-9** ** _Air quality maps can be seen at_****https://outlooks.airfire.org/outlook**
---
| |
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO SEE THE GOVERNOR'S DECLARATION](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.governor.virginia.gov%2Fmedia%2Fgovernorvirginiagov%2Fgovernor-of-virginia%2Fpdf%2Feo%2FEO-29.pdf/1/0100018baa37f8de-1f25059a-95fc-4e31-9029-3991bf36839c-000000/SZ_e07nkr3aVtZg1yXRQg2uvPws=347)

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05v03pjod9aoke4327u2fr9jbujktk51fuilf68_rp22sh2s8i66p74spgeaob1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ea6tehdgrdvqsmeiobsdu444khkpb70v8hf1h8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spgeaob1chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4dheasnf3o54vfa2f7d94jmo1av8rd6sa30fs8o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spgeaob1chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsiqovfsuq78re4qg4vk958vldqg2dlu957o4j9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74spgeaob1chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Open Seat for Republicans in 2024! 🇺🇸
body:
| | | | | |

# Maryland's 6th Congressional District
# is an Open Seat for the 2024 election!
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=9617833276&e=0a12281e0e)
As many of you may already know, the 6th District is currently an open seat in Congress for the 2024 election, and the political landscape in this district has undergone significant changes.
The reason for this change is the decision by the incumbent Democrat representative, David Trone, to run for the United States Senate in 2024. This change has presented a unique opportunity for our party, but it also underscores the importance of selecting the right candidate to secure victory for Republicans.
After the 2022 redistricting efforts, the map for Maryland's 6th District has evolved to become more competitive for Republicans. The district has shifted from being a Democratic stronghold to a toss-up, making it a prime target for the upcoming 2024 election. This change is a testament to the hard work and dedication of our local Republican activists and the shifting political dynamics within the district.
To seize this opportunity and bring much-needed change to our district, we need a candidate who not only represents our conservative values but also has the experience and determination to secure victory.
We are proud to introduce you to the top candidate for Maryland's 6th Congressional District, Dr. Mariela Roca.
# Meet Dr. Mariela Roca: A Strong
# and Experienced Candidate ☑️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=0cc925c833&e=0a12281e0e)
Mariela Roca is a true conservative and a proud Air Force veteran, having served our country with honor and dedication in Afghanistan. As a mother of two, she understands the importance of strong family values and the need for responsible leadership in Congress. With a Doctorate in Business Administration, Mariela possesses the expertise to address the economic challenges facing our district and our nation.
Mariela Roca is a true representation of our diverse community, being of Hispanic heritage, and she believes in the American dream and the principles that make our nation great. She is dedicated to working tirelessly to protect our freedoms, strengthen our national security, and create opportunities for all residents of the 6th District.
Mariela's commitment to our country, community, her military service, and her professional experience make her the ideal candidate to lead our district in the 6th Congressional District. She is ready to fight for lower taxes, limited government, and common-sense policies that will benefit all residents in Maryland 6th.
Click below to learn more about Mariela! ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=154500582e&e=0a12281e0e)
# Support Mariela Roca: Join Us in the Fight for Maryland 6th! 🫶🏽
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=fe39768ec4&e=0a12281e0e)
The 6th Congressional District is at a turning point, and the upcoming 2024 election will be pivotal in determining the direction of our representation both here in Maryland and in Congress.
We urge you to join us in supporting Mariela Roca in our campaign for Congress. Your contributions, volunteer work, and your vote will make a significant difference in securing victory for Republicans in this crucial race.
To learn more about Mariela Roca and our campaign, please visit our website at[ ](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c2383e1a59&e=0a12281e0e)[**rocaforcongress.com**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=fe43a00b97&e=0a12281e0e) and follow us on social media for regular updates and events.
Thank you for your continued support, and let's work together to bring conservative leadership to Maryland's 6th Congressional District in 2024.
Please make a donation today if you can to help keep us in the fight. 🙏🏽
\- PaulTeam Roca
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=ac62f6d9a7&e=0a12281e0e)
|
