Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=969adb32eeaf7ade7e3b0c7a2a039433b8a18645948562bec6654c4b630c77202d5bba901cc0e0ce03884d0bc62c2c7b126bc6d4a77966952773b7697d8dd01d

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

[****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fe3807aa9ee640a8a05afbc09e8f4721&_e=QtaU-gla_eTHKKfXSgtQhcJE5okCgVXHWK4WidMyorkApkjml6qLQHfRCnb_aBLNhwCtdzFHfVrcASQijP0u4dSEYW_ZNMevxwicoTpBaaVJRlfXURCKo8Pv-m5AcNUgpzcbJjuQgdlNGcaStWTkq0FImIhRYfycoz6nflJUU8ZAQXkwwkmb-6rvy1Q62noDdrG5-HAQYCAI0Mx3pxYbEGQQtfAKqhys3KKCCnv9fvqeU1gNPDGD4x4USUwtx52usFyo9_11GtGinL10Er7ulZ8rk67Lz36GJ2iImmcHvyw2OOnJMwsGKNu0D4mAwCGK)**' INSTEAD OF HOLDING UP AID TO ISRAEL FOR ADDITIONAL UKRAINE FUNDING, CONGRESS SHOULD GIVE THE SITUATION IN ISRAEL THE SEPARATE DEBATE AND VOTE THAT IT DESERVES' **([The Hill](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fe3807aa9ee640a8a05afbc09e8f4721&_e=QtaU-gla_eTHKKfXSgtQhcJE5okCgVXHWK4WidMyorkApkjml6qLQHfRCnb_aBLNhwCtdzFHfVrcASQijP0u4dSEYW_ZNMevxwicoTpBaaVJRlfXURCKo8Pv-m5AcNUgpzcbJjuQgdlNGcaStWTkq0FImIhRYfycoz6nflJUU8bPMWhkr1S1KrwpT3r4rAhTCG_z1KpOzvU6Xrs2BOyeM40Q1rCPUt131inzXa8zsed6yyxbD4gIwAFvsTqGVMY13TZf9zl4AX_evRCCdu81oozd5CLgMPQGUIXR3ahNvnvDEBk5YQy2FtMOSsK5oOLM)) \-- The horrific terrorist attack against Israel by Hamas, funded and supported by the Islamic Republic of Iran, has left over 1,400 Israelis dead, along with at least thirty American citizens.
The United States' closest ally and strategic partner in the Middle East is well equipped to respond to this escalating war and defend its people, but military support from the U.S. will be necessary in the coming weeks.
Having failed to force through more Ukraine funding by tying it to disaster relief for Americans, Senate leadership is now using the crisis in Israel as a "Plan B" to get the Biden administration's funding request across the finish line -- this time by as much as $100 billion.
But the conflicts in Ukraine and Israel are two distinct events that deserve two distinct responses.
Instead of holding up aid to Israel for additional Ukraine funding, Congress should give the situation in Israel the separate debate and vote that it deserves.
Read Senator Vance and Heritage Foundation President Kevin Roberts' Op-Ed piece [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fe3807aa9ee640a8a05afbc09e8f4721&_e=QtaU-gla_eTHKKfXSgtQhcJE5okCgVXHWK4WidMyorkApkjml6qLQHfRCnb_aBLNhwCtdzFHfVrcASQijP0u4dSEYW_ZNMevxwicoTpBaaVJRlfXURCKo8Pv-m5AcNUgpzcbJjuQgdlNGcaStWTkq0FImIhRYfycoz6nflJUU8ZT02aTJx_qqCGjlh21eLGSvGj-B2rc-0pGZeXgbT7d4TU518qyImOord8kK5pzjZ8vH0zJUldHno53TwZ3UfKJ3P3TTbRYXno1h-3IgsGBRIlbRAmfHUbse6K3r0nUuyt7PYkme4PWxtU0uLc6J8Zw). [****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fe3807aa9ee640a8a05afbc09e8f4721&_e=QtaU-gla_eTHKKfXSgtQhWFuUgWrpV5AE0krmKbMpu12TU6Q3BgCLAsNBKl1nYZR82OulljDo8tmZuehbdH_lIGhQB4n6DUwZG6zThj6910D-RlpYCMfvv8uRO_x8d0viEJifPD0-X2TfWeZBZaWZn-Stggd8vxHFVLlEF8sQm7q2hefLxguJbG1TvkyM0xUzoc2GT83VvDA6ufXz_vSVAYjhNvfunUGKLnJ0N4waaa6_HOnNEjj7DXey_LB_J2NdiUz58WmTtZNkfGRAM7Ze1evAdEKsdLLrpBVjJNcjaF8G04xmQ-yd_6UYYoZ0aUZEJBT6JWfu5O4uIbog8j1gQ%3D%3D)**' FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS ARE RIGHT TO BE CONCERNED THAT THEY MAY NEVER SEE A RETURN ON LOANS ISSUED TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS' **([Fox News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fe3807aa9ee640a8a05afbc09e8f4721&_e=QtaU-gla_eTHKKfXSgtQhWFuUgWrpV5AE0krmKbMpu12TU6Q3BgCLAsNBKl1nYZR82OulljDo8tmZuehbdH_lIGhQB4n6DUwZG6zThj6910D-RlpYCMfvv8uRO_x8d0viEJifPD0-X2TfWeZBZaWZn-Stggd8vxHFVLlEF8sQm50tUuOdZ0YOvqpUUJ-9SjUJCSsx0RNDqaMu9Wrp-ywklJao2mH9lNw1tqVVtoUugnMHc6p0l31MkGRawQKPTAqXh6Uk_IN9gtsZM90_eNV2xVujXHnXpVDqaXQHzA3h9mZvgMDUSN_mtdZbnppWD0SZDE-NpLiWjXoq7NjfLkPDg%3D%3D)[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fe3807aa9ee640a8a05afbc09e8f4721&_e=QtaU-gla_eTHKKfXSgtQhbZsLGxus8fPq5BiMnszHGlqRAn9kjKAJFgn_wumzSzplD8N_HE7A3RX4rlEPYneL8WYl00bW36T9QgB7MIynYouItGRhbGy6lM9xWWIVbWWcyitWrsluQiy9PfRIQZNzJxZpY1PhGjQqfNAVXaQALrftE_nCZdW8FvQXDpgdX1E-qWAVW3-ALFCPV-RtrpweuBw7aCy-WhJNW68YYiuov469awUaBuCgd-FX57QtxNFkbKIa70y9tbLlT1nDm3wIKECJW-ypkvwPeG9D1zc13ozXcIRzhGy4zMNgXcWUaD7shPpsmPae1WZWIfYINv7g864X1ov9eRfXG8UzNz2t50%3D)) \-- A Republican senator led every Senate Banking Committee Republican in a letter to the Biden administration about a recent joint directive on illegal immigrants being approved for loans.
The letter from Ohio GOP Senator J.D. Vance is a response to an Oct. 12 directive from the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) warning lenders against solely denying lines of credit for mortgages, auto and other loans due to a borrower's immigration status.
Signed by every member of the GOP members of the Senate Banking Committee, the letter to the Attorney General Merrick Garland and CFPB Director Rohit Chopra argues that the joint directive flies in the face of sound lending practices.
"If someone is deported to their home country, how is a bank in Ohio supposed to recoup the loan it was forced to issue?" Vance said. "The federal government should be cracking down on illegal immigration - not encouraging more of it."

JD Vance said the work done at the Ohio Air National Guard 178th Wing base at the Springfield-Beckley Airport is important to maintaining national security and carrying out intelligence missions during a visit there Friday.
The Ohio senator said that he learned about the base's mission -- to support federal and state missions through attacks, intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance while being involved in the local community -- and the impact that it has on safety, the economy and more.
"I learned a lot today about the role that these guys have in America's national security sand assessing national intelligence, and really keeping us safe all over the world, so I'm proud to have them here," Vance said. "I'm proud of what they do, and most of all I'm just grateful for them for the mission they do."

"The era of mask mandates caused a lot of problems," said Vance. "It caused problems for our kids and caused developmental delays for school children. It caused a lot of rancor and a lot of division within our common American family. If people want to wear masks, of course, they should be able to. But if people don't want to wear masks on airplanes, on transit, they should have that option as well. And that's all that my amendment does."
After the vote, Vance released a statement that called the amendment's passage "a massive victory for personal freedom in this country."
"We saw countless abuses of authority throughout the COVID pandemic, and the American people were justifiably enraged by unscientific mask mandates," Vance continued. "Today, the United States Senate took an emphatic step toward common sense and individual liberty."

J.D. Vance, R-Ohio, along with U.S. Sen. Sherrod Brown, D-Ohio, introduced the bipartisan Railway Safety Act of 2023. On Thursday, Vance voiced both frustration and exasperation that the legislation meant to strengthen rail safety and prevent another disaster like East Palestine has stalled.
"Two hundred and fifty days have passed since the disastrous train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio. Yet Congress has still not passed commonsense railway safety legislation to prevent something like this from happening again," said Vance. "Enough is enough - it's time for the Senate to pass the Railway Safety Act."

\-- Seventy years ago, the CEO of General Motors could say that "what's good for General Motors is good for America." The auto industry was booming, building upon its wartime expansion as the "arsenal of democracy." Workers shared in the industry's prosperity. A job in the American auto industry delivered an income that could comfortably support a family, and autoworkers found peace of mind in working toward a secure retirement.
But the same cannot be said today. The U.S. auto industry has fallen victim to offshoring and stagnating productivity. While some sectors--particularly tech and finance--have done well, wages in other industries have stagnated. And it's become nearly impossible to raise a middle-class family on a single income.
The Biden administration would rather shutter every combustion engine facility in Ohio than admit their EV pipedream is crushing our auto industry. Autoworkers in Cleveland, Defiance, Sharonville, Anna, Lima, Toledo and across the Midwest will be left in the breach--casualties of the far Left's religious zeal for electric vehicles.
Ohioans have too much to lose. Our state builds more internal combustion engines than any other in our union. Now is the time to reject Joe Biden's disastrous obsession with electric vehicles and rescue the American auto industry.

clean_body: | Senator JD Vance continues to fight for Ohioans. This edition of Hillbilly on the Hill captures Senator Vance's recent updates! ' COMBINING ISRAEL AND UKRAINE AID WITH MONEY FOR OPEN BORDERS IS A DISGRACE. IT'S A WAY TO PROVIDE POLITICAL COVER AND MORE MONEY FOR BIDEN'S DISASTROUS POLICIES' () Watch Senator Vance discussing on Fox Business : Listen to Senator Vance joining Glenn Beck about this issue: ' INSTEAD OF HOLDING UP AID TO ISRAEL FOR ADDITIONAL UKRAINE FUNDING, CONGRESS SHOULD GIVE THE SITUATION IN ISRAEL THE SEPARATE DEBATE AND VOTE THAT IT DESERVES' () \-- The horrific terrorist attack against Israel by Hamas, funded and supported by the Islamic Republic of Iran, has left over 1,400 Israelis dead, along with at least thirty American citizens. The United States' closest ally and strategic partner in the Middle East is well equipped to respond to this escalating war and defend its people, but military support from the U.S. will be necessary in the coming weeks. Having failed to force through more Ukraine funding by tying it to disaster relief for Americans, Senate leadership is now using the crisis in Israel as a "Plan B" to get the Biden administration's funding request across the finish line -- this time by as much as $100 billion. But the conflicts in Ukraine and Israel are two distinct events that deserve two distinct responses. Instead of holding up aid to Israel for additional Ukraine funding, Congress should give the situation in Israel the separate debate and vote that it deserves. Read Senator Vance and Heritage Foundation President Kevin Roberts' Op-Ed piece . ' FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS ARE RIGHT TO BE CONCERNED THAT THEY MAY NEVER SEE A RETURN ON LOANS ISSUED TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS' () \-- A Republican senator led every Senate Banking Committee Republican in a letter to the Biden administration about a recent joint directive on illegal immigrants being approved for loans. The letter from Ohio GOP Senator J.D. Vance is a response to an Oct. 12 directive from the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) warning lenders against solely denying lines of credit for mortgages, auto and other loans due to a borrower's immigration status. Signed by every member of the GOP members of the Senate Banking Committee, the letter to the Attorney General Merrick Garland and CFPB Director Rohit Chopra argues that the joint directive flies in the face of sound lending practices. "If someone is deported to their home country, how is a bank in Ohio supposed to recoup the loan it was forced to issue?" Vance said. "The federal government should be cracking down on illegal immigration - not encouraging more of it." Read the entire article . ' THE NATIONAL LEADERSHIP RECOGNIZES THIS IS AN IMPORTANT FACILITY' () \-- Republican U.S. Sen. JD Vance said the work done at the Ohio Air National Guard 178th Wing base at the Springfield-Beckley Airport is important to maintaining national security and carrying out intelligence missions during a visit there Friday. The Ohio senator said that he learned about the base's mission -- to support federal and state missions through attacks, intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance while being involved in the local community -- and the impact that it has on safety, the economy and more. "I learned a lot today about the role that these guys have in America's national security sand assessing national intelligence, and really keeping us safe all over the world, so I'm proud to have them here," Vance said. "I'm proud of what they do, and most of all I'm just grateful for them for the mission they do." Read the entire Springfield News-Sun article . ' WE SAW COUNTLESS ABUSES OF AUTHORITY THROUGHOUT THE COVID PANDEMIC, AND THE AMERICAN PEOPLE WERE JUSTIFIABLY ENRAGED BY UNSCIENTIFIC MASK MANDATES' () -- The U.S. Senate on Wednesday approved a proposal introduced by Ohio's JD Vance that would block the Department of Transportation from using any federal money to enforce mask mandates in response to COVID-19 through the current fiscal year. "The era of mask mandates caused a lot of problems," said Vance. "It caused problems for our kids and caused developmental delays for school children. It caused a lot of rancor and a lot of division within our common American family. If people want to wear masks, of course, they should be able to. But if people don't want to wear masks on airplanes, on transit, they should have that option as well. And that's all that my amendment does." After the vote, Vance released a statement that called the amendment's passage "a massive victory for personal freedom in this country." "We saw countless abuses of authority throughout the COVID pandemic, and the American people were justifiably enraged by unscientific mask mandates," Vance continued. "Today, the United States Senate took an emphatic step toward common sense and individual liberty." Read Cleveland.com 's entire article . ****' TWO HUNDRED AND FIFTY DAYS HAVE PASSED SINCE THE DISASTROUS TRAIN DERAILMENT, YET CONGRESS HAS STILL NOT PASSED COMMONSENSE RAILWAY SAFETY LEGISLATION' () -- It's been nine months since the Feb. 3 Norfolk Southern train derailment in East Palestine and eight months since U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance, R-Ohio, along with U.S. Sen. Sherrod Brown, D-Ohio, introduced the bipartisan Railway Safety Act of 2023. On Thursday, Vance voiced both frustration and exasperation that the legislation meant to strengthen rail safety and prevent another disaster like East Palestine has stalled. "Two hundred and fifty days have passed since the disastrous train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio. Yet Congress has still not passed commonsense railway safety legislation to prevent something like this from happening again," said Vance. "Enough is enough - it's time for the Senate to pass the Railway Safety Act." Read the entire Times Leader article . **' GREAT TO VISIT THE AUTO WORKERS STRIKING IN TOLEDO... THEY'RE IN HIGH SPIRITS AND HAVE A SIMPLE MESSAGE: GOOD WAGES FOR AN HONEST DAY'S WORK' ()-- Senator JD Vance met with striking United Auto Workers in Toledo on Friday. Sen. Vance visited the Toledo Assembly Complex on the morning of Oct. 6, where workers are taking part in the UAW strike happening across the country. Vance talked with workers and showed support for their cause. "Great to visit the auto workers striking in Toledo this morning," Vance said in a release. "They're in high spirits and have a simple message: good wages for an honest day's work. I'm proud to support them." Read WDTN 's article . ' THE U.S. AUTO INDUSTRY HAS FALLEN VICTIM TO OFFSHORING AND STAGNATING PRODUCTIVITY' () \-- Seventy years ago, the CEO of General Motors could say that "what's good for General Motors is good for America." The auto industry was booming, building upon its wartime expansion as the "arsenal of democracy." Workers shared in the industry's prosperity. A job in the American auto industry delivered an income that could comfortably support a family, and autoworkers found peace of mind in working toward a secure retirement. But the same cannot be said today. The U.S. auto industry has fallen victim to offshoring and stagnating productivity. While some sectors--particularly tech and finance--have done well, wages in other industries have stagnated. And it's become nearly impossible to raise a middle-class family on a single income. The Biden administration would rather shutter every combustion engine facility in Ohio than admit their EV pipedream is crushing our auto industry. Autoworkers in Cleveland, Defiance, Sharonville, Anna, Lima, Toledo and across the Midwest will be left in the breach--casualties of the far Left's religious zeal for electric vehicles. Ohioans have too much to lose. Our state builds more internal combustion engines than any other in our union. Now is the time to reject Joe Biden's disastrous obsession with electric vehicles and rescue the American auto industry. Read Senator Vance's entire Op-Ed piece . ' THE LAST THING THE STATE DEPARTMENT SHOULD BE DOING IS WASTING ITS TIME AND YOUR TAX DOLLARS PUSHING FAR-LEFT GENDER IDEOLOGY' () -- FIRST ON THE DAILY SIGNAL: Sen. J.D. "The last thing the State Department should be doing is wasting its time and your tax dollars pushing far-left gender ideology," Vance told The Daily Signal. "There are only two genders--passports issued by the United States government should recognize that simple fact. I am proud to introduce this bill to restore some sanity in our federal bureaucracy." Read The Daily Signal 's entire article . ' WHAT BIDEN IS DOING IS DISGUSTING' () -- Sen. J.D. "They are not the same countries, they are not the same problems, and this effort to use Israel for political cover is offensive," he added. "Hell no." Read Breitbart 's entire article . After the attacks on Israel, pro-Hamas rallies broke out across many major American cities and college campuses with protesters in New York City chanting "From the river to the sea!" At least one counterterrorism expert has said that the phrase calls for the extermination of Israel. Vance, in a Twitter post on Tuesday, wrote that his "education policy is that we should stop funding institutions that teach American kids to support terrorist killers" and that his "immigration policy is that we should stop importing people who already believe those things." Read Breitbart 's entire article . Senator JD Vance continues to deliver for all of Ohio as a conservative outsider in the United States Senate. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. We’re working around the clock to get the message out to as many people as possible, but with hours left until the polls close we need your help to make our final push.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLisbuTNe1H5SvzWWVPle40lEb6gXccgvMS2Q1aRiezMyiEz9DN_3sCBK43-RjhIMDkQG7o_W-1RLRriUL5hXgTMIA6NaoEukG1x-j3DGQ1ItQoqy2-fhywJtc2j5hzbF82AKBm9kOp3nz00lqaY4e4-b-j2Ya05ysC4P4aMFz5Hy309BymuNjcjJg46L9Z25bykYYjx4C5monVPpCQ1A9sC0DBHGnb8sBi07bv1iHObLmuYyRscJEo-ETXtFpEetfADHgAX60mOiZNwhCFlS7Wi4DLn5arJnhG6ba19Q0SoR0SnCEKGpynaw53AKINcaDG970aEQWG7-JagTqfmgm9ozbMivpI9aY46TLL7_yRp3g/413/AzgDQVSYSQulKgKgLY2Z_Q/h8/kh-DDh-kiwTZz_4CWCqUxzSXfzZx_pYP4ykue6IfYd8) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. name: Jasmine (personal)
subject: This is it, Peter (last chance to hit our Election Day goal)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
This is it, Peter. **Today is our last chance to hit our emergency Election Day goal** and make a difference for more than 200 Emerge women on the ballot right now!
---
But I just checked our progress, and we’re still **$1,015 short** of what we need to raise by midnight. I’m reaching out to you directly because your support is critical to our movement. We urgently need you to step up now – while we can still make a difference in the races this year.
**Will you chip in $10 or more to help hit our emergency goal and empower Democratic women to win up and down the ballot? Here’s the best link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/emerge2023_electionweek](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946540/436902587/-1013658139?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)**
Thank you for powering our movement forward,
Jasmine Smith
Development Manager, Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sandra Bishop, Emerge**
Date: Sat, Nov 4, 2023
Subject: 🚨JUST LAUNCHED 🚨Emerge emergency Election Week Fund
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946541/436902589/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=) | Peter, we have only **THREE DAYS until Election Day, and we’re facing a critical budget shortfall. **
---
That’s why we just launched an **emergency Election Week Fund** to help close the gap and power more Emerge victories at the ballot box. **[But we’re counting on your support before midnight tonight to help Democratic women run and WIN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946542/436902591/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946543/436902592/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)
Peter, this election is a big deal, and we can’t afford to take it for granted. _Here’s why closing our budget gap is so important right now:_
We have **over 200 trailblazing Emerge women on the ballot, ready to build strong, women-led majorities that can protect our rights in every state.** In Kentucky, all four women running for statewide office on the November ballot are Emerge alums, including Col. Pam Stevenson, Candidate for Kentucky Attorney General. If elected, she will be the first Black woman attorney general in Kentucky. In Virginia, first-time candidate and Emerge alum Lily Franklin is running for the House of Delegates in District 41. Through hard work and dedication, she has made her highly competitive race, winnable. In New Jersey, Britnee Timberlake, current Assemblywoman for District 34 is now a candidate for the State Senate. She was mentored by the late New Jersey Lieutenant Governor Sheila Oliver who recruited Timberlake to her assembly seat when she became Lieutenant Governor herself.

We need these women and countless others to fight for us at every level of office, to push back against the far-right, and to send a strong message to MAGA Republicans ahead of the 2024 races that our democracy belongs to us!
We deserve new voices in leadership who represent _all_ our communities and put people, our rights, and our futures first. **Emerge has been building a bench of Democratic women to do exactly that, but we can’t wait until “big” election years to do it. **
That’s why we’re calling on our top supporters – including you! – to help hit our emergency goal. But here’s what we found when we checked your official supporter record:
| | **Official Contribution Record **
---
_**Supporter ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com**_
---
_**Donated today?: PENDING**_
---
_**Suggested donation: $10**_
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946544/436902594/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)
---
**We MUST seize the opportunity to transform politics here and now. Because the GOP isn’t waiting until 2024 to unleash their anti-science, anti-women, and anti-voter policies. **They’re aggressively pushing their out-of-touch agenda and positioning their candidates to lock in right-wing power for years to come. We can’t let that happen, Peter, but we need your help to stop it.
**[Please, don’t pass up this opportunity to power our movement forward. Donate $10 or more to Emerge now – ahead of this crucial Election Day – to power bold Democratic women to victory in 2023 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946545/436902596/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. _
| | | [DONATE $10](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946546/436902597/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)
---
| [DONATE $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72946547/436902599/-1013658139?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk1355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWE1YTZlLTgwN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_gkyrjUD80Te5RsL5d6kPb9P4vBSEtZqcKdkC_N1Pg=)

Thank you for your urgent support,

Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge

That’s why we’re calling on our top supporters – including you! – to help hit our emergency goal. But here’s what we found when we checked your official supporter record: | | Official Contribution Record Supporter ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donated today?: PENDING Suggested donation: $10 | | = We MUST seize the opportunity to transform politics here and now. Because the GOP isn’t waiting until 2024 to unleash their anti-science, anti-women, and anti-voter policies. They’re aggressively pushing their out-of-touch agenda and positioning their candidates to lock in right-wing power for years to come. We can’t let that happen, Peter, but we need your help to stop it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your urgent support, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Next year and an invitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Dear Peter,
As I reflect upon the past three years, I’m reminded of the extraordinary honor it has been to represent the people of Senate District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Through the ups and downs, I’m proud to have been a steadfast advocate and powerful voice in the legislature, fighting for what is fair and just.
In two short months, we will begin the final legislative session of this senate term. In anticipation of session, I would like to invite you to my re-election kickoff fundraiser on December 11th at the home of my friends, Angela & Michael Vogeli! Please consider joining the host committee or buying a ticket here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023] Your presence and support would be greatly appreciated.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
Senate District 20 is the most competitive seat in the entire state and we must champion this seat as a symbol of progress and balance in our legislature. In 2020, I won this seat 52-48. Since winning, I’ve been at the forefront of the fight against GOP extremism in the Senate.
Together, let’s solidify our commitment to the future of our state and hold onto this seat. I hope you will join me as we kickoff my re-election campaign and tell the MAGA extremists in our legislature that we will not back down!
Thank you for standing with me. Your support is the cornerstone of our continued success.
Heidi Campbell
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

We need to know that Democrats everywhere are prepared to stand against Donald Trump -- because it’s going to take _all of us_ to keep him from inflicting four more years of misery on the country.

**We’ve launched our Official 2024 Straw Poll to make sure our grassroots team is prepared to take on Donald Trump once again, but I just checked our records and didn't see your response --_so please answer immediately:_**

name: Team Cori
subject: Sign onto the pro-peace, pro-humanity resolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is a time for humanity and moral clarity to prevail. | |
---
Peter, ******Last month, Cori introduced the Ceasefire Now resolution** in Congress, because we urgently need to call for de-escalation and an immediate ceasefire in Israel and Occupied Palestine, and for humanitarian assistance to urgently be delivered to the 2.3 million people under siege and trapped in Gaza. And because, without a ceasefire, we will only see more death and bloodshed. Since we published our petition a few days ago, almost 4000 people have signed onto it so far. That’s a great start, but we need to keep the pressure going. ****[**That’s why we’re asking you to sign on as a supporter of this resolution so that Cori’s fellow members of Congress who have yet to sign on know that the people of this country are anti-war, pro-peace, and pro-humanity.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6bmqq6DdunkysRCsFwguDw4Nf94B9LZdM0nCBUGON_9qh3mBNiW9cWjji-8h4gItT_2NVVLfeXxbzSvlkfIxLRNGJU8vLxbGsygprEv47RI7PW23erxS_jP_TxE-g1d54AlMjH30f3edh_RLAFP8Y20-kXTgzZ-aRb2chRDoiLkl3qULUz2dMi_zIWv-lg0h56eym3FSG_tq1c1Vbw4N_Ifkmp7Q5pjPDTnTlE88_q8NaWmKEqTIDZ9FeXdbaxMI4/413/Bq-g4gyyRdaiag-1kXFaNA/h0/PMZZiOY_nKTWjr5HwJy0T-EdhtOC2LvpF1MIi78z6ZE) **[ADD YOUR NAME TO THE CEASEFIRE RESOLUTION >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6qYKjRyW9W8PF2Dqacua6L-gJOO2I474YteIiKmYAqMvDPalDAUeC8w79Pt98DxUqAbEVhyI4PLW748_ocL-r2Fav1QEdQZ3dxLIT1H1qEHRFlO3bi8hzUxaBZReQl-QDqLTiPfJEHfIJI_6CEvPE4Ie3Y4RdNExfVaZVXzxd9F2CsC8lQLMrIlLrTGyyrRyiZ20xJ756Y4rSAfJRahg2qNbGUXG_7usleHiC9fvzJOmwtFtrk0aAluKzh0Lm8OMM/413/Bq-g4gyyRdaiag-1kXFaNA/h1/2gpsLyS2x3Wir4xqZQZshdB_m5Kec4y1nS7rFK-JD8Y) **
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgLY6G4FkTCAo7TEOo4jwMq_UrLtfkPqLdpNUNItRyPo2YrWiwt5UyIV9ryScj41VpNwKrv_UQlV3-MrQ4GtU7eX-8jJf9q4XTEh0eVmdI0Z74W-DmClSqKH8Or92rgVoDbaqY7ALOHH7AG5mO7s2iZGpaw2i6xbGZe-jqz29Xm0HGbjne-Rrm0c6jXdCBjRx626NQURXAs750aG0TTdJHx7rOmIgttKW2wfYD2-Ri53nrTU-sQQciWavsUJSvFkiCobUtq3EYYFinrI5ARmAL7Q/413/Bq-g4gyyRdaiag-1kXFaNA/h2/DfuQPCLIg-wg23tgilLGz1YLMKDWXwkqXIiJzAosnWk) From the Doctors without Borders, to the United Nations, to Amnesty International, to the Pope, **our anti-war, pro-peace, pro-humanity movement is strong and growing stronger by the day.** We are leading with love. We need the safe release of all hostages, humanitarian aid to Gaza, and a ceasefire now. This is a time for humanity and moral clarity to prevail. We cannot bomb our way to peace, we must do everything to prevent mass atrocity. That’s a great start, but we need to keep the pressure going. ** From the Doctors without Borders, to the United Nations, to Amnesty International, to the Pope, our anti-war, pro-peace, pro-humanity movement is strong and growing stronger by the day. We are leading with love. We need the safe release of all hostages, humanitarian aid to Gaza, and a ceasefire now. This is a time for humanity and moral clarity to prevail. We cannot bomb our way to peace, we must do everything to prevent mass atrocity. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s sad but true
body:
An all out assault on my Christian faith has been launched by the Left.

| **From the Desk of Speaker Mike Johnson**
---
Friend, It’s no secret that I’m a man of faith and place my trust in God at every step of the way, and no matter how hard the media and Democrats try to frame that as a bad thing, I will never apologize for my Christian faith. Jesus Christ is my Lord and Savior, and while that may be a foreign concept to the Socialists in Congress and their propagandists in the media, it isn’t to the millions upon millions of hardworking Americans who spent the last two and a half centuries building our country. Since the Obama Administration, the Left has fallen deeper and deeper into the fell clutch of Marxism. **I refuse to accept their extremism, despite the media’s attempts to normalize their agenda.** [**If you’re tired of the GASLIGHTING by the Left and the media as they try to frame us as crazy for opposing their extremism, I’d be humbled to have your support.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znf7a5brjfa62cbtfemmumse65ilincb2lp5qq28_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge9o34cdh2bs) The Left openly celebrates the extinguishing of innocent and beautiful life through the evil of abortion. The Left has launched what amounts to a crusade in our schools to indoctrinate our children with extreme sexual and gender ideologies, even to the point of legislating away the rights of parents who reject radical transgender hormones and surgeries for children. _**The Left is even taking to the streets of American cities to cheer on Hamas, the Radical Islamic Terrorists who just massacred over 1,000 Israelis in the worst terror attack since 9/11.**_ Yet, the Left still has the audacity to attack me for defending every American’s God-given right to bear arms in a time when violent crime is surging and dangerous criminals are being released onto the streets with impunity. **It is clear to every sane American citizen that our country is in the midst of the greatest spiritual crisis in our history.** Our only way out of this mess is for sanity, morality, and decency to once again be the pillars upon which our society stands and flourishes. To be victorious, we must be prepared and willing to fight with even more vigor and intensity than the Left, and that’s exactly what I’m going to do. [**If you’re with me, I’d be humbled to have your support as I raise money to elect more conservative leaders to join our majority in Congress.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zorpt7ru9d37e1jvla2asfn9urpfrg3rkbue5e40_rp22sh2s8i66p74spge9o34cdh2bs) _In Freedom,_ Speaker Mike Johnson
| **Paid for by House GOP Battleground Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee.**
---

---

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s Election Day in PA!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek, it’s Election Day in PA!
Even though some people call this the “off-year,” there are really important elections for state and local office that will have a real impact on communities like yours and mine.
We’ve got to turn out for Democrats up and down the ballot — and from the PA Supreme Court to county-level elections, every ballot could be the deciding vote. 🙏🙏
So if you haven’t already cast your ballot, get out there and vote before the polls close at 8 PM. **[You can find your polling place here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49745?t=1&akid=8656%2E434096%2En7fdXX)**
**[Find your polling place »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49745?t=2&akid=8656%2E434096%2En7fdXX)**
_And an important reminder: mail-in ballots have to be RECEIVED by 8pm, so if you haven’t mailed yours out, drop off your ballot at the county board of elections instead._
Let's get out the vote, Derek!
❤️❤️❤️John
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49745?t=3&akid=8656%2E434096%2En7fdXX)
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231107-8656-footer&t=4&refcode2=8656_434096_n7fdXX&akid=8656%2E434096%2En7fdXX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Hey Derek, it’s Election Day in PA! Even though some people call this the “off-year,” there are really important elections for state and local office that will have a real impact on communities like yours and mine. We’ve got to turn out for Democrats up and down the ballot — and from the PA Supreme Court to county-level elections, every ballot could be the deciding vote. 🙏🙏 So if you haven’t already cast your ballot, get out there and vote before the polls close at 8 PM. And an important reminder: mail-in ballots have to be RECEIVED by 8pm, so if you haven’t mailed yours out, drop off your ballot at the county board of elections instead. Let's get out the vote, Derek! ❤️❤️❤️John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: 2023 Election Alert (via Lose Cruz PAC)
subject: 2023 will be a preview of 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
Ted Cruz isn’t on the ballot this year, but there are a ton of other important elections!
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=136%2E623276%2EvOatCb)
It's our favorite day of the year — Election Day!
While Ted Cruz unfortunately isn’t on the ballot, (yet) there are **_a lot_** of other important elections happening up and down the ballot across the country! For more information on elections happening in your area, please click **[here](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/1446?t=2&akid=136%2E623276%2EvOatCb)**!
**In these last few years, Republicans nationally and in Texas have been doing _everything they can_ to undermine our elections and democracy.**
However, as we saw with the 2020 election and last year’s midterm elections, voters have stopped them in several key states. But that doesn’t mean the threat to our democracy is over. The outcome of today’s election will be a preview of what’s to come in 2024.
As we work to protect our democracy, there’s no _higher priority_ on our list than losing Cruz next November.
We have our work cut out for ourselves, but we know that if we can build a massive grassroots movement between now and next year, we can _win._
[**Whether you've donated in the past or simply read our emails, we're beyond appreciative to have your support. If you'd like to further that support today, can you chip in $5 or anything you can so we can ditch Ted Cruz next November?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231107?refcode=em20231107&amount=5&refcode2=136_623276_vOatCb&akid=136%2E623276%2EvOatCb)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231107?amount=5&refcode=em20231107&refcode2=136_623276_vOatCb&akid=136%2E623276%2EvOatCb)**
Let's go save our democracy, one vote at a time. Happy Election Day Team!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231107?refcode=em20231107&amount=5&refcode2=136_623276_vOatCb&akid=136%2E623276%2EvOatCb)
In solidarity,
— Lose Cruz PAC

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-footer?refcode=em-136&t=3&refcode2=136_623276_vOatCb&akid=136%2E623276%2EvOatCb)**

Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aae654a38248496a965a08c841f488ef&_e=rPED0cS6J2Csctmx4h2Aej_NrczlAbaRQKlBxqVr2n8OM4jdVDS2C-8pZe2nIDIG4AS_gqwkjxaEnOjKSQqEZNQO_kzHl116DLeKcdVc40M2oCVwnNPkzVzrLvb40TUxzVKpuiAHPFIRW4OMWMwhpw_Y4iy40URas0oObKX7BdUYhC3ZEq3godXEeEoE4WVt1fA_faJj68hbXBuoL9zkac3OI0jCX7Mi8KSi6XCXmC6I3OWS9BsEAExVBGx_YTcSFmnIwo95LCWlu88AENiHaqrb9_vsR3AQMvc9d24Uy_R3T28PhYFaycuo7pkfO79zR1lRUV-qhzuR7Lb-6UKPGJutnMqmG80Ge4538dnfvqpHm3ouDiysfmA4OeI4aEcK0wNAxC8gYPMsgGLsgCX-tQ%3D%3D)**

Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 14 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. **How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory?**

**We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate.**

If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. **[I’m working to make sure that every Republican in the country understands that winning the Montana Senate race this cycle is my top priority.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aae654a38248496a965a08c841f488ef&_e=rPED0cS6J2Csctmx4h2Aej_NrczlAbaRQKlBxqVr2n8OM4jdVDS2C-8pZe2nIDIG4AS_gqwkjxaEnOjKSQqEZNQO_kzHl116DLeKcdVc40M2oCVwnNPkzVzrLvb40TUxzVKpuiAHPFIRW4OMWMwhpw_Y4iy40URas0oObKX7BdUYhC3ZEq3godXEeEoE4WVt1fA_faJj68hbXBuoL9zkac3OI0jCX7Mi8KSi6XCXmC5ahPgqQ7WhO1ELRVx9PbOw0Ct2rqlvoXgNowQssz69tW7aGaj9GVLA83jcbhkZiLqSCrTrpUhDve4cnKzAdFEm41fSnGW5CYC_Oa08XVzI0RU9s1R968q0b-iPW0PJeWBLZAPeMDhHU5MAvI-mszj7kGWr-NV5L52s_fifPRwFwg%3D%3D)**

subject: Friend, I want you to see this.
body:
Plans for our future

| |

Friend,

Are you ready to return to the days when America was **STRONG** and **PROUD**?

Are you ready to return to leadership without the drama and without the chaos?

_**Are you ready to elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track?**_

**[I have a plan to save our future, but I need your help ahead of my debate TOMORROW. Once you finish looking over my plan as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99c710229d50477fbb2302a11b961df8&_e=3J6Ril6ynz7hLZxaWLQsxZ_3ruFe8kNQ2f0lT2BKw2ebnA24fjVd-VVNANkC8ZjILbWpyjZ4uS2Y4rs73qJrhWLtpAui_o0C4hEO9hJAdjBTWMy_bQcQqSGpur5g0drzPFNKurWqpWNsqmYPD01DL7D1sJvdGc9OU5h23OXhbINUWAMYmx03aRHolI22l1kZEDW2wGe4VqMsPwIwDT0Kibpk7_-t5f2f4VyzHUXOhe-LqAQl69lDUNxBhrkvMMYeuRNUO7Zoi9XY84eIvwkftqY-UKtWMneWtBssrm6Pbks-g_5aOpStAADCbNQanKIubW34eTJWdAfiLICJGYkMF7GomrxaoRVv_HllpsyWeWKk-gGnE51eZsYdSujbosq_Y4Uk0VVrEQDrfxfr9EOxK0sX-5vuzTiQkgw-BnLytsTOfBvvh3E5HDk_HH34ThJ4Fc7pGfJc1vZt7GVh1641nxcJstC2oWmf05WgFj8fZCgp-s3K0q6QFstu3nAWpqJbQ2mxEIWvR0KxFeSc3Eo5tTvvrAnvSHAetI0N3akMgNPBcDpHcVGJMDKSYCGZRDdd92zyBfVEDxiiwAkaoHaDOlurqz4KSHLU-ClqrbUh12S0LdDPJuuMIkU1WU7LdHTUcYvMk7P7cl1tr3Z9xKSkrzWc60txHAXdY84EeXwCE28%3D "I have a plan to save our future, but I need your help ahead of my debate TOMORROW. _**When it comes to our economy**_ , if 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards!

_**Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America**_ , let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**When it comes to education** , there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening!

**We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again!** In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let's put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America.

**When it comes to our universities, we 'll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over.** We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all.

**When it comes to crime, it's simple:** Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

_**We will bring law and order back!**_

_**When it comes to energy independence**_ , no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let's make sure we do things so that it's __**our American producers**__ supplying __**our American families.**__

_**When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us!**_ Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies!

**When I am President, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! **

We have the solutions. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship!

**[Will you please pitch in a generous donation today so we can build momentum ahead of my debate, capitalize on our momentum after I walk off the stage, and take one step closer to WINNING the battle for our country's future.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99c710229d50477fbb2302a11b961df8&_e=3J6Ril6ynz7hLZxaWLQsxZ_3ruFe8kNQ2f0lT2BKw2ebnA24fjVd-VVNANkC8ZjILbWpyjZ4uS2Y4rs73qJrhWLtpAui_o0C4hEO9hJAdjBTWMy_bQcQqSGpur5g0drzPFNKurWqpWNsqmYPD01DL7D1sJvdGc9OU5h23OXhbINUWAMYmx03aRHolI22l1kZEDW2wGe4VqMsPwIwDT0Kibpk7_-t5f2f4VyzHUXOhe-LqAQl69lDUNxBhrkvMMYeuRNUO7Zoi9XY84eIvwkftqY-UKtWMneWtBssrm6Pbks-g_5aOpStAADCbNQanKIubW34eTJWdAfiLICJGYkMF7GomrxaoRVv_HllpsyWeWKk-gGnE51eZsYdSujbosq_Y4Uk0VVrEQDrfxfr9EOxK0sX-5vuzTiQkgw-BnLytsTOfBvvh3E5HDk_HH34ThJ4Fc7pGfJc1vZt7GVh1641nxcJstC2oWmf05WgFj8fZCgp-s3K0q6QFstu3nAWpqJbAf_r6yji-DnvfRwRtI_-QI4G7UgBkWef5wUReXgGRNJPzFvuWYPNbobwpCxOlTMDgpKTzwyyceyq2o_Qma58wNqoG_5foMu3jAo-ctzM1-qAe3SNqT1Z5eFgUWwnh9I-Mvt45T0yfLIN3Knfxzsu_JwdbcyefaSLE7CteTlJTOg%3D "Will you please pitch in a generous donation today so we can build momentum ahead of my debate, capitalize on our momentum after I walk off the stage, and take one step closer to WINNING the battle for our country’s future.")**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99c710229d50477fbb2302a11b961df8&_e=3J6Ril6ynz7hLZxaWLQsxZ_3ruFe8kNQ2f0lT2BKw2ebnA24fjVd-VVNANkC8ZjIKIDw6fiz2QbUCbqwwtoK8Qw-QTA_qIF2Ylhyipsw3c59d1jcNd8ncbrmHwcs-UgLSUpJfI7vICtqjlVf0BqEcbPZt2Ei-0JifhZyzVWkfgqfGfbGaDPuAMjrCOFsGd8XXQCzyXFM1coz2oCM6teSeB1fe5MlpXaMT_l1kdvMIhLSzugh1MRJW44s28NPljMQBBH04eBHyvXr2JIO-w6bv_qjZpPvm7_DmLWIDamLqwbPGcwA_fRCMXx9U_7jhJnlHvwjy6J9CkhGcfGClQxi_Ri-nZKtagUQhyiYJBGJh06Fwz6NRPyIjjjiodPQq4mfv6GvMuK68nOjDXficJix-84P5J2N_xUm5iYzFyI8zE5jHNJmdLnrFnUQi54mJXNVazJEFfFJgHWcXZKt4JQ06qB8DgFJLiyjjJuwyRj7CBbudmcKnzA0SpGw6PteF7fWcLLZFGAOVHg8DQpmrBHA1uafHiq_lYkuWEV5jF2-S39VSyn6nQZ10zAaMoPKnic8oi3gXXmPDUC1aTk5REeAswhaEwiRU66hQTLUS4QHdqT9UJwtIttBdE6AHl2wOK4Bb5blifbimDF8KjOlznnRFQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Plans for our future | | | | | | Friend, Are you ready to return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD? Are you ready to return to leadership without the drama and without the chaos? Are you ready to elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track? "I have a plan to save our future, but I need your help ahead of my debate TOMORROW. Once you finish looking over my plan as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. " | When it comes to our economy , if 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America , let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. When it comes to education , there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening! We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again! In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let's put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America. When it comes to our universities, we 'll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over. We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all. When it comes to crime, it's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. We will bring law and order back! When it comes to energy independence , no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let's make sure we do things so that it's our American producers supplying our American families. When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us! Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies! When I am President, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! We have the solutions. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship! "Will you please pitch in a generous donation today so we can build momentum ahead of my debate, capitalize on our momentum after I walk off the stage, and take one step closer to WINNING the battle for our country’s future." | | We've got a country to save, Friend. subject: The election is one year from today. Are you ALL IN to defeat Ted Cruz?
disclaimer_text: paid for by The Real Texas PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25]
It's the first Tuesday in November, which means we're ONE YEAR away from Election Day.
Peter, it's time to get serious.
Colin Allred is surging in the polls, and Ted Cruz is more vulnerable than he's ever been... but there's a catch
The MAGA money is POURING in from all across the country to help Ted Cruz buy his way out of his unpopularity.
We CAN flip this seat - but it's going to take a swell of support from grassroots Democrats like you. We need to make sure Cruz's opponent can match that MAGA money dollar for dollar.

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Election Day…
body:
One year until American’s decide | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d%26ss_email_id%3D654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d%26ss_campaign_name%3DElection%2BDay%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-11-07T16%253A08%253A21Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=mkNU4WNybX4gi8RrCDbfM0BRtso%3D)
---
| **We are one year away from a historic 2024 election!** However, today is Election Day throughout Michigan, and around the country. In Kentucky, the Republican candidate is poised to knock off the Democrat Governor, just one month after a Republican won Louisiana Governor for the first time in eight years. That could mean two new GOP Governors!And new polling from the New York Times (yes, the New York Times), [shows Donald Trump beating Joe Biden by 5%](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.nytimes.com%2F2023%2F11%2F05%2Fus%2Fpolitics%2Fbiden-trump-2024-poll.html&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=0BmhzCq9kEJMXRSJk6QA07HoQTA%3D) here in Michigan, setting off alarm bells at the Democratic National Committee and George Soros’s living room.
---
| | |
---|---|---
[_ _ Win In 2024!_ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fstop-soros&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=je7zT49DAyEDKLhChDXVqEJeBa8%3D)
---
Last year, [George Soros spent more money](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cnbc.com%2F2022%2F11%2F03%2Famerican-billionaires-spent-a-record-880-million-on-the-us-midterm-elections-.html&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=hFxAZKyG8W5I-5WfvkTjRDH1y4k%3D) on American elections than any other individual or organization in the country - $128 million. Soros is a radical leftist and he’s made winning back control of Congress his top priority in 2024.That means he’s coming for me - coming for our Republican Majority - right here in mid-Michigan.**One year from today.**
---
|
---
[_ _ Stop George Soros!_ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fstop-soros&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=je7zT49DAyEDKLhChDXVqEJeBa8%3D)
---
**This race is the Top Open Seat in the Country** according to the Cook Political Report, and will decide our Republican Majority.In New York, Alabama, North Carolina, and now Georgia, the courts are forcing the states to redraw their district lines for 2024 to favor Democrats - wiping out our narrow 4-seat majority and making Hakeem Jeffries Speaker of the House.**That means winning Michigan’s 7th District is a top priority.**
---
This week, the [Detroit News broke a scandal](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2023%2F11%2F01%2Fcurtis-hertel-michigan-congress-greater-flint-health-coalition-jim-ananich-gretchen-whitmer%2F71385198007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=jE1sOHkXFG3lOeEICIToUQWuifo%3D) involving my opponent - a 22-year politician who worked as Gretchen Whitmer’s top lobbyist - steering a $1.5 million grant to a non-profit controlled by one of his political allies and accepting a $108,000 contract the next business day.**The very next business day.**
---
|
---
[_ _ Drain the Swamp _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fstop-soros&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=je7zT49DAyEDKLhChDXVqEJeBa8%3D)
---
We cannot let the swamp win. We cannot let George Soros win.If we are going to fight back against the corruption of the left, we need conservative leaders stepping up throughout the country. _You are a conservative leader._[Please make a donation of $25 or more today](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fstop-soros&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=je7zT49DAyEDKLhChDXVqEJeBa8%3D) and help us raise the resources we need to fight George Soros’ billions and my opponent’s corruption.Last year, this was the most expensive race in the nation and it promises to be again. I need you to be successful and hope I can count on your support.
---
| | |
---
Tom Barrett, U.S. Army (Ret.)Conservative candidate for CongressMichigan’s 7th Congressional District
---
[_ _ DONATE _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=654a5f69f8189311c6dfc42d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fstop-soros&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_654a3950f8189311c6d7ba3d&l=en-US&s=je7zT49DAyEDKLhChDXVqEJeBa8%3D)
---

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Do this for our Veterans ahead of Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Add your name, and tell Tuberville to stand down. One more time.
#
Derek,
If there’s one thing Veterans really care about, it’s the women and men currently in uniform. It’s a special bond.
These last several months, Tuberville’s hold on hundreds of senior promotions, have been difficult for many of us.
Leadership is the critical piece in the Military. And hundreds of Military families, and hundreds of qualified, decorated officers are having their careers put on hold. Hundreds of thousands of Active Duty members are going without the leadership they deserve. Readiness has degraded. We have been made less safe. All because of one man, with the help of his Republican allies.
But we’ve made a ton of progress. And the GOP is finally feeling the heat. Many of you have signed our petitions on this in the past — thousands and thousands of you have called Tuberville out. It’s made a huge difference.
So today, before Veterans Day on November 11th, we’ve got a request:
**[Add your name, and tell Tuberville to stand down. One more time. Join VoteVets and help us continue our push to get these officers confirmed.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231107_vv_em_tub/?source=em231107-1-30?refcode2=18999.3013755.SUINNr&akid=18999%2E3013755%2ESUINNr)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231107_vv_em_tub/?source=em231107-1-30?refcode2=18999.3013755.SUINNr&akid=18999%2E3013755%2ESUINNr)
---
Thank you. Let’s finish this.
The team at VoteVets

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sponsor a Student at TPUSA's AmericaFest
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Fellow Patriot, Turning Point USA has already heard from THOUSANDS of patriotic student activists about AMERICAFEST 2023 -- and I don't want to turn ANY of them away! TPUSA's AmericaFest is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, it can be the TIPPING POINT in our efforts to make kids love America again and WIN the American Culture War. **[Can I count on YOUR support to help bring EVEN MORE young people to AmericaFest this year? Your gift today of $50 will help sponsor ONE MORE student to attend ... your gift of $100 will help sponsor TWO MORE students to attend ... and so on.](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**
---
[Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-ZtKLCUpjQ)
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | _Above: Students at AmericaFest were INSPIRED by TUCKER CARLSON and my friend CANDACE OWENS last year -- and we've got EXCITING speakers planned for 2023!_
---
There is no other event in the Conservative Movement -- or the country -- like AmericaFest. Over four days, AmericaFest brings together patriotic speakers, exciting musical guests, and young people from across America ... and, with 10,000+ grassroots patriots expected, it's on-track to be the LARGEST Conservative event of the entire year! _Put simply: in the American Culture War, AmericaFest is a KEY battleground, and that's why I want to do all I can to bring as many students as possible to this year's event._ **[Would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE MORE student ... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students ... and so on? But truly, any amount you're able to chip in will make a difference for young patriots across the country.](http://trk.secureandprosper.-KziBuXfB4g)** Your gift today to TPUSA's AmericaFest Scholarship Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from your state, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event.
---
[Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-3r4x_5pGpPXRg)
---
| | _Above: THOUSANDS of young people attended AmericaFest 2022 ... and as you can see (photo at left), these kids stand for the National Anthem and put their hands over their hearts for the Pledge of Allegiance._
---
For more than 11 years, I've traveled across America to speak directly with young people. **That's why I can tell you there has never been a more important time to fight for our Pro-America values.** The "Woke" Left is working around the clock to INDOCTRINATE young people with their toxic, racist, sexist, hateful Marxist ideology. And these radicals are TERRIFIED of Turning Point USA ... our 600,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states ... and the generous support of patriotic Americans like YOU ... Because they know that Turning Point USA can inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to love our country again -- and WIN the American Culture War! **[This year's AmericaFest is more important than EVER, and I hope that I can count on YOUR support to help even more young people attend.](http://trk.secureandprosper.-zISAVA9FE4DHA)**
---
[Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQwNjkifQ/obzqs-u8du49MSgG05JNRg)
---
Your support of TPUSA's AmericaFest Scholarship Fund can make a powerful difference. A donation of $50 will sponsor ONE MORE STUDENT to attend AmericaFest. A gift of $100 will sponsor TWO MORE STUDENTS. And the more you give, the more students we can bring to this one-of-a-kind event. **[Please make your most generous gift right now.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQwNjkifQ/t7UzAwDzm8BpvGtfML6-wg)** Thank YOU for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots! Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA

---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: You can still make a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Today's the day, Peter. And there's still time to help Andy win this close race. Today's the big day, Peter. But our job isn't done yet.

Hundreds of thousands of Kentuckians have already voted, and many more are heading to the polls today. And while you may think it's too late to help us make a difference in this race — **that's not the case!**

**We're still running ads, and we still need your support in these final hours to reach out to more voters and keep working to secure this race for Andy.**

This work requires resources — especially as Andy's opponent and his super PAC allies are spending **$26 MILLION** to buy this race to try to defeat Andy.

Stay strong!

Niki Conforti

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=d3c4a07fc8ff4c28ae327567bfbd3c14&_e=AegB3EBPHwyczNcosGbjjvBJ_pGuVKFEQ8sv59AVegHIrNrT6KstzRyxTk0p7JGGalA92vKQCEGbTWUDGykwDc66KPKt1JrrromAnLB_1svXOMaK-p7Ucv8jxF002XH8b5-eGoGab4LMInFieKQTFHhfgiTrNrmsuHPDgv0Ds_t6fKGdcAk4WHQcI03_N_T-xe5BOKIASZjgX3eqSYGjtgUASjJmU8WRae9azesEtmgYSkci55S1thhTduMDzeaUQmMKXnzb_oVjE5GU5joIXUkbvb8FjhT8Y2LkkyMguGdOoeN891fckIVA0mn7mF_AAZn2fnURF6t98Pyci9PHD_ZaIpr8cnsDGfWDtHpIt7T3vEBkk7ASt7KCuJFgfDoczveNI8ivj8OepY31tboswXGJ3_MQ59ul4LEHNXO3VmznVHcU18mg5NKVfLwvpqoMnWrJpwSlKCI4SXMfUvtGh_4Ae6pFeo6uqZBw9b-FYS5sxoCBAdxDpVQCJYMmHliz)
---
| | Patriot,

---
While I took the witness stand yesterday, one of the Republican presidential candidates chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to __attack__ me online.
---
This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me.
---
Let me clear something up for this very confused little RINO.
---
At the end of the day, it’s not the GOP that lets a person be the presidential nominee... **_It’s the_** _**_VOTERS_**_** _who choose our nominee._**

---
_If the Party establishment can hijack the primary in order to steal the nomination from the _most popular_ GOP candidate in history and cancel YOUR vote, then the GOP will have become no different from the tyrannical Democrats who are trying to remove my name from the ballot.
_
---
The only thing “fatal” I see is this candidate’s chances of _EVER_ having a future in politics. He will “get the BOOT” – as they say – and fade into oblivion.

---
But that’s what you get when you choose to side with the tyrannical Biden regime for the sake of your own political ambitions.

---
OH WELL!

---
Very soon, the primary will be OVER – and we will instead be able to focus 100% of our time, resources, and efforts on FIRING the tyrannical crook in the White House.

---
_And the truth is – polls consistently show that I am the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe._

---
Together, we will wrap up the primary ASAP and we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---

clean_body: | | | | | Patriot, While I took the witness stand yesterday, one of the Republican presidential candidates chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to attack me online. This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me. Let me clear something up for this very confused little RINO. At the end of the day, it’s not the GOP that lets a person be the presidential nominee... It’s the VOTERS who choose our nominee. If the Party establishment can hijack the primary in order to steal the nomination from the most popular GOP candidate in history and cancel YOUR vote, then the GOP will have become no different from the tyrannical Democrats who are trying to remove my name from the ballot. The only thing “fatal” I see is this candidate’s chances of EVER having a future in politics. He will “get the BOOT” – as they say – and fade into oblivion. But that’s what you get when you choose to side with the tyrannical Biden regime for the sake of your own political ambitions. OH WELL! Very soon, the primary will be OVER – and we will instead be able to focus 100% of our time, resources, and efforts on FIRING the tyrannical crook in the White House. And the truth is – polls consistently show that I am the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe. Together, we will wrap up the primary ASAP and we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, Donald J. subject: Today's the day! Get out and vote 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Today is a day of profound significance in our democracy—Election Day. I️ urge each and every one of you to exercise your right to vote.

Election Day: Your Voice, Your Vote, Our Future

Friends and Fellow Hoosiers,

Today is a day of profound significance in our democracy—Election Day. I'm reaching out to urge each and every one of you to exercise your right to vote.

Your vote is your voice, your choice, and the very essence of our democratic system. It's the power to shape the future of our great state, and it's a privilege that countless have fought to preserve.

Please take a moment today to cast your ballot and make your voice heard.

And, you may see some familiar faces today at the polls!

Team Crouch is out supporting our Republican candidates and collecting the necessary petition signatures I️ need to get on the ballot for the May Primary.

I️ encourage you to join us in supporting our Republican candidates up and down the ballot. It's crucial we have strong, Republican leaders at every level to ensure Indiana remains a place of prosperity, security, and opportunity for all.

You can find your polling location and learn who's on the ballot at indianavoters.in.gov (https://indianavoters.in.gov/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6250eb73f2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_07_03_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6250eb73f2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Your vote matters, your support matters, and your participation in our democratic process matters. Thank you for prioritizing Indiana's future.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9be15fc3087e4393ab694b04b970ec27&_e=kLdAaPS0RE4-SwmMZ_GR35q02pJG26In4zxzbni_DfiunHJTe-MjMVp7r5x6tW7xsi3nxiqtI-_snGA724zxLsv4cCeYWZ4Ij52PHBaODUG-Iyfad0cWhk59d_tChi3O1ECCbH_Uu823oNAmvXKlFaYI3awTU8RqiyfXDwCHD3yfU9cfwsByrfYxoXqLSQURdpC6GheObsktOMcG1y_kW1261WdsejX_xlY0CIomNeKFhuel5ClgPdYJKiS6sEm3txobbAQq_KLAsRgR1I8EWNA8WbCGbtb_2UGALa8kwXZwi02cl31SxLuvuQXKrlz_iJ_3gWoBsJ_Pxaia7cWQlm4TZSyK8pxgcZ6yK2bwK4CLoby0MF19DgvfYV7AAN4-I82WbUlcsuIXBaT0_x1-rexzYj3hYWKuhU_VoR6JLfvgV-Plgz2K3O_y8Cb8TqYb)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9be15fc3087e4393ab694b04b970ec27&_e=kLdAaPS0RE4-SwmMZ_GR35q02pJG26In4zxzbni_DfiunHJTe-MjMVp7r5x6tW7xsi3nxiqtI-_snGA724zxLsv4cCeYWZ4Ij52PHBaODUG-Iyfad0cWhk59d_tChi3O1ECCbH_Uu823oNAmvXKlFaYI3awTU8RqiyfXDwCHD3yfU9cfwsByrfYxoXqLSQURdpC6GheObsktOMcG1y_kW1261WdsejX_xlY0CIomNeKFhuel5ClgPdYJKiS6sEm3txobbAQq_KLAsRgR1I8EWOsy2AAViV0g4oyYx4prxDow6x7JTJbfXAuiUoNb51IJLq-n7kkwqXakEfjPukoJ_CIH-Ftu54DRTIDOOWQAxtbYGQDslCYdQmWS-uWkFYXJndBNWtkfKBiXx1o3WMJuFmA4tWaixh1SAyn7Lt-vsFF0fibU8i6YtJeQ0Tu1Ul9U)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9be15fc3087e4393ab694b04b970ec27&_e=kLdAaPS0RE4-SwmMZ_GR35q02pJG26In4zxzbni_DfiunHJTe-MjMVp7r5x6tW7xsi3nxiqtI-_snGA724zxLsv4cCeYWZ4Ij52PHBaODUG-Iyfad0cWhk59d_tChi3O1ECCbH_Uu823oNAmvXKlFaYI3awTU8RqiyfXDwCHD3yfU9cfwsByrfYxoXqLSQURdpC6GheObsktOMcG1y_kW1261WdsejX_xlY0CIomNeKFhuel5ClgPdYJKiS6sEm3txobbAQq_KLAsRgR1I8EWAB60Db72RVJWTrjQgAnVUKwII0X2Iz5wMt7O4Gl4bV6SSevU7wMJc5ALWGCz22tHEDb6fFZWxr9c0LJvElPwCfzKOzILxvvzU0AZnrjad-BBEsRuBw1C6k-Q5INUHG7652RmNW8rrlMob-DxqRnqZ2eQ7NErjUEd8nLZoTt23Ny)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9be15fc3087e4393ab694b04b970ec27&_e=kLdAaPS0RE4-SwmMZ_GR35q02pJG26In4zxzbni_DfiunHJTe-MjMVp7r5x6tW7xsi3nxiqtI-_snGA724zxLsv4cCeYWZ4Ij52PHBaODUG-Iyfad0cWhk59d_tChi3O1ECCbH_Uu823oNAmvXKlFaYI3awTU8RqiyfXDwCHD3yfU9cfwsByrfYxoXqLSQURdpC6GheObsktOMcG1y_kW1261WdsejX_xlY0CIomNeKFhuel5ClgPdYJKiS6sEm3txobbAQq_KLAsRgR1I8EWOO2c4ailp4RQWQe-cA6pKdKIfVLnljLycr2DqSR9rSndtoJPys_kCXiy9RqWUJ0usHYTzXrNiWnenxXfTDkhmDWa4i7axqXxZR91fYJgf2Y_HpO9GIL66S1SByBWzJ9hGRVK3Gv8SFlV2zzcMm9oMx4Ke4gn0sh6_ch_A5vZEk0).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
