Most folks wouldn't know by meeting me, but I was born on a farm. I grew up cleaning hog pens and taking care of chicken houses with my brothers. After my family lost the farm – I carried my learned values of perseverance and hard work into my professional life.
First, as a business owner, and then again when I ran for Congress.
I fought to pass bills that helped working people who were struggling with substance use disorder, mental health issues, and a systemically racist criminal justice system. _And I'm ready to continue that fight as Maryland's Senator._
Marylanders are at the heart of our campaign, and that's what our new ad is all about.

| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f976f0696ad4738b0cbc81531490bbd&_e=Osz7flRxW_OUlqjeq4ZVPojNO-fzJJZYL3KmDLUMW0m3gFS9rcr6D8zqtYtMyQtJ8YOADcayHnvbTJ84bdiasuwXascTV8oe9IFPH-x8Gu9o5GTEUSUt57niXPLF3hX14p-2eer0nw_zGcbsnc_-kN9YtDm_RT3HPzm46A_VIXcZogPACITGNI2kdj2ZZuMhG4zkV0Iz7CBIDNtNoDuCAXYs5miA-2suW9Jkyehp4rKDd0f5CZSl6XG3BlBCDdGx3m44wfG2zh1YAbkDybLbAFmi9bkOtwIsUu3IL9DmGLWRr8kBWHy6dLPg2AmvYg6VshIX7MBY2Kxu3hcSvo23Kmb_Te9rgABRD54NhR-TYP54s-4BUr3gehAZ7dEXCKzO9izNgvgp40DlEigIo5xJyA%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f976f0696ad4738b0cbc81531490bbd&_e=Osz7flRxW_OUlqjeq4ZVPojNO-fzJJZYL3KmDLUMW0m3gFS9rcr6D8zqtYtMyQtJ8YOADcayHnvbTJ84bdiasuwXascTV8oe9IFPH-x8Gu9o5GTEUSUt57niXPLF3hX14p-2eer0nw_zGcbsnc_-kN9YtDm_RT3HPzm46A_VIXcZogPACITGNI2kdj2ZZuMhG4zkV0Iz7CBIDNtNoDuCAXYs5miA-2suW9Jkyehp4rKT9mig97Uog6i_S40ik8BOMTxGMEL441Gtqf0D1vJjdcTq9zg5q57_hZi9maBrg2mQTG8V8mcoa3yd9L2P6uxX8XifKP_gnV202goNboWUdDa6hn0NpzP0u8s-_FLB2MVKar2BD0SqQIvoVAgwoyn4p2WS9LCu1WH5bLA3Srvi-w%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

name: Kelly Johnson
subject: Allow me to introduce my husband, Speaker Mike Johnson.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Mike is a Christian, a husband, a loving father, and a patriot.
Hey, Friend. It’s Kelly Johnson.

|
---
| | |
Hey, Friend. It’s Kelly Johnson.

I’m sure you’ve already heard PLENTY about my husband and our new Speaker, Mike Johnson.

_**But I wanted to reach out to our grassroots supporters and introduce him for myself. **_

Mike was born and raised in Shreveport, LA. As the son of a firefighter, he learned the importance of service and sacrifice at a young age.

Then, he attended Louisiana State University, where he received a degree in business and later a law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, Mike has worked harder than anyone I know to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---
| | | [SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673580%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OPxVBvnfQr6CeChMAEI%2fmg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673581%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ShyVF5WfRMM78JKSEfYOTA&sysid=1)
---

But most importantly, Mike is a loving husband and a wonderful father to our four amazing children.

---
| | | [SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673580%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OPxVBvnfQr6CeChMAEI%2fmg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

Take it from me, Friend. Mike is honored to serve as Speaker of the House and work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I know Mike has already gotten started. But I need to ask you one favor.

_**We’ve set a goal of activating 30,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running. **_

**[Will you join Mike’s team today to help us fight for our conservative values and expand our Majority in 2024?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673582%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KpEv9LNrwdAJjc4HnAwWtA&sysid=1 "Will you join Mike’s team
today to help us fight for our conservative values and expand our Majority in
2024? ")**

---
| | | [JOIN OUR TEAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673583%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nByycdJ4VN6td24TxzVmzA&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

Thank you for helping to make our country great once again.

God Bless,

Kelly Johnson

---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s sad but true
body:
An all out assault on my Christian faith has been launched by the Left.

| **From the Desk of Speaker Mike Johnson**
---
Friend, It’s no secret that I’m a man of faith and place my trust in God at every step of the way, and no matter how hard the media and Democrats try to frame that as a bad thing, I will never apologize for my Christian faith. Jesus Christ is my Lord and Savior, and while that may be a foreign concept to the Socialists in Congress and their propagandists in the media, it isn’t to the millions upon millions of hardworking Americans who spent the last two and a half centuries building our country. Since the Obama Administration, the Left has fallen deeper and deeper into the fell clutch of Marxism. **I refuse to accept their extremism, despite the media’s attempts to normalize their agenda.** [**If you’re tired of the GASLIGHTING by the Left and the media as they try to frame us as crazy for opposing their extremism, I’d be humbled to have your support.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1hktlfidvdflu1q2e706fo1bbt6sljkuuc3u0n8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spie4or4cdh2bs) The Left openly celebrates the extinguishing of innocent and beautiful life through the evil of abortion. The Left has launched what amounts to a crusade in our schools to indoctrinate our children with extreme sexual and gender ideologies, even to the point of legislating away the rights of parents who reject radical transgender hormones and surgeries for children. _**The Left is even taking to the streets of American cities to cheer on Hamas, the Radical Islamic Terrorists who just massacred over 1,000 Israelis in the worst terror attack since 9/11.**_ Yet, the Left still has the audacity to attack me for defending every American’s God-given right to bear arms in a time when violent crime is surging and dangerous criminals are being released onto the streets with impunity. **It is clear to every sane American citizen that our country is in the midst of the greatest spiritual crisis in our history.** Our only way out of this mess is for sanity, morality, and decency to once again be the pillars upon which our society stands and flourishes. To be victorious, we must be prepared and willing to fight with even more vigor and intensity than the Left, and that’s exactly what I’m going to do. [**If you’re with me, I’d be humbled to have your support as I raise money to elect more conservative leaders to join our majority in Congress.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeas6op017s9vh7qal2ar67iigco5o2vofqh5r58_rp22sh2s8i66p74spie4or4cdh2bs) _In Freedom,_ Speaker Mike Johnson

Peter,

The attacks on Rashida Tlaib haven’t slowed down — in fact, they’re
worsening.

Right-wing extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene just reintroduced her
resolution to censure Rashida, making another attempt to formally punish
the only Palestinian American in Congress for standing up for human
rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231107-rt.yImyQZ&refcode=em20231107-31725&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31725%2E1203867%2EahIQO9 ]We can’t waste a moment: join Justice Democrats in standing with
Rashida in the face of this disgraceful attack by splitting a grassroots
contribution NOW →

MTG — the same woman who’s notorious for her anti-Semitic, white
supremacist comments and conspiracy theories while cozying up to actual
Neo-Nazis and insurrectionists — is hoping to succeed in censuring Rashida
this time with help from BOTH sides of the aisle.

And this time, she might. Members of Congress and even Senators from both
the GOP and Democratic establishment — including Senators Marsha Blackburn
and Jacky Rosen — have ramped up their hateful rhetoric condemning
Rashida.

Instead of defending their fellow Democrat who’s done nothing but call for
peace, moderate Democrats are joining Republicans in fanning the flames of
this malicious censure attempt as well as the violence and death threats
against her.

Democrats should be focused on working together to save lives, not to
silence one of the few Muslims and the only Palestinian American in
Congress for her courage to demand a ceasefire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231107-rt.yImyQZ&refcode=em20231107-31725&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31725%2E1203867%2EahIQO9 ]Help Justice Democrats and Rashida’s campaign fight back right now:
rush a split contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford
to stand with Rashida and defend her House seat next year!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231107-rt.yImyQZ&refcode=em20231107-31725&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31725%2E1203867%2EahIQO9 ]Contribute $3

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=31725%2E1203867%2EahIQO9 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=31725%2E1203867%2EahIQO9 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Friend, We all know our nation is going through a challenging time. From high inflation to the southern border crisis to the woke indoctrination of our public school children, there are so many problems we need to solve. **But November is the month we step back to take a breath and focus on what we’re thankful for: faith, family, freedom, and so much more.** **Will you please take a moment to[let us know](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/f589052e0c9d43fe3947229f28c3afba/b7b58ae343ba6227c3d6b838967d376c/35193)**** ****what you’re most grateful for in your life?**

What results will we wake up to the morning after Election Day?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72955680/436935531/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODZmZWY2MS04ZTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zn4jtiP6paxMxM9hchvQXwuCU8ueorNrxXOxCqwMQVA=&emci=bc8f6d80-fc7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=586fef61-8e7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=9818364)

| | 365 days from now, we'll be waking up and looking at the results of the 2024 election. **We'll either see headlines about how Democrats hung on across the country in tough races from Pennsylvania to Nevada to Montana to Ohio —**** _or_****we'll be reading about the return of Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.** I won't sugarcoat it: Democrats are facing a _very_ difficult Senate map in 2024. I'm committed to doing my part to help my fellow Democrats running competitive races that will decide control of the Senate. But I can't do it alone. [**None of us want to wake up to bad news – or remorse that we didn't leave it all on the field. So will you help me continue to help my fellow Senate Democrats hold the majority by chipping in $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72955683/436935534/-2044921950?refcode=2023-11-07-one-year&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=586fef61-8e7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODZmZWY2MS04ZTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zn4jtiP6paxMxM9hchvQXwuCU8ueorNrxXOxCqwMQVA=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72955686/436935537/-2044921950?refcode=2023-11-07-one-year&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=586fef61-8e7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODZmZWY2MS04ZTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zn4jtiP6paxMxM9hchvQXwuCU8ueorNrxXOxCqwMQVA=) Our narrow Senate majority has been a critical buffer against the extremism coming from House Republicans. It's allowed us to get once-in-a-generation climate and drug pricing legislation across the finish line, and continue confirming President Biden's qualified judges and progressive nominees to serve the American people. **And if our Senate majority survives 2024, there's every chance that we will be working alongside President Biden**** _and_****the new Democratic House come 2025.** Democrats have made a lot of progress for the American people, and I'm excited about what else we can achieve with a Democratic Congress. Senate Democrats have overcome long odds before. Many of my colleagues (such as Tammy Baldwin, Sherrod Brown, and Bob Casey) entered the 2018 cycle in states that Donald Trump had just carried — and then won strong victories. I remember how in early November 2020, pundits had written off our odds of re-taking the Senate — only for Democrats to flip _two_ seats in Georgia the following January. And I'll never forget last year, when many were predicting a "red wave" — and Democrats _increased_ their majority. We can overcome the odds again. And we'll do it through consistent grassroots donations from supporters like you. [**Are you with me? Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f3b4af8ec25641f3917bddf6cbf9e25b&_e=Hd_nF4ryvMJwbRMGIZBv_UJad0hBFD1bR3eRqfLQ81BPwdEXSEgLJz2KN9z3iHYKo2b4Iih-vgNE6QNNHL0WDESxyGldC5AX_xPRH8vHQM82jeucLRnEA6ZZNkbwvLOP7EHYHHSmQ9cXHPSPQmkaUaNQEOFQ37Nq3BnDeykWUqoGPpnQMVBZpshn_s3DKiKNFjiz-0LywUntRuFvJYKojxpgeuwGikiKCZupKWlRMZgL5I2pL1vzP9Fms4w5TXMWQ5GyttQMbYgR7-yjt9QbrcQxxoVgXubR6Nr4fXxjYHOJ7e1_GkbS1oMoVSin6Sxu1vMY9s9PNtLjlpetUDDwehPRwT6mqsiNFtrpsvE3w3s8i-5_9ICkOo2SBFej-_X5sq4PZYoHHGP7iSJ29lJSdA%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL FOR U.S. SENATE
DONATE $2
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f3b4af8ec25641f3917bddf6cbf9e25b&_e=Hd_nF4ryvMJwbRMGIZBv_UJad0hBFD1bR3eRqfLQ81BPwdEXSEgLJz2KN9z3iHYKo2b4Iih-vgNE6QNNHL0WDESxyGldC5AX_xPRH8vHQM82jeucLRnEA6ZZNkbwvLOP7EHYHHSmQ9cXHPSPQmkaUaNQEOFQ37Nq3BnDeykWUqoGPpnQMVBZpshn_s3DKiKNFjiz-0LywUntRuFvJYKojxpgeuwGikiKCZupKWlRMZjivHDaiADeeKjkZACzxGwGqm-4CkvO4gX-7gK8zVq2yCtNfLIME0U5EyWI77bvjpOEchJD5UPGYOqcviRXddKm6cgihmtSioKiOPBgSv2I7t-ShqWsiOi5M5_6AoLBPQLzbE45MoJLyCDfOmDe7_i4oV5TPkBIo3lMnWB26wPN4-bxtiAg0ojNCoB54lXEpkc%3D)
**As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman** , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and **I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate.**
**[Will you let me know that you got this email by chipping in $2, $5, or even $20 right now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f3b4af8ec25641f3917bddf6cbf9e25b&_e=Hd_nF4ryvMJwbRMGIZBv_UJad0hBFD1bR3eRqfLQ81BPwdEXSEgLJz2KN9z3iHYKo2b4Iih-vgNE6QNNHL0WDESxyGldC5AX_xPRH8vHQM82jeucLRnEA6ZZNkbwvLOP7EHYHHSmQ9cXHPSPQmkaUaNQEOFQ37Nq3BnDeykWUqoGPpnQMVBZpshn_s3DKiKNFjiz-0LywUntRuFvJYKojxpgeuwGikiKCZupKWlRMZheVJrcaT--iDMoYoCrdHjUhyoyLcChbqC9sTsVckESlIjgvDZoECwNnprpf558_rLuobGZArYPj28PvJ5XORc5zCXh2rl73I9SpffV4Qjm1xkikFIoCRoy_HClRRvLiA_Hd7_Il1LOaGiV1sHTga07vip0bLPgV4ZF7CeROk6uNg%3D%3D)** I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, _**meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster.**_

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL

Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 14 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. **How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory?**

**We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate.**

If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. **[I’m working to make sure that every Republican in the country understands that winning the Montana Senate race this cycle is my top priority.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f3b4af8ec25641f3917bddf6cbf9e25b&_e=Hd_nF4ryvMJwbRMGIZBv_UJad0hBFD1bR3eRqfLQ81BPwdEXSEgLJz2KN9z3iHYKo2b4Iih-vgNE6QNNHL0WDESxyGldC5AX_xPRH8vHQM82jeucLRnEA6ZZNkbwvLOP7EHYHHSmQ9cXHPSPQmkaUaNQEOFQ37Nq3BnDeykWUqoGPpnQMVBZpshn_s3DKiKNFjiz-0LywUntRuFvJYKojxpgeuwGikiKCZupKWlRMZjbUkIKPHguwcDVDuLMn0xZgSI9ozi2scokKrhFFyGyh7gZOikfafIjgWSzOd7rlpRqsQpMqvRdofRskgMv2-H_Bc5Ag1A9SwnUVg13GYQvN0mUADKVUwxpSmMDacmbu30caGZUxBPP_m3kixrmhCESTB6yPZmbgudPFSxS5s82cA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: We have the chance to elect the 6th Navy SEAL to the United States Congress next November and I’m asking for your help in getting the job done | | Fellow Conservative, Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe. We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, Joe Biden continues to do nothing. I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster. We need to get our country back on track. We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible. He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate. I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster. Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 14 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory? We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate. If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. Thanks for your consideration, Sen. Marco Rubio United States Senator (R., FL) | | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33a6c3fa79f7400789a9bb618ba6a09c&_e=PZrxnYgzsL5gDi5-xTheosGX4Sc670MzXkGu53_gLPSnZM13tDW42uJfiZHAVdAUJnjS-WPC74_UuGhzr2PkdZ0SmL21c6ohMaRPEDHdcWR6Q2XMbGyUUv7jWT2UpTz8mmkC-25DqPELTq89vKT2AeSWUnSMdAhsRQSauPxUfNVx83hUDfv2lel_qx3HJ9pHbPa-vDF1AnCyU_JszvDXzbQAzbx6qX0ZogxdDkvS468LhppiIYfnKR7z2TivgMDQgSTZWBM47QSp9V5XXwF05xuH7LYHjbl1xXU2qfuSSHBmpgntV_SYQSW9QMtUA8iA9FisaatcVKQcewWLbfPFKuOgNJQyG8TBw9HfdZ19DY-ZDQd4sS-LJ-c4tDLbD6bnWo5TvVZCIS1l5DrdodybJckRlNPajpyn9KteWb2Zsyk13evHXNM79Z1BEHq8TuwZ)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33a6c3fa79f7400789a9bb618ba6a09c&_e=PZrxnYgzsL5gDi5-xTheosGX4Sc670MzXkGu53_gLPSnZM13tDW42uJfiZHAVdAUJnjS-WPC74_UuGhzr2PkdZ0SmL21c6ohMaRPEDHdcWR6Q2XMbGyUUv7jWT2UpTz8mmkC-25DqPELTq89vKT2AeSWUnSMdAhsRQSauPxUfNVx83hUDfv2lel_qx3HJ9pHbPa-vDF1AnCyU_JszvDXzbQAzbx6qX0ZogxdDkvS468LhppiIYfnKR7z2TivgMDQgSTZWBM47QSp9V5XXwF059IH54LP0j0uIEGx3GZF9utkya-Pmze3oGWrs_sfy191Hremr7FEicDTaZwhOQcaDLhUXM83rxyymTFs6LBF1S3RovW5hfnPwLON_jqbH3bt_7chbqpQ7Y1iIQtra7u_cwQr_kN6-2Y7FIlEcf6KZCpKWXR6m0j3PEsMPCdPSzzH)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33a6c3fa79f7400789a9bb618ba6a09c&_e=PZrxnYgzsL5gDi5-xTheosGX4Sc670MzXkGu53_gLPSnZM13tDW42uJfiZHAVdAUJnjS-WPC74_UuGhzr2PkdZ0SmL21c6ohMaRPEDHdcWR6Q2XMbGyUUv7jWT2UpTz8mmkC-25DqPELTq89vKT2AeSWUnSMdAhsRQSauPxUfNVx83hUDfv2lel_qx3HJ9pHbPa-vDF1AnCyU_JszvDXzbQAzbx6qX0ZogxdDkvS468LhppiIYfnKR7z2TivgMDQgSTZWBM47QSp9V5XXwF05xNATl_t--6G1WKp5GdxWvRW-mgZ7UEuwNA9ynFA7JGBCL48sdRhA5J5r50KghY9qah7R3vZHIgR0hnGfYoeLmWtaJClKjxQS2EzdcISxCAE6umOyRBxEiaHHkb4ot8CO04ILWGR2P8uwpvOOshg59DVQ9XfzFiqgdEJGJgIqPNn)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33a6c3fa79f7400789a9bb618ba6a09c&_e=PZrxnYgzsL5gDi5-xTheosGX4Sc670MzXkGu53_gLPSnZM13tDW42uJfiZHAVdAUJnjS-WPC74_UuGhzr2PkdZ0SmL21c6ohMaRPEDHdcWR6Q2XMbGyUUv7jWT2UpTz8mmkC-25DqPELTq89vKT2AeSWUnSMdAhsRQSauPxUfNVx83hUDfv2lel_qx3HJ9pHbPa-vDF1AnCyU_JszvDXzbQAzbx6qX0ZogxdDkvS468LhppiIYfnKR7z2TivgMDQgSTZWBM47QSp9V5XXwF052xNc3V9fS9Q5AsBse2JWPnrxRlbZTFV9RDQncsaFXakJypi3B_r07SalQs26vk0g47Hv1f3YwTrtGZz-rpXuw-OqlCNKwDA8_oRnhVzyXP5u1e_ntFARCBgkoeFtH6eNP8ZYqAG80Xu3HVJ2KSOzBB9qkVnxGfIdqn_WM0J1axt).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Full Mag News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=33a6c3fa79f7400789a9bb618ba6a09c&_t=XH8ufpjBxQjBT3y3IP4cm1aHdGOFrXL7Xx9kozehJ7bIKEoaBSNcdB6muC_eUfNewRvdA1M9c5UGTIiVpePBgS3T_GRFp9jy72OEGmCHQFryfsbsv08KPQYvNWWPKTiy92ybLT3_TxyJ0wbSCJAw-VYkHPuaRHwQCXB41Te_lmE%3D)

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE SOON] Join Bill for Election Day
body:
Peter, Bill is going live in just a few minutes at 5:30PM from the North Brunswick Pub for a very special Common Ground Elect
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/ebb756ac51be6eb6c54472400168b5ad/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqlhYyoaKMVa0ZAoRWrFU1mTKV1MNstm1nSVvHs3tnhS8DKHmW--n5kTEEouKc4hgh86BkEfPNCYCSVQ0qSSxLPzNHgMWZ95UAi5n-nKKIhOV5cvQNdmg2HoAVmFDnlfjSdJvJx9pvEycaTi2mXc5wnZ4OKZLsZxCm17U4yloOnBuWuISBvsLsqFu4rWunD8N5GqI99vmqZnK0Nmh72sKn1VcFuImp678vSWvsyPeNjKnSkpeZBKz_evo6_V0G7YxyZja-6iuFIo8_8_JWj_AttfmzRx2A==)
---
| Peter, **Bill is going live in just a few minutes at 5:30PM** from the North Brunswick Pub for a very special Common Ground Election Day stream!
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE LIVE STREAM (STARTS AT 5:30PM)](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/460608e9d5e21c6ba6813bda0d96b13b/eJyNkMFOwkAQht9lzpVmCxJsYgwigaaVGCIST2Zpx7ih3U62s9SF9N3douGkiZc5zHzz_Zk5AaOWmpMCYvjkYxQNIQCDuSKFmme1Zpmfp9H1SAxFAKXS-4WpLUF8-nX5AvRtMZ5EAbAj9MjzejpLk9XiLUtWqSdJGp_xP89IjC-e-eM0yaDr_hRjpXh-8O4GYjYW-4sK5a_ijSk9_8FMTRyGbdsOXG3Z7nCQ11VIpXSlaviuL7dP2f3yiIdXvbMVp1eazHL_cPO-nriteNnmYiN9lCRCXfz8KUX3Hdh9AZlKcdY=)
---
|
---
**This election isn’t just another run-of-the-mill vote; it’s a turning point for defending many things we hold dear** — **including parental rights in our schools.** It’s about ensuring that we have a say in what’s going down in our children’s classrooms. And when it comes to fiscal responsibility? We must stop the reckless spending and make sure our tax dollars are actually doing work for us, not just funding endless government bloat.

---
| The whole Assembly and Senate are on the election block, and that’s just the top of the ticket. Our local leadership is on the line, too, with numerous school board and municipal seats ready for change, and pivotal county commissioner positions also on the ballot. [**Click here to join the stream now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/350ef82c178ed28473d4bbd014f3224b/eJyNkMFOwkAQht9lzpW6BQk2MQaRQNNKDBGJJ7O0Y9zQbifbWepC-u5u1XDSxMscZr75_sycgFFLzUkBMXzwMYqGEIDBXJFCzbNas8y_ptHVSAxFAKXS-4WpLUF8-nX5DPRtMZ5cBsCO0CNP6-ksTVaL1yxZpZ4kaXzG_zwjMT575g_TJIOu-1OMleL5wbsbiNlY7C8qlL-KN6b0_DszNXEYtm07cLVlu8NBXlchldKVquHbvtw8ZnfLIx5e9M5WnF5oMsv9_fXbeuK24nmbi430UZIIdfHzpxTdd2D3CZdgcdQ=) These elections are our chance to step up, make our voices heard, and vote in folks who stand for what we believe in. **Let's vote for the America we know we can be.
** Common Sense Action Team
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea

body:
Ohioans have the chance to make history before polls close today. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72960433/436945777/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRmMGM1NS05MTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Y-PyxdgFBYBrVqojW4eZNW25DhhrwbD91moX3oBsrY=&emci=7fe642f8-d07c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=854f0c55-917d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=561582) | Today is the day, team. **Ohioans have the chance to make their mark on history today.** Now is the final push and the culmination of every bit of work we’ve done on the ground over the past few years. Today, Ohio has the opportunity to protect reproductive rights statewide in Ohio and continue the domino effect sweeping across the country as we fight back post-Dobbs. What happens tonight is going to be a look into America’s future in 2024. The residents of Ohio get the chance to use direct democracy to end up on the right side of history. So, check in with your family and friends in the Buckeye State and be sure that they vote “yes” to protect reproductive rights. **When we find out the results, you’ll be the first to know.** — The Fairness Project **[P.S. clean_body: Ohioans have the chance to make history before polls close today. | | Today is the day, team. Ohioans have the chance to make their mark on history today. Now is the final push and the culmination of every bit of work we’ve done on the ground over the past few years. Today, Ohio has the opportunity to protect reproductive rights statewide in Ohio and continue the domino effect sweeping across the country as we fight back post-Dobbs. What happens tonight is going to be a look into America’s future in 2024. The residents of Ohio get the chance to use direct democracy to end up on the right side of history. So, check in with your family and friends in the Buckeye State and be sure that they vote “yes” to protect reproductive rights. When we find out the results, you’ll be the first to know. — The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Colin Allred Road Team
subject: we don't want to give up yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, we'll be honest: If we had a dollar for every voter Colin has met on his Texas tour, we wouldn't be writing this email.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
We don't have to tell you that Colin's race to defeat Ted Cruz was already super competitive.
But right now, 14% of Texas voters are still undecided. That means whoever can reach the most undecided voters will win this election.
That's why Colin has been on the road nonstop these past few weeks, giving every speech, having every important conversation and meeting voters where they are whenever he's able to.
But, as Colin hits every corner of Texas to shake hands and win over voters, the costs are adding up FAST – and if we don't raise $50,000 by our midnight fundraising deadline, our voter outreach efforts could be impacted.
We can't let this happen – not when Ted Cruz has over MILLIONS to fund his voter outreach. So, please: Will you split a donation of $20 right now between Colin and Serve America to keep Colin and our team on the road? We’re still short of what we need to raise today, and we're counting on you to help make up the gap FAST → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for being such a critical part of Team Allred.
– Allred Road Team

It’s the first Tuesday of November.
That means one year from today, our country will face one of the most important elections in modern history.
This will be our chance to take back the House majority.
We will vote on whether to keep a pro-democracy President in charge or elect a right-wing extremist who will threaten the very fabric of our nation.
And a year from today, my name will be on the ballot in California, once again. And voters will decide whether I have the honor of serving them in Congress for another term.
The future of our nation will be put to the test at the ballot box.
So I am asking for your support so I can continue to fight in Congress, help Democrats take back the House majority, and hold the White House.

**Peter, today millions of Americans are lining up at polling locations across the nation to cast their vote in local elections.** And while these elections are vital in their own right, this year's election will give Republicans the chance to test how far they can suppress the right to vote ahead of the 2024 election.
**Already, Republicans have suppressed the will of an alarming number of Americans. ****During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked 4.6 million people from voting. And in 2023 so far, 14 states have enacted laws making it _harder_ to vote.**
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote or how you just cast your vote this Election Day.
So please, we need 436 more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results.
**According to our records, we still do not know your voting preferences. That's why we're reaching out to you today with this URGENT request, Peter.**

subject: How it started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc
body:
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=daf22f787a1f4ca4bdb566f282da672e&_e=NPCc2SBeqIOHinqwlFxoZghkH10MoAaIA5aW88olKjPoRgLYRxX9-yMbdC2lfglKxl6OUS4AjkELzXIvFMtZSA3DjF6EsOPGKBOOTPrJlNPoQVzM5xL1nm3yT2jSGfp0PAnF4JdnCxYVzq4nIMONPDMKnWCbjZeTQp2-zcnSoK4geOepApga24oELuOZN0MGa-GaCb60ZBsreaAkMRY6czcAa9YQsP6inxdK1f2K1ZDWBWLdjKYpWMmN4tZYjIntXMUG2WePykZoKLvptlP8GVv57ev7Fia5aGQzVEkTK8Q8LcYvewbc-1-QKSXMEpWVlnhcQ-rkk3Y4wCQ8yjMBjA9jC2fls0W7GADVWKEY6s2rAWAycoE1Ma9zifFe-tXkAQ6ex9tBpQZz1TDIUJjCEe2oFP0C8VJZYazFizyeGpKCzeOcLSlswQQ0kKp5oMoYc9vUcWAPwDVtYqaWi9KP3nNfu8QCkRvL0Vo0xd6dpIc%3D)[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=daf22f787a1f4ca4bdb566f282da672e&_e=NPCc2SBeqIOHinqwlFxoZghkH10MoAaIA5aW88olKjPoRgLYRxX9-yMbdC2lfglKxl6OUS4AjkELzXIvFMtZSA3DjF6EsOPGKBOOTPrJlNPoQVzM5xL1nm3yT2jSGfp0PAnF4JdnCxYVzq4nIMONPDMKnWCbjZeTQp2-zcnSoK4geOepApga24oELuOZN0MGa-GaCb60ZBsreaAkMRY6czcAa9YQsP6inxdK1f2K1ZDWBWLdjKYpWMmN4tZYjIntXMUG2WePykZoKLvptlP8GVv57ev7Fia5aGQzVEkTK8Q8LcYvewbc-1-QKSXMEpWVlnhcQ-rkk3Y4wCQ8yjMBjPszFBkcTTaCne8-C-Cr6JpXHaw0M5orJmJ4vWYJFOylidU0CM_u5e0_d_pfkXK45gbfZxHwwOrUc44yO8s0sTE3CQeqn2kJ-cmsxvf8LydNCs964OqnVAkGU2Ko3wuP9WMq_PTZWF-YRr0eCbIxky4%3D) |
---
Friend,

I thought I'd take a second to tell you how I got here. There's so much to tell, and I want all of you to know why I am so determined to fight for the forgotten men and women of this country. Let me give you the Sparknotes version of my **_Hillbilly Elegy._** My sister Lindsay and I grew up in the manufacturing town of **Middletown, Ohio**. We grew up in a dysfunctional house without a constant father figure. My mother struggled with drug and alcohol addiction. I recall an episode when I was eleven when my mother and I got in a heated argument and I climbed into the back of the car. She eventually pulled over, I got out of the car, and she chased me across a field. The drama and family turbulence was nonstop.[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=daf22f787a1f4ca4bdb566f282da672e&_e=NPCc2SBeqIOHinqwlFxoZghkH10MoAaIA5aW88olKjPoRgLYRxX9-yMbdC2lfglKxl6OUS4AjkELzXIvFMtZSA3DjF6EsOPGKBOOTPrJlNPoQVzM5xL1nm3yT2jSGfp0PAnF4JdnCxYVzq4nIMONPDMKnWCbjZeTQp2-zcnSoK4geOepApga24oELuOZN0MGa-GaCb60ZBsreaAkMRY6czcAa9YQsP6inxdK1f2K1ZDWBWLdjKYpWMmN4tZYjIntXMUG2WePykZoKLvptlP8GVv57ev7Fia5aGQzVEkTK8Q8LcYvewbc-1-QKSXMEpWVlnhcQ-rkk3Y4wCQ8yjMBjHKam1fCwx7tnrNjbzWvJMGh50kKzwWG3BHu36R7FkicIZO__K4pOHGFJyaKFKjz5VfeBvbUDhUftW7TjDTSXQ72dci0HEQJPGIRt41OJnEM_Vz4n8zbhJPdheejDTruBGbbe3TfKdIlsa0CbebQIqk%3D)
My sister and I eventually moved in with my grandparents - Mamaw and Papaw. **She and Papaw were, without question or qualification, the best things that ever happened to me.** They spent the last two decades of their lives showing me the value of love and stability and teaching me the life lessons that most people learn from their parents. Both did their part to ensure that I had the self-confidence and the right opportunities to get a fair shot at the American Dream.[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=daf22f787a1f4ca4bdb566f282da672e&_e=NPCc2SBeqIOHinqwlFxoZghkH10MoAaIA5aW88olKjPoRgLYRxX9-yMbdC2lfglKxl6OUS4AjkELzXIvFMtZSA3DjF6EsOPGKBOOTPrJlNPoQVzM5xL1nm3yT2jSGfp0PAnF4JdnCxYVzq4nIMONPDMKnWCbjZeTQp2-zcnSoK4geOepApga24oELuOZN0MGa-GaCb60ZBsreaAkMRY6czcAa9YQsP6inxdK1f2K1ZDWBWLdjKYpWMmN4tZYjIntXMUG2WePykZoKLvptlP8GVv57ev7Fia5aGQzVEkTK8Q8LcYvewbc-1-QKSXMEpWVlnhcQ-rkk3Y4wCQ8yjMBjD0MglHLlexY02SCNeNkSdWhKQSGRuXtqu0ZnlNJ-9-fxdRYLAhAX4rUNMcw-urxNwmm5smEQbcZ2rISJIvXXKwU3Ey430kixICnJPMqhdYfkCvEKJQCrmXk625vXcLMwf8mmWltSvHhVia15XN_urI%3D)
After high school, I decided to enlist in the **Marine Corps**. I served in the Iraq War performing public affairs activities. I served for four years before returning home to Ohio, where I became a first-generation college graduate at the **Ohio State University.**
I then went on to attend **Yale Law School** , where I met the love of my life, **Usha**. She showed me kindness and patience, all while guiding me through the trauma and baggage I held onto from my childhood. We married in 2014 and now have three beautiful children together.[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=daf22f787a1f4ca4bdb566f282da672e&_e=NPCc2SBeqIOHinqwlFxoZghkH10MoAaIA5aW88olKjPoRgLYRxX9-yMbdC2lfglKxl6OUS4AjkELzXIvFMtZSA3DjF6EsOPGKBOOTPrJlNPoQVzM5xL1nm3yT2jSGfp0PAnF4JdnCxYVzq4nIMONPDMKnWCbjZeTQp2-zcnSoK4geOepApga24oELuOZN0MGa-GaCb60ZBsreaAkMRY6czcAa9YQsP6inxdK1f2K1ZDWBWLdjKYpWMmN4tZYjIntXMUG2WePykZoKLvptlP8GVv57ev7Fia5aGQzVEkTK8Q8LcYvewbc-1-QKSXMEpWVlnhcQ-rkk3Y4wCQ8yjMBjK3-fm73gWjcTdoMFuVCEjCAlWRJ_DiEq_2A64v-QQ_xL2CInsAhNuVVCT6kjQ2uqKJn7ehtjW7KI499hbWHDXDY3oCpH8ysaeNZluetgqCJUJ7tBQUnPMXmZ969_LzKdQI3Bsq-flcolpoDw4KoSgs%3D)
After the success of my book, I began working to fiercely defend working-class Americans against the media and political elite who have ignored us for so long. I've seen too many lives devastated by job loss, addiction, and economic turmoil to stay silent. **All of this brought me to where I am right now - serving as your Senator.**

**I think so many politicians are lost in the establishment. They fail their constituents, their country, and ultimately - they fail themselves. It's an industry of broken promises and corrupt practices. But I will never stoop to that level. My roots - my family - my hometown - are what got me here. The good and the bad.**

I will never let you down or leave you behind. The Senate needs leaders who know what it's like to live in a left-behind community, leaders who will fight for what's best for the people. Leaders who will fight for our country. I'm honored to be doing just that for you today.
[**_My team relies on grassroots donations from generous individuals like yourself, and I hope you can make a donation today. It would truly mean the world to me._**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=daf22f787a1f4ca4bdb566f282da672e&_e=NPCc2SBeqIOHinqwlFxoZghkH10MoAaIA5aW88olKjPoRgLYRxX9-yMbdC2lfglKxl6OUS4AjkELzXIvFMtZSA3DjF6EsOPGKBOOTPrJlNPoQVzM5xL1nm3yT2jSGfp0PAnF4JdnCxYVzq4nIMONPDMKnWCbjZeTQp2-zcnSoK4geOepApga24oELuOZN0MGa-GaCb60ZBsreaAkMRY6czcAa9YQsP6inxdK1f2K1ZDWBWLdjKYpWMmN4tZYjIntXMUG2WePykZoKLvptlP8GVv57ev7Fia5aGQzVEkTK8Q8LcYvewbc-1-QKSXMEpWVlnhcQ-rkk3Y4wCQ8yjMBjPVuT4bu6xFaUyFNEPdmO6gzxc_RTy_HPXPPmvN5ITsk9sM12xJbzG89A5L4cWkeaGTdzv8kBZsFJjAmnnBR2zz6MZ4xiEpFYxcXGrDQrTIcAXDSox-4QRa2sI08G75Qx-KEEHJULifYgZvW9dgjj30%3D)

clean_body: | Friend, I thought I'd take a second to tell you how I got here. There's so much to tell, and I want all of you to know why I am so determined to fight for the forgotten men and women of this country. Let me give you the Sparknotes version of my Hillbilly Elegy. My sister Lindsay and I grew up in the manufacturing town of Middletown, Ohio. We grew up in a dysfunctional house without a constant father figure. My mother struggled with drug and alcohol addiction. I recall an episode when I was eleven when my mother and I got in a heated argument and I climbed into the back of the car. She eventually pulled over, I got out of the car, and she chased me across a field. The drama and family turbulence was nonstop. My sister and I eventually moved in with my grandparents - Mamaw and Papaw. She and Papaw were, without question or qualification, the best things that ever happened to me. They spent the last two decades of their lives showing me the value of love and stability and teaching me the life lessons that most people learn from their parents. Both did their part to ensure that I had the self-confidence and the right opportunities to get a fair shot at the American Dream. After high school, I decided to enlist in the Marine Corps. I served in the Iraq War performing public affairs activities. I served for four years before returning home to Ohio, where I became a first-generation college graduate at the Ohio State University. I then went on to attend Yale Law School , where I met the love of my life, Usha. She showed me kindness and patience, all while guiding me through the trauma and baggage I held onto from my childhood. We married in 2014 and now have three beautiful children together. After the success of my book, I began working to fiercely defend working-class Americans against the media and political elite who have ignored us for so long. I've seen too many lives devastated by job loss, addiction, and economic turmoil to stay silent. All of this brought me to where I am right now - serving as your Senator. I think so many politicians are lost in the establishment. They fail their constituents, their country, and ultimately - they fail themselves. It's an industry of broken promises and corrupt practices. But I will never stoop to that level. My roots - my family - my hometown - are what got me here. The good and the bad. I will never let you down or leave you behind. The Senate needs leaders who know what it's like to live in a left-behind community, leaders who will fight for what's best for the people. Leaders who will fight for our country. I'm honored to be doing just that for you today. Thank you so much for taking the time to read. God bless, JD Vance | Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. Box 6564 Cincinnati, OH 45206 Copyright (C) 2022 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9b9bb18d474ab2971b9ff48c4123dd&_e=kTNMrpC-QR7gm_RrPhkbrfKKYu2OYbPr4H9K9I-cNZFQBByPMBVgfXFyu4Fk57vvnC2oVvvt0BrJbu43Kz_1aeGZuCI30cti4ZEl-PW-kBQMCCUmWaH0zXWLm2_p8PfIgavYo0okkUx6Xv4Q-sJIeSmiveIKK7tl5lWda-5Qhr1a7zPKpagbjTH88UEHcW-MFX9fwfx6NaOs6hVBSXqe8ei8Qu7wViIxl48S0WMjd0DoI63PRcNsNTC_9niONHw_-8P0ayutJuVZimIWfEu3_Unu56UWgdlY5qMaeMqcSPcZ8YkkBEvzOTNCXwTvugdNBL0-69jRLzh_mNlLLWY-UcsHiJAThLyIcWbAnVjh_TNlfgIDohh4UEr5yiaIkSS7sXFb78im0x0uAVgvrTjjiEAb2lwkUd-WzG7od09TQRT-55S4CjBe9OCj2j1vrXG8a0bU7QQbAI3fqRtbM5L5vPBrgepU8hrOmDTz63rCiU8%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9b9bb18d474ab2971b9ff48c4123dd&_e=kTNMrpC-QR7gm_RrPhkbrfKKYu2OYbPr4H9K9I-cNZFQBByPMBVgfXFyu4Fk57vvnC2oVvvt0BrJbu43Kz_1aeGZuCI30cti4ZEl-PW-kBQMCCUmWaH0zXWLm2_p8PfIgavYo0okkUx6Xv4Q-sJIeSmiveIKK7tl5lWda-5Qhr1a7zPKpagbjTH88UEHcW-MFX9fwfx6NaOs6hVBSXqe8ei8Qu7wViIxl48S0WMjd0DoI63PRcNsNTC_9niONHw_-8P0ayutJuVZimIWfEu3_Unu56UWgdlY5qMaeMqcSPcZ8YkkBEvzOTNCXwTvugdNBL0-69jRLzh_mNlLLWY-UScW1hZFuSIK8MfkS9vB15PQp5Fd0uk9M7zeAZ6tdHyNeMx1T79z5EuPYn1pLlypD5EwyTFa8fc6mXUTnTp_w71dCr3qTAmekeaLVqtNpf9V6lwrvKM54iFWT9N8ZTfrRb4YVDHYz-R_Xp4WxMzlFJo%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9b9bb18d474ab2971b9ff48c4123dd&_e=kTNMrpC-QR7gm_RrPhkbrfKKYu2OYbPr4H9K9I-cNZFQBByPMBVgfXFyu4Fk57vvnC2oVvvt0BrJbu43Kz_1aeGZuCI30cti4ZEl-PW-kBQMCCUmWaH0zXWLm2_p8PfIgavYo0okkUx6Xv4Q-sJIeSmiveIKK7tl5lWda-5Qhr1a7zPKpagbjTH88UEHcW-MFX9fwfx6NaOs6hVBSXqe8ei8Qu7wViIxl48S0WMjd0DoI63PRcNsNTC_9niONHw_-8P0ayutJuVZimIWfEu3_Unu56UWgdlY5qMaeMqcSPcZ8YkkBEvzOTNCXwTvugdNBL0-69jRLzh_mNlLLWY-USR6ghEl10AGemiZjrHZ2NQwlN24TLlmIrMk5Wev6yEb5fNy9_Btz1RXqT7jlWZ1qqwxagXzF8WanNpvXueeB40MtopAWmG4DesDoncUR0JMnEazv3rS44Jxe5dFZo-20DOfbgVNmZ4ZI8okW32sFxA%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

| | | Friend - it's Steve Scalise. I wouldn't be doing my due diligence if I didn't make sure you saw our Speaker's message.

The Liberal Mob just launched a COORDINATED and PREPLANNED attack on his Christian beliefs, and I am utterly disgusted.

_**[You need to see this for yourself.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e43c2709e20a4f27926968ba87be78d1&_e=_1sCMcYhe8HZiGPZKUuyMyLSpDpHHesv3EN__iltluBYsCEUVSQxydg8uzABMESu0CnX7OT-iBgidCQ4-PmC_7XDaEydyMJiK_R7J6ul5OAYOICbW0wYzaLuKaRYWNAdUFOGttb7DbF9w9lwvuw7_0Ac2czUC_lysbfAEHB5djgk-6Kbxf-XVTsFHMYY63r23EusInEOF-Mg7rgVQAiCi7EMaY92eTWQucU6_GKd_GwWqe8p8Ux6wug-2MuaBVhxYsfL3G6Y50BB-pQj0J7l8wyrOVB5KyDzw0Sxx7uzE-ACbPeHuLm3Tffm0TP3y4wkoCJIM7czt-3zfo4N4eiwW2YX_yGD1jrBYf_jOlxHxLCK6C7bxFByU93tUUQqV5VCoJo_L6eCC7hvHbxa_aCAiw%3D%3D "You need to see this for yourself. ")**_

To: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e43c2709e20a4f27926968ba87be78d1&_e=_1sCMcYhe8HZiGPZKUuyMyLSpDpHHesv3EN__iltluBYsCEUVSQxydg8uzABMESu0CnX7OT-iBgidCQ4-PmC_7XDaEydyMJiK_R7J6ul5OAYOICbW0wYzaLuKaRYWNAdUFOGttb7DbF9w9lwvuw7_0Ac2czUC_lysbfAEHB5djgk-6Kbxf-XVTsFHMYY63r23EusInEOF-Mg7rgVQAiCi7EMaY92eTWQucU6_GKd_GwWqe8p8Ux6wug-2MuaBVhxTJs-y315_T_9hv9t1DCpxbA08z-NG383tTON2VEfwuhBunbT0iO_LbBwT62mXGkNEe1vsDIviHISw2tfHPcrUKjhI3gWCxCydf2o4Cdp7dACArpsky3kEwHpOZtrWqVVhX8mKopy3rbeGaXIcTC3QA%3D%3D "%%Email__c%%")_

My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e43c2709e20a4f27926968ba87be78d1&_e=_1sCMcYhe8HZiGPZKUuyMyLSpDpHHesv3EN__iltluBYsCEUVSQxydg8uzABMESu0CnX7OT-iBgidCQ4-PmC_7XDaEydyMJiK_R7J6ul5OAYOICbW0wYzaLuKaRYWNAdUFOGttb7DbF9w9lwvuw7_0Ac2czUC_lysbfAEHB5djgk-6Kbxf-XVTsFHMYY63r23EusInEOF-Mg7rgVQAiCi7EMaY92eTWQucU6_GKd_GwWqe8p8Ux6wug-2MuaBVhx_zO58oIzMEjGjSPNLc9QqBrENsWSEwwd7DCTo_qYIc1g1K3vLFyyVzLFYxM8HwKVFykvx5aLgMgCpLVRIUpqSNw3Tub4zuj6g3JqM5E6l_0V31lUdyt0v2OVhB17CjUSc98Ke92AMLS2PweXJRUXgQ%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e43c2709e20a4f27926968ba87be78d1&_e=_1sCMcYhe8HZiGPZKUuyMyLSpDpHHesv3EN__iltluBYsCEUVSQxydg8uzABMESu0CnX7OT-iBgidCQ4-PmC_7XDaEydyMJiK_R7J6ul5OAYOICbW0wYzaLuKaRYWNAdUFOGttb7DbF9w9lwvuw7_0Ac2czUC_lysbfAEHB5djgk-6Kbxf-XVTsFHMYY63r23EusInEOF-Mg7rgVQAiCi7EMaY92eTWQucU6_GKd_GwWqe8p8Ux6wug-2MuaBVhxgVmf3uNvnSTvQ0OPDhNjzq8syMLpU-GH8z3EUdr8Kam0YRvOJ9p7LDXVFI0kW_ZnOHTP2FYvLM1KglWgRoa8ZiexOUTWDSEO3rQxGQy8uiqu73YWxcTeUA2fSWPA-XHvjTTs-95gkU39tjxANnpOqw%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e43c2709e20a4f27926968ba87be78d1&_e=_1sCMcYhe8HZiGPZKUuyMyLSpDpHHesv3EN__iltluBYsCEUVSQxydg8uzABMESu0CnX7OT-iBgidCQ4-PmC_7XDaEydyMJiK_R7J6ul5OAYOICbW0wYzaLuKaRYWNAdUFOGttb7DbF9w9lwvuw7_0Ac2czUC_lysbfAEHB5djgk-6Kbxf-XVTsFHMYY63r23EusInEOF-Mg7rgVQAiCi7EMaY92eTWQucU6_GKd_GwWqe8p8Ux6wug-2MuaBVhxQFVJsxlW1_gPMi0Cu-6LN4hnZ_cihpdCMa6LSx9aCHO27BT6zwVPpxSoKTYR4PHcU51mnQDxgZHy1N7QhbYcakSSXmmT9S_OK8JXn5HzKucHkmgCsj47gGf_zPu4dj4T6zXqIC3rPfQ08dfzVHBkCg%3D%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

The Liberal Mob just launched a COORDINATED and PREPLANNED attack on his Christian beliefs, and I am utterly disgusted. "You need to see this for yourself. " I've attached his message below: \----------------- Begin Forwarded Message ----------------- From: House Speaker Mike Johnson To: "%%Emailc%%" Subject: It's all coordinated. And it's all preplanned. My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. body:
Peter, One of the biggest wins of this year’s historic legislative session was the passage of the Restore the Vote Act, which restored voting rights to 50,000 formerly incarcerated Minnesotans. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72963611/436949271/1217362581?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWI0MjY0OS05MzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-SkkEx6mTQ6eqOzB-16QgQ6WhDEx-pgPCyfPiGgn06s=)

Peter,
One of the biggest wins of this year’s historic legislative session was the passage of the Restore the Vote Act, which restored voting rights to 50,000 formerly incarcerated Minnesotans.
So when a judge in Mille Lacs County was attempting to rule the Restore the Vote Act unconstitutional last month, I stepped in to defend it.
**On this Election Day, I’m proud to say that the Minnesota Court of Appeals ruled in our favor, and the voting rights of those 50,000 Minnesotans are protected once again.**
This decision is a victory for our democracy and our entire judicial system. But make no mistake: This incident serves as a reminder that the right to vote is precious. Special interests and ideological forces are always working against us, and we can’t get caught flat-footed.
Your support truly powers the work I do that makes victories like this possible, and today, I’m asking you to step up so we can continue working together to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.
According to our records, you’re still eligible to use your PCR. That means you can donate up to $50 (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State!
[**Peter, I can’t say it enough: Absolutely none of my work would be possible without you. Will you take advantage of your PCR today so I can keep fighting for us every day?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72963621/436949297/-71585828?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWI0MjY0OS05MzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-SkkEx6mTQ6eqOzB-16QgQ6WhDEx-pgPCyfPiGgn06s=)

subject: yard plant eats through 62 LBs of flab?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Scientists from
Cambridge University and the Faculty of Food Science and
Technology recently confirmed...

That a strange weed
commonly found in backyards across America eats through stubborn
flab fast:

>> Common yard weed
TEARS through 62 LBs of fat

Why is this weed so
powerful?

It FLUSHES out a
sinister acid that brand new research reveals is responsible for
deadly white fat that's clogging up your body and your
arteries...

Once that acid is
eliminated...

It FIRES UP your
body's natural fat-burning mechanism like when you were a
teenager...

And incinerates fat
from your belly, hips, butt and arms much easier and faster than
you've ever thought possible.

>> Potent yard weed
eats through 62 LBs of wobbly flab

PS: I urge you to
check this out before the weight loss companies shut it down.

They are already up
in arms, and want this solution to be kept under wraps for good.

juice destroys unwanted bloat

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA for November 7th: Stand with Israel events & call the Senate
body:
| | |
---
This week we are asking you to do the following:
* Organize a Stand with Israel event to be held on November 14th, if possible, or another day if that works better for you.
* Call your senators with two messages.

**Organize a Stand with Israel Event** There is a national march in Washington, D.C. to support Israel scheduled for November 14th at 1:00pm ET and we would like to support their efforts as much as possible**.[If you are near D.C. or can get there, please support their efforts and go to D.C.!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---
| | [MORE INFORMATION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzMxMS0wZmEyNzAxODcyM2U0NTdhYTk2OTA5MWM3NWZiMDczNCIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIxIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWFyY2hmb3Jpc3JhZWwub3JnLz9taWQ9NDY1NTMmaWQ9VDE3VU5Uc2ZaSnR3a1N5VFRDIn0/buMSD-gQE83DC-QJupwieQ)
---
**However, if you cannot get to D.C., please organize a local rally for the same day**. This can be as big or small an effort as time allows. It can be a rally at your state capitol or a simple sign and flag waving at a busy intersection near your house. Note that if you cannot host a rally on the 14th, but you can on a different day, go ahead and schedule for the day that works best for you. [**On our website,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) you can enter your event details after you decide, and you can also pledge to attend an event near you. We will also send you a how-to guide to help you organize and plan – you don’t have to do this alone! Please help us show Israel and our Jewish friends that America stands with Israel, and that we support their right to defend their country and to exist.
---
[SIGN UP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
**Call Your Senators** We want you to deliver two messages to both of your senators. We want to defend Sen. Tuberville and we want to urge them to support the standalone Israel aid package. Use the sample script below when you call.
---
| | **Message to the Senate**
---
Hello, my name is **[Name]** and I live in **[City, State]**. I’m calling to urge my senator to support and defend Senator Tuberville in his efforts to keep radical left-wing activists out of military leadership and to ensure the military stops paying for female service members to travel from states where abortions are illegal to states where they are legal. I am also calling to urge my senator to support the House’s standalone aid package to Israel. I want to see it brought to the floor for a vote and I want to see it pass as written, no amendments. Thank you.
---
| | [FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bzfZiT2T5_gg)
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Nuv3vmxLG5B5QGgX3w)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-dog)
---

Note that if you cannot host a rally on the 14th, but you can on a different day, go ahead and schedule for the day that works best for you. you can enter your event details after you decide, and you can also pledge to attend an event near you. We will also send you a how-to guide to help you organize and plan – you don’t have to do this alone! Please help us show Israel and our Jewish friends that America stands with Israel, and that we support their right to defend their country and to exist. | Call Your Senators We want you to deliver two messages to both of your senators. We want to defend Sen. Tuberville and we want to urge them to support the standalone Israel aid package. Use the sample script below when you call. | | Message to the Senate Hello, my name is [Name] and I live in [City, State]. I’m calling to urge my senator to support and defend Senator Tuberville in his efforts to keep radical left-wing activists out of military leadership and to ensure the military stops paying for female service members to travel from states where abortions are illegal to states where they are legal. I am also calling to urge my senator to support the House’s standalone aid package to Israel. I want to see it brought to the floor for a vote and I want to see it pass as written, no amendments. Thank you. | | | | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2023 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 | mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org?subject=Unsubscribe%20Request "support@teapartypatriots.org"

body:
Tell your representative to take the No PAC pledge.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72965492/436951445/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ5MjY5NWItOTQ3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEiVBFNOMonkRNSSi42uypCLvbN8lj50_ewrqpYNEHo=&emci=0092695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=0492695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=9848080)

Friend, During last year’s midterms, PACs [contributed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72965499/436951447/-557203715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ5MjY5NWItOTQ3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEiVBFNOMonkRNSSi42uypCLvbN8lj50_ewrqpYNEHo=&emci=0092695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=0492695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=9848080) over $467 million to federal candidates, Republicans and Democrats. This obscene amount of spending sends a troubling message to the American public that lawmakers are working for wealthy donors, not We the People. Is it any wonder that [public trust in the federal government has hit record lows,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72965504/436951450/-1989944016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ5MjY5NWItOTQ3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEiVBFNOMonkRNSSi42uypCLvbN8lj50_ewrqpYNEHo=&emci=0092695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=0492695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=9848080) with fewer than 2 in 10 Americans saying they trust Washington to do what’s right? The good news is that there is a way for Congress to regain the public’s trust, and that’s by pledging not to take PAC money. **[Sign the petition: Tell your representative to take the No PAC pledge.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72965510/436951451/1854196567?contactdata=2aXNTVScNt3chOJhAmc0Nh1mmwJw6gOTUw2K3/GFlrWWdcDrL5pSLZ4Acl/eDqCk13r1PLjFt2b4+pAu1Neq1mb4AU1mk4Q6tqtjNVERFzqGuWTwtMDAz6fdhXl3zNzf3Z8G/tlgK8x9A2/vEMHZYQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ5MjY5NWItOTQ3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEiVBFNOMonkRNSSi42uypCLvbN8lj50_ewrqpYNEHo=&emci=0092695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=0492695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=9848080)**

I founded the bipartisan No PAC Caucus and I am one of three members because I’m tired of watching corporations and lobbyists attempt to corrupt our democracy. I’ve never taken a dime of PAC money, and I never will. Getting big money out of politics will put the government back on track and protect the integrity of our institutions. I’ve proposed a bill that would ban all PAC and lobbyist money. But until Congress can get its act together and deliver comprehensive anti-corruption reform, every member of Congress should join me and take the No PAC pledge. No lobbyist money, no leadership PACs, no corporate PACs–no corruption. **[Sign if you agree: We must get PAC money out of politics.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72965521/436951453/1854196567?contactdata=2aXNTVScNt3chOJhAmc0Nh1mmwJw6gOTUw2K3/GFlrWWdcDrL5pSLZ4Acl/eDqCk13r1PLjFt2b4+pAu1Neq1mb4AU1mk4Q6tqtjNVERFzqGuWTwtMDAz6fdhXl3zNzf3Z8G/tlgK8x9A2/vEMHZYQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ5MjY5NWItOTQ3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEiVBFNOMonkRNSSi42uypCLvbN8lj50_ewrqpYNEHo=&emci=0092695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=0492695b-947d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=9848080)** Thank you for your activism and all you do.**** In solidarity, Ro

body:

| | If Trump’s not there, I DON’T CARE!

_**The nomination race is already over.**_
_**President Trump’s lead is insurmountable.**_

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/skiVU8wGG7LoERHepMbyxg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/skiVU8wGG7LoERHepMbyxg~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/skiVU8wGG7LoERHepMbyxg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/skiVU8wGG7LoERHepMbyxg~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Sean Feucht
subject: 🎧Sneak Peak: God of Israel
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=85a7ab4ca1224be4b698315f2f5c9cd6&_e=siOeq2QYaWi24ria0449b6MvHD3Jmd8AJvU-e50W-wHVmD3V0yfQw14aAi7DNjCF_SsTPPnmKb7FNj9IYQy37gk8OwQ282IgQlkEJWRfpBdzztD9k7Q8i0JrqQFH7yZ4U0oBbWK6l9EXLKpKb7B7LwABvN_Q09mvVZv2YHyOIGWLL9D6LTT--oV9O2TqKjy-7DRfWkmhRIlB-cpfOHluiWURUH3SXO0DRtp_rTsxwPXGmhLGlm3yQw_xjhwH12GiUfXpIKDHdGG-UaZGD_Wu94tnd0D0fYyj3dtQygui7QNhAGg4Qykizfj8ErKDIOEe)
---
Dear Friend,
---
What happens when a song of praise is lifted up in Hebrew, Arabic, and English? Hope abounds! That is exactly what happened last week when I was joined by two very special musicians, Yair Levi and Carine Bassili.

Together we lifted up a song of unity and hope for the nation of Israel! I can't wait for the song, titled “God of Israel,” to be released! In the meantime, here's a sneak peek of what's to come!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=85a7ab4ca1224be4b698315f2f5c9cd6&_e=siOeq2QYaWi24ria0449b6MvHD3Jmd8AJvU-e50W-wHVmD3V0yfQw14aAi7DNjCF_SsTPPnmKb7FNj9IYQy37gk8OwQ282IgQlkEJWRfpBdzztD9k7Q8i0JrqQFH7yZ4U0oBbWK6l9EXLKpKb7B7LwABvN_Q09mvVZv2YHyOIGUFzxY7q8AylYYdPhV5WJGdFSH8-QiYDlDpzK1zG3-M7tsEylLqPDtFfa-GdQZcBB9vgcFmCUwL18f1MbOOmU5SvNsHDlNcS1cBMJBbwS23-KkE5xLheiH82o3RF5KUsq6aG9SXEBnRhwdVd_rC7oWB)
---
Like our song "Imago Dei" became an anthem of God's love for the unborn, my prayer is that "God of Israel" can be an anthem of hope for the nation of Israel in this dark time!
---
Till all hear,
---
---
