clean_body: | | | Dear Friend, What happens when a song of praise is lifted up in Hebrew, Arabic, and English? Hope abounds! That is exactly what happened last week when I was joined by two very special musicians, Yair Levi and Carine Bassili. Together we lifted up a song of unity and hope for the nation of Israel! I can't wait for the song, titled “God of Israel,” to be released! In the meantime, here's a sneak peek of what's to come! Like our song "Imago Dei" became an anthem of God's love for the unborn, my prayer is that "God of Israel" can be an anthem of hope for the nation of Israel in this dark time! clean_body: Submit your survey now | | | | | Friend - It's Speaker Mike Johnson. I could not be more honored to lead House Republicans in our fight to defend and expand our Republican Majority in 2024. To do that, I asked my team to assemble a list of the top Republican patriots in the country. Congratulations, you were chosen! "Please see my Speaker’s Survey below and consider leaving your feedback. [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3af1a3420a0d4f698374b1a8092974a7&_e=GDretriAKyNmzAV3pmcRzvmAv_T8pr-nY3D2_UvrMZaNTjiPO6Sd5PP9IoaSpBRsfQ28n-gc3AhIOwhpLDWcnSkfWQpOSw98zh0wDRQ6vwXxHrsxW9YYEVN2oj5RUgIgjpl3cFI_at2GT95Z12ZHfO85bW1jYYdfbzR1rF_0O_3WObwxUIeJ0uH4ZKt_4TZMZ7EpylxCJlh6eVrZ91cTKjf3eFyrPmBSWci4ULd3oUiB51d1EV0ueTc9hucWGQVOPI2fHXuLZNe3rsvhwrUamCr7rK4mF9FsMvKnBMoV1qVSEmBTp1NYK4cX7qZ7GSFfhFMtLSFSQ_Z4k1jVA_6ocvkTXd-P26uMt537JlGQLIdsIVHbfS3obk4vADGYjJTIV0uPTch_ELtUc7vDd-n2hq353EeLd9vNxF3OGPEdTz4%3D)
When I launched this campaign in late February, we were polling at 0.0%. Now we’re squarely in the upper echelon in the national polls AND have the strongest grassroots base out of any candidate on the stage – 130,000 unique small-dollar donors and an army of grassroots volunteers.

**Everyone is taking notice.**

I want to make a big splash on Wednesday night in Miami – but we also need to raise as much money as possible between now and before I take the debate stage.

[**Before the day is over, I want to secure an additional 500 donations to Team Vivek to show the D.C. Establishment the strength of our movement. Will you chip in?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3af1a3420a0d4f698374b1a8092974a7&_e=GDretriAKyNmzAV3pmcRzvmAv_T8pr-nY3D2_UvrMZaNTjiPO6Sd5PP9IoaSpBRsfQ28n-gc3AhIOwhpLDWcnSkfWQpOSw98zh0wDRQ6vwXxHrsxW9YYEVN2oj5RUgIgjpl3cFI_at2GT95Z12ZHfO85bW1jYYdfbzR1rF_0O_3WObwxUIeJ0uH4ZKt_4TZMZ7EpylxCJlh6eVrZ91cTKjf3eFyrPmBSWci4ULd3oUiB51d1EV0ueTc9hucWGQVOPI2fHXuLZNe3rsvhwrUamFpDo8RoJtv_QFiXi4ltVQTwjkfHvqoSzmOz2l-wWB7u5P5qno_aSRYqGPipZhsjE4fDE1SuzS5duUfrtEy3FWAKghIqFaRAmg9p4z4zy4Wvv-GRxhj-F4vqR94j5I9qPuryTNiR_gbulUI6AmufoDc%3D)

Whether you can give $1, $10, or $100 today – that doesn't matter to me. It's the fact that you're in this fight with me.

I am not counting on Super PACs to fund this campaign – I am counting on _**you.**_

[**Fellow American, let's show D.C. insiders the strength of Team Vivek today, tomorrow, and Wednesday night on the Debate stage!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3af1a3420a0d4f698374b1a8092974a7&_e=GDretriAKyNmzAV3pmcRzvmAv_T8pr-nY3D2_UvrMZaNTjiPO6Sd5PP9IoaSpBRsfQ28n-gc3AhIOwhpLDWcnSkfWQpOSw98zh0wDRQ6vwXxHrsxW9YYEVN2oj5RUgIgjpl3cFI_at2GT95Z12ZHfO85bW1jYYdfbzR1rF_0O_3WObwxUIeJ0uH4ZKt_4TZMZ7EpylxCJlh6eVrZ91cTKjf3eFyrPmBSWci4ULd3oUiB51d1EV0ueTc9hucWGQVOPI2fHXuLZNe3rsvhwrUamAfutKJPvS8hxF-KhcZsIlk-VBEHZ5GIkYurlblOw6_QS-rhPP5Lr3_H4NwOni35eDEOz814QIEAP0Vayjgos0Jg8tZYX8tYPZBfFkhGY5M50VOgnVZL11JDbt0BhQCu7-jwAQ2r2A3oLqcnCgB6SF4%3D)

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3af1a3420a0d4f698374b1a8092974a7&_e=GDretriAKyNmzAV3pmcRzvmAv_T8pr-nY3D2_UvrMZaNTjiPO6Sd5PP9IoaSpBRsfQ28n-gc3AhIOwhpLDWcnSkfWQpOSw98zh0wDRQ6vwXxHrsxW9YYEVN2oj5RUgIgjpl3cFI_at2GT95Z12ZHfO85bW1jYYdfbzR1rF_0O_3WObwxUIeJ0uH4ZKt_4TZMZ7EpylxCJlh6eVrZ91cTKjf3eFyrPmBSWci4ULd3oUiB51d1EV0ueTc9hucWGQVOPI2fHXuLZNe3rsvhwrUamMIrolsOnO9Hg9VU_1Tn2ya1D0sFjNIg44ag01o9ty6bm6Gc8n-fVXTpDyChqVnaJ488tzpXbys3_EFQbWkJ6lMl4gQgkEOorohKlz7ASheOpRISchnKP7vxJUZS4sHa_H-sF9AZ-pFQfQmTClQQSoA%3D)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Please watch this before my next debate.
body:
It's Nikki Haley here, and with the third debate one day away

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=78f7b61bee754ecc9dbe67f9b6e7a05b&_e=fAHpKrRQe0n9Br6ZRBwtgevp3e2Mu7WmoQi4Il3ibILS6QzC1yFPhvNg7ok6sh-TKMVmNMsllqMQEcSTgwMgMzpc-TaPQW59GWwv9sB-TI7b0jFzNYAgI9x8R_hu1GsOAOakQtBxxFKhUswkRnx8vkWr1ZwTKtdI0QtNg8S8NpuYa5Xlo6F-GKlbx3Nxk0rCje0y7_YEtx0wZWJurGWOsI5f3nDZfb1oNuaaTYY_Oo9CnGn1vkmlpttfEEkPv_Kiua4NhWk-Fpb3gy-5oXGaAKpuKRWteI9lxz9Bmu-PGvbs8b4Z9XQg0VQ151qkK80mcQB1ZTTmMPEXQ840zzENQYUO76gUSn8_6z0LO3bsQtETAgWyUtE3AoAJ5HY7qMDxK2_q4rRojPwvJ6ISI3kYDkV83Xb7nFj9oZFC2Ip8k9wOSs7TsTGCFPYb38amJL5_6IgeK_SpFCnHL1I4oS6gElDqueLKt0C7hs1Um2-Dy06SljEcHLsFOwT0rNA4gkvJgYbRQ_cbf-Sfz2ZhJZXhzlsAjeZw2gVf0TdsPRJ2bfHK7g78onNub0Zhdi9BLiUT977NadIfr_Edjy8DXtP6Wj77d4W_qkPECbMYtXi7PzZg03lziYFM3iiZWyU3BRa3kMwp5dcje1ZBlMc2hGbrNA%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

It's Nikki Haley here, and with the third debate tomorrow, I want to take a moment to share my story and my vision for a strong and proud America with you.

**Throughout my life, I have dedicated myself to standing for America and defending the values she was founded on.** This commitment has been at the core of everything I've done, whether it was during my time as South Carolina's governor or while representing America on the global stage at the United Nations. I firmly believe that these values are the foundation of our great nation, and I am determined to uphold them as your next President of the United States.

**I want you to hear my vision for America directly from me. That 's why I'm sending you this quick video. **

---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: It's Nikki Haley here, and with the third debate one day away | | | | | | Friend, It's Nikki Haley here, and with the third debate tomorrow, I want to take a moment to share my story and my vision for a strong and proud America with you. Throughout my life, I have dedicated myself to standing for America and defending the values she was founded on. This commitment has been at the core of everything I've done, whether it was during my time as South Carolina's governor or while representing America on the global stage at the United Nations. I firmly believe that these values are the foundation of our great nation, and I am determined to uphold them as your next President of the United States. I want you to hear my vision for America directly from me. That 's why I'm sending you this quick video. | | | "Click here to see what America will look like when I’m President! >> " Thank you for taking a moment out of your day to watch. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. name: Election Alert (via Courier HQ)
subject: Election Day 2023
body:
Today, Ohio voters will decide the fate of abortion rights in the Buckeye state.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968361/436956607/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=&emci=c6f333ab-8a7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=dfd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=14016711)
Happy Election Day, Peter! Whether you voted early, or are voting today, thank you for taking the time to do your part to sustain our democracy.
At Courier, our talented team of journalists knows the most effective way to protect our democracy and mobilize voters is by delivering factual, impactful local journalism to those living in “news deserts” across the country.
As Ohio voters get ready to go to the polls, one of the **_major questions_** being presented to them is a proposed amendment to the state constitution that would codify access to abortion and reproductive care in the state — one that could decide the future of abortion rights in the Buckeye state in the aftermath of the _Dobbs_ decision.
Before we go on, [**will you make a $5 contribution to power Courier's work and help us continue educating voters this year and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968370/436956611/-542558343?refcode=em20231107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=)
**Here's the problem:** Voters are being fed a steady diet of misinformation and outright lies. And it’s coming from Ohio Republicans who are using taxpayer dollars to push a disinformation crusade that’s determined to see this referendum fail.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968374/436956647/-542558343?refcode=em20231107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968378/436956651/-542558343?refcode=em20231107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=)
**Why are they doing this?** Republicans _know_ how unpopular abortion restrictions are, their strategy has been to lie and deceive voters by making the ballot language deliberately confusing and vague. The endgame is to muddy the waters just _enough_ to criminalize abortion. It’s become a routine GOP tactic to undermine reproductive rights.
While Courier doesn’t have an Ohio newsroom, we know that our reporting on abortion-related news has made a difference before.
**Here's what we mean:**
In the run-up to last year’s midterm elections in Michigan, we surveyed a few thousand Michiganders about abortion. We then exposed some of these same folks to three weeks of coverage around a piece from _The Gander_ — our Michigan newsroom on the state’s former 1931 controversial abortion ban. After seeing our reporting, we re-sent our survey to see if people’s views had changed.
**The results were striking:**
In the end, **the folks who saw _The Gander_ piece were more likely to oppose criminalizing abortion by _five points._** In turn, Michiganders voted overwhelmingly to protect reproductive rights. And in April, Gov. Gretchen Whitmer signed legislation that repealed the 1931 abortion ban.
**Peter, that's the power of our journalism.** Our newsrooms like _The Gander_ are moving the needle on the issues that matter most to communities across the country. And we'd like to expand our reach to other parts of the country but we can't do that without your support.
**[So, if you can, will you pitch in $5 or anything you can right now to support Democracy's Newsroom? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968382/436956655/-542558343?refcode=em20231107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=)**
[Pitch In ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968385/436956663/-542558343?refcode=em20231107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=)
Thank you!
In solidarity,
— Courier HQ
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968388/436956672/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=&emci=c6f333ab-8a7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=dfd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968393/436956683/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZeq-aUJayekANV521COtg0R_5lg9cvUqOjgPOPxz5g=&emci=c6f333ab-8a7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=dfd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=JfDlksvXoq%2BbdzllEsPym%2Fl6C81vPLBbLbiSmLgwY%2BYMK4aVM1Tkf%2Ba78CIIt2d%2BvRY%2B4D3aiG26%2FYto%2F4rHepOXuFnGi95AGuCoWqBbJ%2BhpR6Xv%2Fvp6QLHc8oDLdx2DXCHGvK0AzNY6WmST%2F8Fb7xLy%2FGTEPgQuOe5Lw0A9%2FCLuW84Ft%2FIuRwQvav4ZoLRXKosfnsNvgfQiOVxSbt8Dn7tDRQJiyd2czE09%2B0ksXMiZBBddthsNGVgPXQFgXPFbFALokP5XhjCXdmmAy6G731C5yPwPLEN4J1Um%2FHC%2FTlbZJZcYxbPB7e2sGJcVBeMrUKQlFlovk4izSvualATspnbTVIytMIGFafALIP96w%2BJR6kLRcBUUuUUNQRScXZfQ9CCL9v3MlpGCm6uNe5cZwNtOZkm9VTTIP%2BNPajtNLegnPaMZlOT39Ss6M8ta7xJJ)**

name: Election Alert [via Team Brandon]
subject: ⚠️ Polls are open. Here’s all the information you need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Please pass this along. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968503/436956931/17860314?refcode=ea.cdd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.cdd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvIa3FGXYYn-9drRKWb9DUOO_1X2eX2agUiEhqf6vwU=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72968516/436956976/-192700460?refcode=ea.cdd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.cdd4097a-977d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RkNDA5N2EtOTc3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvIa3FGXYYn-9drRKWb9DUOO_1X2eX2agUiEhqf6vwU=) Peter, I’ve been sending you emails all campaign long, building toward this moment — this is it: Election Day!

Voters are headed to the polls as we speak to make their voices heard. And let me tell you, I couldn’t be more excited to see such enthusiasm across Mississippi right now.

[But we can’t sit back and relax until every last vote has been cast. clean_body: There’s something I want you to have. It’s been a journey. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, When I officially filed for the New Hampshire ballot, I shared a message with voters in New Hampshire and all across the country: " Let's do this!" Fellow Conservative, we've got a country to save. We CAN win this and get our country back on track! Are you with me? - | As a key player on my team, I want to make sure you have this mug as a daily reminder that we're putting in the hard work, and together, we will win the fight for our nation's future. I started this race as an underdog, just like I've started every other race I've run. But like each time before, I will outwork everyone, connect with every voter, get my message out, and win. I may have started as an underdog in this race, but with hard work and a strong team of grassroots supporters, we can win this! We're rising in the polls, momentum is surging, and our movement is expanding by the minute. But, we can't stop now! We've got to continue to keep our heads down, work hard, and earn every vote. We've got just over three months to go until the first votes are cast, and I need your support now more than ever. We've got a country to save, Fellow Conservative! Let 's do this! My very best, Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. name: Alex Padilla
subject: What do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
This will only take a minute, and it’s a big help for me
#

Hey there,
As you might know, I like to ask my team to put together a quick survey to send out to some of our top supporters across the country every month or so.
These surveys help us determine our priorities in the Senate, and ensure we’re responding to what Californians need.
But we haven’t heard from you, so I wanted to reach out myself and personally ask for your input:
**[Friend, do you have a minute to take the short survey my team put together? I want to hear from you on the most important issues facing California and our country.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Nov23-Issue-Survey/?source=em231107-1-ex&refcode2=1598.159979.UQRZDD&akid=1598%2E159979%2EUQRZDD)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Nov23-Issue-Survey/?source=em231107-1-ex&refcode2=1598.159979.UQRZDD&akid=1598%2E159979%2EUQRZDD)**
Thanks in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts with my team and me.
Alex
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Nov23-Issue-Survey/?source=em231107-1-ex&refcode2=1598.159979.UQRZDD&akid=1598%2E159979%2EUQRZDD)**

| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---

name: Rick Coplen
subject: On Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
_On Voting_

"VOTE VOTE VOTE VOTE VOTE. Write that in capital letters in your notes. All over the page. Remember the time when the right to vote was denied us? I do. And once we could vote, there were lines and lines and lines to register. We can't afford to let democracy slip away. We fought for that right. Demonstrated with bandages on our heads. We fought to prevent changes to the Voting Rights Act and then to restore it. We were weary, tired, but we had purpose. Don't take this right for granted. Don't squander it Keep building. A vote is your voice being heard. A vote is your power. A vote is your change. A vote is sacred.

Go out there and VOTE."

– JOHN LEWIS

clean_body: | On Voting "VOTE VOTE VOTE VOTE VOTE. Write that in capital letters in your notes. All over the page. Remember the time when the right to vote was denied us? I do. And once we could vote, there were lines and lines and lines to register. We can't afford to let democracy slip away. We fought for that right. Demonstrated with bandages on our heads. We fought to prevent changes to the Voting Rights Act and then to restore it. We were weary, tired, but we had purpose. Don't take this right for granted. Don't squander it Keep building. A vote is your voice being heard. A vote is your power. A vote is your change. A vote is sacred. Go out there and VOTE." – JOHN LEWIS * | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

Vivek has always been ambitious. He told me during his time in the biotech industry he wanted to go against the pharmaceutical establishment. Then, later at Strive, he would take on BlackRock. _**He did it.**_

When the government was getting in the way of running a successful business, Vivek spoke up against woke corporations and ESGs. He told me he was going to write a book that would become a New York Times bestseller. _**He did it.**_

I shouldn’t have been surprised when he told me he wanted to run for President of the United States.

When Vivek puts his mind to something, he gets it done. I know that will not be any different once he’s elected President of the United States and he leads our country toward a national revival.

But Vivek and our team need your help. [**Before Vivek takes the debate stage, will you join our growing movement by chipping in $5 or even $50?**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=6a1daa9223d3495ea0f3ad5ed21b0638&_e=WJsdFtDs_ZTx60k6tK4jz6TgvtyqX4vE9X_ivv_ETxa0jM1eTpPuOHMZtFzUkGqNeLwuaWYAXKQHVB8lmZn87bPtyavwUZOLHyuuYw6tm73cxZKWdhkFdDcPsNdXLd_v7j-7hz2tDnWBDDnM7vB_GXcI8naSD7vsEIJ4tFIRNRRaZjVfOZzXVubTTkbquffGWOydrj3uOORI4jpqtoLQOzQfSQumueCXTb2CqirZDG1B0VOKwc4l38tGoVJhx09Oid9rI4q_bagpdRGfOYQhL6t4aoLxmK2wES036N1FfjvPAn5ZL7cWufov_Pc7COAKVFqDQ7TOE58sucnT5F11EHy6KREbjPkMuC7tc39iOZIpvDlXs1Y-63L1ALwJP6egy3lwDBNV730yzpHxoNl_6M28dxGYd9yRKUdPTgulPkE%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: When Vivek puts his mind to something, he gets it done. | | Vivek doesn’t know that I am emailing you, Fellow American, but let me explain why I am reaching out. Tomorrow is a big day. My husband, Vivek Ramaswamy will participate in his third political debate. Vivek is the only outsider in this race. He’s up against political insiders, and I hope America will once again get to see the new ideas he has for the future of our nation. | Vivek has always been ambitious. He told me during his time in the biotech industry he wanted to go against the pharmaceutical establishment. Then, later at Strive, he would take on BlackRock. He did it. When the government was getting in the way of running a successful business, Vivek spoke up against woke corporations and ESGs. He told me he was going to write a book that would become a New York Times bestseller. He did it. I shouldn’t have been surprised when he told me he wanted to run for President of the United States. When Vivek puts his mind to something, he gets it done. I know that will not be any different once he’s elected President of the United States and he leads our country toward a national revival. But Vivek and our team need your help. I know it means so much to have you in his corner. Thank you, Apoorva Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | _Democrats Win Seats is dedicated to taking back the House. One of our biggest opportunities in the 2023 election is in Rhode Island, where Democrat Gabe Amo is running against an extremist Republican. We’re giving this space to his Communications Director to share why they need your support for today's special election._
Hi Peter,

#TeamGabe has been working hard to run a strong campaign through Election Day--and it's finally here.

Rhode Islanders deserve a leader with the experience to go to Washington and work to protect Social Security and Medicare, prevent gun violence, bring people together to solve the climate crisis, and codify abortion rights into federal law.

In order to get Gabe to Congress to do this work, we need your help. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: TREACHEROUS COMMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
RINOs have a passion for backstabbing.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7ED2DGCzYNFclC4iVa266M8mMvaQzC02CMyN0qeviJJuv3M0Op_Ghnnk4d4KfRAAV_arABD4SQCcysPPL_Xpx6nLvbl_y7u6Km97Cm8CIN1n-l99XikoWB53qrvMt-AMOJdRq-qmQaNkZbJrq-zQ20YPGs1AZHrQJcqql7120quBMm5BAioltTJKoyr6BnXlTaP0oCTaXpTyxrHwU7Sjf0_LFubCTSEb22tK8_qYdBRwXMltCxU3jgv5vbEz-0G5DbSws_n7xDHlwxb9YnnleMndFAKnRCTgGN1IzqMtNSp0VpXaCzxuKZwDed6CwO7pW-9wnbbFkcDO8dk-mbNhtnyJAruX0yuZYqKYBHZKVrURUJ_jyF5gV_59Mx_N8PnX9wd8vAS7wyH47ffXy59saf1843HktdailJd9wi73LwAA__9SMY4Z)
---
Friend,
As we all know, Crooked Joe is trying to imprison me for life as an innocent man.
You would think that every Republican candidate would condemn such a vicious act of tyranny in the strongest way possible, right?
**Sadly, one of our primary opponents – who has been dropping in the polls like a wounded bird falling from the sky – just declared that the GOP should rob me of the nomination if Crooked Joe were to _unjustly_ convict me in any of the ongoing witch hunts.**
There are two types of people in this world – those who boldly and bravely stand up to injustice and those who drop to their knees in surrender.
As someone who is willingly putting himself at risk of an unjust prison sentence and the “corporate death penalty,” you know – _by my very own actions_ – which type I am.
Meanwhile, not only is this other candidate surrendering to Crooked Joe’s Marxist tactics, but he’s trying to exploit our persecution and injustice for his own political ambitions.
_Look, polling shows that the primary is effectively over, but when I hear disgraceful comments like these, I know that we need to be 100% prepared to fend off treacherous attacks that could come at the final hour._
You may recall what happened in Iowa in 2016 when one of our opponents’ team spread a vicious and false rumor that a presidential candidate had dropped out at the last minute as a way to steal his delegates.

clean_body: RINOs have a passion for backstabbing. | | | Friend, As we all know, Crooked Joe is trying to imprison me for life as an innocent man. You would think that every Republican candidate would condemn such a vicious act of tyranny in the strongest way possible, right? Sadly, one of our primary opponents – who has been dropping in the polls like a wounded bird falling from the sky – just declared that the GOP should rob me of the nomination if Crooked Joe were to unjustly convict me in any of the ongoing witch hunts. There are two types of people in this world – those who boldly and bravely stand up to injustice and those who drop to their knees in surrender. As someone who is willingly putting himself at risk of an unjust prison sentence and the “corporate death penalty,” you know – by my very own actions – which type I am. Meanwhile, not only is this other candidate surrendering to Crooked Joe’s Marxist tactics, but he’s trying to exploit our persecution and injustice for his own political ambitions. Look, polling shows that the primary is effectively over, but when I hear disgraceful comments like these, I know that we need to be 100% prepared to fend off treacherous attacks that could come at the final hour. You may recall what happened in Iowa in 2016 when one of our opponents’ team spread a vicious and false rumor that a presidential candidate had dropped out at the last minute as a way to steal his delegates. And this time around, that same consultant is working for the RINO candidate who is hoping Crooked Joe convicts me as an innocent man. That’s why we cannot write off the primary just yet. We need to be prepared for ANYTHING that comes our way – even at the final hour. | Thank you, | Donald J. That means we're not wasting any time getting our grassroots team activated and ready to win in 364 days (2024 is a leap year, so we've got an extra day!). **Democrats are counting on grassroots supporters, like you, to win our critical, toss-up races.** In swing states like Ohio, Montana, Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Nevada, and Arizona, folks are working around the clock to ensure they have the resources to fight disinformation and dark money and stop Trump-endorsed MAGA extremists. If we don't hold these seats, we won't hold the Democratic Senate Majority. We have bold plans, and our to-do for America list is ambitious. **We're committed to lowering costs for working Americans, tackling climate change, restoring abortion rights for all, and defending our democracy from far-right attacks.** [**But we can't do it alone. clean_body: We’re not wasting any time getting our grassroots team activated and ready to win. | | | | Can you believe that we are less than one year away from the 2024 election? That means we're not wasting any time getting our grassroots team activated and ready to win in 364 days (2024 is a leap year, so we've got an extra day!). Democrats are counting on grassroots supporters, like you, to win our critical, toss-up races. In swing states like Ohio, Montana, Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Nevada, and Arizona, folks are working around the clock to ensure they have the resources to fight disinformation and dark money and stop Trump-endorsed MAGA extremists. If we don't hold these seats, we won't hold the Democratic Senate Majority. We have bold plans, and our to-do for America list is ambitious. We're committed to lowering costs for working Americans, tackling climate change, restoring abortion rights for all, and defending our democracy from far-right attacks. = The consequences of losing the Senate Majority are far-reaching. We're seeing what a MAGA-controlled House looks like — it's chaotic, and it's not a pretty sight. We can't allow the Senate to fall into the hands of Mitch McConnell and the extreme Trumpian candidates running in 2024. With the Blue Wave Project, we're working nonstop to support Democratic candidates who will fight for our values and ensure we continue to make progress. = Onward! name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Some great news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We did it!

Greg Abbott’s special legislative session has ended without passing his
top priority: a private school voucher scam that would defund our schools
to subsidize private education for the wealthy.

Texas Democrats once again held together a bipartisan majority to stand up
for our kids and stop this bill from reaching the House floor. Along with
public school educators, parents, and concerned Texans everywhere, they
took on Abbott and his billionaire donors — and won!

This is a big deal. For years, right-wing billionaires [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59925?source=ema20231107-234538&t=1001&akid=234538%2E444211%2E-Uyg1H ]Tim Dunn and
Farris Wilks have pulled virtually all the strings in this state by buying
off top Republicans and threatening retaliation against GOP lawmakers who
refuse to advance their extreme agenda, including this voucher effort.

They’ve [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59926?source=ema20231107-234538&t=1002&akid=234538%2E444211%2E-Uyg1H ]spent millions on a campaign to demonize our schools, call
teachers groomers, accuse librarians of indoctrination, and strong-arm
lawmakers into supporting their effort to [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59927?source=ema20231107-234538&t=1003&akid=234538%2E444211%2E-Uyg1H ]“replace public education
with private, Christian schooling” for the wealthy few.

But because so many of us showed up and spoke out, because Democrats held
strong and stood up for their values, we overcame their money and
political influence.

We’re going to need to keep the pressure up in the weeks ahead. Abbott is
expected to call another special session on vouchers as early as this
afternoon, and we know that he’ll use every lever at his disposal
(including the big dollars of his billionaire donors) to try to ram it
through.

But today’s win – and all the hard work, political courage, and grassroots
pressure that made it possible – should give us confidence that we can
stop him again.

— Beto

PS: it’s Election Day — so please make a plan to vote!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59247?source=ema20231107-234538&t=1004&akid=234538%2E444211%2E-Uyg1H ]Click this link to find all the information you need to cast your ballot
today.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=234538%2E444211%2E-Uyg1H

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bf9c360273c412aaf0a37935e843ba7&_e=YYCRePGwqNT5wnVW3we_Wff1ci5P7LsIGVN23GRXqSIRLyQhmEXAGI_qUQNFnOatGKP1QUJG45CX7Jceyb3i598gheteFElwqEtRXzVFz6tDbvnT5abmlWO4mfXZY9dZ405EZ9W_9JnJofpSePDv_jn0dLGn_zGvgFra7j21jwOlDo_8ILmjtsABFjaJM2QGTr3hBlJ_IIHUBBeRj6XKupBiKL96EigPxQ7zOrf2RslTRhBmmUzCVXB2-bhiVo2EtlOu24U0PzNEmRJG3sfypTRvOVEru6rA2iYmv1iDWnJMMD8w-XgXXhQgQz8ZBbYSeICw0UHh9lX80fgKiBmO3w4kUMw8QVw_SUqzfv0u151cFN5Ypm-xWfK1yC-MQDS2MTpPNfOKcnB_zKmATunPcKsQcblkz0lUgSCLiNbPEMy4ydUM_tI4-uOCxux_F6iXlf5Ev_-GSieH5WCn7VaGfmGgV_jL_bcPZigk8zCO_ow%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bf9c360273c412aaf0a37935e843ba7&_e=YYCRePGwqNT5wnVW3we_Wff1ci5P7LsIGVN23GRXqSIRLyQhmEXAGI_qUQNFnOatGKP1QUJG45CX7Jceyb3i598gheteFElwqEtRXzVFz6tDbvnT5abmlWO4mfXZY9dZ405EZ9W_9JnJofpSePDv_jn0dLGn_zGvgFra7j21jwOlDo_8ILmjtsABFjaJM2QGTr3hBlJ_IIHUBBeRj6XKupBiKL96EigPxQ7zOrf2RslTRhBmmUzCVXB2-bhiVo2EtlOu24U0PzNEmRJG3sfypTRvOVEru6rA2iYmv1iDWnJMMD8w-XgXXhQgQz8ZBbYSxqjfZgJyoYWCyuGR2pAyF8Ef9rewlpjDg6bT3YJtkVGbQ4A1DoOiLcbie0mzFS4z2V_da3EbM7y7wGHOu-ki7-tNokDYeKm-SFY0a8VCsatSHLx-KfxojQTm7A91lSSu_RhRq5_cgi8J44ivElwNPZQEY1ON6gyycSKQCpGR28w%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bf9c360273c412aaf0a37935e843ba7&_e=YYCRePGwqNT5wnVW3we_Wff1ci5P7LsIGVN23GRXqSIRLyQhmEXAGI_qUQNFnOatGKP1QUJG45CX7Jceyb3i598gheteFElwqEtRXzVFz6tDbvnT5abmlWO4mfXZY9dZ405EZ9W_9JnJofpSePDv_jn0dLGn_zGvgFra7j21jwOlDo_8ILmjtsABFjaJM2QGTr3hBlJ_IIHUBBeRj6XKupBiKL96EigPxQ7zOrf2RslTRhBmmUzCVXB2-bhiVo2EtlOu24U0PzNEmRJG3sfypTRvOVEru6rA2iYmv1iDWnJMMD8w-XgXXhQgQz8ZBbYSKgx3hIs0G82di0dBxVA_et0LQI19P7jh-UTJMmT60aahCUFHehPX5dWecM4_NXwyZ7-0bjkT_8xryeWfuXlUiNyBkTFRRrqfaK_thtnUoJo0cyy1G53p4ujYaAKCu4-ZQ20ZfrAi7f93-9fWnl38mGlMKS3icjnXbGtjtAMLiO4%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

In liberty,

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72970718/436964653/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmJkMzNiMDYtOWM3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eZlrv1eDLmFt78mUbpX9Pfsd_vg1DKM7NxB8IIwUmjQ=)

Peter, Polls are OPEN!! name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: The first TV ad reservations of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A super PAC supporting one of our competitors just spent $1 million on TV ad time
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)
Derek, a super PAC supporting one of our competitors just spent **$1 million on TV ad time** —these are the very first TV ads to run in this race. **[We need to make sure we don’t fall behind, can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231107-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_PAC_20231107_V1_F&refcode2=32741_3422442_rPgBfV&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)**
Reserving TV ad time in California is incredibly expensive. But the earlier we can do so, the better rates we get. **Katie likes to say it’s a little like booking airline tickets—if you wait until the last minute, you’re probably stuck paying top dollar for a middle seat with a layover.** If we can’t afford to book ads until the final weeks of the race, we could be left paying extra high prices for 3 AM spots.
We know we have to run TV ads in order to compete in this race, and the sooner we begin booking the better. [**Can you chip in today to help Katie stay competitive amidst this super PAC spend?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231107-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_PAC_20231107_V1_F&refcode2=32741_3422442_rPgBfV&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231107-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_PAC_20231107_V1_F&refcode2=32741_3422442_rPgBfV&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)
Thanks, Derek.
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_PAC_20231107_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32741_3422442_rPgBfV&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=32741%2E3422442%2ErPgBfV)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: The tide is turning

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72971672/436968412/-233825198?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU3NTgyOS05ZjdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHE39CyRuSzABfmtN2aUdjof-UlKiUF5rU6B9Xfxbts=)

[Will you chip in $1 -- _that’s right, just four quarters_ \-- toward my campaign to flip CA-27 blue today? There’s a laundry list of reasons why far-right Rep. Mike Garcia needs to go, and I know together we can win this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72971673/436968413/-233825198?refcode=em-11.07.23-all-a&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU3NTgyOS05ZjdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHE39CyRuSzABfmtN2aUdjof-UlKiUF5rU6B9Xfxbts=)

Instead of getting results for the people of CA-27, Garcia is backing extremists, pushing for a nationwide abortion ban, and hobnobbing with special interests for huge PAC donations.

But the tide is turning. A new poll released late last month proves what we already know \-- voters see right through Garcia’s lies.

➡️ Garcia’s approval rating dropped by a staggering **9%** in the last month.

➡️ **61%** disapprove of his vote for a nationwide restriction on abortion access.

➡️ **68%** disapprove of Garcia joining Republicans who are threatening to shut down the government and cut critical services like veterans benefits.

As you can see, the more people learn about Garcia’s true agenda, the less they want to keep him in office. **This gives us a huge opportunity to flip this seat to give CA-27 the community-centered representation it deserves -- and moves us closer to a Democratic House majority.**

[With less than a year until Election Day, we want to send a message that thousands of grassroots supporters are ready to unseat Mike Garcia. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in just $1, or any amount, toward our campaign for CA-27. Please, will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72971676/436968416/-233825198?refcode=em-11.07.23-all-a&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGU3NTgyOS05ZjdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHE39CyRuSzABfmtN2aUdjof-UlKiUF5rU6B9Xfxbts=)

Friend,

We're 24 hours out from the debate, and we can't let this time go to waste. As tens of millions are being poured into this race to attack us, every single donation to our team will make a difference in fighting back.

COUNTDOWN TO THE GOP DEBATE:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72ca33675553141fcb3e1403316f343434b9eec053d66ce3eaf43a255079fe6cfef6d450f24586f7888dfbaa404fdedca860a6027a765280044

Support Ron DeSantis right now!

We've always been the threat in this race, and now the target on our backs is even bigger...

👉 The establishment KNOWS that when Ron DeSantis says he's doing to usher in accountability and integrity across DC, he means it.

👉 The Democrats KNOW that Ron DeSantis will actually rip up their agenda and protect the children whose innocence they're threatening.

👉 The media KNOWS that their false narratives will be proven wrong by the voice and support of the people, and their weak ploys will never prevail over the truth.

We have just earned an incredible endorsement for Governor Kim Reynolds in Iowa. Ron DeSantis continues to fight for every vote. Backing him up now before he takes the debate stage tomorrow is more important than ever. Your support will show the nation what the media is working overtime to deny: that the American people are standing up to support Ron DeSantis.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72c34cce444c9a0ef0ff57bf6b977a644bcfa09d79bfa83ab1c4f136a4e8d4c551e3dd4fd37d870c7c5fa803023edcadab6e8b0aef62f3e0346
Send in $20.24 before he steps up on stage to fight for you once again!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72c34cce444c9a0ef0ff57bf6b977a644bcfa09d79bfa83ab1c4f136a4e8d4c551e3dd4fd37d870c7c5fa803023edcadab6e8b0aef62f3e0346
Chip in $24

We need to help Ron DeSantis take that stage with an arsenal of support. That starts with YOU, friend.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72ca33675553141fcb3e1403316f343434b9eec053d66ce3eaf43a255079fe6cfef6d450f24586f7888dfbaa404fdedca860a6027a765280044
We are working hard to earn 2,500 donations before this debate is over, and we need you to be the supporter that helps us reach it.

Ron DeSantis has PROMISED that he will make you proud and never let you down. Tomorrow night, the nation's going to see that. Don't let him go up without knowing you're standing up with him. Chip in NOW!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72c2a26ba09de0a7f7b8167fe026b9bd099ff0b042eb962af1f9776b18038f776ea1129ca50e5b58602e16a9217a1f4e8c326a3d969eaf8ed6d

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72cd86e43fc420d231002ed008c97c23c834c804989f9ca31c23f2ac7839906a3fde873286723d2f09ba65cc632c0704ae178c5d23203efa824
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72c50eb2fdf5e8b70f26058e7199ea0c28c1a03f1976778daf39d6e468036481a5d0746a2bafd86e3c65b5edc7179c6a44fb0b72c8120e2a660
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72ca33675553141fcb3e1403316f343434b9eec053d66ce3eaf43a255079fe6cfef6d450f24586f7888dfbaa404fdedca860a6027a765280044

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=37fd718cd1bbc72ca33675553141fcb3e1403316f343434b9eec053d66ce3eaf43a255079fe6cfef6d450f24586f7888dfbaa404fdedca860a6027a765280044

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Democrats need our support today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today is Election Day in communities across the country and our democracy needs your support!
#
Hey Peter,
Today is Election Day and Democrats need your support!
Today reproductive rights, voting rights, health care justice, and so much more are on the line, so **now is the time to support Democrats up and down the ballot.**
In Washington, Pramila and our team have been hard at work building support for candidates who have our progressive values at heart.
Through canvassing, phone banking, and dedicated GOTV efforts, we’ve been able to grow our grassroots support and make our voices heard before the polls open. **But now we have to keep work up all the way until the last poll closes tonight!**
**Now’s the time to turn out for our movement, so[can we count on you to chip in $3 or more to help us support Democrats up and down the ballot today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47050?refcode=em20231107-3135&t=1&akid=3135%2E420207%2E4eFenI)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47050?refcode=em20231107-3135&t=20&akid=3135%2E420207%2E4eFenI)**
Let’s do this,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231107-3135-footer&t=21&refcode2=3135_420207_4eFenI&akid=3135%2E420207%2E4eFenI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=3135%2E420207%2E4eFenI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3135%2E420207%2E4eFenI)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sheehy may be our only hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
We have the chance to elect the 6th Navy SEAL to the United States Congress next November and I’m asking for your help in getting the job done | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=fd039e78959348daac1ec60f5fee2f1a&_t=I-uda9ZfeMY6SNw7--kYSqQCUd3fNkPcr4Q25g5KJscb1UxP60vv3gm7eYjYFq73rYKZ-UwR8ro0tXAvez_pTe8vqUycspF6lZCpbBY-xig%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=fd039e78959348daac1ec60f5fee2f1a&_t=I-uda9ZfeMY6SNw7--kYSqQCUd3fNkPcr4Q25g5KJscb1UxP60vv3gm7eYjYFq73rYKZ-UwR8ro0tXAvez_pTe8vqUycspF6lZCpbBY-xig%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd039e78959348daac1ec60f5fee2f1a&_e=Bcv0YC874Qnc77JVdv3c59DSzzkbyg_IkKHgLY8wEmZJgsh9hrp4FeeWe-OilM0EF2poykWpK4Q-SDrjeHkT9eoClsds8x2XG2EUiLpknyRbNBPLfgF9SsWqMTYUpmx8b5OLVEtQLMN16ulruGxmKx4gGrMg1fBZ78QEGFGXQbjc20R6j7fVwbPpKD0P1NSSW746wCS1v53dRrDKrf1Zhy3dsm4KoVsK_Xg2rLYl5wevfb2HOIvggpaKU9vyiPsUmNDrKbOBb0dYMTGQ06RxIxHNZ7G79JpVNR01FE3jZFU3ZMW8P1M2Tbkq-UsvAZtjSJqu1icDBDeRqzVXvG1JZ5JW8vfwGO26XlHQwgz5GOmxM3NXJMdcHInLesWcnWemclQvoUF3YURqqO36dAgJ8A%3D%3D)

Peter,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Peter, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd039e78959348daac1ec60f5fee2f1a&_e=Bcv0YC874Qnc77JVdv3c59DSzzkbyg_IkKHgLY8wEmZJgsh9hrp4FeeWe-OilM0EF2poykWpK4Q-SDrjeHkT9eoClsds8x2XG2EUiLpknyRbNBPLfgF9SsWqMTYUpmx8b5OLVEtQLMN16ulruGxmKx4gGrMg1fBZ78QEGFGXQbjc20R6j7fVwbPpKD0P1NSSW746wCS1v53dRrDKrf1Zhy3dsm4KoVsK_Xg2rLYl5wfUKxKCn7j3gKtAZPvYWsiSg9S5PzEbNlJasQV604xgGWIgRsEb0Qen9gf9DEEn9ygee75UM1ohViTrpVlWqfSIbSGl3iSlWwSeAFxEuT3pfhtLJOMdkzFEkx4D9GNBabOoOXxjCPlSdPoel5J1QaqeR-SovCHpjTKWRfgl3yiFbw%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL FOR U.S. SENATE
DONATE $2
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd039e78959348daac1ec60f5fee2f1a&_e=Bcv0YC874Qnc77JVdv3c59DSzzkbyg_IkKHgLY8wEmZJgsh9hrp4FeeWe-OilM0EF2poykWpK4Q-SDrjeHkT9eoClsds8x2XG2EUiLpknyRbNBPLfgF9SsWqMTYUpmx8b5OLVEtQLMN16ulruGxmKx4gGrMg1fBZ78QEGFGXQbjc20R6j7fVwbPpKD0P1NSSW746wCS1v53dRrDKrf1Zhy3dsm4KoVsK_Xg2rLYl5wdWAcaVm5rECO3OWNMEqp7ovJ67iZJH8oGMfYYU5p96x01khng3dJMj1S5qeW7hdxMbKeYIM_uFKAcg6pB0bbsDA6nz3VJ1Y_0CopeQBbV12dD5E7FHu3kOwXWRZx5rNnZyH0schlUwFPY36H4Ce131cc1frfG57LV-UcsSjJXFO7eDBsejMVi1lq2y4psfNms%3D)
**As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman** , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and **I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate.**
**[Will you let me know that you got this email by chipping in $2, $5, or even $20 right now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd039e78959348daac1ec60f5fee2f1a&_e=Bcv0YC874Qnc77JVdv3c59DSzzkbyg_IkKHgLY8wEmZJgsh9hrp4FeeWe-OilM0EF2poykWpK4Q-SDrjeHkT9eoClsds8x2XG2EUiLpknyRbNBPLfgF9SsWqMTYUpmx8b5OLVEtQLMN16ulruGxmKx4gGrMg1fBZ78QEGFGXQbjc20R6j7fVwbPpKD0P1NSSW746wCS1v53dRrDKrf1Zhy3dsm4KoVsK_Xg2rLYl5werkmHB07cj0YzLT8xg3AZiFHeQHnipOZFqS-tR5OUXfuyLIsqTxAKKH7XOYxLLofW9YC0P__b1pfJn9-8Laj0kgfqryaYyC-FnowS6Dfn0xGxfZhsEXr8ttmcjaXeiqd8Uq7w6GA5CIFxdgZSG5i_R4UiMxrfAIjmfKUzD9c3LnQ%3D%3D)** I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. clean_body: We have the chance to elect the 6th Navy SEAL to the United States Congress next November and I’m asking for your help in getting the job done | | Peter, Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe. We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, Joe Biden continues to do nothing. I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Peter, the last three years have been a disaster. We need to get our country back on track. We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible. He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate. I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster. Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 14 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory? We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate. If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. Thanks for your consideration, Sen. Marco Rubio United States Senator (R., FL) | | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: The two questions I ask of every nominee
body:
|
#
_Content warning: This message contains mentions of sexual assault._ Peter, When countless people across the country sparked the #MeToo movement six years ago by courageously speaking up about sexual misconduct they faced from powerful men — celebrities, politicians, business executives, and superiors — I wanted to ensure that this movement would not get swept under the rug in Washington. **So I began asking two questions — on the record, under oath — to every nominee before the Judiciary Committee:**
* _“Since you became a legal adult, have you ever made unwanted requests for sexual favors or committed any verbal or physical harassment or assault of a sexual nature?”_

* _“Have you ever faced discipline or entered into a settlement related to this kind of conduct?”_

At first, these questions caught many by surprise. Onlookers in the audience would shift uncomfortably in their seats. These issues were not commonly spoken about in Washington — and they were _certainly_ not directed at accomplished judges seeking lifetime appointments. This practice drew intense attention when, days after I asked these questions to Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh during his confirmation hearing, he was credibly accused by multiple women of sexual misconduct. That is when the importance of asking these questions, even if they are uncomfortable, quickly became evident. But the truth is, I had asked these questions of dozens of nominees before him and of all nominees since who have come before the committees on which I sit, including President Biden’s nominees — because the only way to eliminate the pervasive culture of sexual violence and harassment in our society is to speak openly about it. It is not lost on me that as a woman, I shouldered the responsibility of asking these questions for the first time. **But I am not afraid to speak out bluntly about injustice.** Whether it’s leading the call to reform the extremist Supreme Court majority, to calling out Republicans for their radical agenda to ban abortion nationwide and wage an outright attack on women in this country, I have no plans to stop using my voice — especially while the MAGA GOP tries to silence yours. [**Peter, that’s why I’m personally asking if you will make a contribution of any amount toward our end-of-month fundraising goal today. Your support will help me stay the course and continue fighting in Washington for what is right — no matter the attacks we face.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72972482/436971169/-459603993?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_WEL_NTL_202310_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzFmOGI0My1hMDdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GPpq4_pD1Cp3P0PZTH_T0iCtDUGWSMtmO95bbRVjzY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72972483/436971171/-459603993?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_WEL_NTL_202310_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzFmOGI0My1hMDdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GPpq4_pD1Cp3P0PZTH_T0iCtDUGWSMtmO95bbRVjzY=)****
