clean_body: | Content warning: This message contains mentions of sexual assault. Peter, When countless people across the country sparked the #MeToo movement six years ago by courageously speaking up about sexual misconduct they faced from powerful men — celebrities, politicians, business executives, and superiors — I wanted to ensure that this movement would not get swept under the rug in Washington. So I began asking two questions — on the record, under oath — to every nominee before the Judiciary Committee: “Since you became a legal adult, have you ever made unwanted requests for sexual favors or committed any verbal or physical harassment or assault of a sexual nature?” “Have you ever faced discipline or entered into a settlement related to this kind of conduct?” At first, these questions caught many by surprise. Onlookers in the audience would shift uncomfortably in their seats. These issues were not commonly spoken about in Washington — and they were certainly not directed at accomplished judges seeking lifetime appointments. This practice drew intense attention when, days after I asked these questions to Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh during his confirmation hearing, he was credibly accused by multiple women of sexual misconduct. That is when the importance of asking these questions, even if they are uncomfortable, quickly became evident. But the truth is, I had asked these questions of dozens of nominees before him and of all nominees since who have come before the committees on which I sit, including President Biden’s nominees — because the only way to eliminate the pervasive culture of sexual violence and harassment in our society is to speak openly about it. It is not lost on me that as a woman, I shouldered the responsibility of asking these questions for the first time. But I am not afraid to speak out bluntly about injustice. Whether it’s leading the call to reform the extremist Supreme Court majority, to calling out Republicans for their radical agenda to ban abortion nationwide and wage an outright attack on women in this country, I have no plans to stop using my voice — especially while the MAGA GOP tries to silence yours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** Thank you for standing with me. Mazie Our friends in Maui still need our support. If you would like to make a contribution to the Hawaii Community Foundation to support disaster relief and recovery efforts, you can click=. Thank you. Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Team AOC
subject: Important elections today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Get to the polls, or help out in key states.
#
It’s Election Day in over 30 different states!
While there is only 1 federal race today, there are state-wide elections happening all over the country — **many with abortion access as a central issue** — that will have broader implications for national races next year.
In Virginia, the GOP Governor has vowed to pass on abortion ban if the state legislature flips Republican today. In Ohio, abortion rights are facing a massive disinformation campaign from state Republicans. In deep red Kentucky, the Democratic Governor is polling evenly with a supporter of the total abortion ban.
So **let's get to the polls** , or keep reading to help us get out the vote in other states!
**[Find your election info](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/21724?utm_source=em20231107-5277&t=1&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)**
_Use this link to check your voter registration, find your poll place, or see what's on your ballot._
Here are **other ways to get involved in key elections around the country today:**
* In Ohio, voters will vote on establishing a right to an abortion in the state constitution. Republicans have fought the referendum with a massive disinformation campaign, confusing voters on the wording of how to vote. Abortion rights activists are **phonebanking today to ask people to vote YES on Issue 1, and create a constitutional right to access an abortion** in Ohio.
[_Sign up to make calls with Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights today →_

](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/21718?utm_source=em20231107-5277&t=2&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)
* In Virginia, the entire state General Assembly is up for re-election, and has been a target for Republican funding and organizing. Yesterday, GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin promised he would “deliver” a total abortion if Republicans take control of the state legislature. Organizers today are **phonebanking to get people to the polls** in their various districts.
[_Sign up to make calls with the Virginia Majority Project →_

](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/21722?utm_source=em20231107-5277&t=3&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)

And **remember: it is your right to cast your ballot in a safe, accessible site today!** If you witness (or are subject to) intimidation, threats, or false information at the polls, call the Election Protection Hotline at 1-866-OUR-VOTE (867-8683) to report illegal activity.
See you at the polls!
Team AOC

_Photo credit: Corey Torpie Photography_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20231107-5277-P_ORG_EXP_ORG&t=4&refcode2=5277_2526796_HZ4eAX&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231107-5277-P_ORG_EXP_ORG&t=5&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=5277%2E2526796%2EHZ4eAX)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Enough is Enough: Halt Wasteful Spending in D.C.
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Enough is Enough: **
**Halt Wasteful Spending in D.C.****
**
---

Dear Peter,
Washington's 8th legislative district deserves representatives who prioritize our hard-earned tax dollars. Regrettably, D.C. has become synonymous with wasteful spending, misallocating funds that could better serve our communities and nation.

It's time for a change.

Our campaign is laser-focused on bringing fiscal responsibility back to the forefront. But to challenge the status quo and redirect our resources wisely, we need your support.

---
| | | |
---
|
Would you consider contributing $25, $50, or even $100 to help us combat the reckless financial decisions in D.C.?

Your contribution will empower us to:

* Advocate for stringent budget oversight and accountability.
* Prioritize essential services and infrastructure for Washington's 8th.
* Rally against the unchecked spending that burdens future generations.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/654a903b2fd61d6b87b4a845/654a893a0dd1d2eef668b3dc/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=7f562e507dca365b429d54a40eb20f5acdf5bdd41726427991959653f6abf979)
---
| | | Let's send a resounding message to D.C.: Our money should be invested in our communities, not squandered. With your support, we can usher in an era of financial prudence and prioritize the needs of Washington's 8th.

Thank you for joining us in this crucial fight.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|
---
| | | | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/654a903b2fd61d6b87b4a847/654a893a0dd1d2eef668b3dc/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=7f562e507dca365b429d54a40eb20f5acdf5bdd41726427991959653f6abf979) | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/654a903b2fd61d6b87b4a849/654a893a0dd1d2eef668b3dc/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=7f562e507dca365b429d54a40eb20f5acdf5bdd41726427991959653f6abf979)

| | | Friend - it's Steve Scalise. I wouldn't be doing my due diligence if I didn't make sure you saw our Speaker's message.

The Liberal Mob just launched a COORDINATED and PREPLANNED attack on his Christian beliefs, and I am utterly disgusted.

_**[You need to see this for yourself.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a952137df2da45b0978b9b15d949b240&_e=ZlszyOmJgGoWVmNgqeupNT8zcNi6xb-XRajrcw-fdu8wVzXXeWFHQ1k5t-XgcPra4li9-3MnJfJ3zCYdSlIlQs69KiFcK9-eHjgfL8rIpIYXxsNkkKA-zrCXJjJmiauz85M0dNS8r0O4wg4SwA-pHh32UVleML1QwAYFA0Htyw0MxMfu1PbTQ6CUQNlc5GLZyVvsWlf-rqr0t0YrC_2-f8Krg66kEaNfLxjVJTGJPYPuaG6hjoVhIGe1LQAzmPyMA2ncrOGfRK_WGmYIcDmvKPV_z4hAKc-P23y7Yd5LsSR_WWY5KROVwyTBDzQngyjuYGWZ1k9mPmluz1xPWOx2bkpmHSG0xNFC5kYfIEm0U8sbja1H4tLwI_WYVV4KANsg2t4JiEIZH90d2nMdJ66Qz3b32VBsIAA8P9tm4GUJrUoRg9FKHrDz9h1zCzoodwQegwUVuML25tsjSOgDFLFQHMhKDeVWj9k7jtRiumSoaCM%3D "You need to see this for yourself. ")**_

I've attached his message below:

_\----------------- Begin Forwarded Message -----------------_
From: House Speaker Mike Johnson
To: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a952137df2da45b0978b9b15d949b240&_e=ZlszyOmJgGoWVmNgqeupNT8zcNi6xb-XRajrcw-fdu8wVzXXeWFHQ1k5t-XgcPra4li9-3MnJfJ3zCYdSlIlQs69KiFcK9-eHjgfL8rIpIYXxsNkkKA-zrCXJjJmiauz85M0dNS8r0O4wg4SwA-pHh32UVleML1QwAYFA0Htyw0MxMfu1PbTQ6CUQNlc5GLZyVvsWlf-rqr0t0YrC_2-f8Krg66kEaNfLxjVJTGJPYPuaG6hjoVhIGe1LQAzmPyMA2ncrOGfRK_WGmYIcDmvKPV_z4hAKc-P23y7Yd5LsSR_WWY5KROVwyTBDzQngyjuxMUO60cwgjpsrDhuHlDtPVuAXHoywwvhcoNDG-DiXiiHEKc9VP6zGKGGMXrGzXoXaMpZ6WOB8cdngkr2rHig_WC-4VepXUV70lXLFThalGYH_J3rcSxJhkj4hFMou03s_R_CbIqg3ISxz-N_ojE6zeY4sMv4d7ubwK7v_LDj8JI%3D "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
Subject: It's all coordinated. And it's all preplanned.

---
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a952137df2da45b0978b9b15d949b240&_e=ZlszyOmJgGoWVmNgqeupNT8zcNi6xb-XRajrcw-fdu8wVzXXeWFHQ1k5t-XgcPra4li9-3MnJfJ3zCYdSlIlQs69KiFcK9-eHjgfL8rIpIYXxsNkkKA-zrCXJjJmiauz85M0dNS8r0O4wg4SwA-pHh32UVleML1QwAYFA0Htyw0MxMfu1PbTQ6CUQNlc5GLZyVvsWlf-rqr0t0YrC_2-f8Krg66kEaNfLxjVJTGJPYPuaG6hjoVhIGe1LQAzmPyMA2ncrOGfRK_WGmYIcDmvKPV_z4hAKc-P23y7Yd5LsSR_WWY5KROVwyTBDzQngyjukijBfcVAyTr8FI4CCPiJzw2QxJpwC5xV3F9BNXTNU0uCcfb31OUTQFfCX-KbU-6f0rKTSigCxksCSTe4p0AsoNOC2OdMNLCBEJEkmi0KMJ2_mdw5YxRRkzmGcBvLkKvaEJR4ALQuqq3iTGuwnmCism2c4z9Qq7OMsXaJLuZvZcA%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a952137df2da45b0978b9b15d949b240&_e=ZlszyOmJgGoWVmNgqeupNT8zcNi6xb-XRajrcw-fdu8wVzXXeWFHQ1k5t-XgcPra4li9-3MnJfJ3zCYdSlIlQs69KiFcK9-eHjgfL8rIpIYXxsNkkKA-zrCXJjJmiauz85M0dNS8r0O4wg4SwA-pHh32UVleML1QwAYFA0Htyw0MxMfu1PbTQ6CUQNlc5GLZyVvsWlf-rqr0t0YrC_2-f8Krg66kEaNfLxjVJTGJPYPuaG6hjoVhIGe1LQAzmPyMA2ncrOGfRK_WGmYIcDmvKPV_z4hAKc-P23y7Yd5LsSR_WWY5KROVwyTBDzQngyjuHu-FdYaiLqspsRAyrKx3mjFYER0NgmD6fW8g1tTnEmZxZkU757lIaD00sTcF2ulnv0sPA106adYqFJcfzVwmjXUzj37S5z16W97A0XpOlhs4WdQBKBYz33PFscS5xLR3BBPktJSQ_qeJ1VpdAUCPc-LxrXbxAuea_8CevaOppSU%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a952137df2da45b0978b9b15d949b240&_e=ZlszyOmJgGoWVmNgqeupNT8zcNi6xb-XRajrcw-fdu8wVzXXeWFHQ1k5t-XgcPra4li9-3MnJfJ3zCYdSlIlQs69KiFcK9-eHjgfL8rIpIYXxsNkkKA-zrCXJjJmiauz85M0dNS8r0O4wg4SwA-pHh32UVleML1QwAYFA0Htyw0MxMfu1PbTQ6CUQNlc5GLZyVvsWlf-rqr0t0YrC_2-f8Krg66kEaNfLxjVJTGJPYPuaG6hjoVhIGe1LQAzmPyMA2ncrOGfRK_WGmYIcDmvKPV_z4hAKc-P23y7Yd5LsSR_WWY5KROVwyTBDzQngyjuuV_F1OAs4ZFPbfc_V_wVrF_SAcwjqd5yYj58yHZX4FNYRWxvQN4UJizhjI8Ge7vJ1zd3YjZdfoaWdtCke4X3PmZRjEsKYiVqaxWf_Z9s0UXX_7bzTr-R9QR19hGUXiIFF0FZRugtijtLEgVUKIGE_k2-S3-Rrf6DycVGbbbsoy0%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=73ec05e16b274491aecb89ac4e00c37b&_e=aULl3cpRXd0tAzrGbOeqkZVT4u2uSGON3913UivW1RjUhJPwcGF9tE96-VkPfxeZnKHdbjjiUAqfNJQVIneUQpo2g0rezIkx2Voira8vU0qSCjCrJBFBt9XKdT0xyZLsK-7QszTKFGHPr02TO0xasZNp0JmZpy80ULFQmpZ1HrzuZ_Sf1iGNTBpjBsRdsykGrXfgeGzqnI63RmGSMyQvsoY_5DFzjZwtnMfuuFgOs6-gb0Lu9odZXyXcvCJ1J1UMaf5W2iSoAP42CzwNe9TuXp6JhhI6KLjcLsR3SWl-boTV99eJpQPoa0cxSirXRMpnSLIhb071O45F11OiKVvxUQqnMSOWnRuNfErbCq27BQhj-otLIRurJd-Gwp8swtgm92xUa7EmNr7r1_vGJNqUHw%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=73ec05e16b274491aecb89ac4e00c37b&_e=aULl3cpRXd0tAzrGbOeqkZVT4u2uSGON3913UivW1RjUhJPwcGF9tE96-VkPfxeZnKHdbjjiUAqfNJQVIneUQpo2g0rezIkx2Voira8vU0qSCjCrJBFBt9XKdT0xyZLsK-7QszTKFGHPr02TO0xasZNp0JmZpy80ULFQmpZ1HrzuZ_Sf1iGNTBpjBsRdsykGrXfgeGzqnI63RmGSMyQvsoY_5DFzjZwtnMfuuFgOs6-gb0Lu9odZXyXcvCJ1J1UMn5UoMk0Cm3ZFK2rc6uUFbWvpzfEjS4-JrUcpd4om3Ha4suNPXXMbXGXOT-VSsZBsNPFe7MCRIFBQubSUN9fkQQP9XGZPh_58m0ejzvKqhS1-K96lxZCHMAIqAOMeLo8es6pfJRhl1O-h0F5xTwbYLQ%3D%3D)

Peter, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=73ec05e16b274491aecb89ac4e00c37b&_e=aULl3cpRXd0tAzrGbOeqkZVT4u2uSGON3913UivW1RjUhJPwcGF9tE96-VkPfxeZnKHdbjjiUAqfNJQVIneUQpo2g0rezIkx2Voira8vU0qSCjCrJBFBt9XKdT0xyZLsK-7QszTKFGHPr02TO0xasZNp0JmZpy80ULFQmpZ1HrzuZ_Sf1iGNTBpjBsRdsykGrXfgeGzqnI63RmGSMyQvsoY_5DFzjZwtnMfuuFgOs6-gb0Lu9odZXyXcvCJ1J1UMhayDASy0Vc_2OR3qBzHMxSHuIl_0KHXYwfFrj2cZEGZmLJP2PgJMi_PrsO3bTS2mwqZ8iQzv5MQqKi6Gkc7O5T5UV9GCIAVqAzh2eHo0iLcPHBsU8XjvMBdpoi4FJxhCR6qI_Mx0-DQHzprhzkBi5w%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=73ec05e16b274491aecb89ac4e00c37b&_e=aULl3cpRXd0tAzrGbOeqkZVT4u2uSGON3913UivW1RjUhJPwcGF9tE96-VkPfxeZnKHdbjjiUAqfNJQVIneUQpo2g0rezIkx2Voira8vU0qSCjCrJBFBt9XKdT0xyZLsK-7QszTKFGHPr02TO0xasZNp0JmZpy80ULFQmpZ1HrzuZ_Sf1iGNTBpjBsRdsykGrXfgeGzqnI63RmGSMyQvsoY_5DFzjZwtnMfuuFgOs6-gb0Lu9odZXyXcvCJ1J1UMho44GzBXutA6EjuwsfWPIi7mLnacVa33TU23Cvbvhq1UILnGh5NVS9H3C58IC_FVTeXf673mfL6dLPbXeAi6fkY5ruuO2T7Lsm_vmTxkHF4pDxi-d8gxnmNZUp7s28_q9wyvsUINJK6ECjJVQcSRbg%3D%3D)

body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=643%2E52803%2EnobR5g)

| | It’s Election Day, and as I’m following the results, I’m looking at a handful of trends that could give us some clues as to where our own race — only _6 months away_ on May 14th — is heading. There are 3 main things I’m keeping an eye out for, but before I unpack them: **[Would you be willing to chip in $25 to help us ramp up our grassroots fundraising?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7454?t=11&amount=25&akid=643%2E52803%2EnobR5g)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7454?t=12&amount=25&akid=643%2E52803%2EnobR5g)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7454?t=13&amount=35&akid=643%2E52803%2EnobR5g)
---
**The first thing I’m looking for is turnout.** _What percentage of registered Democrats are showing up to the polls vs. the number of registered Republicans, Independents, and everyone in between?_
**The second thing I’m looking at is spending.** _How did the candidates spending more money fair against the candidates spending less? (This is big, given that we’re going up against a multi-millionaire)_
**The third thing I’m watching for (and it’s the toughest to gauge) is enthusiasm.** _Are folks excited to show up for their candidates of choice? What’s the energy on social media and in the community?_
**[If we’re going to win and elect Angela to the U.S. Senate, we’re going to need all 3, Peter, and that starts with fundraising right now. Can you pitch in $25 ASAP to give our grassroots fundraising an early boost?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7454?t=14&amount=25&akid=643%2E52803%2EnobR5g)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e4ac3ef16ab54b808ea5f8e5fa86ba38&_e=wKHqL03yKpAyXIdyU9-ngd9gI83H3w0LYYEji1AVOaaQdhc-HXN1-D6yFVICHChXDmsk8XC4uaLp4N-1owHzjLaM8tiMrjAMsU80O2N6oGEWD2t2iBUHR6kEBcEYs2o3f2sR-VxMmzdpGmbCIkM1YZxOw6Mf4RQsKcrLXgEv879d84sxatBPpjP6VvvY1W1cqfhr0qLUmzBlxCjzaHXgJCOFsZdD0EZXLriIX3erzT9JI7Kh5flaSSS8YEbzxA_7dHgkhWBPfRN_XXPU1vqGA-AHKF9Awcgs6mdxxwvTc5NjfqP-9aaT-9KBVuhX3ZJDoJ5SjOaR0XnLzx_P2MvCfiM2iKUxrZfdDeliSVnGk56EaQUb5bCjE53FgGZLOZ7h)
Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e4ac3ef16ab54b808ea5f8e5fa86ba38&_e=wKHqL03yKpAyXIdyU9-ngd9gI83H3w0LYYEji1AVOaaQdhc-HXN1-D6yFVICHChXDmsk8XC4uaLp4N-1owHzjLaM8tiMrjAMsU80O2N6oGEWD2t2iBUHR6kEBcEYs2o3f2sR-VxMmzdpGmbCIkM1YZxOw6Mf4RQsKcrLXgEv879d84sxatBPpjP6VvvY1W1cqfhr0qLUmzBlxCjzaHXgJCOFsZdD0EZXLriIX3erzT85AJ8qCrL7vjLLuw3Gvh0L8j6grx53SV0TkTDv_YO-hkar5DL2XMKYbU1Av3YfWJesr38dgGMg6D0WNWh6ZrOFke1hZHnlrOvR7tfx0HAA3IhNw2hWJXfvShuUKht5tlwDO9YkrVr9_uB7sappscZx)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e4ac3ef16ab54b808ea5f8e5fa86ba38&_e=wKHqL03yKpAyXIdyU9-ngd9gI83H3w0LYYEji1AVOaaQdhc-HXN1-D6yFVICHChXDmsk8XC4uaLp4N-1owHzjLaM8tiMrjAMsU80O2N6oGEWD2t2iBUHR6kEBcEYs2o3f2sR-VxMmzdpGmbCIkM1YZxOw6Mf4RQsKcrLXgEv879d84sxatBPpjP6VvvY1W1cqfhr0qLUmzBlxCjzaHXgJCOFsZdD0EZXLriIX3erzT_wcIy-lwWCHmFFvU_Pb0ArDT63AhN4JTb5zrfHyMCk0Db2Oluj0D_-eCnvMNhgaV-_6B7eO7jikxLYYXPP841Z05-jwN0VRyHngy9TvCOazF4MYkXemI00_oYnRRhmqrG6eox3_fecZuCafJuLA5-m)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e90d2d3a01f4f1fa666eb0a18d7c86a&_e=rT46KGSSYtmt2v0L4QMSaIKkXsB4B1nf3fwihnNfvurj08loihRTO8l5mkuOFgkfYPur1J_pVj-p3bVLKNWdVEHiMhHKnnedMKPAoqC3bUF56O-AymEvu0dyEvaa-w44PAttavsJtfvZRn-k7hCWQh3E5_DzAb3uxHIyPMKWiZ6VdINAC20coCd753cQop_R_oMD7Bd8yYN1Abqa9fv2ylH8ttOlpAc2YxKsd9JnqzHNl1JMhwaeXICN_Nz773IzS8zIeBbY6xGvkcIBpXOhwKR9nAJsI27Ag8kek0YcJqckT6SNHi-jE-AtxWAT1ZPUts2kl9RE0ppyaDqyAjQRvI_IUVR06YD9vBoLkQSooro-tdZSIqWUU6RGYAMix3OMOFArRLKy2L0MVcAMa-0Rfx6PviECZfNQhgCOPY4o1K4%3D)
When I launched this campaign in late February, we were polling at 0.0%. Now we’re squarely in the upper echelon in the national polls AND have the strongest grassroots base out of any candidate on the stage – 130,000 unique small-dollar donors and an army of grassroots volunteers.

**Everyone is taking notice.**

I want to make a big splash on Wednesday night in Miami – but we also need to raise as much money as possible between now and before I take the debate stage.

[**Before the day is over, I want to secure an additional 500 donations to Team Vivek to show the D.C. Establishment the strength of our movement. Will you chip in?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e90d2d3a01f4f1fa666eb0a18d7c86a&_e=rT46KGSSYtmt2v0L4QMSaIKkXsB4B1nf3fwihnNfvurj08loihRTO8l5mkuOFgkfYPur1J_pVj-p3bVLKNWdVEHiMhHKnnedMKPAoqC3bUF56O-AymEvu0dyEvaa-w44PAttavsJtfvZRn-k7hCWQh3E5_DzAb3uxHIyPMKWiZ6VdINAC20coCd753cQop_R_oMD7Bd8yYN1Abqa9fv2ylH8ttOlpAc2YxKsd9JnqzHNl1JMhwaeXICN_Nz773IzS8zIeBbY6xGvkcIBpXOhwDozh-LBwSgXf3t01b2G-CoxepHlgGGqcvhkYlZVUfrm3STrQzD0E-3rvFHEhtnWlesCqS9yDIEvl2J2ILJNqzoSFsBVyvwxn49v0Hmoa7-XwLdyHMs8imETasAScuSTMxONyeQDrAtURt6KB-zqFUw%3D)

Whether you can give $1, $10, or $100 today – that doesn't matter to me. It's the fact that you're in this fight with me.

I am not counting on Super PACs to fund this campaign – I am counting on _**you.**_

[**Fellow American, let's show D.C. insiders the strength of Team Vivek today, tomorrow, and Wednesday night on the Debate stage!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e90d2d3a01f4f1fa666eb0a18d7c86a&_e=rT46KGSSYtmt2v0L4QMSaIKkXsB4B1nf3fwihnNfvurj08loihRTO8l5mkuOFgkfYPur1J_pVj-p3bVLKNWdVEHiMhHKnnedMKPAoqC3bUF56O-AymEvu0dyEvaa-w44PAttavsJtfvZRn-k7hCWQh3E5_DzAb3uxHIyPMKWiZ6VdINAC20coCd753cQop_R_oMD7Bd8yYN1Abqa9fv2ylH8ttOlpAc2YxKsd9JnqzHNl1JMhwaeXICN_Nz773IzS8zIeBbY6xGvkcIBpXOhwMHeIWyJRqrphEprTcHWvmBWs60rQap1_MrqjQQi7AIJYG46Zv7pFJxAoeYfNAEwbM_1_w3RY-OKhWY02M8jKPN4BVjrW59y-7df0l-aEfsN9K-P1eOF9YXuLp6I_k_35VCdim4U9hnjkjXPAsbnE7I%3D)

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e90d2d3a01f4f1fa666eb0a18d7c86a&_e=rT46KGSSYtmt2v0L4QMSaIKkXsB4B1nf3fwihnNfvurj08loihRTO8l5mkuOFgkfYPur1J_pVj-p3bVLKNWdVEHiMhHKnnedMKPAoqC3bUF56O-AymEvu0dyEvaa-w44PAttavsJtfvZRn-k7hCWQh3E5_DzAb3uxHIyPMKWiZ6VdINAC20coCd753cQop_R_oMD7Bd8yYN1Abqa9fv2ylH8ttOlpAc2YxKsd9JnqzHNl1JMhwaeXICN_Nz773IzS8zIeBbY6xGvkcIBpXOhwBO-rCKci4f_2vjxNV5YNQYOZ728tj-kMW4vsBMe55ROxNkiRYgIVfPoKaGaHYVdBS04NCgFzOlWMH_U0lkFEquoMRmDkXUXCSuNnyXIinjZ9dyD11w_QOv1AZ9JtKzYB6ZnVFmVN4c7apH9yU3WcOM%3D)

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e90d2d3a01f4f1fa666eb0a18d7c86a&_e=rT46KGSSYtmt2v0L4QMSaIKkXsB4B1nf3fwihnNfvurj08loihRTO8l5mkuOFgkfYPur1J_pVj-p3bVLKNWdVEHiMhHKnnedMKPAoqC3bUF56O-AymEvu0dyEvaa-w44PAttavsJtfvZRn-k7hCWQh3E5_DzAb3uxHIyPMKWiZ6VdINAC20coCd753cQop_R_oMD7Bd8yYN1Abqa9fv2ylH8ttOlpAc2YxKsd9JnqzHNl1JMhwaeXICN_Nz773IzS8zIeBbY6xGvkcIBpXOhwLswyHCfvWCPUvfWFWsJhPipvt3msHaZQFzESQDol9SqiEb4Lk9duMmLlu_1IuVmrl_3Arl53vhf_uuGkWZEdMB0xezzgIKKQTJnElTBzySqZAv1-dvQfgPaZeoTLeexDO7wD0wrE4htRuDMB203MaU%3D)

body:
"I believe that Ron is the right person for the right job. And I believe he's going to win."

---

All eyes are on our team, Peter. The entire internet and political news stations won't stop talking about the impact of this endorsement because they know that it is HUGE. Traditionally, Iowa Governors remain neutral during the primary, but **_Kim Reynolds understands that we aren't getting a mulligan if we lose in 2024_**. We need a leader who delivers on their promises, has a winning record, and will never back down. That's exactly why she endorsed Ron DeSantis!
---
| | [RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT FOR RON DESANTIS HERE!](https://secure.winred.com/desantis/ia-rally-email-imgedata-cpm?utm_source=hs_id&utm_medium=em_lr&utm_campaign=2023-11-07_post-rally-momentum-imgedata-cpm_ha_aud0431_em0894_lp1755_tds__&first_name=%%first_name%%&last_name=%%last_name%%&state=%%state%%&city=%%city%%&zip=%%zip%%&email=%%email%%)

---
With this huge endorsement, we need your help to keep up with what's coming. It's more important than ever that we raise what we need to fight back now... **[Can we count on you to pitch in $47 to help us rise above the insanity and fight for the comeback that Ron DeSantis WILL lead?](https://secure.winred.com/desantis/ia-rally-email-imgedata-cpm?utm_source=hs_id&utm_medium=em_lr&utm_campaign=2023-11-07_post-rally-momentum-imgedata-cpm_ha_aud0431_em0894_lp1755_tds__&first_name=%%first_name%%&last_name=%%last_name%%&state=%%state%%&city=%%city%%&zip=%%zip%%&email=%%email%%&amount=47)** Pitch in what you can today to drive this incredible momentum forward!

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://secure.winred.com/desantis/ia-rally-email-imgedata-cpm?utm_source=hs_id&utm_medium=em_lr&utm_campaign=2023-11-07_post-rally-momentum-imgedata-cpm_ha_aud0431_em0894_lp1755_tds__&first_name=%%first_name%%&last_name=%%last_name%%&state=%%state%%&city=%%city%%&zip=%%zip%%&email=%%email%%)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://secure.winred.com/desantis/ia-rally-email-imgedata-cpm?utm_source=hs_id&utm_medium=em_lr&utm_campaign=2023-11-07_post-rally-momentum-imgedata-cpm_ha_aud0431_em0894_lp1755_tds__&first_name=%%first_name%%&last_name=%%last_name%%&state=%%state%%&city=%%city%%&zip=%%zip%%&email=%%email%%)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. body:
**** 🔔🔔🔔
**Peter – the polls are open in _today’s_ important elections for PA Supreme Court, Superior Court, and Commonwealth Court! There are also a host of local races on the ballot – school board, township supervisor, county commissioner, and more!**

As we’re all aware, the courts have a _major_ impact on our rights, and while we don’t have a direct vote for the U.S. Supreme Court, we do vote for our judges here in Pennsylvania. Today, with our reproductive rights in danger, Pennsylvanians have an opportunity to show that we’ll fight to defend _all_ of our rights.

**[You can find your polling location here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72974569/436980230/364851138?refcode=11072023_md_gotv_en_1&refcode2=2a9acb3e-a87d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTlhY2IzZS1hODdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t7c0bD0WAfgINPum5ggIMMV-3XcyWr3YPln6rR2UjTI=&emci=fe7eb361-8b7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=2a9acb3e-a87d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)** Be sure to give yourself plenty of time, and, remember, if you are in line when the polls close at 8 PM, stay in line – you are still eligible to vote!

And if you’ve already voted, or returned your ballot – thank you! I hope you’ll consider forwarding this email to a friend or colleague so they have the resources at their fingertips. Every vote counts!

With appreciation,

– Mad
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. Friend, Today is the day—Ohio voters are heading to the polls to protect reproductive freedom and our right to plan our families and manage our own private lives. **The stakes could not be higher.** What our team has been hearing on the ground from voters tells a consistent story: some have mixed feelings about reproductive healthcare, in particular, but most think that the Republicans’ 6-week ban is extreme and will harm people and families; and others worry about whether they will come next for birth control and access to reproductive healthcare generally. This battle for the future of our country will not end today. **But it is crucial that we win on Issue 1 to send a message that we will not stand for the GOP’s extremist agenda anywhere.** [**We will stand or fall together, and what happens in Ohio right now and in November will reverberate across the entire country—so if you can, I need your support to defeat Jim Jordan and keep up the fight for our basic rights and freedoms:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72974720/436980432/1649708063?refcode=11-7-edayNGP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA5YWNiM2UtYTg3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UalTncnUSFrpvVFnn_MTee8A-Wi91FBvPuTRZEfZRSs=)

What our team has been hearing on the ground from voters tells a consistent story: some have mixed feelings about reproductive healthcare, in particular, but most think that the Republicans’ 6-week ban is extreme and will harm people and families; and others worry about whether they will come next for birth control and access to reproductive healthcare generally. This battle for the future of our country will not end today. But it is crucial that we win on Issue 1 to send a message that we will not stand for the GOP’s extremist agenda anywhere. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = | = = = | | Donate= Thank you for standing with us during this fight. -Tamie | | | = | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | = To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson for US** 273 SARATOGA ST. DELAWARE, OH 43015 you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please | |

we’re in the final hours of our battle to protect abortion...
| Today is no ordinary Tuesday, team. It's a day that will shape the course of our future. A day that will define our commitment to the fundamental right we know we deserve: Abortion access. The battle to protect not just abortion, but the full range of reproductive healthcare is real, **and it’s happening right here, right now.** **So we have to ask: Have you voted today? If not, this is your last chance to make your voice heard.** Your support, including casting your vote for Issue 1, means the world to us. **[Please, if you haven’t yet, head to the polls to vote and consider contributing to join us in taking a stand against corrupt politicians hell-bent on stripping away our reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72974847/436980853/1478100299?refcode=odp_em_231107_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjlhY2IzZS1hODdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ySZ-0dA1asn87P3Fjud2Swxyg2fVLKN-Gk9YRnrVqc=)** It’s not too late to make a difference. name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: One of our most precious resources
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72975050/436981555/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231107_fr_OneYear_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmUxMmJkNy1hODdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3FnsxjUEUdaHZNGsdXUvMTDNs8Vpc9GZMzeFIYH6uc=)
---
There are only 364 days left in the 2024 election. While that may feel like a lot, I've learned every campaign has only 3 resources: People, Money, and Time. And so every day that passes – that's a day we can't get back. 🤝 It's one less day to meet with voters. 💰 It's one less day to fundraise (House races cost millions!). ✍️ It's one less day to fill out endorsement applications. 📢 It's one less day to get our message out across PA-01. 👨👩👧👦 It's one less day to build the people-powered campaign we'll need to compete with Brian Fitzpatrick's machine. So, co-pilots, I need to know – can I count on you to make the most of the precious resource that is our time? **[Can you make your first donation of $10 to my campaign? clean_body: | = There are only 364 days left in the 2024 election. While that may feel like a lot, I've learned every campaign has only 3 resources: People, Money, and Time. And so every day that passes – that's a day we can't get back. 🤝 It's one less day to meet with voters. 💰 It's one less day to fundraise (House races cost millions!). ✍️ It's one less day to fill out endorsement applications. 📢 It's one less day to get our message out across PA-01. 👨👩👧👦 It's one less day to build the people-powered campaign we'll need to compete with Brian Fitzpatrick's machine. So, co-pilots, I need to know – can I count on you to make the most of the precious resource that is our time? = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight with me, = Ashley 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Fellow Conservative, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. **Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. **We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans._If you are, I’m asking for you to send us _just_ $5 right now_.**

clean_body: | You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need.| | | Fellow Conservative, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. Texans know me; Americans know me. It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans.If you are, I’m asking for you to send us just $5 right now. By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. For Freedom, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

| Catching you up on Mike Johnson’s extreme views:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1484%2E35263%2E5ZYdjo)
Last month, House Republicans chose Rep. Mike Johnson from Louisiana as the new Speaker of the House. Let us catch you up on some of his far-right views. _(Hint: they’re about as extreme as they come...)_ Mike Johnson is an ardent opponent of LGBTQ+ rights, going so far as to support a constitutional amendment **banning same-sex marriage** in Louisiana. As a state legislator, he introduced the Marriage and Conscience Act, which would allow people to **discriminate against same-sex married couples.** In Congress, he introduced a bill mimicking Ron DeSantis’ **“Don’t Say Gay”** law from Florida. Johnson has openly attacked the LGBTQ+ community with homophobic comments — but despite all of this, House Republicans came together to elect him Speaker. As the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history, Tammy’s taken up the mantle to fight back against anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination and protect same-sex marriage through her work. **But extremist Republicans like Speaker Mike Johnson are hellbent on rolling back our progress — and Tammy needs your help to defeat them in 2024.** **[Republicans continue to elevate their party’s most extreme factions. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Governing by crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
The deadline for the House to pass a budget and avoid a government shutdown is next Friday.

And what is Speaker Mike Johnson doing to keep our government open? Not a damn thing, friend.

Instead of putting pen to paper, Johnson is spending the week trying to prove to his Republican colleagues that, despite having passed zero meaningful legislation during his time in Congress, he’s ready to take the reins of his party.

Look, it’s not hard to see Johnson’s long-game here: He wants to galvanize the base, scare the markets, and blame Democrats for whatever economic nightmare results from Republicans’ governance-by-crisis.

This is the same strategy that led to our last nail-biting budget deadline and the ultimate removal of Kevin McCarthy from the Speaker’s chair — it’s all but guaranteed to fail this time, too.

Americans cannot afford to keep pushing off this economic crisis every month, friend . Help my Democratic colleagues and I put pen to paper so we can permanently avoid this shutdown, take back the House in 2024, and stop this chaos for good » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?&refcode=E4857-20231107-ShutdownNegligence-SL-GOP&amount=25]

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Today, Ohioans head to the polls to fight for reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Exciting stuff is happening in Ohio, and this is just the beginning.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72975411/436983016/-1341413768?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.07_b2_gl_oos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTMzMmRjMi1hOTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14R-X2WF0hcy57b1ZHAMd3XaoSCjeQwghbsOQmdp4Vw=)
---
Team, **it’s Election Day in Ohio.**

Right now, millions of Ohioans are heading to the polls to vote YES on Issue 1, a ballot measure that, if passed, will enshrine reproductive freedom in our state’s constitution. Issue 1 will ensure that women can access the reproductive care they need and that these incredibly personal healthcare decisions stay between women and their doctors.

**And I know we’re going to win _because we have a people-powered grassroots team on our side._**

**Exciting stuff is happening in Ohio, and this is just the beginning.** Next year, the fight for control of the House will run through Ohio – meaning the outcome of our election could determine whether Democrats take back the House, or if the Chaos Caucus will remain in control.

**And let me be clear – if Republicans keep control of the House in 2024, they’ll stop at nothing to pass a national abortion ban._We can’t let that happen._**

**[It’s all going to come down to races like ours. clean_body: Exciting stuff is happening in Ohio, and this is just the beginning. | = Team, it’s Election Day in Ohio. Right now, millions of Ohioans are heading to the polls to vote YES on Issue 1, a ballot measure that, if passed, will enshrine reproductive freedom in our state’s constitution. Issue 1 will ensure that women can access the reproductive care they need and that these incredibly personal healthcare decisions stay between women and their doctors. And I know we’re going to win because we have a people-powered grassroots team on our side. Exciting stuff is happening in Ohio, and this is just the beginning. Next year, the fight for control of the House will run through Ohio – meaning the outcome of our election could determine whether Democrats take back the House, or if the Chaos Caucus will remain in control. And let me be clear – if Republicans keep control of the House in 2024, they’ll stop at nothing to pass a national abortion ban.We can’t let that happen. = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: I'm calling on this team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1083%2E552475%2EU2pqAW)
Hi Peter, it’s Tiernan, Bob’s campaign manager. This is a longer email in which I’m going to make the case for folks to step up and help raise as much as possible for Bob Casey’s re-election fight.
We just passed the “one year out” milestone until Election Day, and in order to prepare for the millions that will be spent against our campaign from now until then, our team set a 72-hour goal to raise $30,000.
**[We have less than 24 hours to reach our goal, so if you’re ready to help us get there, I’m asking you to chip in right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231107-2?refcode=em20231107-2&refcode2=1083_552475_U2pqAW&akid=1083%2E552475%2EU2pqAW)**
Look, I know this team is ready to face any challenge from now until Election Day. You can take it from me -- I’m working hard alongside Bob and our entire team to build the strongest campaign possible, day in and day out.
(Thanks to Bob’s fun facts about PA history and endearing dad jokes, we manage to have fun while we’re at it.)
But with a self-funding mega-millionaire running against us to flip PA red, it’s clear that we could be facing the toughest Senate race Pennsylvania has ever seen. Here are just a few facts to back that up:
**FACT:** Among the Senate battlegrounds, Pennsylvania is a historically expensive state. With over $381 million dollars spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race, strong grassroots support is critical to our success in 2024.
---

**FACT:** Our opponent David McCormick is a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive, which means he has effectively unlimited funds to support his own campaign and run attack ads against Bob.
---

**FACT:** _CNN_ just moved us up to #4 on their list of Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats, and Senate control could come down to us.
---
Over the next 12 months, all eyes will be on this battleground state and our race to see if we have the campaign to succeed. That means the infrastructure to stop Mitch McConnell and national Republicans from taking back the Senate and the White House.
Now, with less than 24 hours left, I’m asking:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can to help reach our 72-hour goal to raise $30,000, hold PA’s critical seat, and defend our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231107-2?refcode=em20231107-2&refcode2=1083_552475_U2pqAW&akid=1083%2E552475%2EU2pqAW)**
**[Rush a donation »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231107-2?refcode=em20231107-2&refcode2=1083_552475_U2pqAW&akid=1083%2E552475%2EU2pqAW)**
Thank you,
Tiernan Donohue
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1083%2E552475%2EU2pqAW)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1083%2E552475%2EU2pqAW)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

# **Today is Election Day!**
If you have an election in your state and haven’t cast your ballot yet, GO VOTE! (We promise this email will be here when you return.)
---
This is one of our favorite days of the year here at Fair Fight.
**Election Day is a reminder of our power when we come together and cast our ballots — and this year is no different. **
This election cycle, Fair Fight has endorsed candidates who are champions of voting rights — who will work hard to protect access to the ballot box and keep their communities moving forward.
With your support, we equipped candidates with resources to fundraise, organize, and advocate to protect the freedom to vote for years to come. Just last month, we helped Louisiana Rep. Mandie Landry — a strong voting rights advocate — win her primary election.
**We’ll soon know the results of today’s elections. But our work will be far from over. The 2024 elections are now less than one year away — and we’re already getting ready to help voters make their voices heard. **
In 2020 and 2021, this team helped drive record-breaking voter turnout among Georgians, particularly young voters and voters of color — flipping the Peach State blue for the first time in decades and securing a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. Cynics said it wasn’t possible, but because of generous folks like you, we proved them wrong.
Now, experts are predicting that Georgia will once again be a swing state. And that means we can’t wait until next year to start making key investments to help every eligible voter make their voice heard.
**We need to ramp up critical programs right away — and for that, we need this team.**
[**Make a $20 donation today to help fuel Fair Fight’s 2024 work and protect the freedom to vote across the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72976266/436985983/-1609390824?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231107_eday_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU4NzU5NC1hYzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Upted1ouWyrWcsN6adskP8InAc3nkKV4U1I4QTA7D8=)
Thank you for being a part of this grassroots movement,
The Fair Fight Team

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It’s not just about the stickers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
There’s something special about Election Day.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1808%2E4032634%2Exj-1iJ)
---
There’s something special about Election Day. It’s not just the fun “I Voted” stickers — although those go a long way. It’s about our power when we come together in our democracy. Special interests have piles of money, but we have our voices and votes. If we use both of them on Election Day, we can win. And today, there’s plenty at stake. To name just a few: Ohio could pass a constitutional amendment protecting the right to an abortion. Virginia could keep anti-abortion rights extremists from seizing power and ramming through a state ban. Pennsylvania could elect judges who’ll uphold the rule of law, defend free and fair elections, and protect basic freedoms. And in Massachusetts and across the country, the outcomes of state and local races will touch people’s lives for years to come. **Up and down the ballot, Republican extremists are running to restrict even more rights, slash even more resources, and twist our government so it only works for the wealthy and well-connected.** **Not on our watch.** [**This Election Day, if you’re ready to keep fighting for a government that works for working people, and if you can make a financial contribution at this time, will you pitch in $28 or any amount to support our re-election campaign and grow our grassroots movement?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/969?amount=28&t=8&akid=1808%2E4032634%2Exj-1iJ) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. Have you reminded someone to vote? Check in with a friend, a family member, a coworker, a teammate, a neighbor out walking their dog — anyone who could use a nudge. We wouldn’t want them to miss out on a free sticker.

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/969?t=12&akid=1808%2E4032634%2Exj-1iJ)

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: We proved them wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72976286/436986119/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.07_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjYwOGZmYi1hYzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuM7AEDuKqqeB8r5PFCWfEpLK48r88D9HAFRu1avlQI=)
Peter, last November, this team proved the pundits and pollsters wrong by winning Colorado’s newly-created 8th district! **We did it, because we all came together, met voters where they were, and spoke plainly about the issues that matter.**

We can win again in 2024, but I’ll need your help ahead of this critical election year. **[Peter, can I count on your $8 donation to help me win reelection to Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72976287/436986120/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.07_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjYwOGZmYi1hYzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuM7AEDuKqqeB8r5PFCWfEpLK48r88D9HAFRu1avlQI=)**

Last year, we spoke about freedom. We spoke about fighting for an economy that works for all. We spoke about protecting the environment and putting people - _as well as their clean air and water_ \- over corporate profits.

Now, we need to win back the Democratic House majority and move the needle on our most pressing issues, and we need to make sure we keep winning in Colorado. **Republicans are laser-focused on flipping swing seats in blue states like mine, Peter. So, it’s critical that we prepare for 2024 now.**

This November - _just like they did last year_ \- all the pollsters and pundits are saying this election is a complete toss-up. Republicans are already spending millions of dollars to attack me, so I really need your help to win this.

**[Can I count on you to pitch in to my campaign, so I can keep up the work in Congress? We need to keep this district blue to win nationwide, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72976288/436986121/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.07_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjYwOGZmYi1hYzdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuM7AEDuKqqeB8r5PFCWfEpLK48r88D9HAFRu1avlQI=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: John Padora
subject: We’ve got a year to win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:

subject: BLM & Hamas: A match made in hell
body:
Dave Rubin breaks it down on the Sean Spicer Show | | | | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9a27266a2f)
|
---
|
---
# BLM & Hamas: A match made in hell
Thousands of Pro-Palestine protestors chanting "F-Joe Biden" and "Allahu akbar" descended upon the White House this weekend. Dave Rubin joined us to discuss the implications and the dismal future of Joe Biden. Most recent polls show Trump winning by 3 to 10% points coming into the 2024 election. Will the election today in Virginia flip the state senate to the Republicans?
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=865ecf528c&e=f6564bbe3b)
Don’t forget to subscribe and hit the bell to get notified every time a new episode drops.
Would also greatly appreciate it if you could subscribe to the audio version and give us a 5 star review. It really makes a big difference in growing this show and being able to put out great content at no cost to you all.
| [Subscribe to the podcast here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1f7150e544&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
# Stories I’m Reading...
[Senate Republicans unveil border security demands for Ukraine funding](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=26430e54be&e=f6564bbe3b) — The Hill
[As Black Voters Drift to Trump, Biden’s Allies Say They Have Work to Do](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0496796699&e=f6564bbe3b) — NyTimes
[Meet the Anti-Semitic Spiritual Guru on Cori Bush’s Payroll](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=56579ce591&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Washington Free Beacon
[Over 50 DNC Employees Sign Letter Urging Biden to Call for Israeli Cease-Fire in Gaza](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e5af169542&e=f6564bbe3b) — via HuffPost
[CT judge overturns results of Bridgeport mayoral primary, just days before election](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=31e0925b49&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CT Public
[New York Times Writer Resigns After Signing Letter Protesting the Israel-Gaza War](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2c3d9b9fd5&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NY Times
[Republican National Committee Announces Tougher Criteria for Fourth Debate ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=916fd5908f&e=f6564bbe3b)— via NY Times
|

# “Debate Prep” is back tomorrow morning before the 3rd GOP debate...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4f03ccd0d3&e=f6564bbe3b)
Tomorrow morning at 9a ET, veteran journal Mark Halperin, former presidential candidate and Governor Scott Walker, veteran campaign strategist Gail Gitcho and I will all be on a zoom call to we’ve named “Debate Prep” to give you all an inside look into what we expect to see at the debate, how the candidates are preparing, what we expect from the moderators and more.
If you sign up below, we’ll be taking some questions from the audience. See you tomorrow.
| [Sign up here to join us live](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5559b47009&e=f6564bbe3b)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Share your thoughts before I take the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Together, we can take America First to the next level.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=487f8dabb50a4b7586e37594438c8f30&_t=yJxEfjQyW5KxK9s5b9fd6WW7iBxRAsoHxnupx6fNCh0TdNAvf_wuYrwkgL04rF4bY_3-S-EetfT6KM2m8uc-YvI-dOUpFjHotkRDWglbId0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=487f8dabb50a4b7586e37594438c8f30&_t=yJxEfjQyW5KxK9s5b9fd6WW7iBxRAsoHxnupx6fNCh0TdNAvf_wuYrwkgL04rF4bY_3-S-EetfT6KM2m8uc-YvI-dOUpFjHotkRDWglbId0%3D)

|
Fellow American - the third Presidential Debate is just days away.

Before tomorrow night, I want to hear from you:

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Clearly, the priorities of the Biden administration are not shared by most conservatives, libertarians, or Republicans. In fact, the policies advanced by Team Biden often resemble those of failed Leftist governments of the past 100 years. From the weaponization of the legal system, youth indoctrination in public education, and government censorship to fiscal mismanagement, naive foreign policy, and political corruption, the Biden administration is failing.

So, as we head into 2024 and another presidential election cycle,**what are your top priorities? What concerns you most? What issues will make the difference in how you vote and who you support?**

subject: Are you ready to break the GOP supermajority?

body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Dear Peter,
We are thrilled to extend to you a special invitation for an upcoming event on November 11th. Joining forces with the Senate Democratic Caucus and the Tennessee Democratic Party, we are proud to introduce our collaborative initiative: "Take Back Tennessee."
SIGN ME UP! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktn]
"Take Back Tennessee" is a day-long summit where we will offer training, support, and networking opportunities for candidates, staff, and volunteers committed to electing Democrats throughout our state.
Don't miss out! Whether you plan to participate in campaigns this cycle or simply want to be a part of this movement, we encourage you to join us on November 11th.
Please RSVP or consider becoming a sponsor for this event by clicking here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktn]
We look forward to your presence.
Sincerely,
TN House Democrats
The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus consists of the Democratic members of the Tennessee House of Representatives.
The chief roles of the Caucus include, in part:
*
Planning
and
executing
legislative
strategies
and
policies
that
reflect
the
values
of
Tennessee
Democrats;
*
Delivering
legislative
and
political
communications;
*
Reelecting
Democratic
House
incumbents;
and,
*
Recruiting
and
supporting
Democratic
House
candidates.
The Tennessee House Democrats must raise the money necessary to support its work. The money raised by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus will be directly and strategically invested into its efforts to break the GOP supermajority.

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, We are thrilled to extend to you a special invitation for an upcoming event on November 11th. Joining forces with the Senate Democratic Caucus and the Tennessee Democratic Party, we are proud to introduce our collaborative initiative: "Take Back Tennessee." SIGN ME UP! [] "Take Back Tennessee" is a day-long summit where we will offer training, support, and networking opportunities for candidates, staff, and volunteers committed to electing Democrats throughout our state. Don't miss out! Whether you plan to participate in campaigns this cycle or simply want to be a part of this movement, we encourage you to join us on November 11th. Please RSVP or consider becoming a sponsor for this event by clicking here! [] We look forward to your presence. Sincerely, TN House Democrats The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus consists of the Democratic members of the Tennessee House of Representatives. The chief roles of the Caucus include, in part: Planning and executing legislative strategies and policies that reflect the values of Tennessee Democrats; Delivering legislative and political communications; Reelecting Democratic House incumbents; and, Recruiting and supporting Democratic House candidates. The Tennessee House Democrats must raise the money necessary to support its work. The money raised by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus will be directly and strategically invested into its efforts to break the GOP supermajority. CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] follow along: [] [] [] [] Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn Treasurer Tennessee House Democratic Caucus P. O.
