I promise that Kirsten is spending every moment in Washington fighting for the issues that matter most. By introducing legislation to lower the cost of living, certify the Equal Rights Amendment and help seniors retire with dignity, she's working each and every day to win progress for families like yours.
But now, Kirsten needs your help. **Let me explain why she's set these weekly goals and why it's so,_so_ important that we hit them:**
1) With the presidency and control of Congress on the ballot, running a winning campaign will be **more expensive than _ever_ before.**

2) New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades. They're going to be **calling on their biggest megadonors to defeat Kirsten** and bankroll endless attack ads against her.

3) We're about to head into the election year, and **Mitch McConnell will be looking for any sign of weakness amongst Democratic incumbents**. We must show him that Kirsten's seat is NOT up for grabs.
We need Kirsten's bold voice in the Senate — and our narrow Democratic majority could be riding on what happens right here in New York. **[_That's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 to help us get back on track before 11:59 p.m. tonight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72977676/436991507/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4557-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM0YzQ0ZS1iMTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4szCvCcAGkgiys0KsML4ooGex-BYC4x45X9Kw_6UIEI=)**

**Please, friend, will you rush $5 or more now to defend our Senate majority and ensure Kirsten can keep on fighting for progress in the Senate? Here's that personalized donation link that I made for you:[ https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72977677/436991508/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4557-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM0YzQ0ZS1iMTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4szCvCcAGkgiys0KsML4ooGex-BYC4x45X9Kw_6UIEI=)**
We just need around 800 Democrats to step up before tonight at midnight to hit this goal — and I'm really counting on you to be one of them, friend.
Thanks so much,

Emily
Team Gillibrand

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. body:
Peter,

It’s Election Day in multiple states today, and one thing is clear: Abortion is on the ballot.

In Ohio, Virginia, and Kentucky, the elections could set a roadmap for the future: One that is equitable and keeps the government out of personal health decisions, or one that is set by the radical GOP’s oppressive agenda.

In Ohio, voters are fighting to pass Issue 1, which would enshrine abortion rights into law, and permanently overturn the Governor DeWine-supported six-week ban, one of the most draconian anti-abortion laws in the nation.

In Virginia, Governor Youngkin is using a proposed 13-week abortion ban as a Trojan horse, trying to appear “moderate” as he spends millions on supporting candidates who will further his radical GOP agenda in the Virginia legislature.

In Kentucky, Governor Andy Beshear - a Democratic governor in a red state - is running for a second term against a Trump-backed candidate who supports the severe abortion limits the radical GOP has already passed.

We are well aware that abortion will be a huge issue in 2024, too. Every dollar you give today can help us forge a path to retaking a Majority in the Georgia House where we can protect the right to health care and fight back against the six-week abortion ban enacted by Georgia’s radical GOP.

Give today: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=110723_DemocracyInAction_link],

Today, we’ll see democracy in action. It can serve as inspiration for our continuing fight for the rights of all Georgians.

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=110723_DemocracyInAction_button2]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC

Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/edmJkbvXJkS-zzBKLH_fFA2?unsubscribedata=XnbdCNJ%2BPYq1bG2Ih6heglMegz6%2BoY%2BTUxdovMZZGjBo0J1TRuhbeYK9GQL%2B%2FraKGL6owtrXxEt2sybD%2F0k4ajSz%2BLL3fCKb7FwKx%2BBcBJr5PIEkXJlWGh%2FlsisnPL28lWAVis3PFsGl0V4H%2B6Y6HeA5kmEgsPZ%2FZ59T3z7tqx6wFEL4oZzcMp1lBRGrwhR3a8DcK58YDJNjMYcQCi4FdQ4HiLsASZLFss1PZPJsMvfHoy4J0Pm0%2BBiEB0c6ENnbO97lYuHXsZSSNYNfxX5RZmw3IZVymUmqB%2Bl1CYcMLuv32BMMT0grwxaT3oZlaf3mAlo07QpMWRLd32HwECpQ6K9RrGdEpq5X%2FjdqUDe7bsaormyg1SXt0fmJYnuXeFzoKpWZ%2B8jC%2BBmFWXRpQhVN5qABXXhfyWSYxg3yjdFdSQuGkWee6zyY1Pi%2BZ5Bv7W1Q .

body:
Political leaders must stop genocide and see Palestinians as human beings too. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTviq3PFkZQD2yBPSZyYXEPUHwZHd_aO3iD5lTry6RQVhlTfqh__Lz_miRjYGLJucABAl3alrt35F6oMXsQzcx-m7TX6aKmI7L0IqLV8Tj0KAtB6__x1iON3ol6aXpXyjAaZ-qCbFlLRQPhdZvjo6Pidq2BbFiU8NbgbluvgpYQjCosyyGeaaOfLH3PgRwMoKBM9KOHZ4hXQ6MX-aOqhDUXlA/413/QQ26kHRMRO-zVvzl7yY_nQ/h0/5pe3i7eHcM8K4yGNuZovolYyn5e4hwe4JbEYKqc5UG8)
---
Friend, This weekend, 300,000 Americans protested in Washington, DC for a ceasefire and to end U.S. funding for Israel’s military. They were joined by millions of people around the country and the world, who are horrified that **after a month of relentless bombing, Israel’s government has killed more than 10,000 Palestinians in Gaza—including more than 4,000 children.** In recent days, an Israeli Minister suggested dropping a nuclear bomb on Gaza and said that anyone waving a Palestinian flag “shouldn’t continue living on the face of the earth.” Israeli soldiers filmed themselves abusing and torturing Palestinians in the West Bank—where residents of entire villages have fled after armed intimidation from Israeli settlers. **In the U.S., many Congressmembers are egging on this bloodshed.** Some have said that there are no innocent Palestinians. Last week, a majority of Representatives voted to send $14.3 billion to Israel’s military with no conditions on protecting civilians. And President Biden wants to send billions more of our taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military in secret, without notifying or getting approval from Congress. [**Please sign now to tell President Biden and Congress: We demand a ceasefire now. No more U.S. tax dollars for weapons and bombs used to slaughter Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Qo6x2qTvq3U1ZI__ehebZG9OVngjlskuvlojyxb_nvQussvNsAqS0zeWGccZygaXjXWwJ6aHNlUJpMUhEPHO-lKfPP2mCR6Bct7wRYdXEORhrXxMqPG7mkOzK9UuIvZ47fOpmrgLD2llsvAFf3SgH9BI5EvjAvta8TiBTmuXunRaoXHh2A5tQjlND6VrlgPAPUHNnDEb3f29Y-8yoJu7V94AbF0twB-loi0JOuK_ejZ2ZLPfM0eg_bzsiMceEo_nyMCFgeT3oBTZuLlCsjAMSa5lXVoIdft25tPaHhWej-HqeLkENp8ByuJaHtNZd2cJT9eQltlyshy1cuSowMFAyD1oQXspGtddOshKSlJTBwP0iEbrHgLFNAZ_fsbpz92P4K4heT--JUMelWkdHSOGHZacz_EsyKbBbNKz9GWeJOMc/413/QQ26kHRMRO-zVvzl7yY_nQ/h1/D5oSkLQf4UT7qDsCOudD7EBHMjv7QG2wlwhUIoE67zE) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Qo6x2qTvq3U1ZI__ehebZG9OVngjlskuvlojyxb_nvQussvNsAqS0zeWGccZygaXjXWwJ6aHNlUJpMUhEPHO-lKfPP2mCR6Bct7wRYdXEORhrXxMqPG7mkOzK9UuIvZ47KJ3ipa9grzd_z9n2viJP8qgwT_9LCaP7JEq5KqzC_CTu6jJ6gf2GPIoaZ4sGKikXvm4xyvo6ykKDAzq5tbcfL4ItDlYHYDDZVLxWBcqYITXdO89UjFTAmrTCkpH7Sr2yb955LtLAVdTb1-fVVvesakq7Dy_RBcHQ23C3G-CPgFnwfkXMFRJFME8vpwQHlW9o1JuRj_EE1oIumjippDd5HiTWyMi3Yatv8xGu5hcMsXzJ3EzmK6OX9QnZaQzGXxx_TfuRbEw8tBkFrRfyaASkfU3CdGHbAecgi0Q8eG4UyKo/413/QQ26kHRMRO-zVvzl7yY_nQ/h2/cB94otNc--Ea_1g8Cew2lcjeD6qkkOUwwUrqtBpp6LE)
---
Each day that passes without a ceasefire brings more death and destruction upon innocent civilians who have nowhere safe to go, the majority being children.
Polls show that overwhelming majorities of U.S. voters across the political spectrum support a ceasefire to save countless lives. But they’re not being heard by Congress.
In this time of intense repression and criminalization of people speaking up to recognize Palestinians’ humanity, 10 House Republicans just co-sponsored a**** horrifying bill to ban Palestinians from entering the United States and to expel Palestinians who are not permanent U.S. residents.
Amidst all this, many American politicians and reporters want to focus on critiquing my use of the term “genocide.”
[**Please add your name to tell President Biden and Members of Congress: Support a ceasefire now, push Israel’s government to lift the blockade on Gaza, and end U.S. aid to Israel’s military.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Qo6x2qTvq3U1ZI__ehebZG9OVngjlskuvlojyxb_nvQussvNsAqS0zeWGccZygaXjXWwJ6aHNlUJpMUhEPHO-lKfPP2mCR6Bct7wRYdXEORhrXxMqPG7mkOzK9UuIvZ47N73MNc0jwpLAbqG_T7OsHShc6UjNaG6qAudRFkt8MJRbH_t5ek-fZMxAegrCYriiDijt4XaZbYFVwo83-CP6WTmfYfllHnJLc8Rru42VGU3hynQJTz6Nqiv2HaspAQdZGXZmU4WwkIgJ7-9fggrI7fS_AyDDKWTEuV0BK3uGBnivBnizxYGYQckNb1LUDqCkrF_94FuIgdSuEweFSADZg6yQvUpHNSAa7pTkaLDXQU9FwBYdmm-Aixse5xmRsIa2_tIBlKZ2_iUiW5YKHe8_0EWrLqCKjNsy82jEx1XqTFM/413/QQ26kHRMRO-zVvzl7yY_nQ/h3/Xif8FifcA3WMJWMV7Adzr6A5qUkWScORryOWMVvkx0M)
Thank you,
Rashida

Subject: Sign now to tell Biden and Congress: Ceasefire now!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This week, the Israeli military bombed Gaza’s largest refugee camp multiple times. Then they bombed at least four schools sheltering displaced people from the refugee camp, according to the UN.
These are clear war crimes, but the political leaders supporting this genocide must not see Palestinians as human beings. They are allowing it to happen by not calling for a ceasefire.
Right now, Arab Americans and Muslim Americans feel unseen and betrayed by our own government, as Congress and President Biden’s administration refuse to acknowledge or value Palestinian lives. It's chipping away at my soul, so I can only imagine how others are feeling.
Across the country, thousands of Jewish Americans are standing up and saying not in our names, but are met with cruelty. Anti-war advocates are speaking up, but are being dismissed by President Biden.
This call for a ceasefire is beyond 18 members of Congress or an organization, it is a movement that keeps getting stronger. The vast majority of Americans now want a ceasefire—including 80% of Democratic voters and a clear majority of Republican voters.
[**Please sign now to tell President Biden and Congress: We demand a ceasefire now! Palestinian Americans in Michigan and across the country have lost 20 or more family members in the past few weeks of bombing.
We’re watching video after video of dead children and parents under rubble, but the President we helped elect has disputed Palestinian death tolls. The American people will remember.
To the President of the U.S.: The American people are not with you on this one. You need to join with the majority of Americans and support a ceasefire now to save as many lives as possible.
[**Please sign and share now to demand President Biden and the U.S. Congress stop the genocide and support a ceasefire now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Qo6x2qTvq3U1ZI__ehebZG9OVngjlskuvlojyxb_nvQussvNsAqS0zeWGccZygaXjXWwJ6aHNlUJpMUhEPHO-lKfPP2mCR6Bct7wRYdXEORhrXxMqPG7mkOzK9UuIvZ476oilQOtx9IjAwtWMFKfF85RjQqXc4DNVlL2jTPSRz_RbUx-nGwXt4BLYpuonHuVSxV_G0Vg_K5hCXJ38ms4Uk8Ur-zPpYQfRPZH_V4wf08YlPh89jPlEYs32Z8wCmPvb-KYVXrjCYdsZOT4g5GFhWJ-SxBqMs-LWHnW4pjFMmDRFgVP9_XD7ktGfm52XvLcq4zu1nsN2MIdzadfEoMTKhRl6HBFNJZyOYM8PqKB1bts1nJv6QwMIWej9Bd4I9vnIbRGsh-fddSDgvKXv5JKwgdW2pDKy6SobySVcwaWNyr0/413/QQ26kHRMRO-zVvzl7yY_nQ/h6/EwbjQOCB6kQ6jq3T2okkro9uqhOELoHouhysTF7v5s8)

clean_body: Political leaders must stop genocide and see Palestinians as human beings too. | | | Friend, This weekend, 300,000 Americans protested in Washington, DC for a ceasefire and to end U.S. funding for Israel’s military. They were joined by millions of people around the country and the world, who are horrified that after a month of relentless bombing, Israel’s government has killed more than 10,000 Palestinians in Gaza—including more than 4,000 children. In recent days, an Israeli Minister suggested dropping a nuclear bomb on Gaza and said that anyone waving a Palestinian flag “shouldn’t continue living on the face of the earth.” Israeli soldiers filmed themselves abusing and torturing Palestinians in the West Bank—where residents of entire villages have fled after armed intimidation from Israeli settlers. In the U.S., many Congressmembers are egging on this bloodshed. Some have said that there are no innocent Palestinians. Last week, a majority of Representatives voted to send $14.3 billion to Israel’s military with no conditions on protecting civilians. And President Biden wants to send billions more of our taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military in secret, without notifying or getting approval from Congress. | Each day that passes without a ceasefire brings more death and destruction upon innocent civilians who have nowhere safe to go, the majority being children. Polls show that overwhelming majorities of U.S. voters across the political spectrum support a ceasefire to save countless lives. But they’re not being heard by Congress. In this time of intense repression and criminalization of people speaking up to recognize Palestinians’ humanity, 10 House Republicans just co-sponsored a** horrifying bill to ban Palestinians from entering the United States and to expel Palestinians who are not permanent U.S. residents. Amidst all this, many American politicians and reporters want to focus on critiquing my use of the term “genocide.” Thank you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Sat, Nov 4, 2023 Subject: Sign now to tell Biden and Congress: Ceasefire now! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, the Israeli military bombed Gaza’s largest refugee camp multiple times. Then they bombed at least four schools sheltering displaced people from the refugee camp, according to the UN. These are clear war crimes, but the political leaders supporting this genocide must not see Palestinians as human beings. They are allowing it to happen by not calling for a ceasefire. Right now, Arab Americans and Muslim Americans feel unseen and betrayed by our own government, as Congress and President Biden’s administration refuse to acknowledge or value Palestinian lives. It's chipping away at my soul, so I can only imagine how others are feeling. Across the country, thousands of Jewish Americans are standing up and saying not in our names, but are met with cruelty. Anti-war advocates are speaking up, but are being dismissed by President Biden. This call for a ceasefire is beyond 18 members of Congress or an organization, it is a movement that keeps getting stronger. The vast majority of Americans now want a ceasefire—including 80% of Democratic voters and a clear majority of Republican voters. Palestinian Americans in Michigan and across the country have lost 20 or more family members in the past few weeks of bombing. We’re watching video after video of dead children and parents under rubble, but the President we helped elect has disputed Palestinian death tolls. The American people will remember. To the President of the U.S.: The American people are not with you on this one. You need to join with the majority of Americans and support a ceasefire now to save as many lives as possible. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. If you can, please. Or . Thank you for continuing to advocate for our shared humanity. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Peter — I had to reach out to thank you for your strong and continued support. With the support of grassroots donors here in Tennessee and across the country, we were able to launch our Run Tennessee Fund which will support candidates in every county that will help break up the supermajority in the statehouse and hand the gavel to Hakeem Jeffries so national Democrats can continue to do the work of the people. Recently, I was fortunate to speak with Democrats in Williamson County at the Unite for Democracy Celebration and at a joint county party fundraiser for Tipton and Lauderdale counties. I was in awe of the energy from candidates and constituents in those rooms. I know, it feels far away, but Election Day 2024 will be here before we know it. At the core of everything we do from now until then are the hardworking, everyday people of Tennessee. Tennesseans that deserve fairly and fully funded schools. Tennesseans that deserve good paying jobs that keep food on tables and roofs over heads. Tennesseans that deserve equal access to the ballot box and candidates that inspire them to engage in every election. Tennesseans that deserve a full range of affordable healthcare, including the right to make their own reproductive decisions. **This is who and what we’re fighting for, and I’m honored you’re in this fight with us. Thank you, Peter.** — Hendrell Remus, Chair [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72978865/436995614/-1166922630?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRkMjBlYy1iNTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0puOrix655jvnl7AnQI10_Teu-HduSgdP7dX9gsPUk=) | | P.S.: If you didn’t get a chance to make a founding contribution to our Run Tennessee Fund before the end of October, you still have time to make an impact! [****Pitch in $10 or more right now to help us expand this training to more Democrats up and down the ticket.****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72978867/436995622/-1166922630?amount=10&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRkMjBlYy1iNTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0puOrix655jvnl7AnQI10_Teu-HduSgdP7dX9gsPUk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72978869/436995628/-1446216713?express_lane=true&amount=2&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRkMjBlYy1iNTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0puOrix655jvnl7AnQI10_Teu-HduSgdP7dX9gsPUk=)

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama radically transformed our country
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kguAcWSak5Z4gSSWtl8-Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnLWvwP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMTA3X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplRsWwSmUBPi4rUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kguAcWSak5Z4gSSWtl8-Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnLWvwP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMTA3X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplRsWwSmUBPi4rUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kguAcWSak5Z4gSSWtl8-Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnLWvwP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMTA3X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplRsWwSmUBPi4rUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kguAcWSak5Z4gSSWtl8-Iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnLWvwP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMTA3X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplRsWwSmUBPi4rUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

subject: Endorse Lee for Congress
body:
There’s only one endorsement that I’ve been trying to get that I haven’t received: Yours. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7621433d4a81/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12663406?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=4dcea6da46&e=91a702298f)
Friend,
Last week, Governor Joe Lombardo stepped up and supported my campaign for Congress to represent NV-04, and so have countless donors and supporters across the country who want to see Republicans hold and expand their majority in the House.
Two weeks ago, Congressman Burgess Owens of Utah endorsed my run as well.
There’s only one endorsement that I’ve been trying to get that I haven’t received: Yours.
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=f492cadef9&e=91a702298f)
| [ENDORSE JOHN FOR CONGRESS >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=0b89ce4f21&e=91a702298f)
---
The people of Nevada understand better than anyone the challenges that the Biden Administration and their allies in the House have brought to our state. Crime is skyrocketing, law enforcement morale is down, inflation is hurting our bank accounts, and Congress has done little to stop it.
**As your next Congressman for NV-04, I will use my knowledge as a former Mayor and job creator to see that our economy rebounds and that law and order are brought back to our cities and communities.** We the People deserve nothing less.
[_**If you agree with my priorities, I’d be honored to have your endorsement as we continue to kick off this campaign for Congress >>**_](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=3963b4f2f0&e=91a702298f)
| [SEND YOUR SUPPORT TO MAYOR JOHN >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=1ed4f45c7e&e=91a702298f)

Two weeks ago, Congressman Burgess Owens of Utah endorsed my run as well. There’s only one endorsement that I’ve been trying to get that I haven’t received: Yours. | The people of Nevada understand better than anyone the challenges that the Biden Administration and their allies in the House have brought to our state. Crime is skyrocketing, law enforcement morale is down, inflation is hurting our bank accounts, and Congress has done little to stop it. As your next Congressman for NV-04, I will use my knowledge as a former Mayor and job creator to see that our economy rebounds and that law and order are brought back to our cities and communities. We the People deserve nothing less. | | For Nevada, Fmr Mayor John LeeCandidate for Congress, NV-04 | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 John Lee for Congress. All rights reserved.

In my time serving Tucsonans as Mayor, we’ve been able to invest in our infrastructure like never before — including improving our roadways, creating a more climate resilient Tucson, and expanding affordable housing for low-income and working families.
I’m committed to making sure that Tucson continues to lead in combating climate change, and I’ve taken the bold steps to keep us on track to become a carbon neutral city by 2030.
Our Climate Action and Adaptation Plan was created and passed with input from Tucsonans. I worked alongside our Council to direct $80 million into ongoing and new climate projects.
[**We’re not finished yet, folks — that’s why I’m personally asking for your support right now. name: Future Forum PAC
subject: Mike Johnson is playing politics
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:

clean_body: | = We have a key race update for you, team: The Cook Political Report just released their latest 2024 House ratings forecast: AZ-01 remains a TOSS UP. This confirms what we already know -- the path to the House majority runs through AZ‐01. = | **= Our GOP opponent David Schweikert has proven time and again that he is not a true representative of AZ-01. He is a far-right extremist who voted for the new anti-democracy, anti-woman, and anti-freedom Speaker of the House. He wants a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. He votes against the best interests of Arizonans , but then takes the credit for Democrat achievements like the Inflation Reduction Act. He voted to overturn the 2020 election results. But here’s the good news: The recent toss-up report shows that political experts see that Schweikert is vulnerable. We have a golden opportunity to unseat Schweikert, give AZ-01 the real representation it deserves, and flip the House majority from red to blue -- but we must start the hard work now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Team Marlene Galán-Woods | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . _"The future rewards those who press on... I don't have time to complain. I'm going to press on." _
**President Barack Obama**

As voting rights and the future of electoral maps hang in the balance -- [**our mission is clear.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72979718/436998857/-1365437853?refcode=20231107_AOTL_F_Eday_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyMWYyNGZlLWI4N2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2GpoK4Kyg5VJ-tdP2LchmKrOBhfykfHP-gdZmCHJgzA=)
[**All On The Line, powered by the dedicated efforts of grassroots supporters like you, is leading the charge to protect fairness in democracy. We understand the gravity of this moment and the impact it holds on our nation's future.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72979719/436998858/-1365437853?refcode=20231107_AOTL_F_Eday_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyMWYyNGZlLWI4N2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2GpoK4Kyg5VJ-tdP2LchmKrOBhfykfHP-gdZmCHJgzA=) In Virginia, extreme, anti-democratic agendas threaten our rights and freedoms. **We refuse to let these forces prevail. Instead, we press on.** In Pennsylvania, there are candidates on the ballot who have questioned the integrity of the 2020 election, threatening the checks and balances that safeguard voters' participation in democracy. **This is a fight we cannot afford to lose. We press on.**
---

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Did you see Peter Meijer’s logo?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=777%2E135344%2EkXyrtm)

Friend --
Here's something we didn't want you to miss: In a direct attempt to link his campaign to his family’s wealth and influence across the state, Peter Meijer copied his family’s logo from the mid 80s through the early 2000s as his official campaign logo. All Michiganders know that logo like the back of their hands.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231107-1-30&t=2&akid=777%2E135344%2EkXyrtm)
Peter Meijer, who just got in the race yesterday, is the grandson of the Meijer founder. Meijer has more than 240 locations in Michigan and across the Midwest. Most Michiganders grew up shopping at the massive chain store. And now his campaign logo is identical to the store's logo that was used starting in 1984.
Subtle, right?
It's actually pretty fitting that Peter Meijer repurposed his family's company logo for his campaign. He comes from one of the nine billionaire families in Michigan, and he knows that, given his voting record, tying himself to the popular chain will really help him. Local media spent his first day asking about the logo and he tap danced by saying _“if I spell my name in lowercase, it looks like the current logo. If I make it all caps, it looks like the former logo.”_
In reality, the association makes sense when you consider he’s self-funded his campaigns in the past.
Elissa may not have the Meijer name, but she knows how to stand up for working families across Michigan and take on large corporations. **[Together we are going to defend Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats and protect the Senate majority.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231107-1-30&t=3&akid=777%2E135344%2EkXyrtm)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Michigan Republican Party Retained ACLJ to Fight Democrats' Lawfare
body:
While this case targets candidate Donald Trump, it creates a dangerous infringement on party rights bigger than this election cycle. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
**The Michigan Republican Party has retained the American Center for Law and Justice to Fight Democrats' Lawfare**
The Michigan Republican Party (MIGOP) has retained the American Center for Law and Justice (ACLJ) to file an amicus brief with the Michigan Court of Claims. MIGOP has a clear and unique interest at stake in this case. The ACLJ will help vindicate the Party's rights in court – starting with the Party’s First Amendment speech and associational rights. The ACLJ will argue to defend those rights, as well as the MIGOP’s autonomy, procedures, and processes, all of which the election statutes and the U.S. Constitution protect. MIGOP deserves to be heard and to have the opportunity to protect those interests.
The lawsuit is being brought in order to have the Michigan Courts, the Secretary of State (currently a Democrat), and the attorney general decide eligibility for a primary and general election ballot. While this case targets candidate Donald Trump, it creates a dangerous infringement on party rights bigger than this election cycle.
The lawsuit was brought by four individuals, represented by the former chair of the Michigan Democrat Party, who regardless of whether they have voted as a Republican or not do not represent the interests of the state political committee. The state political committee has been granted the exclusive use to determine the method by which we (from within our association) select candidates for national, state, and local offices who run as Republicans.

| [Donate to Protect our Kid’s Freedom](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=530657edc5&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: A new poll has Ruben down one point against Kari Lake.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We need you to rush $5 right away.
#

Peter,
A leaked poll from the Senate GOP shows us down by one point in a three-way matchup between Kari Lake, Kyrsten Sinema, and Ruben.
Kari Lake could win this race, and we need you to rush $5 right away to make sure that doesn’t happen. If that’s all you need to hear, use this link:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/11-7-23-Poll**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231107-2-f&t=1&akid=1418%2E734936%2EWUaeor)
But if you need a bit more, let us explain why your donation is so important right now.
1. Rumor has it that this poll was commissioned by the GOP for Republican Senate Chiefs of Staff. That tells us they’re trying to build support for Kari Lake. If they’re successful she could see a ton of fresh endorsements — and more importantly, a ton of donations.

2. Kari Lake lost by less than 1% in 2022. If she’s up by 1% a year out from Election Day, we’re in trouble. And if Kari Lake can win in Arizona, she could help Donald Trump win, too. For all of us, that’s extremely bad news.

3. This poll is just a snapshot — not the final result. But we’d be foolish not to take it seriously since we’ve led the field in most polls up until now. And that’s why we need you to step up to the plate and chip in today.

We know $5 might not seem like an amount that can win this race. But thousands and thousands of people are reading this email right now, just like you are.
If just a fraction of those people chipped in, we’d have enough resources to win this race and defeat Kari Lake once and for all.
This only works if we all do our part. That’s the simple truth.
[**Please use this link to contribute $5 directly to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. This is important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231107-2-f&t=2&akid=1418%2E734936%2EWUaeor)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231107-2-f&t=3&akid=1418%2E734936%2EWUaeor)
Thank you for your support. We really mean that.
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s sad but true
body:
An all out assault on my Christian faith has been launched by the Left.
| **From the Desk of Speaker Mike Johnson**
---
Friend, It's no secret that I'm a man of faith and place my trust in God at every step of the way, and no matter how hard the media and Democrats try to frame that as a bad thing, I will never apologize for my Christian faith. Jesus Christ is my Lord and Savior, and while that may be a foreign concept to the Socialists in Congress and their propagandists in the media, it isn't to the millions upon millions of hardworking Americans who spent the last two and a half centuries building our country. Since the Obama Administration, the Left has fallen deeper and deeper into the fell clutch of Marxism. **I refuse to accept their extremism, despite the media 's attempts to normalize their agenda.** [**If you 're tired of the GASLIGHTING by the Left and the media as they try to frame us as crazy for opposing their extremism, I'd be humbled to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f585df464de441748ffe0c9f083074dc&_e=ASRbGUARZMlJ26pzbzvyQHgglRtgAgJQtNaAR8karERxg5BRMZAPfShYqeFamnNA6Xl5TMHVbsPItx-Bs48Ut6FlQVNNkUw4oUkRiYD9VbgfEdN2yA83TpQNStryA0MXGxZI-enxtytrdAzhzk6QlUk_2hF50Xos3sXMJOBuxDr3_KME-HHZdo_TIU1AEsgISIJrZZy7lqLbbh4CHtbk6Yd8djkgwrz46Kj35Hm323DQfWfUib2030cFeZL-p3WCnPQnW0P8eG5eqDmqiorIPkGc2rFI6p-icbirQZG1vZ3MJJXtqfBkoSjZv3wPENt-ZXUk0PWCmzmxeT4SmDVZriW2hL6mVR7b0bgWQolFQxs%3D) The Left openly celebrates the extinguishing of innocent and beautiful life through the evil of abortion. The Left has launched what amounts to a crusade in our schools to indoctrinate our children with extreme sexual and gender ideologies, even to the point of legislating away the rights of parents who reject radical transgender hormones and surgeries for children. _**The Left is even taking to the streets of American cities to cheer on Hamas, the Radical Islamic Terrorists who just massacred over 1,000 Israelis in the worst terror attack since 9/11.**_ Yet, the Left still has the audacity to attack me for defending every American's God-given right to bear arms in a time when violent crime is surging and dangerous criminals are being released onto the streets with impunity. **It is clear to every sane American citizen that our country is in the midst of the greatest spiritual crisis in our history.** Our only way out of this mess is for sanity, morality, and decency to once again be the pillars upon which our society stands and flourishes. To be victorious, we must be prepared and willing to fight with even more vigor and intensity than the Left, and that's exactly what I'm going to do. [**If you 're with me, I'd be humbled to have your support as I raise money to elect more conservative leaders to join our majority in Congress.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f585df464de441748ffe0c9f083074dc&_e=ASRbGUARZMlJ26pzbzvyQHgglRtgAgJQtNaAR8karERxg5BRMZAPfShYqeFamnNA6Xl5TMHVbsPItx-Bs48Ut6FlQVNNkUw4oUkRiYD9VbgfEdN2yA83TpQNStryA0MXGxZI-enxtytrdAzhzk6QlUk_2hF50Xos3sXMJOBuxDr3_KME-HHZdo_TIU1AEsgISIJrZZy7lqLbbh4CHtbk6Wmhb6fv0u5eI5yTqs1pedavJoYs9IN67P6ljhfJ7qlGvnl5e1RjBKVH-yQZONoMBF6UM1u40j638GNWBVpYu6mwVjraSl1o0uqEDmjaxNX4uMA-B_Gm5aYElSyKk9O9aczZ7BSRaCv9RwJad3MzFzM%3D) _In Freedom,_ Speaker Mike Johnson

Jesus Christ is my Lord and Savior, and while that may be a foreign concept to the Socialists in Congress and their propagandists in the media, it isn't to the millions upon millions of hardworking Americans who spent the last two and a half centuries building our country. subject: Could be my last email

body:
Friend...

|

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=fd41b15b76884994bc3a27cdd908eef3&_e=VQjbxSU4cwEUC9VgifUPrMOhM5M9nKceGHMgg6YBvglwS8qwJNaJr03sTewAWafX3waixLb7YzuGGl63NxX0EATtvGlX6ilGqksmScvHw1b5GJEA-eY8CMnJRiJGOZkGT-Om7eFe9sgihUq5E8yzwNjxzkBENNPZ9VaxdoWGKZ25TmnIq0RK-pAsrS1SKzLoCEGuGUzLXlBYPc5I6a3VJc35mz49E3CrUZ71tva25sRIh5UYBCnH9ir0AW2zDpUfgAncMrXlUeJllimLLjPGDe1lzV-KwuxR_yxAWHiRlGvkips25kduc6d50_9fXm5d)
Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=fd41b15b76884994bc3a27cdd908eef3&_e=VQjbxSU4cwEUC9VgifUPrMOhM5M9nKceGHMgg6YBvglwS8qwJNaJr03sTewAWafX3waixLb7YzuGGl63NxX0EATtvGlX6ilGqksmScvHw1b5GJEA-eY8CMnJRiJGOZkGT-Om7eFe9sgihUq5E8yzwDrYoBqr-X2RPK_x63R1wa2lzQcbpYTbMhPqoi85Oum2wYh_TQGr9PiN_TarK2-byRdOKObb2Oxc9rdzO7dA31FZgcXBeWGOn8MCwNLFZMWHhBSkqcACD3RI-Ix3Eyd4f0cyjYRuNdqoYFysFNMMuHCFdWEMT1eckS0GTXytI9k4)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=fd41b15b76884994bc3a27cdd908eef3&_e=VQjbxSU4cwEUC9VgifUPrMOhM5M9nKceGHMgg6YBvglwS8qwJNaJr03sTewAWafX3waixLb7YzuGGl63NxX0EATtvGlX6ilGqksmScvHw1b5GJEA-eY8CMnJRiJGOZkGT-Om7eFe9sgihUq5E8yzwIpC1QpJmtRzT2Ai5bXu4au5id6B9pDL3WR1Ri5nieozZgKXe7rFdCHA3KhHkijBF1VXAMhCwHwpunoWDts0IzysvngdqB2ep-won0sNqFXZFFuyjAlF87pNTIjHyNiYD-oeEEiLP1OjwN5LEngrBRxsqGviXaPEkbsNgyK-LLKD)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,
Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Team Engel
subject: One year to go...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
Happy Election Day!
If you haven’t voted yet, it’s not too late. You can find your nearest polling place here. [https://www.azcleanelections.gov/arizona-elections/november-7-2023-election]
Though it’s an off-year, there are still plenty of local issues on which to make your voice heard. Mayor Regina Romero is up for reelection, as well as three Tucson City Council positions — and multiple school bonds are on the ballot.
Today is also a big day for our campaign.
Last year, Kirsten lost this race by one percentage point.
Next year, with your grassroots support, Kirsten will win this race and flip AZ-06 blue.
We have 52 weeks to get out into the district, spread our message, and mobilize undecided voters. Your support now is critical to our success. We’re not exaggerating when we say every bit helps — even taking the time to read this email makes a difference!
Will you chip in $1 now to help Kirsten flip AZ-06 blue? Your generosity helps us take on Kirsten’s Republican opponent and his corporate PAC donors. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110723_ElectionDay_act]
DONATE $1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110723_ElectionDay_act&amount=1] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110723_ElectionDay_act&amount=10] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110723_ElectionDay_act&amount=100]
Thank you so much, and happy voting!
Team Engel

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110723_ElectionDay_act]

name: Defeat Lauren Boebert
subject: not good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
We just finished a meeting about how our November fundraising is going to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72981363/437004332/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODk4NzFjMC1iZTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gNxalRI4i_rS6FfoKrsOCDTwTh6QzmhgH_yZ3i15hzg=&emci=3ebe33d9-bd7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=889871c0-be7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72981366/437004335/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODk4NzFjMC1iZTdkLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gNxalRI4i_rS6FfoKrsOCDTwTh6QzmhgH_yZ3i15hzg=&emci=3ebe33d9-bd7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=889871c0-be7d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
We just finished a meeting about how our November fundraising is going to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert.
**It’s not good news: For the first time ever during this campaign, we’re behind pace and missing our fundraising goals.**
Last year, this was the closest race in the entire country. After the recount was finished, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. We cannot afford to get out-spent again – not if we want to kick Boebert out of Congress.
But we just took a look at the numbers, and we’re $9,257 short of where we need our fundraising to be if Adam is going to win and send Boebert packing in 2024.
There’s still time to close the gap, but Adam’s not taking money from corporate PACs. **If we’re going to defeat Lauren Boebert, we need grassroots donors like you to give whatever you can afford to right now:**

clean_body: We just finished a meeting about how our November fundraising is going to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert. Hello, We just finished a meeting about how our November fundraising is going to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert. It’s not good news: For the first time ever during this campaign, we’re behind pace and missing our fundraising goals. Last year, this was the closest race in the entire country. After the recount was finished, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. We cannot afford to get out-spent again – not if we want to kick Boebert out of Congress. But we just took a look at the numbers, and we’re $9,257 short of where we need our fundraising to be if Adam is going to win and send Boebert packing in 2024. Peter, Abortion is on the ballot TODAY in Virginia. Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin tried — and failed — to ban abortion after 15 weeks in the state, but couldn’t get it through a Democratic-controlled Senate. Now, he’s vowed to try again if Republicans take back the state legislature in just a few weeks. Republicans are going all out to win in Virginia, even initiating a cyber attack against Susanna Gibson meant to shame and humiliate her by publicizing intimate details of her private life — all too familiar to what happened to Katie. Today’s elections promise to be a bellwether for 2024, and show whether reproductive rights still hold the political weight needed to flip elections for Democrats. We’re hoping to prove to Republicans and the rest of the country that we have what it takes to win big next year. Peter -- In almost three years, the Biden-Harris administration has made ZERO progress in addressing the chaos at our southern border

Clearly – we need to take matters into our own hands.

**FIRST:** We need to pass The Secure the Border Act of 2023

**THEN:** Restart construction of the border wall, deploy technology to our borders, and end deadly catch and release.

**NOW:** We need Republicans everywhere to stand with Congressman Roger Williams and support his call to CLOSE our southern border once and for all!

Please, sign our urgent petition supporting common sense border security reform before the midnight deadline.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter -- In almost three years, the Biden-Harris administration has made ZERO progress in addressing the chaos at our southern border Clearly – we need to take matters into our own hands. FIRST: We need to pass The Secure the Border Act of 2023 THEN: Restart construction of the border wall, deploy technology to our borders, and end deadly catch and release. NOW: We need Republicans everywhere to stand with Congressman Roger Williams and support his call to CLOSE our southern border once and for all! His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Less Than One Year Away from the 2024 Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
While the outcome of the 2023 election is in voters’ hands now, the 2024 cycle is already here in a big way.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72982412/437008186/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231107-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyMjg2Zjg4LWMyN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lGEVt9tZc_DkpcsBZNZbpJJ10Ys0TpFXq1exSAFkRzQ=)
---
| Jane Fonda here.

Today is Election Day in key state and local races across the country. That means our candidates in Virginia, Pennsylvania, San Diego, Minneapolis, and New Jersey are doing everything they can to win every last vote before polls close.

That also means _**we’re officially less than one year away from the 2024 election.**_ **Below, I will share some thoughts with you on why 2024 is such a critical moment for combatting the climate crisis at the ballot box, but first,[_can you contribute $10 to make sure we can hit the ground running?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72982413/437008187/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231107-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyMjg2Zjg4LWMyN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lGEVt9tZc_DkpcsBZNZbpJJ10Ys0TpFXq1exSAFkRzQ=)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72982414/437008188/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231107-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyMjg2Zjg4LWMyN2QtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lGEVt9tZc_DkpcsBZNZbpJJ10Ys0TpFXq1exSAFkRzQ=)
---
While the outcome of the 2023 election is in voters’ hands now, the 2024 cycle is already here in a big way. The fossil fuel industry and their elected allies will never rest – _**and neither will we.**_ And 2024 can be no different if we want to secure a livable future for us all.

From approving permits for deadly drilling projects and pipelines to how we power our homes, offices, and public transportation, each office will make decisions that will impact our progress one way or the other. And we can’t stop fighting back against the millions of dollars Big Oil and other corporate polluters are pouring in.

That’s why my climate PAC always endorses climate champions with a track record of climate action who are committed to prioritizing climate progress in office. clean_body: While the outcome of the 2023 election is in voters’ hands now, the 2024 cycle is already here in a big way. | = | Jane Fonda here. Today is Election Day in key state and local races across the country. That means our candidates in Virginia, Pennsylvania, San Diego, Minneapolis, and New Jersey are doing everything they can to win every last vote before polls close. That also means we’re officially less than one year away from the 2024 election. Below, I will share some thoughts with you on why 2024 is such a critical moment for combatting the climate crisis at the ballot box, but first,= | = While the outcome of the 2023 election is in voters’ hands now, the 2024 cycle is already here in a big way. The fossil fuel industry and their elected allies will never rest – and neither will we. And 2024 can be no different if we want to secure a livable future for us all. From approving permits for deadly drilling projects and pipelines to how we power our homes, offices, and public transportation, each office will make decisions that will impact our progress one way or the other. And we can’t stop fighting back against the millions of dollars Big Oil and other corporate polluters are pouring in. That’s why my climate PAC always endorses climate champions with a track record of climate action who are committed to prioritizing climate progress in office. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Wes Moore
subject: Virginia
body:
Friend,

With polls closing soon in Virginia, I have a few things to say.

Today’s elections will decide decades of policy in Virginia, from abortion access to voting rights. Not only that, Virginia’s elections will serve as a bellwether for the rest of the country — especially the DMV area.

This past weekend, I spent Saturday in the Commonwealth supporting incredible candidates and getting out the vote from Norfolk to Virginia Beach. Here are a few highlights:

Let me tell you: everywhere I went, the energy and drive just didn’t stop.
Countless organizers, volunteers, and voters have poured their hearts into stopping MAGA extremists and sending strong leadership to Richmond. I was only one of many on the ground the past few days to fight for every last vote.

Friend, we are at our best when we come together like we just did in Virginia. Together, we are building a movement, not a moment.

So no matter what happens in the Commonwealth, we need to bring the same tireless energy to defending our freedoms and rights in next year’s elections, in Maryland and nationwide.

Let’s not just be grateful for the work being done in Virginia, Firstname. Let’s carry it forward.

Elevate,
Wes Moore

body:
Sorry to bump you again, Peter, but I had to make sure that you saw this urgent message from my team.

Since the beginning of 2023, far-right extremists across the nation have introduced a massive number of bills that make it harder to vote – and at least _14 states_ have enacted restrictive voting laws just in time for Election Day.
**_Peter, this is only the beginning._ That's why I'm fighting tooth and nail to ensure that the right to vote remains protected, but to do so effectively, I need to know how people prefer to vote. I need another 65 responses from your area, so please update your record ASAP:**

clean_body: | = = Folks — this weekend, I was honored to march alongside members of the LQGBTAI+ community and allies alike at the Palm Springs Pride Parade. At a time of increasing attacks, violent rhetoric, and discrimination, it is more important than ever for all of us to form a unified front to stand with our LGBTQAI+ family, friends, and neighbors. The new Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, is a far-right extremist with abhorrent views rooted in bigotry: ❌He partnered with a hateful conversion therapy organization. ❌He wants to criminalize gay marriage and even criminalize homosexuality itself. ❌He seeks to empower the government to take trans children from parents that seek to find them gender-affirming care. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = I can’t thank you enough for standing with me in this critical fight. — Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Republicans' false narrative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
the GOP circus is coming to my state
| | |
---
Friend, tomorrow night, the GOP presidential candidates will take the debate stage to spread hateful lies as they attempt to keep Florida red.
I am so incredibly proud to call Florida my home. It’s where I found my calling for public service, where I raised my children, and where I found my own American Dream. It's a place full of diversity, community, beautiful culture, joy, unity, and hope.
That's why it breaks my heart that Republicans have spun a false narrative that Florida is a red state made up of people who subscribe to their hateful ideology. I know that Floridians are anything but that. **We're fiercely independent, and we don't like anyone spreading lies to win votes.**
**Florida is ready for a change. Just look at Rick Scott's last election: He only won this seat by 10,033 votes, just 0.12%!**_(And he had to spend $64 MILLION of his own fortune to do it.)_
**I know that we can win this race. But we need strong grassroots resources to do it. That's why I set a $100,000 goal ahead of tomorrow's debate.**[**Friend, wi****ll you chip in $5 or more right now to help me hit this critical goal and defeat Republican Rick Scott? With our Senate majority on the line, I'm really counting on you to step up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72983204/437011011/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTMxYzZiNjAtYzg3ZC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C78KtbBnD1_4wiXUVnDPFv8TVrkqErjohFZq0MGXD60=)
